C: 「瓦尔特的日志 ████年██月██日。 ███与主角组的人际关系： █——███心中如动画主角般闪闪发光的年轻人，冲吧！ ███——活泼的年轻人，希望她能一直这么想象力丰富，即使做错事了也不希望她太愧疚，年轻人犯点错都是难免的事，有███在可以帮她搞定。 ██——可靠的年轻人，基本不用操心。希望他能多和███聊聊，但如果他不想聊也就这样吧。 ██——可以交付生命的同伴，███相信她会做出最正确的决定。 ██——动画作品中常见的角色，一个看似可爱但实际背景深厚力量强大的生物。 注：如果能回到家乡，考虑把这段经历拍成动画吧。」
E: — Welt's Log ██/██/████. ███'s relationship with the protagonists: █—███'s sparkling personality is just like the protagonist in a cartoon. Go for it! ███ — A lively youth. I hope she can keep being imaginative, and not feel guilty even if she stumbles. Youths are always going to make mistakes, and ███ will be able to support her. ██ — A reliable youth. There's no need to worry about him. I hope he can chat more with ███, but if he doesn't want to, then that's fine. ██ — I can trust this companion with my life, ███ believes she will make the right decision. ██ — A common character in cartoons. Seemingly just a normal creature, but actually possesses frighteningly powerful abilities and a complicated background. Note: If I ever get back home, consider making a cartoon out of this.

C: 「干将•莫邪」——这双剑是男子最趁手的武器，可以反复使用投影魔术制作，无论用坏多少把都毫不心疼。理论上，只要是男子充分理解的武装，都可以被他「无数次投影出赝品」；可出于某些渊源，唯有当投影对象属于「剑」的分类时，男子的投影魔术才能臻于完美。 「听起来很像卖盗版货的商人？啊，差不多就是那样。 「不是什么充满荣誉的手段，但用来对付那些自以为是、用自造的规则骑在别人头上作威作福的家伙，刚好合适。」 传说中，干将与莫邪是一对传奇的铸剑师，夫妇俩穷尽各种方法，试图改变这样的现状：铸剑师无法掌控所铸宝剑的品质，每次锻冶只能听天由命。 故事从这里分裂出许多个版本，其中一种说法是——莫邪以身殉炉，与金属熔液融为一体，让干将得以铸造出前无古人、后无来者的绝世好剑。 而在更负盛名的另一个版本中，暴君因为厌恶铸剑效率的低下而在干将造出宝剑后处死了他，莫邪带着他们的孩子隐匿在乡间；多年以后，这个长大成人的孩子与他在路上偶遇的侠士策划了对暴君的复仇，三人最终同归于尽。 男子的命运是否也与以上的故事有相似之处？如果有，他牺牲的是自己，伙伴，还是某种理想？ 人们不得而知。 人们只知道，为心中之剑，他甘做其骨：以躯为钢，以血为火。 他打造过万千利刃，可最终仍是两手空空，一无所有。 正如他的{RUBY_B#无限剑制}心象风景{RUBY_E#}。 「但这不就是人生吗？ 「剑可无法停留在一个人手上。你要么把它束之高阁，要么把它转交他人，要么…就将它用至最后一刻。 「然后，你才能重新开始。」
E: Kanshou and Bakuya, these twin blades are the man's weapons of choice, continuously reproduced through Projection Magecraft without a second thought for how many break in battle. Theoretically, any armament the man comprehends thoroughly can be "projected as a counterfeit countless times." However, due to some entanglements of karma, the man's Projection magecraft only reaches absolute perfection when creating objects that qualify as "swords." "Sounds like a merchant selling knockoffs? Well, that's about right." "It's hardly the most honorable approach, but it's perfectly tailored for dealing with those self-important types who fabricate rules just to stand above others and exert their authority." According to ancient legend, Kanshou and Bakuya were master swordsmiths. A husband-and-wife duo who exhausted every conceivable method attempting to overcome a fundamental limitation: That craftsmen couldn't control the quality of their forged blades, leaving each creation to fate's whims. From this point, the tale branches into numerous versions. One claims that Bakuya sacrificed herself to the furnace, becoming one with the molten metal, enabling Kanshou to forge blades of unprecedented perfection that would never be equaled. In the more widely celebrated version, a tyrannical ruler, frustrated by the slow pace of sword forging, executed Kanshou after receiving the masterpiece blades. Then, Bakuya escaped to the countryside with their child. Years later, this grown child encountered a wandering swordsman, and together they plotted revenge against the tyrant, a confrontation where all three ultimately perished together. Does the man's own destiny mirror these ancient tales? If similarities exist, what did he ultimately sacrifice? Himself, his companions, or perhaps some cherished ideal? No one knows. What people do know is that he offered himself as its foundation for the sword residing in his heart — His body serving as steel, his blood as flame. Though he crafted thousands of blades throughout his journey, in the end, he stood empty-handed, possessing nothing at all. Just like his {RUBY_B#Unlimited Blade Works}mindscape{RUBY_E#}. "But isn't this precisely what life is about?" "No sword can remain in one person's possession forever. You must either store it away, pass it to another's hands, or... use it until its very last moment." "And only then, can you truly start again with a clean slate."

C: 「玲可为什么会选择成为极地科考队员呢？」 玲可的挚友曾向她提出过这样的问题。彼时的她未有任何头绪，这一玩笑似的提问也便草草了之。 不过，在那之后，玲可也曾无数次地独自思考这一问题的答案——难道是自己对贝洛伯格史前文明或自然地理感兴趣吗？又或是想要逃避冬国围城中无可避免的社交？还是…… 但是，或许就连女孩自己都能没意识到：对于玲可而言，朗道家的事其实都很简单—— 「想去做的话就去。」 姐姐痴迷于自己的爱好，于是成为了机械屋的老板娘和摇滚乐手；哥哥志愿保卫贝洛伯格，于是加入了银鬃铁卫，如今已是大名鼎鼎的戍卫官。 所以，玲可突然向家里人宣布道：「我想去雪原深处看看！」，也只是这么简单的事。 只是因为寒冷就不能去吗？那就做好防寒准备。 只是因为危险就不能去吗？那就做好生存训练。 只是因为没人做过，所以就不能做吗？那玲可来做不就行了。 「毕竟…从起点到目标，不就是这么简单的事吗？」
E: "Why did Lynx choose to become a polar explorer?" Lynx's close friend once asked her this question. At that time, she had no idea how to reply, so she brushed the inquiry off like a joke. However, after that, Lynx also began to think about this question over and over again herself. Was she truly interested in ancient Belobogian history or geography? Or did she actually want to avoid socializing in a city trapped in eternal winter? Or... Or perhaps the girl didn't even realize that, to Lynx, the way Landaus do things is pretty simple. "If you want to do something, go for it." Serval was obsessed with machinery and music, so she ran the workshop and became a rock musician. Gepard wanted to protect Belobog, so he became a Silvermane Guard captain. Therefore, when Lynx suddenly announced to the family: "I want to venture deep into the Snow Plains," it was also simple as that. Afraid of the cold? Then wear something warm. Afraid of the danger? Then learn survival skills. No one's done it before? Then Lynx can be the first one. "After all, isn't it simple to just go from start to goal's end?"

C: 仙舟「罗浮」太卜司之首，自信耿直的智者。\n凭借第三眼与穷观阵为仙舟占算航路，预卜事务吉凶，坚信自己所做的一切便是事情的「最优解」。\n符玄等待着将军承诺的「退位让贤」，然而这一天的到来…似乎还遥遥无期。
E: The head of the Xianzhou Luofu's Divination Commission and a confident, no-nonsense sage. \nUsing her third eye and the Matrix of Prescience, Fu Xuan calculates the Xianzhou's navigational route and predicts the fortune of future events. She firmly believes that everything she does is the "best solution" for the situation.\nFu Xuan is waiting for the general's promised "abdication." However, that day still seems... very far away.

C: 曜青，飞雨湖。 荇藻开着黄花，游鱼在雨丝中跳跃，菱角荷花肆意生长，湖边石滩常有老龟晒背。 狐人少年背着药篓，划着小舟，雨丝顺着他的耳廓流下，又被轻轻甩去。 他捞取荇菜，撷取荷花，剥开鲜嫩的茭白，随手往嘴里扔去。 「甘甜入脾，滋润可口……」 摘毕，他撑起小船，轻盈地越过湖岸，换上了医者的服饰。 …… 医馆内蒸汽氤氲，异香浮动。 「脉象比上次好了些，只是还缺少调养，要不试试我的新药？」 他撤去脉枕和金针，微笑着搬上一套崭新的医具。 老者看着桌上的九宫铁锅，不禁苦笑。 「别人一辈子也搞不出几种新药出来，你倒好，一天就能发明好几种。」 「师父谬赞了，这是名为「九宫格」的鼎镬药式，制作简便，效果奇佳。」 他倒出药篓中的食材，简单清洗后改刀切片，锅里的高汤开始冒泡沸腾。 「一两天锦草，三钱苦木，四厘苁蓉，大骨熬煮，搭配深海贝可驱散苦味，助心神安眠。」「这白鳅和紫鱼片性温，最能滋养气血，只需涮两三秒即可。」 「青菇、银针、雪藕…都是飞雨湖中我以药渣精心培植的作物，除了鲜美之外，兼有药性。」 晶莹的鱼片滑入沸汤，师徒二人大快朵颐，雨天的湿寒一扫而空。 杯盘狼藉之际，老者放下杯筷，仿佛看穿了什么。 「这顿『九宫格』，看起来是醉翁之意不在酒。」 他站了起来，郑重地行了个礼。 「师父敏锐。是否进入丹鼎司，徒儿已有决定。 「丹鼎司虽好，终究和徒儿悬壶济世的心愿不符。要问何处最需要医家，必是曜青征战之地。 「而众多医家之中，唯有我等染指派强调药食同源，以饮食之乐解疾病之苦…『九宫格』之药，方便快捷，祛寒除湿，正是徒儿为战场所特制。 「生死之间，人命至重。倘若我有一方济之，也算不辜负丹鼎司培养之恩。」 老者似有言劝告，但最终却还是咽了下去。 「战场苦寒异常，出发之前，记得…多带些热性的食材。」
E: Rainsoar Lake, the Yaoqing. In the misty rain, yellow floating heart foliage and blossoms decorated the lake as frolicking fishes leaped out of the water from time to time. This lakeside abounds with lotuses and water chestnuts, and old turtles basking on the pebbles were an everyday sight. A foxian youth with a basket for storing harvested ingredients on his back rowed a small boat, raindrops running down his ear before being lightly flicked away. As he scooped up floating heart plants and picked out lotus flowers, he peeled open wild rice stems and threw them casually into his mouth. "So sweet and refreshing, it delights the palate...." After harvesting the plants, he steered the boat to shore and crossed the lakeside with graceful ease before changing into the attire of a healer. ... Inside the apothecary, misty steam hung in the air as tantalizing aromas filled the premises. "Your pulse has become more stable since you last visited, but you should still work on getting more rest and nourishing your body. Care to try one of my new medicines?" With a smile, he put away the wrist cushion and golden needles, bringing out a whole new set of medical tools. As the elderly man gazed at the nine-squared cauldron in front of him, he couldn't help but break into a wry smile. "Others can hardly even invent a few decent medicines in their lifetimes, yet a single day is all you need to achieve that and more." "You flatter me, Master. This cauldron-based medicinal formula is called the 'nine-squared grid.' Not only is it simple to make, but its effects are also wondrous." The youth poured out the ingredients from his basket, cleaning them quickly before slicing them. As he did, the stock inside the cauldron began to bubble and boil. "A tael of euphorbia, three mace of bitterwood, and four cash of desert cistanche... Boil with big bones, then pair with deep sea shellfish to dispel the bitter flavor. The concoction can aid one in achieving peaceful slumber." "As for the white loach and threadfin snapper, their constitution-warming properties are great for nourishing the qi and blood. We need only dip the slices in boiling water for two to three seconds." "These green mushrooms, silver needle tea leaves, and snow lotus roots were all carefully cultivated with decoction dregs by me at Rainsoar Lake. Not only are they tasty and refreshing, but they also offer medicinal benefits." As glistening fish slices met boiling soup, both master and disciple enjoyed a delicious meal that quickly made them forget about the damp coldness of a rainy day. In the aftermath of the meal, the older man put down his chopsticks, seemingly having realized something. "This meal that I've just had, the 'nine-squared grid'... It seems there is more you wish to tell me with this meal than what I'd thought." The youth stood up and solemnly bowed. "Master, you are perceptive indeed. I have long since made up my mind about whether to join the Alchemy Commission." "While the Alchemy Commission is a good place to be, it is ultimately not compatible with my wish to practice medicine for the masses. The one place that requires a healer the most is undeniably the battlefield where the Yaoqing's forces are." "Among the many schools of healers, only practitioners of the Ranzhi School — such as you and me — place emphasis on the tenet of 'food is medicine,' using the joy of food to alleviate the pain of ailments... The 'nine-squared grid,' with its convenience and effectiveness in dispelling the cold that ails one's constitution, was specially made by me to provide succor to those on the battlefield." "For those who yet breathe, there is nothing more important than the preservation of life. If I could deliver the people from pain and suffering with a mere medicinal formula, the Alchemy Commission's time and effort spent in grooming my talents would be well-spent indeed." The elder looked as though he wanted to talk the youth out of his decision, but he ultimately decided against it. "The battlefield is a bitterly cold place... Don't forget to bring more foods that warm the constitution ere you depart."

C: 哀丽秘榭，遗世独立的边陲村落，如今只余晦涩的传说。\n无名的英雄█████，容纳「负世」火种的黄金裔，铭记全世的理想，背负万众的命运，为新世界带来第一缕曙光\n——「但倘若黎明从不存在，就让怒火燃尽此身，化作明日的烈阳！」
E: Aedes Elysiae, a remote frontier village isolated from the world, now lives on only in cryptic legends.\nThe Nameless hero, ████████, the Chrysos Heir holding the Coreflame of "Worldbearing," memorizes the ideals of the entire world, carries the fate of millions, and brings the first light of dawn to the new world\n—"But if dawn should never come, let this fury consume this body, and rise as tomorrow's blazing sun!"

C: 哀丽秘榭，遗世独立的边陲村落，如今只余晦涩的传说。\n无名的英雄卡厄斯兰那，容纳「负世」火种的黄金裔，铭记全世的理想，背负万众的命运，为新世界带来第一缕曙光\n——「但倘若黎明从不存在，就让怒火燃尽此身，化作明日的烈阳！」
E: Aedes Elysiae, a remote frontier village isolated from the world, now lives on only in cryptic legends.\nNameless hero, Khaslana, Chrysos Heir carrying the Coreflame of "Worldbearing," memorizes the ideals of all worlds, carries the fate of multitudes, and brings the first light of dawn to the new world\n—"But should dawn have never existed, let the fires of rage burn this body to ashes and transform into the blazing sun of tomorrow!"

C: 当场上存在4个建木枝梢时，丰饶玄鹿获得韧性保护，消灭任意建木枝梢后解除韧性保护效果。
E: Abundant Ebon Deer gains Toughness Protection when there are 4 Ambrosial Arbor branches on the field. Defeat any Ambrosial Arbor branch to remove the Toughness Protection effect.

C: 抵达监控室的二人面对的却是不在此处的空间站主人随手留下的迷阵。\n「用奇物来隐藏奇物，的确是那女人会干的事情。」\n但很多时候即便猜到了手法，你也猜不到故事的结局。
E: The two arrive at the Monitoring Room to find a maze left by the absent space station's owner.\n"Using a Curio to hide another Curio sounds like something she would do."\nBut oftentimes, knowing the way does not equate to knowing how it ends.

C:
为了逃脱追捕，你们冲进了裂界。可你们怎会突然沦落至此？三月七也无法解释，因为她的人设只是一位单纯可爱的少女。
不过，你们迅速达成共识：当务之急是找到裂界的出口，其他事项等离开这片险地再作商议。
在逃跑过程中被第二道铁门拦住去路简直是再正常不过的事情了…然而，这次有怪物在铁门开关附近游荡。
打倒怪物，闯过这道关卡吧！
E:
You rush into the Fragmentum to avoid getting caught. How come things went downhill so quickly? March 7th has no clue — she's written as an innocent and sweet teenage girl after all.
Despite the initial shock, you quickly agree on the course of action: Find the way out of the Fragmentum first. Everything else can wait.
Being blocked by a second gate while trying to escape is so cliche... However, there are monsters wandering around the gate switch this time.
Defeat the monsters and clear the stage!

C: 深入矿区的路途中，你可以听到惊叫哭喊始终此起彼伏、不绝于耳——看来此处事态已至危殆，你必须对沿途逃难的矿民伸出援手。\n前进途中，你们听到从矿道深处传来的争吵之声，或许是当地的矿民遇上了麻烦…\n小心应战，保证矿民们的安全！
E: On the way deeper into the mines, you can hear the constant screams in the distance. It is obvious that things have gotten pretty serious, you must help the fleeing miners along the way.\nYou hear people arguing from deeper inside the mines. Maybe the local miners have run into trouble...\nBe careful and guarantee the safety of the miners!

C: 在和同伴充分交换意见之后，你们很快得出结论：当下最要紧之事务应是回到旅店房间好好睡一觉，回头再去请教「地火」的想法。\n这听起来确实是有点扯，但你如何能拒绝长途跋涉和艰苦战斗之后的柔软床垫呢？\n休息是为了走更长远的路——每个旅人都应该明白这一浅显的道理，包括你在内。
E: After an exchange of ideas and opinions, you quickly come up with a conclusion: The most urgent matter at hand is to return to the hotel and get a good night's sleep. You'll find out what the Wildfire thinks later.\nIt may not sound like the most heroic thing to do, but a soft and fluffy mattress after hard fights and toil is simply too much of a temptation.\nA short break goes a long way towards preparing for the journey ahead. This is true for every traveler, and you are no exception.

C: 抵达仙舟「罗浮」，等待列车的只有空无一人的港口。\n也许说「空无一人」不太准确，形如失心怪物的魔阴身肆意横行，一位娇俏的狐族少女身陷危地。救美之事岂能让他人专美于前？\n眼前罗浮上的纷乱祸因，恐怕也只有随这位狐女一同离开此处才能得到答案。
E: Upon arriving at the Xianzhou Luofu, only an empty port welcomes the Express.\nPerhaps "empty" is not entirely accurate. Soulless mara-struck monsters are running rampant, and a delicate foxian girl is in danger. How can you let others have the glory of saving a damsel in distress?\nIt seems the only way to get any answers about the cause of the Luofu's chaotic situation is to leave this place with the foxian girl.

C: 看来列车组的所有人都对美梦游乐园期待已久——除了丹恒——他喜欢安静的地方，你早就看出他对游乐园过敏了。\n列车广播预示跃迁即将启动，是时候回到你的唯一指定跃迁等待位上了。
E: It seems that everyone has been looking forward to a trip to the Dream Amusement Park for a long time — Everyone except Dan Heng — He prefers quiet places, and you have already witnessed his allergy to amusement parks.\nThe Express's announcement system stated that the warp jump is about to begin. It's time for you to get back to your designated waiting position.

C: 经历了漫无止境的入境申报和大大小小十几道检查（尽管这些事听起来像是发生在一瞬间，但你确实经历过了），你和三月七终于抵达了金碧辉煌的「白日梦」酒店大堂。\n三月七难掩激动的心情，飞快奔向前台——你最好赶紧跟上她。
E: After endless immigration declarations and over a dozen inspections of varying intensity (though it sounds like a quick process, you have been through all of this before and know better), you and March 7th finally arrive at the lobby of the magnificent Reverie hotel.\nMarch 7th cannot control her excitement and rushed to the reception desk... You should probably stay close to her.

C: 解决了钟表小子的大危机，你与众人道别。接下来该接着前往流萤的「秘密据点」了——如果你还记得。
E: After resolving Clockie's crisis, you say farewell to everyone. Next, it's onward to Firefly's "secret stronghold"... If you still remember that.

C: 你们几乎没有遭到任何阻碍就潜入了家族议事厅中。这里看起来就像是个能找到机密文件的地方，想必你们一定能有所收获。\n多多益善，反正没人出来制止，你们再到处翻翻应该也捅不出多大的篓子…吧？
E: You two manage to sneak into The Family's council chamber almost unhindered. It looks like a place laden with confidential documents, so you two can surely find something here.\nThe more the better. Since no one is stopping you, it shouldn't cause too much trouble if you keep poking around, right?

C: 你终于找到了线索——一群把猴子当祖宗供起来的小可爱。这年头，什么东西都能当祖宗，这次是猴子，下次是香蕉，搞不好有一天你也会成为他们的祖宗。\n想办法进他们的地盘看看。想不到办法？你腰上别的可不是玩具。
E: You have finally discovered some clues: A bunch of lil' fudgeheads worshiping monkeys as their ancestors. Now, anything can be an ancestor... monkeys, bananas, heck, even you might end up in their family tree someday.\nFigure out a way to infiltrate their turf. Struggling? Don't sweat, the pistols in your pockets aren't no playthings.

C: 你费了好大工夫，才让被家族管控的迷因把你送到了这个鸟不拉屎的地方。这里没看到什么目标的线索，天气差得要命，但麦芽果汁还凑合。\n外面的人吵个不停，可能是欠爱了。
E: You spent a great amount of effort to get the meme controlled by The Family to send you to this dump. Not much here looks helpful, and the weather's been a nightmare, but hey, the malt juice ain't half bad.\nThose sons of a nice lady causing a ruckus outside need some serious chill pills.

C: 这群猴子小可爱搞的蕉皮玩意儿满地都是，这该死的地方也没有环卫工——所以，你不介意帮这儿的人们打扫卫生。\n扫帚就是你手里的枪。
E: These lil' fudgin' monkeys are tossing banana peels everywhere like it's nobody's business. Since there's no janitor in this dump, you might as well lend a hand in cleaning up.\nWith your pistols as your broom, of course.

C: 细数往事，清除隐患，该离开艾迪恩公园了——回望，随后前进，人一生中能做的或许只有这两件事。
E: You've reflected on the past and eliminated the lurking danger. It's time to leave Aideen Park... Look back, then continue onwards. Perhaps these are the only two things a person can ever do in life.

C: 我们与被称作黄金裔的翁法罗斯人发生了初次接触，并跟随两位黄金裔进入神殿进行探索。他们声称来此是为了营救难民，但是在难民中似乎发生了冲突。
E: We had initial contact with the people of Amphoreus known as the Chrysos Heirs, then followed two of them into the Temple to explore. They claimed their purpose here was to rescue the refugees, yet there seemed to be tension and strife among the people.

C: 好在「粉霞天女」风波结束得够快，黄金裔们暂未发觉。为感谢我们先前从尼卡多利手中保护奥赫玛，阿格莱雅似有谢礼要送。
E: Fortunately, the "Rosy Celestial Maiden" fiasco was quickly resolved before the Chrysos Heirs discovered it. As a token of gratitude for saving Okhema from Nikador, Aglaea seems to have prepared a special gift for us.

C: 经过一路的观察，遐蝶揭穿卡吕普索的真面目，指出其人正是{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}。瑟希斯承认身份，委托{NICKNAME}等人助它前往那刻夏所在之处，将火种再度熔合，以便缉拿树庭覆灭的元凶——无名的黑袍剑士。
E: After careful observation, Castorice exposes Calypso's true identity as {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}. Cerces admits to this and asks {NICKNAME}'s group to help them reach Anaxa, so they can fuse the Coreflame again to catch the culprit behind the annihilation of the Grove — the nameless black-robed swordmaster.

C: 你决绝地否定了悬锋人千载的荣耀执念，决定独自还乡，接下尼卡多利抗击黑潮的使命。在迈上回乡之路之前，你还需与城中的友人们一一作别。
E: You decisively reject the Kremnoans' centuries-old obsession with glory, opting to return home alone and assume Nikador's duty against the black tide. Before starting your homeward journey, you need to say goodbye to your friends in the city.

C: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n一切都指向斯缇科西亚最高处的塔，那里曾留下过巨龙的痕迹。
E: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nEverything points to the highest towers at Styxia. There, remains left by the great dragon linger.

C: 冥界…果真如传说那样，是一片花海。\n世人皆知灰黯之手，却鲜有人知晓塞纳托斯的另一只手——如今，你们终于相遇了。\n跟随着塞纳托斯前进，顺道一观她看顾的这片花海吧。
E: Just as the legends say... The nether realm is truly a sea of flowers.\nEveryone knows of the Hand of Shadow, but few know of Thanatos's other hand — And now, you have finally met each other.\nProceed with Thanatos, and behold the sea of flowers that she watches over.

C: 此时，{NICKNAME}与白厄正在树庭继续着他们的意象训练。把力气用光后，友爱之馆的丰富馆藏将他们的视线吸引了过去…
E: Right now, {NICKNAME} and Phainon are deep in their imagery training at the Grove. After spending all their strength, their gaze drifts to the vast collection in the Library of Philia...

C: 将{NICKNAME}与白厄接送至树庭后，赛飞儿找来「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，回到冥滩一阵搜刮…
E: After dropping {NICKNAME} and Phainon off at the Grove, Cipher rounded up the "Spirithief", Bartholos, and returned to the Nethershore for a bit of scavenging...

C:
你还记得吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
在那酣醉的迷梦中，山高而陡峻，你看见了自己。
相信我吧，后来的观众啊，他就在那山巅与众人欢歌。
残缺的黄金裔，还有畸形的半神们，他们同他歌唱，旋飞舞，脚跺地。
欧呵！恐惧令他的心震颤：神谕充满每一颗灵魂，狂喜而迷乱。
欧呵！请宽恕他们吧，卡厄斯兰那，请宽恕他们——你那无匹的烈焰令人胆寒！
就让他们歌唱不知疲倦的英雄，歌唱再创世，那酒与蜜奔腾之地。
歌唱他如何在星辰当中加增荣光，永恒之城如何轰然陨落。
奥赫玛人、悬锋城，还有他们所知的一切血脉如何毁灭。
至于卡厄斯兰那——他就在那酣醉的迷梦中，陡峭的山巅！
他用血点燃火焰，火焰点燃血，似太阳逼迫一切邪恶无法抵近。
山高而陡峻，他就在那里独自狂欢，起舞，永不停歇。
但一切皆为徒劳：火焰不倦，黎明也无缘。
一切皆为徒劳：火焰不倦，黎明也无缘。
E:
Do you still remember, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?
In that drunken dream, the mountains loomed high and steep — and there, you saw yourself.
Believe me, O future witness — he stood atop that peak, and the people sang with him in ecstasy.
The broken Chrysos Heirs, the twisted demigods — they sang, they spun, they stamped their feet upon the ground with him.
Hail! Terror struck his heart: Prophecy burned in every soul, wild with rapture and madness.
Hail! Spare them, Khaslana, spare them — your peerless flame sends chills down every spine!
Let them sing of the tireless heroes, sing of the Era Nova, sing of that land where wine and honey flow in torrents.
Let them sing how he wove new glory among the stars, and how the Eternal City crashed to dust.
How Okhemans, Castrum Kremnos, and every lineage they knew were destroyed.
As for Khaslana — He is still within the drunken dreams, upon the sheer and jagged peak!
There he lights flame with blood, and blood with flame, like a sun whose blaze banished all evil from its path.
The mountains rise cruel and steep. Yet still he dances there alone, wild and unceasing in his joy.
Yet all proves futile — the flames know no weariness, and dawn is beyond reach.
All proves futile — the flames know no weariness, and dawn is beyond reach.

C: 当时本来想做从电视里钻出来的特效的，可惜，监狱里的拍摄条件不太允许——但我在重置版里把这个拍出来了！
E: Originally, I wanted special effects that seemed like they crawled right out of the TV screen, but the filming conditions in the prison didn't quite allow for that. What a shame... Don't worry, I got this in the remake!

C: 人们说，这是一个金血晕染鲜血的残酷时代，这是一个海啸山崩下衰颓的灾难时代，这是一个昏君践踏律法的暴虐时代，这是一个神与信徒都被屠戮的黑暗时代。这就是第一次逐火之旅的时代，这个时代有一颗灼热的太阳，燃烧着令人目盲的光。\n而你要直视它，请它把你要的火点亮。
E: People say this is a cruel era stained with golden blood and crimson, an era of catastrophe where tsunamis rage and mountains crumble, an era of tyranny where corrupt rulers trample the law, a dark era where both gods and their faithful are slaughtered. This is the era of the First Flame-Chase Journey, an era with a scorching sun that burns with blinding light.\nAnd you must gaze directly into it, asking it to illuminate the fire you seek.

C: 在这里你将听不见人声，看不见人影；太阳的闪烁的火焰会把你烤焦，使你的皮肤失掉颜色；直到满天星斗的夜遮住了阳光，或太阳出来化去了晨霜，你才松快。这眼前的苦难将永远折磨你；没有人救得了你。\n——但你已经把火留下了，那是解放他们的火。而解放你的火，早就在过去点亮了。
E: Here, you'll hear no human voices, see no human shadows. The sun's flickering flames will scorch you, draining the color from your skin. Only when the starlit night shields you from sunlight, or when the Sun rises to melt away the morning frost, will you find relief. These present hardships will torture you forever, and no one can save you.\nBut you have left behind the fire... the fire that will liberate them. And the fire meant to free you was illuminated long ago.

C: 小三月到底会怎么样…坐在那里的，究竟是小三月，还是长夜月？
E: What will happen to March... Who's really sitting there? Is it March, or Evernight?

C: 烈阳焚毁了神悟树庭之下的祭坛，那是「大地」的封印。在我到达神悟树庭之后，这里俨然已受到了「记忆」的影响，「毁灭」既是偶然也是必然，我必须继续前进，深入迷雾之中。\n海瑟音揭露了事实，那神秘的山之民并非是真正的荒笛。
E: The Blazing Sun ravaged the altar beneath the Grove of Epiphany, which was the seal of "Earth." By the time I arrived, the Grove was already warped by the Remembrance. Destruction is accidental, yet inevitable. I must press on, deeper into the mist.\nHysilens revealed the truth that the mysterious Mountain Dweller was not the real Terravox.

C:
丹恒，你最信任的列车护卫，「开拓」之旅中最靠谱的伙伴。
他接受了「大地」的神权，只为与你，与黄金裔的伙伴们一起，并肩面对新世界，以及即将到来的决战——仅仅是知道他回到了翁法罗斯，就让你多了一份、不，一百份的安心感。

当他的神识深入无人可及的忆潮中时，他既是层岩，他也是海浪，他还是霜风…
他是大地，亦是其上的万物。
他为你而来，现在你们要为小三月而去。

烈阳已经指明了方向，继续前进吧。
E:
Dan Heng, your most trusted Express Guard, and the most reliable companion on your Trailblaze journey.
He accepted Earth's divine authority, solely to stand alongside you and the Chrysos Heir friends, facing the new world and the impending final clash together. Just knowing he's back in Amphoreus gives you not just one, but a hundred times more peace of mind.

When his consciousness delves into the memoria tide where no one else can reach, he is the bedrock, the waves, and the frosty gales...
He is the Earth and all that exists upon it.
He came for you, and now you will both go for March.

The blazing sun has shown the way. Press onward.

C: 按照黑塔制定的作战计划，列车组众人将深入翁法罗斯内部，与银河联军里应外合，共同击败「铁墓」。
E: According to Herta's battle plan, the Express Crew will infiltrate deep into Amphoreus and coordinate with the Cosmic Alliance in a pincer attack to defeat Irontomb together.

C: 如果德谬歌无力改变实验结果，如果机器头计算的答案是自身毁灭……不，没有这些如果。\n与「智识」接轨的条件已经齐备，并非觐见，而是加冕。求解宇宙的未来，锚定名为黑塔的「时刻」。\n朝闻道，夕死可矣。
E: If Demiurge is powerless to alter the experiment's results... if Droidhead's calculations point to THEIR own Destruction... No, there are no "ifs."\nThe conditions for linking with Erudition are complete. It's not an audience, but a coronation. I will decipher the universe's future and anchor Herta's "Instant."\nIf one could know the Truth at dawn, one can die at dusk without regret.

C:
我来为你讲述「迷路迷境」的故事吧：哀丽秘榭的树林里，住着一群可爱的小朋友，它们的名字能连成一首歌谣——
一、二、三、四、五、六、七♪
哆、徕、咪、发、嗦、啦、嘻♪
生命微种萌蘖于无瑕忆中。心灵最柔软处，由哀怜触动的真挚颤抖，就是「生命的因」。
E:
Let me tell you the story of "Membrance Maze": A group of cute little friends live in Aedes Elysiae's forests. Their names can be connected into a song...
One, two, three, four, five, six, seven ♪
Do, re, mi, fa, sol, la, ti ♪
Tiny seeds of life sprout within pristine memories. In the most tender corners of the heart, that genuine shiver stirred by lament... That's the "mover of life."

C: 前往监控室调取幕后黑手的影像， 一旦锁定目标，你将第一时间前去质问他的动机。
E: Go to the Monitoring Room and pull up videos of the hand behind it all. You will go and question his motives once a target is confirmed.

C: 至此，事件终于告一段落。对于这个结果，你并不意外——不如说现在这样，才更符合你对黑塔的认知。
E: At this point, the incident has finally come to an end. You are not surprised by this outcome — rather, this is now more in line with your perception of the Herta Space Station.

C: 你在裂界中发现了一个神态异常的小女孩，希莉儿。\n希莉儿在被眼前的箱子谜题困扰——你帮助她解决了这个难题。\n和希莉儿谈谈，看能不能得到更多与她的身世有关的信息。
E: You find a strange little girl, Cyrille, in the Fragmentum.\nShe's troubled by an Armory Box puzzle in front of her — you helped her solve it.\nTalk to Cyrille, and see if you can learn more about her past.

C: 你已经成为这地下世界令万千矿车工瞩目的超级新星——在贝洛伯格矿业史上，还从来没有哪位能像你一样迅速熟练掌握调度矿车的技巧…尽管你只是个助教。\n矿车是什么？它从哪里来？要到哪里去？这是使所有矿车工为之困扰的终极三问，而你距离揭晓谜底仅一步之遥。\n问题的答案就藏在矿车工老师傅准备的最终测试里——去问问他准备得如何了吧。
E: You have become a superstar in the Underworld and have caught the attention of thousands of miners. Throughout Belobog's history, no one else has mastered the art of directing mine carts as quickly as you... Even though you were only supposed to be an assistant instructor.\nWhat is a mine cart? Where does it come from? Where should it go? These are the holy trinity of questions that haunt all miners. You are only one step away from uncovering the answer.\nThe answer to this question is embedded deep into the final test that the senior mine cart operator has prepared for you. Let's see what he has in store for you.

C: 孤儿院与裂界侵蚀来袭的方向最为接近，这里怪物出没，务必得保证虎克大人的安全。\n虎克大人拿出了洞洞机随时准备对付怪物，真是个可靠的小姑娘。不过，击退怪物的事就交给大人来做吧。
E: The orphanage is the closest to the Fragmentum corrosion. Monsters are lurking in this place, so you need to protect Hook.\nHook takes out her Diggertron to deal with them. What a reliable girl! But she can leave these monsters to the grown-ups.

C: 根据《冒险鼹鼠队》的目录来看，<color=#dbc291ff>还有3个章节隐藏在边缘通路、铆钉镇、以及铁卫禁区。</color>找到了缺失的书页就能找到宝藏的线索，如果有什么不清楚的，还可以和尤利安再商量商量。一旦将它们收集齐后，就去找尤利安聊聊吧。
E: Based on the table of contents of The Adventurous Moles, there are still 3 chapters hidden at Backwater Pass, Rivet Town, and the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone respectively. If you find these missing pages, you can find clues to the treasure. Ask Julian if you have any questions. Once you've collected everything, talk to Julian.

C: 你和佩拉成功找回了足够数量的零件，应该可以重现「齿轮与智慧」的样貌了。\n回到博物馆的工业展区，完成拼装吧。
E: Pela and you successfully recovered enough parts to re-create what Gears and Wisdom looks like.\nReturn to the Industrial Exhibit in the museum and re-assemble it.

C: 根据名侦探三月七的推理，如果罗刹在这里用足足两个小时才完成了交易，那就说明这里一定凶险异常，到处都是怪物。\n嗯？这不是个推理故事吗？怎么塞了这么多场战斗？
E: According to Genius Detective March 7th's deduction, if Luocha spent two whole hours to complete the trade, it must mean it is super dangerous, with monsters all around.\nHmm? Isn't this a detective story? Why are there so many combat fillers?

C: 正当我随着剑痕残迹一路寻去，有位姐姐被几只魔阴身围困。真是怪了，云骑军封锁港口，怎么还有旅客困在这儿？罢了罢了，她孤身一人难免遇险，少不得在完成任务前我得护送她走上一段路。可惜她眼罩黑纱，似乎目不视物，看来无缘见识我舞剑的英姿了。
E: When I follow the sword marks, a lady was trapped by several Mara-struck monsters. Odd, with the Cloud Knights locking the port, why are there travelers being stuck here? She would be in danger traveling alone, I should escort her to safety before completing my mission. It's a shame that her eyes are covered with a black cloth, so she won't be able to see my graceful swordsmanship.

C: 必须承认，这回是我看走眼了。尽管我勉力追赶，但连她的影子也没摸到…只见到一地的孽物残骸。这般身手，她究竟是什么人？为什么要来为难我这样的小孩子？
E: I have to say, I underestimated her. Even at my full speed, I couldn't even see her silhouette... Only bodies of abominations piling up. Who is she? Why does she want to make life difficult for a child like me?

C: 丹恒出现在这段记忆中倒是不算意外，只是他突然间就摆出一副「没时间解释了，快上车」的架势，让三月七吓了一跳。\n这样也好，有个引路人总好过自己在记忆中漫无目的地搜索。
E: It isn't surprising to see Dan Heng in this memory, but March 7th is rather startled to see him acting in a way that screams "there's no time to explain. Hurry and get onto the Express!"\nThis isn't too bad. Having a guide is better than her searching alone aimlessly in her memories.

C: 铜镜中传出雪衣的声音，可这些声音似乎真真假假，难以分辨。也许只有藿藿这样的当事人才能自其中廓清虚实。
E: Xueyi's voice comes from the mirror, but it's hard to tell whether these voices are real. Perhaps only someone involved like Huohuo could possibly clarify the truth.

C: 在丹鼎司新任司鼎的斡旋下，你们顺利打发了来自公司专员的责难，随她一同前往丹鼎司小叙。但这场未期的谈话却再起波折，与彦卿交锋的少女剑客早已等候多时。
E: Under the mediation of the newly appointed Alchemy Commission's Cauldron Master, you all successfully fended off the accusatory blame from the IPC Specialist, after which you had a chat with her at the Alchemy Commission. But more speed bumps threatened this doomsday talk, for the swordswoman had been waiting long for a showdown with Yanqing.

C: 按照飞霄的要求，你们踏入幽囚狱留下证词。而她派出的曜青信使将自罗浮仙舟接走关押在此许久的步离人首领，呼雷。
E: In light of Feixiao's request, you stepped into the Shackling Prison and left your statements. The Yaoqing messenger that she dispatched whisked away the long-detained borisin leader, Hoolay, who was being held on the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 你进入了莱斯利•迪恩的心绪空间。\n找到构建出这个联觉梦境的人们，然后解放他们吧。
E: You have entered Lesley Dean's Emoscape.\nFind the creators of this Synesthesia Dreamscape and free them from their obsessions.

C: 你已经尽己所能帮助了罗伯特，但愿他能从这个梦境中醒来。\n离开这里，去找到下一个沉溺之人吧。
E: You have done what you can to aid Robert. Perhaps he will awaken from his dream.\nLeave this place and find the next creator.

C: 柯柯娜在梦境酒店遗落了一张唱片，你答应了将它取回。
E: Cocona left a record at the hotel in the Dreamscape, and you promised to retrieve it for her.

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 螺丝咕姆与你一同展开了对查德威克真实经历的调查。\n通过螺丝咕姆的交涉，家族同意让你们检视查德威克入住的客房。
E: Screwllum joins you in the investigation of Chadwick's past.\nThanks to Screwllum's negotiation, The Family has accepted your request to check Chadwick's room.

C: 忙碌如大堂经理也需要一些时间调整状态，缓和心情。\n等你准备好了就继续工作吧，客人不知道什么时候就会找上门来。
E: Even a busy lobby manager needs occasional breaks to relax and unwind.\nReturn to your work when you feel ready, as guests may arrive at any moment.

C: 猜猜看是谁回来了，原来是太卜司符玄大人啊。\n说真的，有人记得符玄大人这段时间在出差吗？\n赶得早不如赶得巧，现在该欢迎符玄大人凯旋而归了。
E: Guess who's back? Turns out it's Master Diviner Fu Xuan!\nSeriously though, did anyone actually remember that Lady Fu Xuan was on a business trip?\nWell, it looks like your timing worked out perfectly. Make sure you welcome Lady Fu Xuan on her triumphant return.

C: 记忆的舞台从纷争的剑下来到了负世的座下，危险与灾厄暂且远离了这段往事，你接下来或许可以欣赏一段没那么沉重的故事。但你要知道，以厮杀与苦难作为进场歌的戏剧，往往也以此作为退场——逛街，促进感情的好方式，无论在哪个时代、哪个世界，都是如此。\n「迅速接受情人是可耻的，应该经过一段时间，因为时间对于许多事物常常是最好的考验。」
E: The stage of this memory has transitioned from under Strife's blade to beneath Worldbearing's seat. The threat and disaster have subsided for now, and maybe you might even be able to immerse yourself in a slightly less heavy story. But you must be aware that any play that begins with slaughter and suffering often meets a similar end... Shopping — it is a wonderful way to increase intimacy in any world or time.\n"It is shameful to accept a lover too quickly. One must take their time — as time is often the best test."

C: 迷路的呜呜伯看上去不太聪明的样子，还是回去反馈确认一下情况吧！
E: The lost Wubbaboo doesn't seem to be the sharpest tool in the shed. Let's go back and report the situation!

C: 传言贝洛伯格的郊外还有冰原狼活动的痕迹，动物学专家莉拉需要你帮助她完成雪原生态调查。要找的痕迹有皮毛、脚印，还有…粪便？
E: Rumor has it that direwolf tracks have been found on the outskirts of Belobog. Lila needs your help with an ecological survey in the Snow Plains. She needs fur, footprints, and... feces?

C: 你又找到了一张「垃圾大王」的明信片，希望这能让亚诺满意。
E: You find another postcard from "Garbage King." Hopefully, Amo will be satisfied with it.

C: 你没有找到「信鸽」，却发现了一个可疑的纸团，去找阿丽娜聊聊看吧。
E: You didn't find a pigeon, but you found a suspicious paper ball. Go talk to Alina.

C: 为了尤利安筹划的「鼹鼠党振兴计划」，你得尽快把手里这箱物资送到大矿区去。
E: To help Julian with his Moles' Reinvigoration Plan, you must quickly deliver this box of supplies to the Great Mine.

C: 前往上层区的公告板处，看看「正当权益会社」是否有新的委托吧。
E: Go to the noticeboard in the Overworld and see whether the Rightful Rights Society has any new commissions.

C: 金人巷的客流量持续增长，光顾杜氏茶庄的客人也日益增多。杜老板对自家茶庄多年来的招牌单品「烈焰浓茶」十分满意，但近期却不断收到客人的意见……\n杜老板决心迎合客人们的口味，为茶庄研发一些新品。不过，在新品上市前，他还需要听听你的意见……
E: As Aurum Alley's clientele continues to grow, so too do those visiting Du's Teahouse. Boss Du is specially proud of his tea shop's signature Flaming Potent Tea, but in recent days, he keeps getting negative feedback from his customers...\nBoss Du is determined to meet the customer's tastes and develop some new teas for his business. However, before he can release these new drinks to the public, he still wants to hear your opinion...

C: 佩佩的坐标停留在当前舱段，不知道究竟发生了什么，艾丝妲拜托你前去与佩佩汇合。
E: Peppy's coordinates indicate that it is stuck in the current area. Not knowing what is happening, Asta asks you to meet up with Peppy.

C: 没想到艾丝妲为佩佩定制了如此神奇的同步功能…你和佩佩以全新的形态出击，继续追查丢失奇物的下落.
E: Asta has developed an incredible synchronization feature for Peppy... Now you and Peppy can venture out in a new form and continue to track down the lost Curio.

C: 浮烟喜欢以「棋子」喻人、以「棋局」喻势…而你需要做的便是在棋坪之上击败它。
E: Cirrus likes to use analogies such as "pawns" and "chess" to describe people and situations... And what you need to do is to defeat it on the chessboard.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 有了众人提供的线索，那女孩的行踪便不难追查。小小年纪就不学好，是该好好教育一下。
E: With the clues you've gathered from everyone, the girl should not be hard to find. Behaving like this at a young age... she needs to learn a good lesson.

C: 你找到了那女孩的藏身处，这里的记忆浓度很高，似乎凝结着某段不愿遗忘的过往。
E: You found the girl's hiding place. The memories are extremely concentrated here as if there is a condensed memory that is not willing to be forgotten.

C: 部分悬锋族人打算返回家乡，并带走这头大地兽，去看看事情的后续进展吧。
E: Some Kremnoans plan to return home and wish to take this dromas. Go see how things are unfolding with them.

C: 柯库翁提出可以用散落各处的盾牌先搭出街垒的雏形。四处看看，收集盾牌、搭建壁垒吧。
E: Glykon stated that you can use the scattered shields to create the shape of prototypical fortress. Look around, collect shields, and build a fortification.

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助进行一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to carry out a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助进行一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to carry out a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 照片中的黑影有些眼熟，应该是主控舱段中的某样东西……
E: The shady object in the photo looks somewhat familiar. It must be something from the master control zone...

C: 照片中的黑影有些眼熟，应该是贝洛伯格上层区中的某样东西……
E: The shadowy object in the photo looks somewhat familiar. It must be something from the Belobog Overworld...

C: 在西衍先生的故事中，鳞渊境的龙尊造像竟活了过来，还给你安排了各种试炼。抛开科学不谈，和一尊造像聊天，这事儿还挺酷的。\n龙尊造像请你帮它清除掉一个满怀恶意的蜃影。照理来说，「蜃影」这东西不会伤人、也无法伤人，但毕竟是西衍先生的评书，发生什么都不奇怪。
E: In Mr. Xiyan's story, the Statue of the High Elder in Scalegorge Waterscape comes to life, and even gives you all sort of trials to go through. Forget about the scientific realism of it all, it's pretty cool to talk with a statue.\nThe Statue of the High Elder asks you to help it get rid of a malicious Mirage Echo. Normally, Mirage Echoes can't and won't hurt people. But this is inside Mr. Xiyan's story. Anything is possible.

C: 小秘书似乎有什么要紧事要告诉你，不会是斯科特卷土归来了吧？\n金人巷复兴并不容易，你已经感受到了。
E: Miss Secretary seems to have something urgent to tell you. It can't be Skott's reckoning, can it?\nThe revival of Aurum Alley is no easy task, and you're beginning to feel the full weight of the efforts demanded.

C: 驭空告诉了你要「重组商会」的商户代表，如果能够说服霄老大，肯定能赢得不少商户的支持。\n霄老大是同功坊的店主，到那里去和霄老大聊聊吧。
E: Yukong told you that you need to "reassemble" the merchant guild's representatives. If you can convince Mr. Xiao, you'll win the support of many business owners.\nMr. Xiao is the owner of Artistry Hardware. Head there and speak with him.

C: 金人巷商会有意借助「尚滋味」的名气宣传「金人巷复兴」的态度，你自告奋勇要担任「推广大使」，可得肩负起责任。\n拍摄宣传材料，也是振兴罗浮夜市重要的一步。
E: The Aurum Alley Merchant Guild wishes to use Spices Supreme's renown to promote their attitudes of "revitalizing Aurum Alley." As you have volunteered to be the "Promotional Ambassador," you must be able to bear the responsibilities of your duties.\nShooting promotional material is an important step of reviving the Luofu's night market.

C: 黑塔、阮•梅、螺丝咕姆和斯蒂芬，联手推出了模拟宇宙的第一次大更新！天才们对做项目各有各的想法，塞了不少好东西进去。斯蒂芬做了些「觐见之骰」，来让这场测试更加有趣。据他所称，其中封存着不同命途的「力量」，这对你觐见星神有大用处。说真的…他是认真在研究星神，还是在做游戏？
E: Herta, Ruan Mei, Screwllum, and Stephen have joined forces to bring about the Simulated Universe's first major update! The geniuses added a substantial influx of fun content from all their various ideas. Stephen created some Audience Dice to add a bit more spice to this test. According to him, the dice hold "powers" connected to different Paths, and is conducive to ensuring that you meet with the Aeons. Honestly, though, it's hard to tell if he's actually investigating the Aeons... or just trying to make a game.

C: 模拟宇宙的内存竟比黑塔想的还有限！数据封装已近上限，它快要停止运行了。黑塔准备跟你一起最后做个总结，赶紧把之前的星神数据都存储起来。给这次的测试成果收个尾——再次遍历祂们的光辉吧。
E: The Simulated Universe's storage was more limited than Herta expected! The data packs are at their limit and soon, the entire thing is going to stop working. Herta is prepared to see this thing through to the end by your side. Hurry and save all the previous Aeon data and ensure a proper end to this test before experiencing THEIR glory once more.

C: 击败公司员工后，你们获得了意外的收获...不过要想在庆典中拿下冠军，首先得学习「以太战线玩家终端」的使用方法。
E: You receive surprise rewards after defeating the IPC workers... However, if you want to take the championship crown in the festival, you gotta first learn how to use the Aetherium Wars Player Terminal.

C: 青雀说「沙盘当然有第二种解法」，现在就按照她的想法在沙盘中就位吧。
E: Qingque says the sand table always holds an alternative solution. Follow her instructions and arrive at your destined position in the sand table.

C: 一切尘埃落定，该是你们例行在「罗浮杂俎」上发布帖子的时候了。
E: Regardless, the incident has been resolved. It is time to post on Ghostly Grove, as per usual.

C: 机巧鸟、藏月瓠和…快递箱，这组合可真够简单粗暴……\n不过能收伏岁阳的发明就是好发明，先试着操作一下吧。
E: A cycrane, a Lunaumbra Gourd, and a... courier package. That's sure a simple and brutal way to go about it...\nBut an invention is useful as long as it does its job. Try control it for a bit.

C: 光培育不养可不行，造物们也该学学空间站的规矩了。保姆机器人建议你用喷漆的方式为划分功能区域，这样便于它们定期维护打理。\n说到休息区，哪里适合充当休息区呢？
E: Just nurturing them without teaching them is no good. Time for the creations to learn the rules of the space station. The Helper Robot suggests using sprayed symbols to divide out functional areas, which would help them to better tidy up the place regularly.\nSpeaking of which, where would be best to put our Rest Area?

C: 艾丝妲为造物们添置了一批睡眠用品，小家伙们也需要休息，试着将它们转移到舒适的窝里吧。\n不用想就知道，这种在价格标签上被列为「宠物用品」的玩意儿肯定是艾丝妲自掏腰包的成果。
E: Asta has bought a stack of sleeping supplies for the creations. The little ones need to rest too, so try moving them to a comfortable cot.\nYou knew without asking that all these things listed as "pet supplies" had to be paid for out of Asta's own pocket.

C: 混乱的梦境卷走了美梦小镇赖以生存的物资。你必须深入梦中，将这些物资一一找回。
E: The chaotic Dreamscape has swept away the supplies Dreamville relies upon to survive. You have to enter the dream and recover all of them.

C: 一些帮忙建设美梦小镇的小鸟被意外困住了，你必须帮助哈努兄弟解救它们。
E: Some of the birds that helped build Dreamville have been trapped by accident. You have to help Brother Hanu rescue them.

C: 许多区划的囚犯从未喝过苏乐达。哈努兄弟决定用苏乐达支援这些囚犯，将它们变成伙伴。
E: Inmates from many areas have never tasted SoulGlad. Brother Hanu decides to use SoulGlad to assist these inmates, turning them into companions.

C: 「惊梦酒吧」的管理者舒翁向你提出了委托，希望你能暂时接替调饮师的工作。\n控制住了发狂的小星星，先带它回酒吧看看情况吧。
E: Siobhan, the manager of Dreamjolt Hostelry, offered you an assignment to temporarily take over the job of drinksmith.\nAfter suppressing the berserk Starlet, bring it back to the hostelry to check out the situation.

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•动作派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「动作」的考验……\n你可太熟悉「动作」了——但在这样一个人人都无法欢跳的世界里，你真的能够施展真正的「动作」吗？
E: The first choice! Firefly and you arrive at the stage for Dreamplay Fantasia: Action Challenge. According to the guide, you'll face the trial of "action" here...\nYou can't possibly be more familiar with "action" — However, in a world where no one can jump, can you really perform real "action"?

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 在流梦礁，你突然感到一阵强烈的不安——似乎有什么重要的存在即将迎来终结，而你又将再次遭逢某个奇遇…你站起身踱步，等待预感的应验。
E: You suddenly feel a strong bout of anxiety while at Dreamflux Reef — As if something important is about to meet its end, and that you're about to encounter a miracle yet again... You stand up and pace around, waiting for the premonition to come true.

C: 伟大的发明，往往诞生于天才的一丝灵感，以及时代的千股浪潮。
E: Great inventions often arise from a stroke of inspiration by geniuses and the thousand waves of the era.

C: 没想到冤家路窄，你们再次撞上斯科特胡作非为，三月七与斯科特立下了十五日后剑斗之约。 三月七任命你为「剑术助教」，为她合理安排训练生活，你要和她二位师父一起，在短短十五日里将三月七培养成独当一面的剑术高手。 也许故事还能有其他的走向，请务必试试！ 「十五日后，罗浮之巅，双剑西来，天外飞仙。」
E: Alas, adversaries are wont to cross paths! The both of you encounter Skott, who is up to no good yet again. March 7th and Skott end up making a pact to cross swords in fifteen days. March 7th makes you her "assistant swordplay instructor," leaving you in charge of her training schedule. Alongside her two masters, you have fifteen days to train March 7th into a swordswoman capable of holding her own in a duel. Perhaps the story can go in other directions. Please give them a try! "The ultimate Luofu duel begins in fifteen days. Watch a pair of swords whiz through the skies in a peerless swordplay."

C: 完成「大衍万象」简单模式I
E: Complete Mutare Magnus Easy Mode I

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n第一场演出正在进行中，问问现场观众对你们乐队的评价吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nThe first performance is happening. Ask the live audience about their reviews of the band's performance.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n得到佩佩的节奏记录，帮助乱破收集作曲用的灵感吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nObtain a record of Peppy's beats to help Rappa collect inspiration for composing.

C: 雕像让你想到了一位故人，他或许就在附近。
E: The statue reminds you of an old acquaintance. He may just be nearby.

C: 在地宫中，每座房间都被封印把守，而这间受制于「欧洛尼斯奇迹」。只有解开它的谜题才能继续前进。
E: Every room in the hypogeum is protected by a seal, with this one bound by Oronyx's Miracle. Only by solving its mystery can one proceed onward.

C: 「昏光庭院」的医师，风堇，请求你前往生命花园，现在就去看看她究竟有什么事吧！
E: Hyacine, the healer from the Twilight Courtyard, needs your presence at the Garden of Life. Head there and listen to what she has to say!

C: 今日待鉴定宝物已准备好，去找西塔罗斯吧。
E: The treasures up for appraisal today are ready. Time to talk to Theodoros.

C: 你将在第一场小组赛中迎击「超级英雄」沐浴皂冠名赞助的提摩斯选手。\n夺走他的胜利，粉碎他的代言协议吧。
E: You will face Timos, sponsored by Superhero Shower Soap, in the first group match.\nSeize his victory and shatter his endorsement deal!

C: 你知道，强者如云的冠军赛，每一位来到这里的选手都强得离谱，但你面前这位选手…未免太离谱了。
E: You know that the championship is filled with ridiculously strong contenders — every competitor here is on another level. But the one standing before you... is beyond ridiculous.

C: 带着青雀的遗憾与梦想，以及回去加班的怨念，你决心帮青雀实现梦想——带着「十三幺」号从比赛中晋级吧，你的目标是总冠军！
E: Carrying Qingque's regrets, ambitions, and grudge of having to return and work overtime, you are determined to fulfill her dream — advance through the semifinals with the Thirteen Orphans and aim to be the champion!

C: 一看到这颗星球，咱就在想——这个世界里都是冰耶，会不会和我的过去有什么关系？这个想法一产生就止不住了。
E: When I first saw this planet, I thought: A world covered in ice... could it have something to do with my past? Now I can't stop thinking about it.

C: 不久之前，星穹列车上…
E: Not long ago, on the Astral Express...

C: 列车长让咱们来吱一声：航线会议就要开始啦。老地方，别迟到咯～
E: The conductor wants us to attend a warp navigation meeting. Same old location apparently, and we can't be late~

C: 走之前记得做好整备工作噢。
E: Make sure you're properly prepared before you set off.

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，准备好的话，就到车头附近集合吧，会议要开始了！
E: {NICKNAME}, if you're ready, head over to the front of the train. The meeting is about to start!

C: 假如真有这么一套评分系统，我一定会给你最高分。
E: I'd say it's a solid five stars.

C: 这是谁？黑塔？
E: Who's this? Herta?

C: 这没什么奇怪的吧，游戏里那些长生不死的老怪，不总是等着主角来消灭他们吗？长生也不是什么好事。
E: That's pretty normal. Aren't the immortal bosses in games always waiting for the protagonist to come kill them? Immortality is not always a good thing.

C: 屏幕旁边贴着一张小小的告示……
E: There's a small announcement attached to the screen...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>听我说</color>：你的脑袋里现在一片混沌。你不清楚自己是谁，为什么在这儿，接下来要做什么；你觉得我很熟悉，却不清楚该不该信任我——
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Listen</color>: You are in a daze right now. You don't know who you are, why you're here, or what you're going to do next. You think I look familiar, but you're not sure if you should trust me—

C: 巧合而已。黑塔委托列车寻找的遗器到手了，我们按照协议返回交付…不想正好碰上了遇袭现场。
E: It's just a coincidence. We came to deliver the rare relic Herta trusted us to find... We didn't expect to arrive during an invasion.

C: 是一辆在宇宙中行驶的列车。如果要进一步解释，我会说：「星穹列车」是「开拓」星神阿基维利曾搭乘的列车。
E: Basically speaking, it's a train that travels through space. But more specifically, the Astral Express was a creation of the Aeon, Akivili the Trailblazer.

C: 它的打分依据会是衣服颜色吗？好像不是……
E: Is it basing things on clothing color? Don't think so...

C: 「无法测定！」眼珠在转动了三圈后突然瞪大，在僵持了片刻后，它疲惫地合上了眼皮。
E: "Rating invalid!" Its eyeball swivels around three times before suddenly widening. After a brief impasse, its eye shuts, wearily.

C: 眼睛高速转动，不可置信，却又不得不信：「<unbreak>13</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: Eyes moving at high speeds. Unbelievable. Yet, it's undeniable: "<unbreak>13</unbreak> points!" it announced.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着那刻夏：「<unbreak>0.616</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Anaxa: "<unbreak>0.616</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着刻律德菈：「<unbreak>0.13</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Cerydra: "<unbreak>0.13</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 研究你啊——你身体里有颗星核，跟藏着颗炸弹也没区别了。谁知道它有什么危害？以后会不会突然爆发，坑你一把？
E: Study you of course. Your body contains a Stellaron, which, in some sense, is no different than storing a bomb. Who knows what might happen? Maybe it'll blow you to bits someday.

C: 行吧。说实话，区区星核，真要封住，我也有得是办法——就是你可能不大自由而已。
E: Ugh. Fine. To be honest with you, I have plenty of ways to seal a mere Stellaron — You just might end up not having a lot of personal freedom.

C: 虽然很多数据损坏了，但残存的零星片段也有难以消化的庞大信息量，我正在尝试整理。
E: A lot of the data is corrupted, but even the residual pieces contain huge amounts of information that we're struggling to process. I'm trying to sort them out.

C: …要跃迁了吗？你先去吧。
E: ...Is it time to warp jump? You go ahead.

C: （还是等房间主人回来再说吧。）
E: (Better to wait till the room's owner comes back.)

C: 因此，只有直接从虚数中获取能量的星神以及被星神赐福的令使能够穿过被虚数能量填充的空域，进行星际旅行。也因此，每个诞生文明的星球才如此相似。
E: Therefore, only Aeons, who draw their energy from the imaginary, and Emanators, who are blessed by Aeons, can travel through the spaces filled with imaginary energy. That's why planets where civilizations exist are so similar.

C: 我这就带你们去参见可可利亚大人，各位可以预先组织一下语言。她的时间宝贵，所以偏好言简意赅的汇报。
E: I will now bring you to see Madam Cocolia. Please have your words at the ready. Her time is precious, so she prefers concise communication.

C: 别浪费时间了，没人会注意到的。
E: Let's not waste time. No one will notice.

C: 她还挺通情达理的。
E: She's very reasonable.

C: 对啊，你们摸摸看就知道了。冰冰凉的，我正打算动手修理呢。
E: Yep, touch it and find out — ice cold. I was just about to fix it up.

C: 加热器…好奇？这不就是个普通的地髓供暖器吗，行政区里到处都是。
E: Curious? About the heater? It's just a standard Geomarrow radiator — you can find them anywhere in the Administrative District.

C: 但是你看呀，现在结果不是很好嘛？我们得到了贵宾待遇，超～豪华的酒店，还有当地势力的全力支持！看来这次的开拓任务也很顺利！
E: But check it out — seems like we landed with a pretty sweet deal, right? We get the royal treatment, rooms in a beauuuutiful hotel, and the full support of the locals! As far as trailblazing goes, this is smooth as heck!

C: 咱们…不会摊上什么大事了吧？
E: Are we... in a lot of trouble?

C: 嗨，我就是个急性子，不说了不说了！
E: Right! I'm such a hothead. I'll zip it!

C: 那就好……
E: That's good...

C: 机械屋的主人，她有能力确保你的安全。见面之后报我的名字就好。
E: The owner of the workshop can ensure your safety. Just say my name when you meet her.

C: 我们今天之所以能聚在这里，共同庆祝这个时刻…是因为一位伟大的「守护者」牺牲了自己，将七百年来一直荼毒这座城市的祸种逐出了我们的家园。
E: Today we gather here to celebrate our victory... but it was a sacrifice made by a mighty guardian that delivered us this opportunity. She dispelled an evil that cost us <unbreak>700</unbreak> years of suffering... and in the process, she paid the ultimate price.

C: 为了让这个世界免受劫难，各位已经倾注了所有努力，{NICKNAME}甚至险些为了它牺牲性命——我无权要求你们付出更多。
E: You've gone out of your way to save this world. {NICKNAME}, you nearly lost your life. I have no right to ask for more.

C: 那…作为「领袖」，我也必须给出与之对等的承诺才行。
E: In that case... as a leader, I must give you a promise of the same weight.

C: 妈妈小时住过这里哦。
E: My mother lived here as a child, you know.

C: 人呢…怎么还没到啊……
E: ...Where did they get to?

C: 哈～托你办事，我能放一百个心！
E: Haha, I knew I could count on you!

C: 虽然现在听起来又长又傻，但当时的我还挺喜欢这名字的…因为很「摇滚」。
E: It's a bit of a mouthful, but I liked it at the time... it was a rock 'n' roll name.

C: 嗐，话题怎么又沉重起来了，这可不行！还是说点有意思的吧。
E: How did the conversation get so heavy again!? No good — let's talk about something interesting.

C: {NICKNAME}，你不必对姐姐言听计从……
E: {NICKNAME}, you don't have to do everything she tells you...

C: 能和她一起旅行，我也很开心。
E: I'm happy to be able to travel with her. It won't be a chore.

C: 大部队在后面。如果交涉顺利的话，邓恩会负责带队开进下层区的。
E: They're behind us. If negotiations go well, then Dunn will lead them down into the Underworld.

C: 也许换个角度思考，十点十分更多是象征意义。十，是一个大数，是十进制转换位的末点。十点十分意味着旧时代的终结，新时代的开始。
E: Let's look at things from another perspective, <unbreak>10</unbreak>:<unbreak>10</unbreak> might be more symbolic in meaning. The number ten, well it's a large one for sure, and it's the endpoint for decimal numbers. So <unbreak>10</unbreak>:<unbreak>10</unbreak> could also mean the end of an Old Era and the beginning of a new one.

C: 加热器散发着温暖，它虽不起眼，却是冬城人民得以生存的功臣。
E: The heater emits warmth. It's inconspicuous, but the people of the Union can't live without it.

C: 后面又写道：「和清洁队的<unbreak>45</unbreak>位工人。」明信片背面什么都没有。
E: It continues: "And the <unbreak>45</unbreak> members of the cleaning squad." There's nothing written on the back.

C: 答对了！帕姆的毛发难以腐烂，没有毒性，属于干垃圾！
E: Correct! Pom-Pom's fur doesn't easily degrade and isn't toxic, so it belongs in the dry garbage!

C: 那个小姑娘…你最好赶紧找到人，把她看住了。地下被封锁十几年，孩子都快忘记地上人长什么样了，突然冒出个穿银鬃铁卫衣服的姑娘……
E: *sigh* That girl... get her back as soon as possible, then don't let her out of your sight. The underground has been sealed off for over ten years now — the children won't even remember what overgrounders look like. If a girl in a Silvermane Guard uniform suddenly shows up...

C: 这里是地下？
E: Is this the underground?

C: 它意味着个人为了整个文明能够存续，自愿选择了一项艰辛的工作。
E: It was a choice... the pursuit of arduous labor for the survival of our entire civilization.

C: 好巧啊，希儿小姐！我们也有事情想要拜会首领大人！搭个伙一起走呗？
E: Perfect, Miss Seele! We were just on our way to pay Chief Oleg a visit ourselves. Room for a few more?

C: 哼哼，放马过来吧！
E: Hehe, bring it on!

C: 没错，说的就是你！
E: You sure did!

C: 不许这么敷衍地叫我！要尊敬地叫我漆黑的虎克大人！
E: That's Pitch-Dark Hook the Great, to you! Who said you could shorten my title!?

C: 我们一开始以为是采掘机出了集体故障，后来却发现那些机器根本就不是矿队的资产。
E: At first, we thought that a collective fault had occurred in the excavation machines, but then we found out that those machines didn't even belong to the mining team.

C: …看来你很适应。
E: ...Sounds like you've taken it in your stride.

C: 不行，这个念头太可怕了！绝对不行，不可能！
E: ...What was I thinking!? No... I shouldn't... That was a diabolical thought!

C: 你想怎么做？听你的。
E: Alright, what's the plan?

C: 她给我们留了封信，唔…难道是传闻中的「锦囊妙计」？我没经验，这个是不是应该遇到危险了再打开？
E: She left us a letter. Hmm... could this be one of those "open-in-case-of-emergency" letters? I've never gotten one of those before. Should we wait until we run into something dangerous?

C: 我们迫于环境压力结成暂时同盟，一起帮下层区的居民解决了些…生存难题。
E: Because of the difficult situation we were in, we formed a temporary alliance to help the residents of the Underworld resolve a few... issues of survival.

C: …陌、陌生人！妈妈说，不可以和陌生人搭话……
E: ...Stranger danger! Mummy said, "Never talk to strangers!"

C: 没想到我还能活着回到行政区…在下面的这么多年里，还真是发生了不少事啊，娜塔莎。
E: ...I never thought I'd live to see the Administrative District again. All those years... We've been through a lot, Natasha.

C: 各、各位…求你们了，救救我的同伴！
E: P—Please, help my friends!

C: 「在铆钉镇一处摆放着货架的洞窟里」。
E: "In a Rivet Town where storage shelves are placed..."

C: 这是路灯，这样的说明应该就足够了。
E: This is a street lamp, this description should suffice.

C: 星际和平播报将对该考古项目持续进一步跟踪报道。
E: The Interastral Peace Broadcast will be covering this story throughout the excavation.

C: 那位狐狸姑娘做事节奏太快，我都难以适应，也许是闲得太久了…抓住这点时间好好喘口气吧，这会是我们唯一空闲的时光了。
E: Little miss fox moves at quite the pace — I can't keep up with her. *sigh* I've spent too long on the bench... Let's catch our breath for a while — we can expect a packed schedule ahead.

C: 可以信任。
E: Trustworthy.

C: 你好像看谁都有点可疑…{F#是女生的第六感嘛？}{M#是你想太多了吧。}
E: {F#You think everyone's suspicious... though they do say some girls have a sixth sense.}{M#Come on, you think everyone's suspicious...}

C: 唉，驭空大人把接待各位的任务又派给了我。
E: *sigh* Madam Yukong has asked me to look after you.

C: 一看到旅馆招牌，倦意就止不住地涌上来了。
E: *yawn* Well, here we are. I feel sleepy already.

C: 只是嘛，岁月蹉跎，最终王牌飞行士还是收住脾气心性，成了总辖一司的首领，要滴水不漏地收拾各种麻烦。
E: Eventually, she became the head of the entire commission, which required her to learn patience and adopt a meticulous approach to her work.

C: 请问太卜司是做什么的？
E: What does the Divination Commission do?

C: 快喂他喝下这药，让他乖乖躺好。
E: Quick! Get him to drink the cure and lay him down!

C: 不了吧。
E: No, thanks.

C: 听说沾染了邪祟的云骑军都发起狂了！
E: I heard the Knights affected by the evil are going berserk!

C: 真是贵人忘事。您在危急关头出手摆平了魔阴身，在下可都看在眼里。
E: You don't remember? You dealt with those mara-struck knights in the nick of time — I saw it all.

C: 哈哈，本姑娘就是从这儿来的，熟得很，跟我走就没错啦。
E: Haha, I came this way, I know it like the back of my hand. Just follow me.

C: 你还真豁达哎。
E: It's good to have a sense of humor!

C: 不对啊，这儿应该有条通道的…怎么不见啦？
E: There's supposed to be a passage... Why can't I see it?

C: 不过，在我们正式搜捕前，得先调试一下这个小玩意儿，让它熟悉工作～
E: But before we get started, let's play with his settings a bit and get him ready~

C: （展示停云的照片）
E: (Show Tingyun's photo.)

C: 我想，这几件东西应该和停云小姐都有关吧？
E: Miss Tingyun must have left us these clues, right?

C: 你颤抖着打开手机，对仙舟物价一无所知的你祈祷着这儿的货物价格不要太贵……
E: You swiped to open your phone with trembling hands. You barely know anything about the prices on the Xianzhou. Hope you can still afford it...

C: 最后三天，最后三天——
E: Final three days! Final three days —

C: 从留下的印迹来看，手指修长有力，又很稳定呢。看起来是一只致命的手。
E: Let me see... Slender fingers, but strong. This hand belongs to a killer.

C: 这是造船监匠人的焊接枪，可能是冒失的工人留下来的。
E: That's a shipwright's soldering gun. I think one of the workers here must have left it behind.

C: 「建木」降临…会带来不死的仙躯——
E: The Ambrosial Arbor's descent... will bring us undying bodies...

C: 咱们手头竟然没有可以救急的东西吗？
E: Don't we have anything to help her?

C: 是，太卜命队伍驻扎此处后，便率斥候去前方探查了。据说隐藏多年的「药王秘传」出现在附近，队伍里人心惶惶……
E: Yes. The master diviner ordered us to remain stationed here and went to scout ahead. They're saying the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus have returned — they haven't been seen for an age... The troops are anxious.

C: 我们按照太卜的军令，几个时辰前攻陷此处。之后我们才知道，原来此行的对手是信奉{RUBY_B#药师}寿瘟祸祖{RUBY_E#}的「药王秘传」。
E: We took over this place a few hours ago under the master diviner's command. It was only afterwards that we learned our enemies were none other than the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus — those who worship the {RUBY_B#Yaoshi}Plagues Author{RUBY_E#}.

C: 什么意思？
E: What does it mean?

C: 炉鼎上的符箓黯淡无光，丹炉静默。
E: The talismans on the elixir cauldron are dark and inactive. The elixir crucible lies silent.

C: 事不宜迟，立刻出发吧。
E: Time is of the essence. Let's go.

C: 人命关天。停云小姐，你回去吧，将军那儿我们解释。
E: Your life is more important, Miss Tingyun. Go back, we can explain to the general.

C: 好久不见了…老朋友。
E: It has been a long time... old friend.

C: 不，没什么…
E: Nothing...

C: 将军应该知道持明轮回蜕生的习性。古海之水已涤尽了<color=#dbc291ff>丹枫</color>的罪愆。当初与你共同站在这里的人，已经不在了。
E: You know the Vidyadhara hatching rebirth cycle, general. The waters of the ancient sea have cleansed <color=#dbc291ff>Dan Feng</color> of his past sin. The person that once stood here alongside you is no more.

C: 你…是丹恒对吧？你头上这对角是怎么回事……
E: Y—You are Dan Heng, right? What's with the horns...?

C: 「为止若木苏生，孽寇侵陵，祷而引古海之水掩覆洞天，镇伏玄根。勒石铭之，垂鉴后世，万勿擅移……」
E: "Hearken, as arbor revives and foe nears, we call forth the mighty waters of ancient sea, to flood abodes of heaven and quell roots of evil. We etch this in stone for all to heed."

C: 哇，我有感动到！但有{NICKNAME}和杨叔在，你还不放心嘛！你瞧，咱们这一路帮忙，帮着帮着就快成仙舟的大英雄了。
E: Aww, how sweet! Buuuut {NICKNAME}, Mr. Yang, and I have been holding our own — we're pretty much Xianzhou heroes at this point.

C: 将军！我们也愿随将军同去！请将军不要撇下我等！
E: General! Don't cast us aside! We're willing to go with you!

C: 这幅壁画描绘的是…持明所学有成，散入仙舟各处，为联盟效力的壮年期。
E: This mural portrays the Vidyadhara young. They acquire knowledge and depart for different places on the Xianzhou — thereby dedicating themselves to serving the Alliance.

C: 哇，虽然什么实际的都没给，但听上去还挺酷的……
E: Wow, nothing tangible then, but at least it sounds pretty cool...

C: 只是星核猎手的傀儡而已…
E: We're just mere puppets of the Stellaron Hunters...

C: 你们向燕翠简单讲述了停云一事的经过……
E: You tell Yancui a brief account of what happened to Tingyun...

C: 燕翠转身进了后厨，为你们端来了一碗热气腾腾的菜肴。
E: Yancui goes into the back kitchen and brings out a steaming bowl of food.

C: 好纠结啊，再带点什么好呢……
E: Oooh this is hard! What else should I take...

C: 尽情享受愉快的假日吧——当然，也别忘了帕姆的请求哦。
E: Let's enjoy ourselves first. Of course, let's not forget Pom-Pom's request either.

C: 你是谁？
E: Who are you?

C: 我完全无法忍受这种恐惧。
E: I cannot bear such a fear.

C: 您口中的星期日是我的兄长，匹诺康尼当地的话事人之一，也是此次「谐乐大典」的主办人。他听闻列位遇到麻烦，便携我前来提供帮助。
E: The person you speak of is Sunday, my senior, and one of the local leaders of Penacony. He is also the organizer of this era's Charmony Festival. He heard you all ran into some difficulties, and sent me here to provide aid.

C: 别紧张，我就是过来沾沾喜气。它现在是你的房间了，但半个系统时前——还是我的。
E: Calm down, I'm just here to soak in the festive vibe. This may be your room now, but half a system hour ago, it was still mine.

C: 毕竟你和其他人不同。你很特别，特别到足以掀翻整张牌桌。那股*力量*，你不想使用它吗？或者…你不想摆脱它吗？你不想靠它名扬宇宙吗？
E: It's clear you're not just one of the crowd. You possess a distinct quality, so magnetic that it could sway the outcome of any game. That *power*, you really don't wish to use it? Or... you don't want to be rid of it? Why not use it to etch your name across the stars?

C: 聒噪的家伙可交不到朋友。一个小知识：阿蒂尼孔雀是宇宙中叫声数一数二难听的鸟类，而你这身行头正像一只花枝招展的孔雀……
E: Clamorous people do not make friends. Fun fact: The Attini Peacock boasts one of the universe's more jarring songs, and your choice of attire is somewhat peacock-esque.

C: <color=#ff3a3e>…这样么。从刚才起，我就始终有种熟悉的感觉…也许这就是所谓的「既视感」吧，呵呵，也是一种缘分。</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>...Is that so? I haven't been able to shake off this familiar feeling since just now... Maybe this is what they call déjà vu, hehe. Or it could purely be serendipity.</color>

C: 谁在和我说话？
E: Who's talking to me?

C: （重申——我不会对这枚梦泡的内容作出任何解释性或暗示性的评论。）
E: (Let me reiterate that I won't make any explanatory or leading comments on the content of this dream bubble.)

C: （抱歉，为了避免某些纠纷，苜蓿草家系只允许这个品牌的饮料出现在预制梦境中。）
E: (My apologies. By order of the Alfalfa Family, delicious, thirst-quenching SoulGlad is the only brand of beverage permitted to appear in recorded dreamscapes.)

C: 这跟阿基维利有半点关系？
E: What do all these have to do with Akivili?

C: 哈哈，这是与您潜意识的渴求最契合的梦泡！如果您想反复欣赏，也可以支付信用点买下它——
E: Haha, this dream bubble aligns with what you desire in your subconscious! If you're interested in experiencing the dream bubble again, you can purchase it with credits...

C: 放心吧，小姐。我相信这是一场误会，这么可爱的女孩怎么会是偷渡犯呢。
E: Don't worry. I believe this is just a misunderstanding. How could such a lovely girl like you be a stowaway?

C: 总共十枚哦。您现在可以尽情享受匹诺康尼的各种游乐设施了。
E: Ten. You may now enjoy the attractions in Penacony to the fullest.

C: 我说你那两位朋友的——你的我早看过了。
E: I'm talking about your friends. I've already seen yours.

C: 啊，这…我朋友初来乍到，怎么可能有贵宾卡呢，哈哈。
E: Um, well, how can my friends have VIP cards when they've only just arrived, haha.

C: 一些强烈的情感——至于要怎么用，就让我桑博先卖个关子吧！
E: Just a few... intense emotions. As far as how we'll use them, you just wait and see!

C: 你的名字叫作「哈努兄弟」，耿直而沉默，是匹诺康尼最负盛名的长篇动画《钟表小子》里行事沉稳可靠、喜欢装酷的狼人老大哥。
E: Your name is Hanu, a candid and taciturn figure — a calm, reliable, cool leader of the werewolves from Penacony's famous, long-form cartoon, Clockie.

C: 隐喻？不，应该是揭露……
E: Hint at? No, more like reveal...

C: ——你看那小姑娘还在么？
E: Is that girl still here?

C: 不必了，阴暗的角落和我气质不搭。还是这座美梦更适合我，轻浮、虚荣、华而不实……
E: I'll pass — the gloomy shade of a place like that just wouldn't go with my vibe. Dreamville is frivolous, vain, and flashy — and that suits me just fine.

C: 你是说…你看到了一个现实中不存在的动画人物？
E: Do you mean... you saw a cartoon character that doesn't exist in real life?

C: <size=36>欢迎来到梦想之地匹诺康尼！</size>
E: <size=36>Welcome to Penacony, Land of the Dreams!</size>

C: 我不知道啊…是我干的吗？
E: I have no clue what I did. You sure I pulled that off?

C: 别想狡辩——你这种人我见过太多了！
E: Don't try talking back to me. I deal with punks like you all the time!

C: 这里没路了，所以我们要借用下筑梦师的工具。
E: The path ends here. For the rest of the way, we need to borrow the Dreamweaver's tools.

C: 这样应该就能填上拼图的空缺了。
E: This should fill in the empty spaces in the puzzle.

C: （我是不是被耍了…？）
E: (Have I been set up?)

C: 可我是人，不是垃圾桶。
E: But I'm a person, not a trashcan.

C: 想不到啊，你很强大，我承认你的英勇…也许我们没有必要进行无谓的争斗。
E: I didn't expect you to be so strong. I acknowledge your bravery... Perhaps there's no need to conduct a pointless battle.

C: 数万年的囚禁早就磨平了我的桶边，我已风光不再，只想以一个普通垃圾桶的身份度过余生。再见了，陌生的人。
E: Countless years of captivity have whittled flat my edges. My prime is long past, never to return. I only wish to pass the rest of my life as a normal trashcan. Farewell, stranger.

C: 嗯。姬子姐姐说，她们是在调查梦境的过程中偶遇的。
E: Yeah. Miss Himeko said that they were investigating the incidents happening in the Dreamscape.

C: 也很高兴能再次与你同行，黑天鹅小姐。
E: Glad to be traveling with you again, Miss Black Swan.

C: …如果能顺路开展调查，也好。
E: ...If we can start investigating on the way, that'd be good.

C: 辛苦你了，忆者——非常精彩的驱虎吞狼。
E: Thank you for your efforts, Memokeeper - quite a brilliant move to pit enemies against each other.

C: 砂金值得信任吗？
E: Can I trust Aventurine?

C: 而为了真相，以及制止更多无谓的牺牲…这是最正确的选择。
E: For the truth and to prevent more unnecessary sacrifices... It is the right choice.

C: （三月的房间就在边上…先去和她汇合吧。）
E: (March's room is this way... I should go meet up with her.)

C: 你认为此事和黄泉有关吗？
E: Do you think this is connected to Acheron?

C: 不过在局势尚不明朗的当下，建立更多联系不是坏事。砂金三言两语便展现了自己的手腕，只要利益一致，他也能成为可靠的盟友。
E: Still, it's good to have contacts among all this uncertainty. Aventurine showed his skills, and as far as our interests are aligned, he can become a reliable ally.

C: 看来砂金没有更多要求，我们就先处理家族的委托吧。姬子，你认为呢？
E: Looks like Aventurine doesn't need anything else — let's turn our attention to The Family's assignment for now. Himeko, what do you think?

C: 怎么，走错路了？
E: What's wrong? Are we heading the wrong way?

C: 是。
E: Yes.

C: 看来这里是查不出什么了。
E: Looks like nothing can be found here.

C: 不过砂金的运气确实很好，经手的案子大多圆满落幕，基本没赌输过。所以在收复匹诺康尼这件事上…我也拭目以待。
E: But Aventurine's luck has always been good. He's always closed all his cases without a hitch, and basically never lost a gamble. Which is why on the issue of retaking Penacony I'm watching with keen interest.

C: 这就不像是一位「巡海游侠」会发表的评论了。
E: That doesn't sound like the kind of comment a Galaxy Ranger would make.

C: 关于「黎明的时刻」…
E: Regarding the Moment of Daybreak...

C: 嗯，我确实想让你帮我一个忙…身为匹诺康尼最优秀的猎犬，你最近有没有和偷渡犯打过交道？
E: Well, actually, I do need a favor... As the most outstanding Hound in Penacony, have you come across any stowaways recently?

C: 加拉赫，什么风把你给吹来了？
E: What brings you here, Gallagher?

C: 噫…这玩意都结块了，摇都摇不动…就算没过期我也绝对不想喝这个。
E: Ugh... the syrup has turned clumpy... I definitely don't want to drink this even if it's not expired.

C: 或许是其他人带过来的。
E: Maybe someone else brought it here.

C: …但我们输了。漫长的时间过去，梦想之地受到的影响已经太深，在没有尽头的穷追猛打下，我放弃了…就像一条丧家犬。
E: ...But we failed. Too much time had passed, and the Land of the Dreams had become deeply corrupted. After countless fruitless pursuits, I gave up... like a lost dog.

C: 你是说…是有人故意支开了他们？
E: So, you're saying... someone deliberately cleared the place out?

C: 覆水难收。我们能做的只有抓住每个机会，让自己尽可能多赢一秒。
E: What's done can't be undone. All we can do is play the cards we're dealt, and rake in as much time as possible.

C: 可…可有人会死掉的，你也会有危险…这哪里是好运了！你们为什么要这么做……
E: But... but people will die, and you will be in danger... How is that good fortune? Why are you all doing this...

C: 黄泉小姐并非危险分子，对星穹列车也没有敌意，砂金先前的指控只是一面之词。
E: Miss Acheron here doesn't present a danger, and she's of no threat to the Astral Express. Aventurine's prior accusation was based on nothing more than his own subjectivity.

C: 准备好面对他们，卡卡瓦夏，成为{RUBY_B#母神赐福之子}他们的骄傲{RUBY_E#}。
E: Preparing to face them, Kakavasha, and to make them proud.

C: ——那难以言明的力量将「存护」斩断，周遭的时空顷刻陷入停滞，你的思绪也在那一瞬间被拧成了一团。你的感官失灵了，只有重力撕扯你的大脑，在无边的黑暗中下坠……
E: The indescribable force severs the power of Preservation, while time and space froze instantly. Your thoughts twist into a knot as your senses fail, with only gravity tearing at your mind as you plummet into boundless darkness...

C: 你以为我为什么会放他走，又是为了什么才把那座影视乐园的舞台专门空出来？
E: Why do you think that I just let him go? And why do you think I emptied the theme park stage?

C: 「巡猎」的义侠团体可不会劫持星穹列车。
E: The righteous heroes of The Hunt would never hijack the Astral Express.

C: …行啊，小子。
E: ...Not bad, kiddo.

C: 哈，兄弟，这问题够难回答的。我甚至很难说我们是个组织。
E: Ha, my friend, this question is a hard one. Don't think I can even consider us an "organization" to begin with.

C: 报告！我们封锁了影视乐园，大部分客人都对梦中的奇异景象习以为常，暂未发现隐患，预计很快就能恢复秩序。
E: We've sealed off the theme park. Most guests are used to bizarre phenomena in the Dreamscape, and so far, no threats have been detected. We can expect order to be restored soon.

C: 我完全糊涂了！
E: I'm completely confused!

C: 让她去吧。在判断她是否值得信任前，我们也需要观察。在此之前，我还想找一个人聊聊。
E: Letting her go was the right decision — further observations are needed before we decide whether to trust her. But first, there's someone I need to talk to.

C: 死、死亡？梦里怎么会有死亡呢，眠眠是比较凶，偶尔也会错把无辜的旅客带回来，但它绝对不会害人！
E: D—Death? Not in a dream, surely. Sleepie's just a little aggressive, and sometimes messes up by fetching the wrong guests, but it would never hurt anyone!

C: 你把他吓成这个样子的？
E: You scared him this badly?

C: 什么看不见的东西？
E: Invisible who?

C: 谁能告诉我应该怎么做啊，我不想做决定……
E: Tell me what I should do. Oh... I don't know what to do...

C: 无妨。不过加拉赫先生费尽心思将家族话事人、星穹列车，和星核猎手汇聚一处，想来是有重要的事要交代吧？
E: That sounds sensible enough. Since you went through the trouble of gathering The Family head, the Crew, and the Stellaron Hunters, I'm guessing you have something important to say, Mr. Gallagher?

C: 别让咱们失望啊，老头。
E: Don't let us down, old man.

C: 你们家族的那点事谁不知道？忘记「钟表匠」了？去你的吧，鸡翅膀脑袋，我可不吃你们这套。骗骗那帮逐梦客得了，别把自己也给骗了。
E: You think nobody knows what your precious Family has done? About the Watchmaker, huh? Don't kid yourself, feather-brain. Those Dreamchasers might be fooled by your act, but don't fool yourself.

C: 看到二位有如此决心，我也安心了。
E: I'm relieved to see your determination.

C: 我听说有位善于欺诈的假面愚者也收到了邀请…看来就是你了。玩得还愉快吗？
E: I've heard that a skilled Masked Fool received an invitation too... That must be you, right? Did you enjoy yourself?

C: 「你是否对你的神要求僭越，妄图超过受造物的本分？」
E: "Have you ever been inordinate with your asks of your God, coveting more than the foundation of the creation itself?"

C: 「黑火药烤肉蘸双氧水味」…真的是人类会喜欢的味道吗？
E: "Dynamite Barbecue with Rocket Fuel"... Is that really something that humans enjoy?

C: 可真是让我一通好找啊，忆者！我就开门见山了，把你知道的都告诉我。
E: Finally, Memokeeper! Well, let's cut to the chase. Spill everything you know.

C: 看时间，你们可是比那位红发选手还要快上不少啊！
E: Look at the time! You've finished much faster than that red-haired contestant did!

C: 天哪，无敌的哈努兄弟居然被发现了！各位，千万要小心行事！
E: Oh my, the unstoppable Hanu has been spotted! Everyone, please proceed with caution!

C: 看来，以我们现在的样子是上不了楼梯的……
E: It appears we can't climb the stairs in our current state...

C: 终于结束了。不过，这支火箭筒的手感好好，有点舍不得……
E: Well, that's that. But it is gonna be hard to let go of this bazooka...

C: 抱歉了，我的挚友。如果你们不能拿出令人心悦诚服的证据，我便绝不能退让，以免辱没纯美骑士之名。
E: Forgive me, my dear friends. If you cannot present irrefutable evidence, I must not yield, lest I dishonor the name of the Knights of Beauty.

C: 我期待你们的答案。
E: I eagerly await your answer.

C: 没什么特别的理由。我只是觉得每一只雏鸟都有飞上天空的权利…但如果它活不到那个时候，就无从谈起了。
E: No special reason. I do think that a fledgling should have the right to fly in the sky... But if it can't even live to that point, then there's nothing to talk about to begin with.

C: 就我观察到的结果，至少有三种以小型鸟类为食的野兽在那片庭院中出没：伏氏镰尾蝎、阿斯德纳狼獾，还有亨廷顿翼颈蛇……
E: From what I've observed, there are at least three predators in that yard that prey on small birds: The Vossickle Scorpion, Asdana Wolverine, and the Huntington Winged-Snake...

C: 听过这位逐梦客的故事，我当即请求猎犬家系停止追捕，这样他便能安心生活。可惜我的眼界太浅，不曾想这自以为是的善举竟在日后酿成了苦果……
E: After hearing the Dreamchaser's story, I immediately appealed to the Bloodhound Family to cease their pursuit. That way, at least he could live peacefully. But I was still too naive to the ways of the world — I did not anticipate that what I thought was a kind gesture would later lead to dire consequences...

C: 同样地，我为各位准备了最后一道课题，最后一次选择。但请放心，这次选择不会带来任何沉重的结果。
E: Likewise, I've prepared one last question, one last choice. But rest assured, this choice will not have any grave consequences.

C: 「每个漂泊的日子，凝视波涛下的光点，我仿佛又回到这里，回到你们的身边……」
E: "Every time I gaze at the shimmering lights beneath the waves, it feels as though I'm back in this place, standing by your side..."

C: 这个「梦泡」，就是我的家。
E: This "dream bubble" itself is my home.

C: 不用了，我没有不开心。至于「钟表把戏」…是啊，在这片梦里它仿佛能解决一切问题。
E: No, I'm not feeling down. As for clockwork... yeah, it resolves all problems in this dream.

C: 为何您会选择让「秩序」降临在匹诺康尼？一个走投无路的世界理应会是更好的选择，可您还是选择了这么一座人们心中怀有自由的梦想之城。为什么？
E: Why did you choose to bring the Order to Penacony? Wouldn't it have been better to choose a desperate world instead of a city filled with hope and dreams? Why?

C: 「主人已不在，我本当自由，可没有主人的号令，我只得问道于盲。」
E: "Master is no longer here. I thought I'd be free, but I'm not. Now without my master's command, I'll have to seek guidance from the blind."

C: ——却令我等晓得自己不过是你的傀儡！
E: ...But this made us realize that we are but puppets in your hand!

C: 哦？看来各位已经有所预期了。不妨说来听听？
E: Oh? Looks like everyone has come with expectations. Care to share?

C: 噫…不要吓我呀……
E: Uhm... Don't, you're freaking me out...

C: 难怪各位一定要{M#他}{F#她}出面呢。
E: No wonder everyone insisted that {M#he}{F#she} be there.

C: 我也是费心挑选了一个{NICKNAME}全无防备的时刻，引导{M#他}{F#她}亲自揭开真相，才得以让{M#他}{F#她}取回清醒。
E: Therefore, I carefully selected a moment where {NICKNAME} was completely unguarded, guiding {M#him}{F#her} to uncover the truth {M#himself}{F#herself} to make {M#him}{F#her} regain {M#his}{F#her} consciousness.

C: 我相信你。但在正式出发前，我还要告诉你一件事。
E: I have faith in you. However, before we depart, there is one more thing I must tell you.

C: 你…做好准备了么？
E: ...Are you ready?

C: 我会带着你的愿望走下去，实现它。唯有如此，我才能了却这死海边最后一桩遗憾。
E: I'll carry your wish with me and fulfill it. Only then will I be able to put an end to the final regret by the Dead Sea.

C: 但它必须有人来完成。至于你所说的意义……
E: Nevertheless, someone has to do it. As for the meaning you mentioned...

C: 真押假押？我可不想把任何东西当给你，省得被吃干抹净。
E: Are we talking about an actual bet here? I don't wanna wager anything just so that you can swindle it all in the end.

C: 你的「钟表把戏」似乎失效了。
E: Your "clockwork" doesn't seem to be working anymore.

C: 欢迎来到「存在的地平线」……
E: Welcome to Horizon of Existence...

C: 家族对外的说法是「谐乐大典遭遇来历不明的星核袭击，被迫中止」——毕竟「秩序」的事怎么也没法摆到台面上讲嘛。
E: The Family's official statement was like, "The Charmony Festival was attacked by an unidentified Stellaron and came to a halt." After all, they can't just reveal the truth about the Order.

C: 鸢尾花家系还派人送来了好多纪念品和果篮，还有一个精致的按钮模型，等你好利索了，慢慢享受个够…这下我们也算是盛会之星的大人物啦。
E: The Iris Family sent us a bunch of souvenirs, fruit baskets, plus this fancy button model. After you're back on your feet, you can enjoy them all... We're pretty much celebrities on the Planet of Festivities now, aren't we?

C: 哦，那你快点。等你准备好了，我们就走。
E: Oh, okay. Hurry up then. We'll leave when you're ready.

C: 与此同时，在「晖长石号」空艇上……
E: Meanwhile, on the Radiant Feldspar...

C: 转告组里的各位，大家守好自己的岗位就行，谈判的事不用操多余的心。
E: Just tell everyone on our team to stay focused on their tasks and not worry about the negotiations.

C: 准备好调饮了吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: Ready to mix your drink, {NICKNAME}?

C: 反之，如果配比得当…那你就能得到一杯独一无二的甜美饮料，回味悠长。
E: However, with the right ratios... you get a uniquely sweet drink with a lingering aftertaste.

C: 没什么要问的了。
E: That's all for now.

C: 嗯，显而易见。但我想问的是，以你的品位，这个项目显然有些*无趣*了，不是吗？
E: Well, that's obvious, but what I truly wanted to know is: This project is obviously too bland for your taste, isn't it?

C: 很可惜，我并未见过他，只是从…{RUBY_B#星期日}前橡木家主{RUBY_E#}口中听过寥寥几句评价：老奥帝先生是位厉害的商人，但其他方面…不敢恭维。
E: Unfortunately, I've never met him. I've only heard a few comments from the {RUBY_B#Sunday}former head of the Oak Family{RUBY_E#}... Mr. Alfalfa is respectable when it comes to business, but in other respects... I can't say the same.

C: 哈，小意思。惩奸除恶可是头等大事，要是少了我们那才奇怪呢。
E: Hah, no problem. Punishing the wicked and eradicating evil is a top priority. Would've been strange if we sat it out.

C: 我还以为你会让我收收心。
E: I thought you were going to make me get my act together.

C: 尊敬的各位来宾，家族的各位同胞，女士们、先生们、来自银河各地的朋友们——
E: Distinguished guests, fellow Family members, ladies, gentlemen and friends from all over the cosmos —

C: 没了你，这列车组就要散啦。
E: The Express crew would've been disbanded long ago if it weren't for you!

C: 这叫伏笔回收，你懂什么？
E: What do you know? This is called foreshadowing!

C: 人。
E: People.

C: 迷因？
E: Memes?

C: 忆者也许能把炸弹转移到没人的地方，但…我在娃娃体内发现了一张纸条。
E: The Memokeeper may be able to teleport the bomb to a deserted location, but... I've found a note inside the doll.

C: （那是…流萤？）
E: (Is that... Firefly?)

C: 博雷克林•铁尔南、拉扎莉娜•简•艾丝黛拉，向你们致敬，银轨的开拓者——
E: Breukelen Tiernan, Razalina Jane Estella, we raise a toast to you, Trailblazers of the silver rail...

C: 这次是相识，下次就是重逢了。
E: With this as our first meeting, we can consider our next meeting to be a reunion.

C: 帕姆？
E: Pom-Pom?

C: 百分明智的判断，阁下也有成为忍者•大师的资质。
E: A wise judgment. You have the aptitude to become a ninja master too.

C: 睡蕉小猴？
E: Slumbernana Monkey?

C: 折纸大学的校训是「美梦多彩，理想自由」，眼前的景象也算是印证了这句话。离校庆开幕式还有些时间，我们先四处逛逛吧。
E: Paperfold University's motto is "Color your dreams, free your ideals." What we see before us reaffirms those words. We still have some time before the anniversary celebration's opening ceremony. Let's take a look around.

C: 蕉，蕉蕉蕉！
E: Ba, Bana bana!

C: 当然，我就没打算好好学习！
E: I sure will! I wasn't planning to study anyway!

C: 欢迎来到彩梦校庆！美梦多彩，理想自由——！
E: Welcome to the Dreamlight Anniversary! Color your dreams, free your ideals!

C: 香蕉派？
E: Banana pie?

C: 遍布翁瓦克雨林、口感酸涩的「碧绿野蕉」；常用于调味、口感刺激的「血色刺蕉」；还有曾风靡宇宙，但已在美梦外灭绝的「金黄睡蕉」……
E: The sour jadegreen banana from the Vonwacq rainforests. The intense bloodthorn banana commonly used as seasoning. And the extinct golden Slumbernana that was once popular across the universe but now only exists in sweet dreams...

C: 加入阿斯德纳肉桂粉。
E: Add Asdana cinnamon.

C: 我买，给我来一只吧！
E: I'll buy it. Give me one!

C: 多么响亮的名号——你们好，琉璃•忍者，以及，飞龙•忍者！
E: What strong names! Greetings, Ninja Ruri and Ninja Hiryū!

C: 逐恶而来，还是旧恨未消？
E: Are you here chasing evil or settling a grudge?

C: 但渐渐地，我发现流梦礁变得有些不一样了。
E: But as time passed, I started to notice something increasingly off about the Dreamflux Reef.

C: 除此之外，我也拜访了名为「睡蕉社」的社团。
E: Other than that, I also paid a visit to the Slumbernana Association.

C: 很奇怪。尽管存在联系，但这里…反而是没有任何杂音的地方。
E: Strange. They're linked, but this place... I don't detect any noise here.

C: 算了算了，你这明明就是一无所知啊，以后再来吧。
E: Forget it. You clearly know nothing about the topic. Come back again later.

C: 还唱上了？专业人士说两句？
E: They're even singing about it now? So, what's your expert opinion on this?

C: 我早说过，人犯不着太聪明，有时候去舞池里跳一曲，事儿同样能解决。
E: Hah, I called it, didn't I? Who needs all that brain when swingin' around on the dance floor solves things just the same?

C: 三月同学都和我说了，其实我根本没受到助蕉影响啦…是有一些别的原因。
E: March explained everything to me. I wasn't really influenced by the Assistananas... It was something else.

C: 你决定无视这个猴子，就像无视渺小的石子、风吹过的树叶与路边的垃圾桶一样……
E: You decide to ignore this monkey like you would ignore an insignificant pebble, a stray wind-blown leaf, or a roadside trashcan...

C: 倒也不是啦。只是想到接下来会发生的事，我忽然发现，圣歌总是以虔诚的心性来要求唱诗班保持统一……
E: Not exactly. It's just when I think about what's going to happen next, it dawns upon me that hymns tend to require a devoted heart and demand the choir to sing in unison...

C: 人们并非只有「齐唱」一种选择，即便发出各异的声音，它们也能彼此串联…这就是「调律」。我相信这首「同谐」之歌，就连不协和音也能够包容。
