E: There are more choices for the people than singing "in unison." Even if they were to contribute their own differing sounds, these can be strung together... That's what it means to "tune." I believe our song of Harmony will be able to embrace even discordant sounds.

C: 终于，迈向情节高潮的所有条件都已完备。
E: Finally, all preparations leading up to the climax are in place.

C: 小猴呆呆地站在倒下的助蕉身边，喊叫声中难以窥得情感。
E: The little monkey stands silently next to the fallen Assistanana, its cries devoid of recognizable emotions.

C: （最后，让情绪与材料产生共鸣！）
E: (Lastly, channel your emotions to resonate with the materials!)

C: 哦！这副画作…你笔下的睡蕉小猴确实非常完美，但混在里面的垃圾桶太碍眼了。主题不够清晰——<unbreak>60</unbreak>分！
E: Ah, this artwork... Your portrayal of the Slumbernana Monkey is flawless, but the addition of the trashcan is too jarring on the eyes. The theme seems unclear. I'd rate it a <unbreak>60</unbreak>.

C: ——看，你没做错。
E: —See, you did nothing wrong.

C: 这是「社员编号」，每个人都有自己的，独一无二！
E: That's my membership number. Each member has their own unique number!

C: 是我没收手。
E: I didn't hold back.

C: 且慢！那在下呢？
E: Not so fast! What role do I play?

C: 所有小猴都是一样的台词，也准备不了什么。
E: All monkeys share the same line. There's no point in rehearsing.

C: 宣扬自己的强大
E: Proclaim your power

C: 邪祟无耻的冷言嗤笑制造无边苦楚，侠客无私的圣剑出鞘誓要驱散毒蛊。
E: Suffering and pain — the fruits of blind hate, a hero draws their sword ready for the fight to break.

C: （到我的台词了，要说出「辱骂小猴的话」……）
E: (It's my turn now. I should say something demeaning to Brave Monkey...)

C: 你觉得？你是给她打分的蕉师？还是为她提供工作的导演？能在课堂上决定学生价值的当然只有我蕉。
E: You think? Are you the BananAdvisor who grades her work, or the director who assigns her roles? It's up to me to assess my students' worth in this class!

C: {NICKNAME}？你没事吧蕉…蕉？
E: {NICKNAME}? Are you alright—ba... bana?

C: 喂，醒醒——醒醒啊——
E: Hey, wake up... Wake up...

C: 想不到你年纪轻轻，竟会用上这种比喻。
E: It's hard to believe someone so young would use that kind of analogy.

C: 现在才要开始？啊…对哦，得去找人帮忙才行，还得抓紧时间帮你看看脑子。
E: The one that's about to begin? Oh... right! I should go get help. You need to get your head checked, like, right now.

C: 我要一枪「爱」死你，这一句还真没被篡改过——我真这么觉得。
E: I'm gonna put a bullet in ya! And if you think this is the faulty Beacon talking, no shirtball, I actually mean it.

C: 是《银河忍法帖》。
E: Oh, because of the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions.

C: 能人<unbreak>22</unbreak>，你不能把她处理掉！
E: Denisovan <unbreak>22</unbreak>! You cannot get rid of her!

C: ——喂，小姑娘，你还好吗？
E: Hey, little miss, are you alright?

C: 姐们儿，这么淡定？你天天把那什么屑人挂在嘴边，恨得死去活来，现在又无所谓了？
E: Gal, why are you so calm? You're always talking about how much you hate that scum. Why are you so unconcerned right now?

C: 那就来吧，在下随时愿意接受阁下的挑战。
E: Bring it on. I'm ready for your challenge.

C: 下课了！
E: Class is dismissed!

C: 蕉师们
E: BananAdvisors

C: 但降落的过程不算顺利，绝处逢生后，开拓小队结识了当地的「黄金裔」英雄，并从他们口中得知，支撑世界的泰坦诸神正在腐坏，翁法罗斯的大地遍布伤痕。
E: But the landing is not a smooth one. After surviving the crash, the Trailblaze squad meets the local Chrysos Heir heroes. They learn from them that the Titans supporting the world are rotting away, and that the land of Amphoreus is covered in scars.

C: 这场试炼，太过漫长了。
E: This trial is taking far too long.

C: 「这就是你陨灭纷争之泰坦，却拒绝火种，延续『纷争』的理由……」
E: "This is why you slew the Strife Titan, only to reject the Coreflame, letting Strife continue instead..."

C: 但我最擅长的，还是治愈大家内心深处的症结——如果遇到麻烦了，欢迎随时来找我倾诉！只要在庭院里晒晒太阳，烦恼自然就会消失啦。
E: But what I'm really good at is helping people sort out what ails their mind and spirit. If you're ever feeling troubled, come find me! A little sunbathing in the courtyard will chase all your worries away!

C: 这画面听着有点抽象了。
E: That just sounds weird.

C: 巨树在无声的林间微微颔首，斜着身形，倒伏在萎靡的翠浪中。偶然掠过的风穿林打叶，好似叹息颤响，幽幽落入天上无光的海洋。
E: A giant tree bowed slightly in the silent forest, tilting and falling into the wilting green waves. A passing breeze rustled through the leaves, as if it was sighing, softly fading into the lightless ocean above on high.

C: 怪、怪物活了！缇安来保护好大家…！
E: Th—The monster is alive! Trianne will protect everybody...!

C: 好吧…是人家想多了。
E: I shouldn't have gotten my hopes up.

C: 我…还是不愿思考这种可能性。
E: I... do not wish to consider this possibility.

C: 其实我带了「固态净水」。
E: Actually, I have some Solid Water.

C: 且请二人越过深井，为吾采来那<color=#dbc291ff>「金枝誓言」</color>，便就够了。
E: All the two of you have to do is to cross the deep well and retrieve the <color=#dbc291ff>Golden Bough of Vows</color> for me.

C: 况且，依「等价交换」的原理：既然我们通过了你所谓的考验，你也该把用意一五一十地交代出来了。
E: Furthermore, according to the principle of "equivalent exchange," since we have passed your so-called trial, isn't it time for you to make your intentions clear to us?
Hm...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>吾想确认汝等是否有实力，为吾夺回正身…更从黑潮手中夺回树庭。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>I want to ascertain your ability to help me reclaim my true form... and reclaim the Grove from the black tide.</color>

C: 没受伤就好。
E: All that matters is you're alright.

C: 制空权已确保！
E: Air supremacy secured!

C: 「制空权已确保！」…好帅，但这是什么意思？
E: "Air supremacy secured!" ...That sounds so cool! But what does it mean?

C: …我知道了。
E: ...I see.

C: 至于那最后一份…<color=#dbc291ff>如今正在那刻夏的躯壳中，亟待修复呢</color>。
E: As for the last one... <color=#dbc291ff>It's currently in Anaxa's body, which is in dire need of repair</color>.

C: 我们接着赶路吧，阁下请跟紧我——阿格莱雅女士已经等了些时候了。
E: Let's keep moving. Don't stray far now — we've already kept Lady Aglaea waiting long enough.

C: 看来…一场恶战在所难免了。
E: It seems like... a fierce battle will be inevitable.

C: 无论发生什么，*我们*都会站在你背后的。
E: Regardless of what happens, we will always be there for you.

C: 走吧，让他们跟着也无妨。
E: They can follow us if they want to. Let's go.

C: 一段时间之前 云石天宫内
E: Some time before, in the Marmoreal Palace...

C: 但愿只是虚惊一场。相信{NICKNAME}和遐蝶吧，吾师……
E: Let's hope that it's just a false alarm. We should place our trust in {NICKNAME} and Castorice, teacher...

C: …我没看走眼吧？了不起的「救世主」，终于愿意出门见光了？
E: ...Am I seeing things? Is the magnificent Deliverer finally deigning to step outside?

C: 你自己…看着办……
E: Do... whatever... you want...

C: 但因为我从未加冕为王，那五人从未被册封…也无人知晓他们的荣耀。
E: But I have never been crowned, and those five were never endowed with any titles... None is aware of their glory.

C: 几位，你们是……
E: Hello... and you are...?

C: 你好。没记错的话，你是卡林尼库斯的妻子吧？
E: Hello. If I'm not mistaken, you are Callinicus' wife, right?

C: 吾师…为何要做到这个地步？
E: Teacher... why did you do this?

C: 母亲明明将它抛入冥海了……
E: What... Mother threw it into the Sea of Souls...

C: 或许吧。不过在找到船长前，小船还需要一位领航的伙伴，她是谁呢？
E: Perhaps. But before we find the captain, the ship also needs someone who can navigate it. Who could that be?

C: 那…就让「缇宁」来！她很乖，肯定能做个好老师。
E: Then... "Trinnon" can do it! She's well-behaved and would make a great teacher.

C: 你知道我根本不信——
E: You know that I don't believe—

C: 我记得，熟成的番红蕊都是装在瓮里密封起来的……
E: I remember that aged saffron is preserved in sealed jars...

C: …缇安，这里什么都没有啊？
E: ...But Trianne, there's nothing in here.

C: 我权赐你与悬锋众英灵，同享尸床的权利——
E: Rejoice, for I grant you the honor of sharing your final resting place with Kremnos' departed heroes!

C: 放心，那个男人是绝不会缺席这场战役的。
E: Don't worry. That man would never miss out on this fight.

C: 我只是在想，换做常人看见这行字句，恐怕此生都不会再接近浴场。
E: I was just thinking... if an ordinary person encountered these words, they would probably stay away from the baths for the rest of their life.

C: …和死亡、悲伤有关的话，我最近已经听太多啦。用缇宝大人的话说，我们都该望向「明天」，不是吗？
E: ...I've heard far too much about death and grief recently. To quote Lady Tribbie, we should all focus on tomorrow, shouldn't we?

C: 最好还是别让他们等太久了，你说呢？
E: We better not leave them waiting too long, don't you think?

C: 祝你战无不胜，迈德漠斯。
E: May triumph always be yours, Mydeimos.

C: 荣耀伴您左右。
E: May glory be with you.

C: 求之不得！让我享用后代的奠酒和熏烟，享用至高无上的荣光！
E: Good! Supreme glory shall be mine as I indulge in the libations and incense offered by my descendants!

C: 送我上绞架就没事了？
E: So, you're okay with sentencing me to the gallows?

C: 缇安大人，为什么…会变成这样呢？
E: Lady Trianne... Why did it have to end up like this?

C: 啊…对不起，缇宝大人，那我……
E: Ah... I'm sorry, Lady Tribbie. Should I...

C: *我们*第一次见它，还是很小的时候。妈妈带了一块好看的玻璃回来，可她脸上挂着泪痕，随手就把它放在桌上。
E: We were still very young the first time we saw it. Mother came back with a beautiful glass piece, but her face was streaked with tears. She simply placed it on the table.

C: 是的。答案很简单，就在书架上——你们可以亲手试试。
E: Yes, the answer is right on the shelf. Go ahead and give it a try.

C: 不用啦，女士，我就是出来散散步，马上就回去。
E: No need to trouble yourself. I'm just going for a quick walk.

C: 缇里西庇俄丝…你来了。
E: Tribios... you've come.

C: ——我，雅努萨波利斯的圣女，万径之践行人，前来接过你的{RUBY_B#火种}使命{RUBY_E#}。
E: — I, the Holy Maiden of Janusopolis, the walker of the infinite paths, have come forth to assume your {RUBY_B#Coreflame}duty{RUBY_E#}.

C: 他们的行事方式…确实令人不快。
E: Their conduct... is certainly irritating.

C: 好，放心吧。答案呼之欲出，你很快就得把身体还给我了。
E: Then, rest easy. The answer will soon be revealed, and you'll have to return my body shortly.

C: 你的声音变得…好成熟。
E: Your voice now sounds so... mature.

C: 一段时间后 命运重渊
E: Some time later, in Abyss of Fate

C: 嚯嗬嗬嗬，咱们就让路易斯•弗莱明好好歇歇吧。
E: Hohohoho... Let's just let Louis Fleming rest for now.

C: …据我所知，这场「圣杯战争」，理应只向家系之主、公司高管和星穹列车发出了邀请函——换言之，就是匹诺康尼的「决策者」们。
E: As far as I know, only The Family heads, IPC execs, and the Astral Express crew received invitations to this Holy Grail War — basically, the "decision-makers" of Penacony.

C: 所以，他把请柬转送给了我，说是我会感兴趣。
E: So he sent me the invite, said I might be interested.

C: 但如果他就等着我们上门，再把我们一锅端呢？
E: But what if they're waiting for us to come knocking, so they can wipe us all out in one go?

C: 既然你没办法使用自己的名字…那我该怎么称呼你呢？
E: Since you can't use your real name... what should I call you?

C: 姑且这样理解吧——所谓英灵，是被历史所铭记之人。经由圣杯的召唤，英灵会以「魔力」构成的身体现界，并使用其生前知名逸话所形成的特殊能力…「宝具」。
E: Let's put it like this — Heroic Spirits are those who have been remembered by history. When summoned by the Holy Grail, they materialize in the form of bodies made of "magical energy" and use special abilities, "Noble Phantasms," which are based on their famous deeds in life.

C: 而在决出最后的胜者前，没人能保证，你信任的这位{NICKNAME}和{F#她}{M#他}的Saber不会对我们刀剑相向。
E: And until the final winner is decided, no one can guarantee that your trusted {NICKNAME} and {M#his}{F#her} Saber won't turn their blades on us.

C: 对方布置好了陷阱，如果放弃支援，固然不必承受风险。但失去两位盟友，在之后的袭击中我们反倒会陷入更不利的境地。
E: The enemy has set up a trap. If we pull back now, we avoid the risk. But losing two allies would put us at an even greater disadvantage in later attacks.

C: 你想要冲出幻境吗？
E: Do you want to break free from this dream?

C: 这就是…石中剑吗？
E: So this is the Sword in the Stone...?

C: Saber——！
E: Saber—!

C: 公司专员来访。
E: Visit from IPC Specialists.

C: 帕姆还是老样子，但看着列车上的人越来越少，总归会有些寂寞吧。
E: Pom-Pom's still the same. But with fewer and fewer people on the Express, it must be getting lonely for them.

C: （好累，还是先回去吧，星穹列车……）
E: (I'm so tired... maybe I should head back first. The Astral Express...)

C: 音符小姐，既然舞台曾让你如此痛苦，为什么在离开囚牢后，你又一次选择留在了匹诺康尼的舞台上？
E: The performing arts had given you so much pain, Miss Note... Why did you choose to remain on Penacony's stage after leaving your prison?

C: 你的选择是正确的。
E: You made the right choice.

C: 那好，清理虫子就交给你了。一骑当千可算是王者的特长吧？
E: I'll leave the bug extermination to you then. Kings are good at facing down entire armies on their own, aren't they?

C: 非常好奇。
E: I'm indeed curious.

C: 比起这些，各位，我有个问题——这个世界的历史中，有可能诞生非灵长类的英灵吗？比如，广告牌，或者电视机什么的。
E: More importantly, everyone, I have a question. In this world's history, is it possible for a non-primate to become a Heroic Spirit? Say, a billboard? Or maybe a TV?

C: 那么，前面这家伙是……？
E: Then what's that thing up ahead...?

C: 怎么有狗在叫？
E: Why does it sound like a dog barking?

C: 我也得再加把劲了，虽然这家伙没什么明确的弱点，但如果能<color=#dbc291ff>找到Assassin的本体</color>，用弓箭好好地给他理个发。他创造的固有结界也就不复存在了吧。
E: I'd better pull my weight too. He might not have an obvious weak spot, but if we can <color=#dbc291ff>find Assassin's true body</color> and let my arrows give him a proper haircut, that Reality Marble of his would no longer exist.

C: 这位龙套先生，可不要污人清白！我只是按惯例打扫片场，免得无关紧要的道具出现破坏了场景。
E: Hey, hey! Don't go throwing shade, extra boy! I was just cleaning up the set as usual. Gotta make sure random props don't ruin the scene.

C: 接下来这场戏，讲的就是公司员工被困在怨灵的回廊里，受永恒折磨的故事。
E: The next scene is all about IPC employees trapped in a haunted hallway and cursed to suffer forever.

C: 各位演员，让你们看到了导演与演员争执的不堪场面。小瞧了「同谐」的力量，是我的失误，我也不该让你们聚在一块。
E: Apologies, cast and crew — you had to witness that little meltdown between director and actor. Underestimating the power of Harmony was on me. I also shouldn't have brought you all together.

C: 女士，这种时候，应该要说「谢谢你」，而不是「抱歉」这种丧气话。
E: Ma'am, this is where you say "thank you" instead of "sorry."

C: 就能召唤同谐星神？
E: We summon the Aeon of Harmony?

C: 呱呱！
E: *ribbit ribbit*

C: 相同的招式，你以为自己会有第二次机会吗……
E: You think you'll get a second chance with the same trick...?

C: 经过短暂的休息后，四散在片场各处的盟友终于合归一处。
E: After a short break, the scattered allies finally reconvened from across the set.

C: 我还是那句话。你是想先被切掉腿呢？还是先被砍下那只碍眼的手，砂、金、先、生？
E: I'll ask one more time. Shall I remove your legs first? Or should I start by cutting off that irritating hand of yours, Mis-ter-A-ven-tur-ine?

C: 匹诺康尼史上最伟大的导演免费伺候你们几个，你还敢有意见？给我安静听着！
E: You got the greatest director in Penacony's history giving you a show for free, and you've got complaints? Sit down and listen!

C: 干嘛？我只是补了最后一箭而已，让他发疯的可是你啊。
E: What? I simply offered him a final shot. You're the one who drove him insane.

C: 我没有说过吗？葛瑞迪先生，我是你的粉丝来着。
E: Did I never mention it to you? I'm your fan, Mr. Grady.

C: 他和圣杯就在那儿等着各位。从他的口中，你们会得到所有问题的答案。
E: Mr. Oti and the Holy Grail will be waiting for you there. You'll hear all the answers from him.

C: 你们觉得葛瑞迪的话可信吗？
E: Do you trust what Grady said?

C: 智库中没有这个世界的记录，甚至连名字都没有出现过。
E: There is no record of this world in the data bank... Not even a mention of its name.

C: 这位是？
E: You are...?

C: …原来如此，失敬。
E: Ah, I see. Pardon my ignorance, sir.

C: 这规矩怎么还玩文字游戏的……
E: Ugh, aren't the rules being too finicky with words?

C: 多谢。
E: Thank you.

C: 既然这位客人如此特殊，姬子小姐不用陪同吗？
E: Looks like this is one exceptional passenger. Don't you have to accompany her then, Miss Himeko?

C: 不错，亲自烹上一席好菜，总能使人念念不忘。
E: That sounds nice. People never forget a personally prepared home-cooked meal.

C: 能够沟通……啊，好像是有。
E: One that we can speak with...? Oh, I think there is one!

C: 就算你说得有道理，也不能套用在这里吧。
E: Even if that's true, it doesn't apply to her!

C: 若再不放心，在他进行「调律」时，各位也尽可对我加以控制。
E: If you still have concerns, you are also free to restrain me while he performs the tuning.

C: 啊，看——起效果了！
E: Ah, look! It's working!

C: 你…是谁？
E: Who... are you?

C: 「可以这么理解。」
E: "You can think of it that way."

C: 一小会而已。
E: Only for a little while.

C: 这你可决定不了吧！
E: That's not your decision to make!

C: 也正因如此，与列位同行的日子，小女子心头总有种别样的滋味。
E: And that's precisely why I haven't been able to shake off this strange feeling in the days since I started traveling with you.

C: 您好啊，女士。请问怎么称呼？
E: It's nice to meet you, Miss. May I know your name?

C: 「但只要你仍在这里遥望它们——」
E: "But as long as you continue to gaze upon them from here—"

C: 我就说会被发现的吧？
E: I told you he'd find out.

C: 您是否见过寿终正寝的老人？当生命迎来终结，他们往往会抬起双手，尽力伸向虚空，恰如婴儿呱呱坠地，最初的姿态也是高举双臂。
E: Have you ever seen the elderly at the end of their lives? As they welcome their final moments, they invariably raise their hands, stretching their arms into the emptiness. Much like how babies also stretch their arms into the air when they are first born.

C: 开始跃迁
E: Begin Warp Jump

C: 考虑到{RUBY_B#开拓力}列车燃料{RUBY_E#}问题，这趟出行最好计划得周密些。
E: Given the {RUBY_B#Trailblaze Power}Express' fuel{RUBY_E#} situation, it's worth us thinking through our options carefully.

C: 情况特殊，感觉也没得选。
E: We don't really have a choice in a time like this, do we?

C: 没人想去江户星吗？
E: No one wants to go to Edo Star?

C: 旅程中途，有所收获的时候…
E: The middle of the journey, when some gains are made.

C: 咱也是。这次翁法罗斯之旅，可要留下一张大家都满意的合照！
E: Me too! This time in Amphoreus let's make sure we get a group photo that everyone loves!

C: 我可是忆者。记忆是不会说谎的。
E: I am a Memokeeper, after all. Memories don't lie.

C: 收拾行李，准备跃迁。
E: Pack up and get ready to warp.

C: 各位乘客请注意——列车即将跃迁——请坐稳扶好帕——！
E: Attention, passengers. The Express is about to make the jump. Please be seated and hold on!

C: 是啊。不过，总得面对智库记录外的世界的。
E: It is. Still, encountering worlds that exist which are not recorded in the data bank is unavoidable.

C: 我没开玩笑，三月七呢？
E: Very funny... But seriously, where's March 7th?

C: 不说这些没用的了。你可知道，要给博识尊发送一段信息是多不容易的事，我可是下了血本——
E: Moving on. Don't try, but you wouldn't even begin to imagine how difficult it is to send a message to Nous. And I went all out for it...

C: 噢…所以让空间站进入静默是一种保护手段，避免让设备运转过载甚至报废？
E: I see... So letting the space station go into hibernation is a protective measure of sorts? To prevent it from slipping into operational overload and turning into a scrap world?

C: 白厄大人能记得我的名字，不胜荣幸。我们是雅努萨波利斯的祭司，家乡被「纷争」泰坦的军队摧毁，一路辗转流离至此。
E: It's an honor you remember me, Phainon. We are priests from Janusopolis. Armies of the Strife Titan destroyed our home, forcing us to flee across many lands until we arrived here.

C: 看来二位已经觉察了我们的苦衷，感谢理解。作为回报，想知道什么就尽管问吧。
E: I see you've both been made aware of our troubles. I'm grateful for your understanding, so in return, please ask me anything you wish to know.

C: 这尼卡多利不会和「毁灭」有关吧…
E: Do you think this Nikador is related to the Destruction?

C: 什么意思？
E: What do you mean?

C: 嘿，不告诉你！
E: Heh, it's a secret!

C: 看来两位确实遍历百险。
E: Looks like the both of you have indeed braved many dangers.

C: 冷静，维持阵型！
E: Stay calm, hold formation!

C: 本人闪亮登场！
E: Yours truly descended upon your world!

C: 有种不好的预感…
E: Why do I have a bad feeling about this...

C: 奇迹…活生生的奇迹！传出去，快把这故事讲给那吟游诗人听：边疆的英雄来到奥赫玛，在此建立起丰功伟业……
E: A miracle... A miracle fresh from the oven! Go, bring word to the bard: Frontier heroes grace Okhema, feats abound right here...

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent)

C: 火种之重，若想承受…必须埋葬过去，悬置痛苦。
E: The weight of the Coreflame, if you wish to bear... You must bury the past, suspend the pain.

C: 我吗？我就不必了，没关系……
E: Me? No, thanks. It's alright...

C: 遐蝶小姐是有什么顾虑么？我们初来乍到，希望能用实际行动拉近与各位的距离。
E: Miss Castorice, are you concerned about something? Since we've just arrived in this area, we hope to build closer relationships with everyone through our actions.

C: 你喜欢拍照？
E: Do you enjoy taking photos?

C: 啊…抱歉，只是个人爱好，我喜欢黑白的照片。如果两位介意，我再重拍一张。
E: Ah... My apologies, it's just personal preference. I like black and white photos. If it bothers you, I can take another photo.

C: 不必了。这样就好。
E: That won't be necessary. This is fine.

C: 打咩阿斯？阿米诺斯？不，我不知道你在说什么，朋友……
E: Dameas? Aminos? No, I don't know what you're talking about, friend...

C: 现在，我心中只有粉霞天女！
E: Right now, I only have the Rosy Celestial Maiden in my heart!

C: <size=28>粉霞天女！天外之界——！！</size>
E: <size=28>Rosy Celestial Maiden! A world beyond the sky!</size>

C: 再不行动的话……
E: If we don't take action...

C: 如何？您打算购入《{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}鏖战粉霞天女》了吗？
E: So, have you decided to purchase {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} Battles the Rosy Celestial Maiden?

C: 不过，瞧您这么喜欢，不如再看看我手上另一幅作品？它的名字叫《白厄与黑厄》——
E: However, since you like this so much, would you like to take a look at another piece that I have? It's titled Phainon and Pie-non.

C: 很难横向对比，但…空间更大，装潢也很华丽。
E: While it's hard to compare them directly, this place... is indeed more spacious, and the decor is quite impressive.

C: 美丽的天女，我多想一睹芳容……
E: My radiant maiden, how I wish to witness your beauty...

C: 粉霞天女？很流行吗？
E: Rosy Celestial Maiden? Is she famous?

C: 怎么偏偏倒在家门口啊……
E: Why did it have to fall right in front of our home...

C: 他刚才在喊…粉霞天女？
E: He was just shouting about... the Rosy Celestial Maiden?

C: 金色的丝线微微地颤动。
E: The golden thread trembles slightly.

C: 异乡人——<color=#dbc291ff>你体内有一股汹涌澎湃的未知力量…你是否愿意用它来协助黄金裔弑神？</color>
E: Outlander, <color=#dbc291ff>an unknown but surging power exists within your body... Are you willing to use it to aid the Chrysos Heirs in slaying the gods?</color>

C: 黄金裔都像你这么多疑吗？
E: Are all Chrysos Heirs as paranoid as you?

C: …我尊重二位的决定。
E: ...I respect your decision.

C: 我还活着。
E: I'm still alive.

C: 白厄说服了我网开一面。至于二位的去留，就由你们自己决定吧。
E: Phainon's words have convinced me to make an exception for you. Whether you stay or go after this is for you to decide.

C: …冷静。冷静。这次。下次？
E: ...Calm down. Calm down. This time. Next time?

C: 我坦度不一定够。
E: I might not be tanky enough, though.

C: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}
E: {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}

C: 万敌
E: Mydei

C: 很好，这样就畅通无阻了。
E: Great. Should be smooth sailing from here.

C: 我是悬锋之子，神谕中的黄金裔。我为你带来了最公平的价码——
E: I am a son of Kremnos and a Chrysos Heir of the prophecy, and I now offer you the fairest deal—

C: 前进的路被铁球挡住了……
E: The road ahead is blocked by the iron ball...

C: 小心——有敌人。
E: Look out! An enemy!

C: 「纷争」和「死亡」曾形影不离。鼎盛时的{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}重视荣耀，绝不会背叛盟友。
E: Strife and Death used to be inseparable. {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} valued honor in their glory days, so they would never have betrayed their allies back then.

C: {RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}，命运三泰坦的第二位。传说中，是它创造了世界运行的「律法」。
E: {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}, the second of the Three Titans of Fate. They were said to have created the laws that govern our world.

C: 不是每位泰坦都如{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}那般暴戾…而它也并非一直如此。
E: Not every Titan is as violent as {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}... They weren't always like that either.

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 我对这段对话完全没有印象…姬子和丹恒的语气也变得很不一样。这到底是……
E: I have no recollection of this conversation at all... Himeko and Dan Heng's tone also seem different. What exactly is going on...?

C: 我做了什么令你不快的事吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: {NICKNAME}, did I do something that made you unhappy?

C: 话不要只说一半…
E: Don't leave me hanging...

C: 我无法理解…这一切到底有什么意义？
E: I don't understand... What's the point of all of this?

C: 我把一切都忘了…
E: I have forgotten everything...

C: 当心，你可不是不死之身。
E: Be careful, you're not indestructible.

C: 我们也有自己的战场。
E: We have our own battle to face.
(Big sis...)

C: …嘁，这趟可真倒霉！怎么偏偏就遇上了这么麻烦的人物……
E: ...Tsk! What rotten luck! Why did I have to bump into her...

C: 哦？这位恬静的女士居然对兵器感兴趣？可以可以，请随便看！
E: Oh? A gentle lady like you taking an interest in weapons? Why, of course! Please, feel free to take a closer look!

C: 我…我很好，{NICKNAME}阁下。不必担心。
E: I... I'm fine, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. There's no need to worry.

C: 终于，我们找到一切的源头了……
E: We've finally found the root of everything...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>你们将与一位几近鼎盛的泰坦战斗；同时，弑神的荣光也将在你们面前绽放。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>You will go into battle with a Titan nearly at the zenith of their powers. And when that happens, the glory of slaying a god will also be presented before you.</color>

C: 所以…你做好觉悟了吗，哀丽秘榭的白厄？
E: So I will ask you once more... Have you made up your mind, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae?

C: 也该想想我们自己了。
E: About time we consider ourselves, too.

C: ——是这张牌？它的名字叫「救世主」。
E: ...This card is the Deliverer.
But...

C: 事态发展至此，我身为领路人难辞其咎。你们一次次为奥赫玛挺身而出，仅凭一樽蜜露早已难表谢意。
E: It is difficult for me as the guide to absolve myself from blame for things to have progressed to this point. Time and again, you have risen to the occasion for Okhema. Merely rewarding you with some Honeydew is no longer able to express the extent of our gratitude.

C: 人家？
E: Me?

C: {RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}祝福你，英雄。
E: May {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} bless you.

C: 世界的命运…你若要…拯救……
E: The fate of the world... if you wish to... save it...

C: 我听见你们在谈论{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}。那句告诫，小蝶也很在意。
E: I heard you two talking about {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}. Cas is also very concerned about the warning.

C: 对不起，我只是想再确认一次……
E: I'm sorry, I just wanted to verify once again...

C: 此前在树庭，我还疑惑阁下为何不会受到我的诅咒影响。我还以为是天外旅客的异能，可没想到，竟然是这种原因……
E: Back at the Grove, I was puzzled as to why you were not affected by my curse. I thought that it might have been the special ability of a traveler from beyond the sky. Never did I expect that this would be the true reason...

C: 正是。「死」是一个动作，一个过程；「死亡」则是一种状态，一种终结。
E: Yes, for dying implies an ongoing process, an action, whereas death signifies a static state, a definitive termination.

C: 哼…反正你我都时日无多了，说说也无妨。
E: Hmph... Since our days are both numbered, I don't mind telling you more about it.

C: 单凭一只眼睛为代价，就想从{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}手中夺回逝者，还是太过天真了……
E: It was naive of me to think that I could snatch the deceased from {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}' grip by merely sacrificing one eye...

C: 当然，我明白。所谓博弈不过各取所需，只要诉求合理，元老院向来不会亏待他的盟友。既然你我都有合作的意愿，不妨打开天窗说亮话——
E: I understand. After all, this battle of wits is just a means for each party to acquire what they need. As long as your request is reasonable, the Council of Elders never shortchanges its allies. Since we're both intent on mutual cooperation, let's not mince words and just speak plainly to each other...

C: 诚然，她有充分的理由对你痛下杀手，可阁下所说也不无道理：身为老练的政治动物，她是否真会跨越那道底线还犹未可知，况且她还需要您来完成泰坦的试炼……
E: Admittedly, there is ample reason for her to take your life. Yet, your previous reasoning is quite sound. As a seasoned political animal, it's unclear whether she will actually cross that irreversible boundary. Moreover, she still needs you alive so that the Titan's trial can be completed...

C: 我不信泰坦，不信神谕，更不会心甘情愿走在她宣扬的道路上。她的眼中向来揉不得沙子，又岂会容下我这个异端？
E: Since I believe in neither Titans nor the prophecy, there's no way that I would willingly walk on the path that she extols. Given how rigorously she enforces her principles, how would she ever accept a heretic such as me?

C: 走吧，阁下，让我与你们同行一程。
E: Please, go ahead. Let me join you both on this journey.

C: 遐蝶，你变了…
E: Castorice... you've changed.

C: 咦？真、真的？那太好了！真是功夫不负有心人…还有有心迷迷！
E: Really!? That's fantastic news! I knew it! Hard work always pays off! Especially if you're as diligent as Mem!

C: 但你已经知道「明天」在哪里了，对吗？
E: But you already know where "tomorrow" is, don't you?

C: 其实，我冒昧登门拜访，是出于一些…私人的心愿。
E: I'm here because of private matters, actually...

C: 没错。现在，我是奥赫玛的「入殓师」……
E: Yes. You now know me as the mortician of Okhema...

C: 可在那之后，我甚至都没有再次确认的勇气…直到{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}剖白残酷的事实，带来你我面前。
E: And from that moment on, I lacked the courage to confirm it again... Until {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} laid bare the cruel truth before us.

C: 礼物…不见了？！
E: Where... did it go?

C: 来吧，轻松点，来谈谈正事？
E: Loosen up, buddy! Shall we get down to business?

C: 别去找什么死亡泰坦了——就这么简单。
E: Don't go look for the Death Titan. The end.

C: 再多的不便细说，你只需知道，斯缇科西亚我们非去不可。
E: I can't go into the details, but we have to go to Styxia.

C: 亡魂们之前遇见的生者，莫非就是……
E: Could it be that... You are the living being that those souls met...?

C: 随后，那往昔的景象倏然散去……
E: Then, the scenes of the past abruptly dissipated...

C: 咦，他怎么那么惊慌？是被黑潮造物吓到了吗？
E: Huh? Why does he look so panicked? Did the black tide monsters frighten him?

C: 所以他找到了我，请求我…了结这一切。
E: That's why he approached me and pleaded... Pleaded for me to put an end to all of this.

C: 那位…斯缇科西亚的女王。
E: ...A tale told by the Queen of Styxia.

C: 小小蝶，虽然我们不知道，你之前的旅途是什么样。缇宝总说，那一定是很重很重，很让人害怕的旅途。
E: Little Cas, we don't know what your journey was like before. Tribbie has always said that it must have been a very harsh and frightening journey.

C: 也正因此，要想取出「死亡」的火种，我们唯有使玻吕刻斯从死亡中苏醒……
E: And that's why we have to awaken Pollux from death before we can retrieve the Coreflame of "Death"...

C: 你一路上好像叹过很多次气。
E: You sighed many times on the way here...

C: 是你吗…玻吕茜亚？
E: Is that you... Polyxia?

C: 啊…以前这条路反而是走不通的吗？
E: Huh... So this path actually didn't exist back then?

C: ——奥赫玛正直的公民，哀丽秘榭的白厄，将为本场大会带来最后的演说！
E: Phainon of Aedes Elysiae, virtuous citizen of Okhema and the last speaker of the assembly.

C: 迷路了吗？我们都在前面。
E: Are you lost? We're all waiting for you ahead.

C: 姬子小姐，试想一下，如果一个人失去了「记忆的能力」会怎样？
E: Think about it, Miss Himeko. What will happen when someone loses their ability to remember?

C: 很遗憾，我并无权限为您说明更多。
E: Regrettably, I do not have the authority to share more information.
Heh...

C: 嗯，落在肩头的重担又多了一桩呢。
E: Yeah... There's no rest for the weary, huh.

C: …不是什么有价值的信息。
E: ...This isn't going to be of any help, that's for sure.

C: 那刻夏格外关注黄金裔流淌的「神性」，还对英雄们的背景做了细致考察。
E: Anaxa seems to hold special interest in the divinity coursing through the Chrysos Heirs' veins, and has even conducted a thorough investigation into the heroes' backgrounds.

C: 那刻夏想通过炼金，让黄金裔体内的「金血」更加纯粹，以至抵达神性。
E: Through alchemy, Anaxa aims to refine the golden blood in the Chrysos Heirs to a degree of purity equal to "divinity."

C: 所以，奥赫玛的天空也是虚假的。
E: So, the skies of Okhema are fake, too.

C: 如果「黄金世」能实现的话…
E: If it's possible to bring "Era Chrysea" back...

C: 盗火行者迟早会盯上这里！
E: But this place will become the Flame Reaver's target sooner or later!

C: 元老院早就脸面扫地了。
E: The Council of Elders has long fallen into disgrace.

C: 可怜见，命运当真是如此残忍哪。
E: It is a pity that fate is such a cruel mistress.

C: 呵，死者能称作至纯粹者么？而且，倘若汝那猜想得以证明，岂不反坐实了神话的真实性，令汝的理论前功尽弃？
E: Heh, can someone who's dead even claim to be the purest of them all? Furthermore, if your hypothesis is proven correct, does it not just confirm that the myths are true and thereby invalidate all your theories?

C: 历史发生的时序已为既定……
E: The sequence of historical events is already set...

C: …「晨昏斗转，控驭浑象——」
E: ..."The turn of dawn and dusk, commanding the celestial globe..."

C: 以一则<color=#dbc291ff>被粉饰成英雄传说，流传千年的谎言</color>为开篇，写下了壮烈的创世史诗……
E: Beginning with <color=#dbc291ff>a lie disguised as a heroic legend, passed down for millennia</color>, a grand epic of creation has been written...

C: 成功了！我们走！
E: It worked! Let's go!

C: 稳住脚下！电梯井很长…赶在坠入黄金池前干掉它！
E: Stand firm! It's a long way down... Let's end them before we crash into the pool of gold!

C: 看来是我错怪你们了——2线网速确实还赶不上肉身传书呢。
E: Looks like I was too quick to judge — physical note-passing still outpaces the reduced threads.

C: 对对对，就是这样！火种、你拿去；小命，我留下……
E: That's the spirit! You get the Coreflame, and I get to keep breathing — everyone wins!
*sigh* ...

C: …什么轮回、宿命，别逗我了！哪个人的路不是靠自己走出来的？天天指望着神明和预言保佑的家伙，才会活成这幅人不人鬼不鬼的模样吧？
E: ...Cycles, fate? Give me a break! Everyone has to walk their path! Those who cling to gods and prophecies end up as hollow shells of themselves.

C: 创…世……
E: Cre... ation...

C: 这有什么难的？*我们*现在就可以教你！来吧，*我们*念一句，你跟着念一句——
E: It's easy! We can teach you right now. Let's go — we will say a line, and you repeat after us.

C: 我当然知道。
E: Of course I know that.

C: 万敌，愿你战无不胜。
E: Mydei, may your battles know no defeat.

C: 我确实在持续搜集线索，做各种尝试。可惜了解得越多，无力感也就越强。
E: I've been actively gathering clues and testing different things. Sadly, the more I find out, the more powerless I feel.

C: 这地方就有一点好，想看什么题材的都能找到。
E: That's the charm of this place. You can find whatever you're into here.

C: 耕耘月，幕匿时，宜食稻麦作物，忌垂钓……
E: Month of Cultivation, Curtain-Fall Hour, a time to feast on grains, but a poor time for fishing...

C: 他们是谁？
E: Who are they?

C: 裁缝女，我如约来了！瞧这满满一箱金银财宝，我敢打赌，准有你没见过的稀罕玩意！
E: Seamstress, I've come as promised! Look at this box full of gold and silver treasures. I bet there's stuff here you've never seen!

C: 桀桀桀，快让我戴上试试…嘢？
E: Hehe, let me try this on... Huh?

C: 哈哈哈哈——
E: Hahahaha —

C: …咳，那不是扎格列斯之手的控制装置嘛？
E: ...Ahem, isn't that a controller for the Hand of Zagreus?

C: 两脚贼灵在行动~
E: Spirithief goes, Spirithief goes~

C: 缇宝老师，我……
E: Lady Tribbie, I...

C: 哈…尚未夺得泰坦神权的区区凡夫，口气倒是狂妄得很。
E: Ha... A bold statement for a mere mortal who hasn't yet claimed the power of a Titan.

C: 你记得很清楚…这很好。
E: Well said. You've got a good memory.

C: …裁缝女，你真的没在用金线偷看我的想法嘛？
E: ...Look, seamstress. Are you sure you aren't peeking into my head with your golden threads?

C: …真是进退两难的处境啊。
E: ...What a dangerous situation we find ourselves in.

C: 是为了防止不够资格的人白白丢了性命吗？
E: Is it to prevent those who are not qualified from pointlessly losing their lives?

C: 啊——我大概能猜到那是谁啦。
E: Ah. I think I know who that is.

C: 悬锋城……
E: Castrum Kremnos...

C: 那边——在那里沉睡的英魂，是我的祖母。
E: There — that sleeping spirit... is my grandmother.

C: 只有足够强大的心灵才能学会宽恕。你并不逊于你的先祖们，风堇。
E: It takes true courage to forgive. You're every bit as strong as your ancestors, Hyacine.

C: 祖母在最后的日记中说，她希望当使命召唤之时，天空一族的后人能将启程的消息带给她留在世间的魂灵。
E: In her final diary entry, my grandmother wrote that when the moment of destiny comes, a descendant of the Sky people would deliver the message of their departure to her spirit.

C: 那翅翼折断、伤痕累累的天空英雄，艰难抬起长枪…将那最后一只恫世的巨眼穿透。
E: The battered hero of the sky, with her wings broken and her body covered in wounds, struggled to lift her spear... and pierced the last monstrous eye.

C: 想必英雄塞涅俄丝就是站在这里向艾格勒宣战，<color=#dbc291ff>翻开了人类逐火征程的第一页……</color>
E: This must be where the hero Seliose stood when she challenged Aquila and <color=#dbc291ff>began the first step of the Flame-Chase Journey...</color>

C: ——出现了！
E: ...There we are!

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「晨昏斗转，控驭浑象——」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"The turn of dawn and dusk, commanding the celestial globe..."</color>

C: 女孩，你说自己是名医师？
E: Girl, you said you're a doctor?

C: 是艾格勒做的吗？
E: Did Aquila do that?

C: 猎场在呼唤我们。走吧，索拉比斯。
E: The hunting ground beckons. Come, Solabis.

C: 但我却从这段记忆里感受到了不祥的征兆…后来发生了什么，露奈比斯阁下？
E: Yet, from this memory, I sense something ominous... What happened later, Lady Lunabis?

C: 我已唤来了虹桥。沿着它行进，在穹顶了结人子与那泰坦的命运纠葛吧。
E: I've called forth the Rainbow Bridge. Proceed along its path to the dome where the entwined fates of humanity and the Titan must be resolved.

C: 只是高高在上地发号施令，或是习惯了替别人做决定的人…是很难感受到他人的真心的。
E: It's hard to truly understand others when you're always giving orders to them or making decisions for them.

C: …或许吧。
E: ...Perhaps.

C: 该感谢的另有其人。刚才那些黑潮造物，无法突破这道屏障……
E: It is someone else who deserves your thanks. Those black tide creatures just now couldn't breach this barrier...

C: 从天而降，虹色的屏障。保护了人们…但无法根除，恐惧。
E: Descended from the sky, the rainbow barrier did. Protected the people... but alleviated the fear, it could not.

C: 这到底是怎么回事…
E: What in the world is going on...

C: …而你，白厄阁下，将用那枚火种埋葬旧世，将万物带入一片灰色的未知——
E: But you, Lord Phainon, will bury the old world with that Coreflame, bringing all things into a gray unknown...

C: 走吧，伙伴，我们找昔涟去。昨天约好了，再陪她看一次「神谕牌」。算算时间，差不多是时候了……
E: Let's go find Cyrene, partner. We promised to be there for her oracle card reading today. It's right about time...

C: 眼前的少女，带着捉摸不透的秘密，对你的态度非常可亲……
E: The girl before you carries an air of mystery, her secrets elusive, yet her demeanor toward you is exceptionally warm...

C: 不过，时隔多年未见，又以这样特别的方式指引我们前来…是出什么事了吗，村长大人？
E: Still... bringing us here like this after so long... Is something wrong, Chief?

C: 你们原来的安排是？
E: What were you planning to do?

C: 来吧，闭上眼，轻轻地打开神谕牌册……
E: Close your eyes, and let's open the Oracle Card Book together...

C: 悬锋一族战士的心愿都已经了却，至于我——
E: The wishes of the Kremnoan warriors are done. But I—

C: 他的理想全靠你实现了。
E: His ambitions rest on your shoulders.

C: 不要去，躲在迷境里吧。
E: Stay here, safe in the Maze.

C: 并非从一开始就完美无缺，站在高高的云端，将慈悲的目光投向整个世界……
E: Not someone perfect from the start, standing high above, casting merciful gazes upon the world...

C: 一副成竹在胸的样子啊，悬锋人。不如透露一下，你打算如何诠释「沉重」二字？
E: You seem awfully confident, Kremnoan. Let's see how you define the idea of "weight."

C: 这场角斗关乎圣城的明天，既然站在这里，我就要为它摘得胜利。
E: The fate of Okhema hangs on this duel. I must claim victory, for their sake.

C: 或成为此世…下一座焦碑…！
E: Or become the next epitaph... seared upon this burning world!

C: 那所谓的「再创世」…究竟是什么？
E: What, then, is this so-called "Era Nova"?

C: 这是值得为宇宙铭记的一刻。千万次演算过后，名为「翁法罗斯」的实验场，终于迎来了成果。
E: This is a moment the universe will remember. After millions of extrapolations, the experimental environment known as "Amphoreus" has finally achieved results.

C: 是啊。所以，我只能寄希望于童年的那场梦……
E: Yeah. So, I can only place my hopes on that childhood dream...

C: 水流到此为止，你寻找的人，就在这之后了。
E: The waters end here. The one you seek is beyond this point.

C: 你为何连一滴眼泪都没有流下？
E: Why didn't you shed even a single tear?

C: 我还以为…「轮回」就是你想要的答案。
E: I thought... "cycles" was the answer you were looking for.

C: 意思是，你愿意帮忙？
E: What's that supposed to mean? You're willing to help?

C: 看在你我也曾为师生的份上，回头吧。我不在乎你已经尝试了多少次，因为有一件事我已十分明了——
E: For old times' sake, turn back. I don't care how many times you've tried, because there's one thing I'm sure of—

C: 「救世主」…我愿你…常战常胜。
E: Deliverer... I wish you... eternal victory.

C: 我…别无选择。
E: I... never had a choice.

C: 「纷争」的追忆啊，为我所用——
E: The memory of "Strife" is mine to use...

C: 救世主啊，请为我…敞开心胸吧。
E: Deliverer, please... open your heart to me.

C: 别了…雅辛忒丝。
E: Farewell... Hyacinthia.

C: 醒醒…{NICKNAME}…醒醒…！
E: Wake up... {NICKNAME}... Wake up...!

C: 这样，你就能带着全部的过往，跨越时间，去往轮回的下一站。
E: This way, you'll carry all that has come before, crossing time itself to reach the next cycle.

C: 你是昔涟…还是迷迷？
E: Are you Cyrene... or Mem?

C: 纳努克投来视线的同时，「白厄」的信号从轮回中消失了。现在「负世」的逻辑出现了漏洞，而它正和「创世」进程直接关联。
E: Phainon's signal disappeared from the cycles the moment Nanook cast THEIR gaze this way. That means Worldbearing's computational logic is currently flawed and bugged, yet it's the factor directly related to the process of "genesis."

C: 执行：记录指令。
E: Executing command: Record.

C: 快醒醒呀，要是再不起来，人家只能……
E: Wake up! Otherwise, I'll have to...

C: 混账——
E: You impudent...

C: 为尊卑有序，世人为我写下许多名号：止战的「燃冕者」、云崖的「独裁官」、圣城的「女皇」、逐火的「凯撒」。但鉴于两位的特殊身份，我准许你们直呼本名——
E: For the sake of order, I am known by many titles: "Flamecrowned" who ends wars, "Tyrant" of Dawncloud, "Empress" of the holy city, and "Imperator" of the Flame-Chase. But in light of your unique identities, I'll allow you to address me by my real name...

C: 「开拓」二周目，总有办法。
E: Trailblaze: The Sequel — we always find a way.

C: 身为人臣，我不便自作主张，随意表态。还望两位谅解。
E: As a humble subject, I cannot freely express my own views to you. Please forgive me.

C: 是你…谁来着？
E: Who are you again?

C: 逐火军对海洋泰坦的狩猎，即日开始。限同盟诸邦于长夜月内交出军权，并缴齐战税，以便筹备战事。
E: The Flame-Chase Army's hunt for the Ocean Titan begins today. In order to prepare for war, all allied city-states must surrender command of their militaries and pay all war taxes by the end of the Month of Evernight.

C: 退下吧，神礼观众。我心中已有定数。
E: Off you go, Theoros. I have already made my decision.

C: 哦？两位贵客，又见面了。看来散会后想来浴场散心的，不止我一个啊。
E: Oh? Honored guests, we meet again. Looks like I'm not the only one who came to the baths to unwind after the meeting.

C: 一声不响地闯入此地，是无意踏错洋流，还是…有意与我共浴？
E: You barged into here without warning. Was it an accident, or... did you wish to bathe with me?

C: 您是想说…最极致的自由，对生命而言反而最残忍么？
E: Are you suggesting... that ultimate freedom is in fact the cruelest fate for life?

C: 还真像模像样。
E: Not a bad imitation.

C: 哼，至少悬锋人还会坚守自己的信仰…！
E: At least Kremnoans keep their faith...!

C: 果然，救世主也来了。正巧小维吉妮娅在犹豫要不要去找你呢。
E: Ah. So the Deliverer is attending this event, as expected. Little Verginia here was just wondering whether she should go find you.
That's...

C: 吾师，恐怕你最没资格说我了。
E: You're the least qualified to lecture me about that, teacher.

C: 时而平静、时而猛烈，这便是「海洋」的滋味。在启程面对法吉娜的波涛前，你理应先熟悉它的善变。
E: Calm at times, tempestuous at others... That's the taste of the "Ocean." It'll do you good to understand Phagousa's fickleness before we set off to face their waves.

C: 不，{NICKNAME}……
E: No, {NICKNAME}...

C: （…仔细组织语言吧。）
E: (...Let's {F#try to }watch our words carefully.)

C: 觉不觉得有点冷？
E: Don't you feel a bit cold?

C: 你…也憎恨星神吗？
E: You... also hate the Aeons?

C: （一个诞育绝灭大君的世界，一定会引来「毁灭」的关注，我肚子里的星核有大用咯。）
E: (A world that'll give rise to a Lord Ravager would definitely draw the attention of the Destruction. The Stellaron in my belly is gonna be super useful~)

C: （来古士不想让这场故事有配乐吗，真是个没品味的观众……）
E: (Doesn't Lygus want this story to have background music? He has such terrible taste...)

C: 还愣着干嘛，你不会很喜欢这个地方吧？快走啦！
E: What are you standing around for? Do you actually like this place? Get moving!

C: 就现状而言，这也是奥赫玛拥有的唯一选择。照我说的做吧……
E: In the current situation, this is the only path Okhema has left. Just do as I say...

C: 当她终于遂愿，却发现斯缇科西亚重蹈前世的覆辙，已被「死亡」吞没……
E: When she fulfilled her wish, she only found Styxia to have already repeated the mistakes of previous cycles and was swallowed by Death...

C: 快看，王也来到席中了！
E: Look! The monarch herself has taken her seat!

C: 法吉娜的蜜露…
E: Phagousa's Honeydew...

C: 就像翁法罗斯的每一个人，都在等待「救世主」的归来。
E: Like how everyone in Amphoreus was also waiting for the Deliverer's return.

C: 但你说的没错。如果只是打造另一座牢笼，问题的本质并不会被解决。
E: But you're not wrong. We're definitely not gonna solve the problem if we just put you in another prison.

C: 你早已死去了，凯撒。离开我的心吧。
E: You died long ago, Imperator. Depart from my mind.

C: 多亏你们的帮助，我们才能顺利度过危机。与公司的合作，既是机遇，也是挑战…但无论如何，都是我们回归宇宙的重要一步。
E: It's all thanks to you that we survived the crisis. The collaboration with the IPC is both an opportunity and a challenge... Nonetheless, it's an important step in our journey back into the universe.

C: 这是一场有去无回的远航。背负神谕的你们，不得随行。
E: This will be a long voyage with no return. Those of you who bear the prophecy cannot come with me.

C: 听好，我的同胞：不妨与黄金裔一同放眼天外，将下一场列神之战的全部敌手纳入计算，重新考量。
E: Listen, my peers. Why don't you look beyond this world, just as the Chrysos Heirs did? Re-evaluate your calculations, and take into account all enemies in the upcoming war among the Aeons.

C: 我只警告一次——立刻，离开她的身体。
E: I'll only warn you once. Leave her body. Now.

C: 但也正因如此，耐心才会成为鄙人最强有力的武器。我已经等待了很久，还可以等待更久。
E: But patience became my strongest weapon because of this. I've always waited for so long. What's a bit more waiting?

C: 俱乐部的人个个特立独行，我们也没打算靠说服「打开」你的思维。既然辩论陷入僵局……
E: Every member of the Society has their own way of thinking, and we were never going to "expand" your thinking through words. Since we've reached an impasse in this debate...

C: 你窃取了我的记忆？
E: Did you steal my memories?

C: 我回来了么？但为什么…完全没有返程的记忆？
E: Am I back already? But why don't I remember anything about my journey back?

C: 在场各位都会被撕成碎片。
E: Everyone here will be torn to pieces.

C: 我权当这是褒奖，收下了。
E: I'll take that as a compliment.

C: 后来的<unbreak>97</unbreak>天，她——我们一起，一边躲避{RUBY_B#「智识」}监管者{RUBY_E#}的追捕，一边以迷因状态「开拓」翁法罗斯。
E: Over the next <unbreak>97</unbreak> days, she — no, the two of us — "trailblazed" through Amphoreus as memetic entities as she evaded the {RUBY_B#The Erudition}administrator's{RUBY_E#} pursuit.

C: 封锁解除了，没想到这本书会在这里发挥作用……
E: The seal's gone. Didn't think this book would have a use here...

C: 看来，也是最后一次啦。
E: ...And it looks like it'll also be the last.

C: 《如我所书》共十二章，分别对应十二位半神。
E: There are twelve chapters in As I've Written, corresponding to the twelve demigods.

C: 祂明明知道，却纵容「毁灭」？
E: THEY knew what was going on, yet still allowed the Destruction to thrive?

C: 「我知道，祂的视线从未离去。」
E: "I knew THEIR gaze never left."

C: 是吗？你…在鼓励我吗？
E: Really? Are you... encouraging me?

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>错误进程：解析中……</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Process error: Analyzing...</color>

C: 这样一来，等到「救世主」降临，最先映入眼帘的就是一片无垠的花海啦。
E: That way, when the "Deliverer" arrives, the first thing they'll see is an endless sea of flowers.

C: 难道窃忆者的行动还不够证明吗？他们竭力促成「铁墓」完成，绝不是为了虚无缥缈的记忆。让我告诉你真正的原因吧……
E: Aren't the Memosnatchers' activities enough evidence? They did everything they could to help Irontomb reach completion, and it wasn't just to obtain some fanciful memories. Let me tell you the real reason...

C: 而对于这样一个无法回头的世界，「无瑕」唯一的定义……
E: But the only way for a world that can't be turned back to be considered "flawless"...

C: 如果你真心认为我们有赞同的可能……
E: If you honestly thought we would agree with you...

C: 你的视线仿佛温柔的风拂过那些轮回的记忆，不忍与哀悯紧紧揪住你的心。
E: Your gaze, like a gentle breeze, drifted across those memories of countless cycles, as reluctance and sorrow clutched tightly at your heart.

C: 成功了。接下来，再将扇叶旋转到合适的位置……
E: That's it. Now, turn the fan blades to the right position...

C: 喔…是那个时候？
E: Oh... you mean that time?

C: 还要大声说：「怎么让我等了那么久！不知道要走快一点嘛？」
E: And shout: "What took you so long to find me! Don't you know how to move faster?"

C: ——嗯，在完成这场「开拓」以后，手拉手一起回家！
E: Mm-hmm. After we complete this Trailblaze, let's hold hands and head home together!

C: 航线会议即将开始！请乘客们前往观景车厢，合议下一站的目的地帕！
E: Attention all passengers! The navigation meeting is about to begin! Make your way to the Parlor Car — it's time to pick our next stop!

C: 什么意思？
E: What do you mean?

C: 「我知道这很难，但你能做到。」
E: "It won't be easy, I know, but you've got this."

C: 不好说，估摸着要几分钟吧？
E: Hard to say... Maybe a few more minutes?

C: 粉色的小姑娘，怎么赢得过我们呢？
E: How could that little pink girl possibly beat us?

C: 也正好免去我的心理负担。
E: What I do won't weigh on my conscience.

C: 相比刚才，这里静得有些出奇了。
E: It's unusually quiet here compared to before.

C: 令一切走向无可挽回的，也是我。
E: And the one who brought everything past the point of no return... that was also me.

C: 看来是了。那些侵扰你的幻影……
E: It seems so. These phantoms that are haunting you...

C: 是你…保护了我？
E: Was it you... who protected me?

C: 也谢谢你，遐蝶。
E: Thank you too, Castorice.

C: 这是自然。一个封闭在权杖中的世界，要如何看见自己在外层空间的模样？
E: Naturally. How could a world enclosed within the scepter have a way of knowing what it looks like from outer space?

C: 不能太得意，连他都无从知晓的秘密，一定极其特殊，或者…极其危险。
E: Best not get carried away. For something to be hidden even from him, it must be either extraordinary... or unimaginably dangerous.

C: 她说的，是三月七？
E: Is she talking about March 7th?

C: 「若你仍在密谋加害几位无名客，俱乐部此前的警告绝非虚言。」
E: "If you still plot to harm the Nameless, then you will find that the Society's previous warnings were not empty threats."

C: 你果然不打算出手。
E: You really have no intention of fighting, do you?

C: 再度苏醒。
E: To wake up.

C: 某位树庭贤者曾做过实验：取一枚奇兽胚胎，在长成前摘下它的头颅，向其身体持续输入刺激，让奇兽相信自己仍有大脑，置于灵液匣中培育。
E: A sage from the Grove once conducted an experiment. He took a chimera embryo, removed its head before maturity, and continuously stimulated its body to make the chimera believe it still had a brain, then nurtured it in an ichor vessel.

C: 我早已遗忘了它，仅此而已。
E: I simply forgot long ago. Nothing more.

C: 这一切，说是奇迹也不为过。
E: It wouldn't be an exaggeration to call it a miracle.

C: 此世，他们将燃烧的金血熔进身躯。
E: In this world, they fused burning golden ichor into their bodies.

C: 星际和平公司，通讯正常。
E: Interastral Peace Corporation, communications normal.

C: 习俗…会让整座城市在一瞬间静默么？
E: A custom... that makes an entire city fall silent in an instant?

C: 「生命的第一因」——这是权杖δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak>最初负责的课题，遭到废弃后，其求解仍在进行。虽然这一问题的价值在于求解过程，而非答案本身……
E: "The prime mover of life"... that's what Scepter δ-me<unbreak>13</unbreak> was originally tasked with. Even after it got scrapped, the query kept running. Yet, the true value lies in the process of solving it, not the answer itself...

C: 装腔作势。
E: Melodramatic.

C: 万千生灵，都在「浪漫」和「门径」的结网下度过平凡、安然的一生。
E: All beings living ordinary and peaceful lives within the net woven by Romance and Passage.

C: 该出发了，别让白厄久等。
E: Time to go. Let's not keep Phainon waiting.

C: 当然。那一程记忆犹新，我不会忘记。
E: Indeed. That journey remains vivid in my memory. I will not forget it.

C: 还有一种可能，他设下的封印不止这一处。
E: There's another possibility. This may not be the only seal he left behind.

C: 这朵寻常却坚强的花儿，已经足够合适。
E: This ordinary, resilient bloom would be more than enough.

C: 你这么一说…还真是！
E: Huh... you've actually got a point!

C: 史诗的每一笔都是鲜活的「生命」，这点毋庸置疑。
E: An epic is shaped by the lives it carries. That much is beyond doubt.

C: 缇里西庇俄丝女士？
E: Lady Tribios?

C: 那意味着，他仍在背负这个世界。
E: It means he's still bearing the weight of the world.

C: 这条路，我也要重走一次吗？
E: So, I need to walk this path too?

C: 在他人眼中，它们可谓「杰出」。但只有我自己知晓，其中有多少遗憾。
E: Others may call them "masterpieces." But only I know how many regrets they truly hold.

C: 胜券在握吗？未必。但我无意久留，因为不想扰了那几位「救世主」的兴致……
E: Assured? Not quite. But I won't stay long. I'd rather not spoil the fun for those Deliverers...

C: 我的愿望……
E: My wish...

C: 我来接过你反抗的接力棒。
E: I'll take up the torch of your resistance.

C: 那其中，不止有「你们」，还有「无数个你们」。
E: And it won't just be "you" in it. There will be "countless numbers of you."

C: 为来世破晓。引火吧！
E: Light the first dawn. Of the new world!

C: 没错。咱俩都成了新世界的一部分，现在就等你啦。
E: That's right. We've both become a part of the new world. Just waiting for you now.

C: 「一如既往，我会把这本书念给你听……」
E: "As always, I'll read this book to you..."

C: 「不过…{NICKNAME}已经陪伴在人家身边啦。」
E: "But... You're already right next to me, {NICKNAME}."

C: 可别被列车长抓到咯。
E: Don't let the conductor catch you.

C: 刚才他还在这里和大家一起聊天来着。现在…不知道跑到哪去了？
E: He was just here chatting with everyone. Now... who knows where he's run off to?

C: 在聊什么呢？
E: What are you talking about?

C: 呵…别忘了，黄金战争期间，凯撒所率的逐火军可是切切实实地打服过悬锋人。
E: Heh... Don't forget that the Flame-Chase Army under the Imperator's command actually managed to subdue the Kremnoans during the Chrysos War.

C: 真是可靠呀，三月。
E: You're so reliable, March.

C: 咕嘟…咕嘟嘟……
E: Bloop... Bloop bloop...

C: 缇安，别在人家里乱跑啦。
E: Trianne, don't run around in other people's homes!

C: 即便经历了漫长岁月的洗礼，三月小姐还是没有丢下纯真的本质。
E: Miss March hasn't lost her innocent nature even after all these long years.

C: 嗯。哪怕身形模糊不清，人家还是确信：那就是「昔涟」梦中的神明。
E: Yes. Even if the figure was hazy, I knew right away: That was the god from "Cyrene's" dreams.

C: {F#她}{M#他}的温柔总是恰到好处，一定…会原谅我吧？
E: {M#His}{F#Her} kindness is always just right for the moment. I believe... {F#s}he will forgive me?

C: …倘若我们终究无法冲破这座囚笼，我会坚守。直到有人前来打破这漫长的轮回，为翁法罗斯的命运添上结尾。
E: ...If we can never break free from this prison, I will stand my ground. Until the day someone shatters this endless cycle and writes the final chapter of Amphoreus's fate.

C: ——降下「岁月的神谕」。
E: And cast down the "prophecy of Time."

C: 迷迷…迷路……
E: Mem... lost...

C: 可是命运无常，催孩子长大，越长越大，走向远方。
E: But fate was fickle, and it urged the child to grow up, to grow bigger and bigger, and to go to places far away.

C: （成像）
E: (Form Image)

C: 这是多少次啦？它忠实地履行使命，响起、格式化……
E: How many times has it been? It faithfully fulfills its duty, activating and formatting...

C: 谢谢…对不起呀，让你看见了难为情的一面。
E: Thank you... I'm sorry for making you see this embarrassing side of me.

C: 保存
E: Save

C: 没有「心」和「爱」？为什么？
E: Doesn't have a "heart"? Doesn't understand "love"? Why?

C: 只有诗人知道，故事之外，有多少挣扎和痛苦。
E: But only the author knows how much struggle and agony lie beyond the pages.

C: 在「虚假的开拓」中醒来后，我得到了昔涟与星期日的帮助逃离其中，可惜「长夜月」掌握着绝对的主动权，使我再次落入忆潮之中…不过，黑天鹅却趁此机会悄悄接近了「长夜月」。
E: After waking up in the "False Trailblaze," I managed to escape with help from Cyrene and Sunday. Unfortunately, "Evernight" held absolute control, causing me to fall into the memoria tide once again... However, Black Swan took this opportunity to quietly approach "Evernight."
███████ I ask: If so, why do you Trailblaze ███████

C: ███████可能性有四，三者已知：毁灭、虚无、同谐。无论其四，开拓必已行向终末，或成为终末███████
E: ███████ There are four possibilities, three of which are known: Destruction, Nihility, and Harmony. Regardless of the fourth, the Trailblaze has surely already marched toward Finality, or become the Finality itself ███

C: 艾利欧的剧本没有提到「星核」的具体位置，也就是说在他看到的未来里……
E: Elio's script doesn't include any info about the location of the Stellaron, which means in the future he foresees...

C: 这也可以？！
E: Seriously!?

C: 敢戳穿我的伪装，我要让你付出代价——
E: How dare you expose me? I'll make you pay...

C: 如果没有这次动乱，我现在还被关在舱室内搞他们那所谓「研究」呢。
E: If not for all the turmoil going on, I would still be locked up in the cabin doing their so-called research.

C: 那我去去就回。
E: I'll be on my way then.

C: 星穹列车。
E: The Astral Express.

C: 这开关你为什么不自己打开？
E: Why didn't you just turn on the switch yourself?

C: 对自己的学科放尊重一点！
E: Show some respect to your own discipline, will you?

C: 老人家，堵不如疏嘛。
E: We may as well get this off his chest.

C: 本时间段无电波讯号转译纪录。
E: No signal decoding record was found during this period.

C: 如果你以为是我从中作梗，那你就错了！小崽子，自作聪明。
E: If you think I am the one being difficult here, you are wrong! Don't get ahead of yourself!

C: 无非孤独地生活在此刻，等着那个有莱斯莉的未来，一步一步朝他走来。
E: He would have to live in this lonely present and wait for the future containing Lesley to finally come to him.

C: 哈哈！我当然是不会等她的！我不会等！
E: Haha! Of course I'm not going to wait for her! I won't!

C: 对了，其实不是所有的诗歌都被洛奇给撕掉了……我这里还剩下一份。
E: By the way, Rocky didn't destroy all the poems... I kept one.

C: 请、请放心，基座舱段的险况已经完全处于奇物再收容小队的控、控制中！
E: P—Please rest assured that this zone is now completely under the con—control of the Curio Collection Squad!

C: 好像有声音…但无论发生什么情况，即使在下一秒死去，我也得把口诀念完。
E: I can hear something... but no matter what happens, even if I die the next second, I must finish reciting this phrase.

C: 数据入侵抹消了多年的研究心血；受损的奇物在无重力环境下缓慢崩解。
E: The cyber attack has erased years of research efforts. The damaged Curios are slowly disintegrating in a weightless environment.

C: 我不同你开玩笑，你必须说个一二字。
E: I'm not kidding. You have to say one and two.

C: 哎，虽然亚伯拉罕常年散发着负能量，他的低气压，大家都苦之久矣……
E: *sigh* Even though Abraham can be quite the downer, which has been a real torture for his colleagues...

C: 观看录像带。
E: Watch the video.

C: 镜头对准议事间雪白的桌面，开始缓慢平摇，场面致密且嘈杂。一个威严的声音正在宣读布告，关于「黑塔•银河法政科」的建立。
E: The camera centers on the white table in a conference room and begins to shake slowly. The scene is dense and noisy. Then a majestic voice starts reading a report about the establishment of the Herta Department of Galactic Geopolitics.

C: 你好，我的名字是希拉•诺娃，「黑塔•银河法政科」的向导。
E: Hello, I am Sheila Nova, your guide to the Herta Department of Galactic Geopolitics.

C: 喂喂喂！你在干嘛……
E: Hey, hey, hey! What are you doing...

C: 所以我试图让她接触过去的录像带，获得更多人的认知。
E: So I tried letting her watch videos from the past, hoping that she could get a better understanding of how to be human.

C: 你可以继承希拉的一切。
E: You can inherit everything from Sheila.

C: 就让一切回到原点吧。
E: Just let everything go back to the way it was.

C: 那个、那个…以后再说吧，我、我没有……
E: Well... let's talk about this... later. I didn't...

C: （说话没有自己的情绪，表情看上去也很僵硬，像机器人一样，是不是有哪里不对……）
E: (She is emotionless when she talks and her face looks stiff, like a robot. Is there something wrong...)

C: 你都没有线索，我能怎办…
E: You don't have any clues, how can I—

C: （频频点头，表示认同）
E: (Nod in approval)

C: 我得对你进行深度的思想教育才行，最好是咱们之后有空坐下来慢慢细说……
E: I need to give you a thorough education on human ethics — we'll need to sit down and go over it slowly...

C: 喂，你这家伙从刚才起就一直在波少旁边问来问去，难不成…也想加入后援会？
E: Hey, you've been talking Master Capote's ear off this whole time. Do you... want to join the fan club?

C: 但是背后的细节可以看出很多故事，比如…嗯…比如它一看就是很用力踩出来的！当时你肯定心里积攒了很多压力，才会这么使劲！
E: But I can tell a lot from the details, such as... umm... y—you used a lot of force! You had a lot of pressure, so you stomped really hard!

C: 还有其他线人吗？
E: Any other witnesses?

C: 啊，我？我……
E: Uh, me? I...

C: 后来，「防护网」破毁、呜呜伯出逃，曾经的两大研究课题陷入停滞……
E: When the Protection Net was destroyed, the Wubbaboos escaped, and the two major research projects were halted...

C: 原来，是这么一回事……
E: So, this is what it is...

C: 你好，螺丝咕姆先生。
E: Hello, Mr. Screwllum.

C: 这样星核猎手的行动，反而会成为我们追查时的烟雾弹。厉害啊，不愧是朋克洛德的家伙。
E: She knew we would be looking for the Stellaron Hunters and used it as her cover. Very smart — to be expected of someone from Punklorde.

C: 我已经晕了，这家伙到底是来干嘛的？总不见得这些涂鸦真的是耍我们玩儿的吧，不会吧？
E: I'm seriously confused. What did she come here for? She wouldn't have put the graffiti up just to mess with us, would she?

C: 边走边玩就行啦！
E: There's fun to be had along the way!

C: 星光拉长她的影子，照亮朋克洛德的历史，那些书写下传奇的人们，他们的誓言被星空所铭记——
E: Starlight elongates her shadow, illuminating the history of Punklorde. Those who penned the legends, their vows remembered by the stars...

C: …当然，我做不到空间传送这种事，只能通过活动地板和逃生管道把你送去另一个房间。
E: ...But of course, I can't actually teleport anything, I can only send you to a different room through moving floor tiles and escape tunnels.

C: 啊，只是有感而发。我之前在公司待过很长一段时间，相信我，落难见人心，患难见真情，朋友。
E: Oh, I just had a moment of inspiration. I was at the IPC for a long time, so believe me, friend, when I say "Adversity shows sincerity."

C: 没问题，这就开始布置场地！
E: No problem, I'll set up the location now!

C: 等一下，你不是来帮忙的吗？
E: Wait, aren't you here to help?

C: 你看我像吗？有钱人会进星际和平公司上班，出差，然后在山洞里被迫宣誓吗。
E: What do you think? Do rich people make forced vows in caves?

C: 三月乘客说的有道理，那帕姆先去列车长室看看！
E: March has a point. Pom-Pom will go check the conductor's cabin!

C: 你的家乡、亲人、朋友、情感、爱和恨……
E: Your home, family, friends, emotions, what you love and what you despise...

C: …你的自知之明，值得夸赞。
E: ...We're on the same page.

C: {NICKNAME}，你如果觉得可以试试，帕姆就先遥控起来了帕。你要仔细盯着看噢，帕姆顺便把角落清洁一下。好！可移动列车清洁机来咯——想先查看哪里？
E: {NICKNAME}, if you think you can do this, I'll start piloting. Watch carefully — I'll be cleaning out the nooks and crannies as we go. Alright! Let's do this. Where do you want to check first?

C: 啥啥啥，他怎么跟虫子交流地那么投入啊……
E: What's going on? Why is he chatting with these bugs?

C: 这样吗…结合三月之前看到的「知晓过去的自己」…我猜测，翅粉产生的幻觉必须依托本人的主观经验和长期感受，才能在自己眼中出现类似<color=#dbc291ff>「个人所求」</color>的事物。
E: I see... This, together with the fact that March's hallucination claimed to know her past, suggests that these visions feed on people's subjective experiences and long-term sentiments... in order to take the form of what they <color=#dbc291ff>personally desire</color>.

C: 不过，相比之下，我看到的幻觉就是找到自己的过去呀？好像有点没追求…我其实还有更多想法诶……
E: But... my past isn't something I'm constantly thinking about. I have plenty of other dreams...

C: 这种虫的体型可以成长至极其巨大的程度——大到足以囫囵吞下一整艘歼星舰。
E: This species can reach tremendous proportions and is big enough to swallow an entire starnought.

C: 如痴如狂地观看小猫咪进食。
E: Obsessively watching cats eat food.

C: 列车的外壁…可能正在胃液中融化。这真是难以想象的图景…
E: The exterior of the Express might be melting in gastric acid... I can't even imagine what it must look like.

C: 噢？好久不见，是帕姆喊你回来的？
E: Oh? It's been a while. Did Pom-Pom call you back?

C: 时间回到现在……
E: Back to the present...

C: 总之，好好干吧。我要出门一趟，想找人帮忙，你可以问<color=#dbc291ff>艾丝妲</color>。
E: Anyway, keep up the good work. I need to go out for a bit. Go ask <color=#dbc291ff>Asta</color> if you want someone to help you.

C: 别担心，只是走个过场了解下情况，你不会真觉得我们怀疑你吧？
E: Don't worry. We're just ticking the boxes to understand what happened. You don't really think we suspect you, right?

C: 拉帝奥先生，请你和{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#女士}同行，将其收容。
E: Mr. Ratio, please go with {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME} and contain the fire.

C: 冥火也是一种能量生命，会被显像仪捕捉到痕迹。跟上它。
E: The infernal fire is also a form of energy lifeform. The imaging device will pick up its trace. Follow it.

C: 拉帝奥先生，请你和{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#女士}同行，将其收容。
E: Mr. Ratio, please go with {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME} and contain the fire.

C: 不知道她，但我喜欢吃西瓜口味的。
E: I don't know about her, but I loooove fermented herring.

C: 随时燃烧的热情
E: A constantly burning passion

C: 哦？芝士流心大人同意了！
E: Oh? The honorable Molten Cheese Tart has agreed!

C: 很高兴见到你，{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#女士}。逻辑：重逢来得比推测中更早些。
E: It's good to see you, {F#madam}{M#sir}. Affirmation: This reunion has happened earlier than my calculations predicted.

C: 余清涂呢？阮•梅，你和她还有往来吗——她还活着吗？
E: What about Yu Qingtu? Are you still in touch with her, Ruan Mei? Is she still alive?

C: 该功能已损坏，嘶嘶。
E: This function has been damaged, *buzz*.

C: 我这样很不负责吧，抱歉。对于自己的造物，我常常不知如何面对。
E: Do I seem irresponsible? I'm sorry. I am often at a loss as to how to face my own creations.

C: 听说黑塔女士……
E: I heard that Madam Herta...

C: 培养皿残渣已清扫……处理中……
E: Growth container fragments have been cleaned up... Processing...

C: 呸，他也配！
E: Yeah, we'd never team up with someone like him!

C: 我，杰帕德•朗道，银鬃铁卫戍卫官，命令尔等放弃无谓的抵抗。
E: I, Gepard Landau, captain of the Silvermane Guards, order you to relinquish your futile resistance.

C: …还没想起来？「查宝」你总记得吧？它就是公司的产品呀。还有…哦对了，「星际和平播报」！这个你总有印象吧，就是列车上总在放的那个！
E: You still don't remember? What about "Findie"? That's one of their products... Oh and the Interastral Peace Broadcast! Y'know, the one always being played on the Express!

C: …多数不能按时还款的个人或组织都有各自的苦衷。但要是我把每个项目都当作「特例」…那整个星系的经济系统恐怕都要崩盘了。
E: I appreciate each case has its difficulties, but if I treated every late debtor as a "special case," the galaxy's economy would come to a grinding halt.

C: 布洛妮娅！还有…托帕小姐居然也在？
E: Bronya! And... Topaz? You're here too?

C: 这就没影了？溜得可真快。
E: That's it? He sure took off quickly.

C: 但是，如果要让她一个人承受如此重大的选择，还有它可能导致的后果——想想就可怕，我这辈子都不想面对这么沉重的选择题！
E: What if this decision is too much for one person? The impact of this choice could haunt Bronya for the rest of her life.

C: 的确，造物引擎在建成初期被投入过战斗，也在对抗军团的战役中立下了赫赫战功。
E: The Engine of Creation was commissioned for combat shortly after its completion and played a significant role in the battles against the Legion.
Huh!?

C: 真的是她！是真人耶！
E: It's actually her! I can't believe it!

C: 克里珀，庇佑我们……
E: Qlipoth, give us strength...

C: 也罢，既然被你找到了这里，那说什么也不能让你毫发无损地离开！
E: Fine, seeing as you came all this way, it'd be rude not to give you the opportunity!

C: 若您有想法了，随时与我联系即可！
E: No worries, if a question does arise, feel free to ask me anytime!

C: 自从「异星水魈」从温明德队长手下脱逃之后，它就从空间站销声匿迹。
E: The Xenohydro has disappeared from the space station since it escaped from Mr. Wen Mingde's hands.

C: 最近帮他办事，出了些岔子，就被他赶到这里，做奇物分拣的流水线工作。
E: But recently, I made a few mistakes when I was running errands for him. So he sent me here to work on the Curio sorting assembly line.

C: 别这样，要是它叫做「{NICKNAME}定律」，你会怎么想……
E: Come on, how would you feel if it was called the "{NICKNAME}'s law."

C: （先解决这帮怪物！）
E: (Let me deal with these monsters first!)

C: 我能打爆你。
E: I can bash you to a pulp.

C: 之前完全忽略了这些话啊。难道这是一封…劝慰信？
E: I completely ignored these words earlier. Is this letter... meant to persuade me?

C: 你也是个温柔的人…
E: You are also very kind.

C: 也不知道拉明娜怎么突然魔怔了，别是有共犯，或者幕后主使者吧？
E: I don't know why Lamina threw that tantrum all of a sudden. There must be an accomplice or someone behind the scenes.

C: 运气也是实力的一部分～
E: Well, you can get good at getting lucky~

C: 呃，我不是故意要破坏这个紧张的气氛哈～
E: Ooh! Sorry, I didn't mean to ruin the intensity of the moment~

C: 大家都只喜欢姐姐…这也难怪，因为姐姐漂亮又聪明。只有他愿意和希莉儿玩…他觉得希莉儿很特别。
E: People only like my sister... That's no surprise since my sister is smart and pretty. All this time, he's the only one who's willing to play with me... He thinks I'm very special.
Uh...

C: 你别让我后悔…
E: Don't let me down...

C: 喂，查宝！你可以为我们带路吗？
E: Hey, Findie! Can you show us the way?

C: 你尝试依旧法操作旋转栈桥的控制终端，但没能成功。
E: You tried operating the control terminal of the gear bridge, but failed.

C: 操作终端内的机械结构不断转动着。随后，一声铿然清亮的脆响传来，操作终端重新归于寂静。
E: The mechanical structure in the control terminal is rotating nonstop. Then, you hear a loud and clear sound coming from within, and the terminal becomes silent again.

C: 你父亲的事…我很遗憾。
E: I'm sorry about your father...

C: 也许他已经疯了…
E: Maybe he went mad...

C: {NICKNAME}，我想再向雪原深处探索一阵。你还能坚持住吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, I want to go deeper into the Snow Plains. Can you press on any further?

C: 那你们呢？这药物有没有什么副作用？
E: Did the medicine have any side effects for you?

C: 「请联系」三个字之后的内容被人粗暴地划掉了，这张海报的背后显然有鬼。
E: The content after "please get in touch" has been crudely scribbled over. There's more here than meets the eye...

C: 肯定没有我的礼物好！
E: I bet your present wasn't as good as mine!

C: 就是这里了。
E: And here we are.

C: 那个…要不，我们还是去问问史瓦罗先生吧？
E: I know, how about we go talk to Mr. Svarog?

C: 你知道文物失窃的事吗？
E: Do you know anything about the stolen museum artifacts?

C: 我之前就一直在怀疑：他一个没什么社会经历的富家公子哥，是怎么突然想到要当文物大盗的？
E: I always wondered — how did he, a rich kid with virtually no real life experience, suddenly think of becoming a smuggler?

C: …开什么玩笑，咱俩撑死了就是共犯关系，懂吗？共犯！谁想跟你有难同当啊喂！
E: You know what we are? Accomplices. You know what that means? Partners in crime! You know what else that means? We are not friends!

C: 很明显，你回答错了。寒腿叔叔这下不做声了…糟糕。
E: You obviously answered wrong. Not a peep can be heard from Mr. Cold Feet. Uh-oh....

C: 不过，正好我也想去博物馆看看…机会难得，就让我陪你一起去递交简历吧？
E: But it just so happens that I want to go to the museum anyway... It's a rare opportunity. So can I go with you?

C: 是啊。上下层区交接的时候，我负责与「地火」的各位接洽——那时候我受了娜塔莎小姐许多照顾呢。
E: That's right. When the Overworld and Underworld were reconnected, I was in charge of contacting everyone in Wildfire. At that time, it was Miss Natasha who took care of me.

C: 我注意到娜塔莎小姐您似乎只写了名字，却没写姓氏…想请问一下，这其中是有什么考虑吗？
E: I noticed here that Miss Natasha has only written a given name here, but not any surname... May I ask what provoked that?

C: 而我为了取得执业资格，加入到他们的行列中，成为了考察队的随行队医。然而，正是在那一年，大探险家佩妮娅女士不幸牺牲了……
E: I joined their ranks in order to get my credentials and became the expeditionary team's accompanying doctor. However, that was the very year in which the great explorer Penya passed away...

C: 既然这样——荣誉队员，我们快出发吧！虎克要去那个什么薄…薄雾……
E: If that's so — dear honorary member, let's go! Let's go to this moosy— moosy-yum...

C: 无论如何，今天都辛苦{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}了。之后有空的话，也请记得来馆里转转哦。
E: Anyway, thanks for your help, {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. Please swing by if you are free.

C: …以至于我现在只要看到写着「贝洛伯格」、「银鬃铁卫」和「克里珀堡」的表格抬头，手就会自己动起来，根本写不出其他东西。
E: ...to the point where now, whenever I see a form header that says "Belobog," "Silvermane Guards," or "Qlipoth Fort," my hand just starts moving on its own and I can't write anything else.

C: 好了，希露瓦小姐。有关下一个问题……
E: Alright Miss Serval, let's go to the next question...

C: 把这种事写进简历，是我太草率了……
E: I shouldn't have included this in my resume...

C: 个人经历…很漂亮嘛，不愧是你。接着看下一个吧……
E: You certainly have an impressive personal experience. Now, let's check out the next column...

C: 要是让他们在馆里见了我当导览员，那怕是要影响你们博物馆的声誉呢。
E: If they see me working there as a guide, I'm afraid the reputation of the museum will be tarnished.

C: 哎…我就知道。这种问题最难办了……
E: Ugh, I knew it. This is a tough one...

C: 咳咳…{NICKNAME}？
E: Ahem... {NICKNAME}?

C: 我现在…实在不知道该摆出什么表情。
E: I am... not sure how to respond to this.

C: 你守护了布洛妮娅的笑容啊！
E: You've made Bronya happy!

C: 带上吧，指不定能帮上什么忙。
E: Let's take it. Maybe it could be of some use.

C: 这也太方便了吧？以后如果丹恒再走丢了的话，是不是也能用查宝找到他？
E: How convenient! So next time Dan Heng gets lost, we can just use Findie to find him, right?

C: 你这么认为？我可不觉得自己欠流浪者什么人情。倒不如说，他们现在能有个落脚的地方，还不是多亏我当时向矿队求情……
E: You think so? But I don't believe I owe anything to the vagrants. In fact, when they had no roof over their heads, I begged the mining team to offer them shelter...

C: 但是没有嫌疑的人应该不会说谎，这就足以帮助我们抓住小偷了。
E: Let's see whose words contradict with the facts, and that person would be the thief.

C: 好人。
E: Good man.

C: 这样，来笔交易如何？只要一点点情报费，我就把自己掌握的信息告诉你们，保证童叟无欺！
E: ...Here, how about we make a deal? I'll tell you what I know, in exchange for a small intel service fee — fair and honest!

C: 他就是个行走的麻烦…
E: He's just trouble on legs.

C: …犯人可能另有其人。
E: ...The culprit might be somebody else.

C: 那家伙是小偷，他想销赃！
E: That guy is a thief, he's trying to sell something he stole!

C: 有人来了，这事我们晚点再谈。
E: Someone's coming. Let's talk about it later.

C: 那个，我不怎么懂带兵…但是一军统帅怎么能轻易冲上前线？这次的状况和铁卫禁区那会儿可不一样啊……
E: I... I don't know much about warfare, but I don't see why a commander needs to lead the charge. The situation here is totally different from the Restricted Zone.

C: 咦？这是……
E: Huh? This is...

C: 也许吧。要是我也能像你一样就好了。
E: I suppose. I wish I could be more like you...

C: …家人就是这样的呀。
E: ...That's how families are.

C: 哎…我就知道。
E: *sigh*...I knew it.

C: 当时的极地探险队隶属于银鬃铁卫，所以是有官方许可的。
E: The exploration team belonged to the Silvermane Guards at the time, so they had authorization.

C: 你是因为家人的原因才需要钱，对吧？拿着它，稍微有点见识的买家一眼就能看出它的价值。
E: You need money for your family, right? Take this and show it to a knowledgeable buyer, and they'll instantly know how valuable it is.

C: …那我们就一言为定。如果食言的话，我会亲自带铁卫来抓你喔。奖章收好，赶紧回镇上去吧，路上的障碍我们已经清理干净了。
E: ...Then it's a deal. If you go back on your promise, I'm going to bring my Silvermane Guards with me and catch you myself! Here, take the medal and go back to the town. We already took care of any threat on the way. You'll be safe.

C: 谢、谢谢你，不知道名字的姐姐！这些东西，你们都拿去吧！
E: Th—Thank you, whoever you are! You guys can take all of these things!

C: 这世界上没有那么巧的事。我现在记起来了……
E: There is no such coincidence in this world. I remember now...

C: 难道你小时候……
E: Could it be, when you were a child...

C: 嗯，我现在记起来了……
E: Yes. I remember now...

C: 你快回去才是。
E: Shouldn't you be the one leaving, missy?

C: 你和克拉拉将刚才交谈的内容转告给了希儿和布洛妮娅。
E: You and Clara tell Seele and Bronya what you just discussed...

C: 真、真的可以吗？不用问娜塔莎姐姐的意思？
E: R—Really? We don't need to ask Miss Natasha first?

C: 这片地方，跟虎克离开的时候完全不一样了！箱子和矿车都被摆在大街上，好乱呀。虎克的宝贝该不会也被人搬走了吧？
E: This place is nothing like it was before I left! Boxes and mine carts are all over the street. What a mess! Did someone move my treasure too?

C: 虎克现在就把它打开——嘿咻！
E: I'm going to turn it on... Whoosh!

C: 还以为会是什么惊人的东西…
E: I was expecting something impressive...

C: 别担心，我毫发无损。
E: Don't worry, I'm completely unscathed.

C: 嘿！这下老实了吧？
E: Ha! Learned how to behave now?

C: …我并无把握，但试试无妨：克拉拉现在在哪？
E: ...I don't know if this will work, but it's worth a try: Where is Clara right now?

C: 能源核心的轴承坏掉了…要是不能赶紧修好的话，聚落就要变得黑咕隆咚的了。
E: The energy core's bearing component is broken... If we don't repair it soon, the settlement will be pitch-black.

C: 还好有大家出手相救，克拉拉会把这件事告诉史瓦罗先生的。
E: You guys saved me — I'll tell Mr. Svarog about it.

C: 根据史瓦罗先生的计算结果，只靠下层区人们的力量，不可能阻止灾难的降临。
E: According to his calculation results, the strength of the Underworlders won't be enough to prevent the disaster.

C: …那不就是把我们关在笼子里么？可笑，横竖都是一死，早两天晚两天有什么区别？连尝试着挣扎一下都不行吗？
E: ...Isn't that just putting us in a cage? It's ridiculous — what difference does it make if our death gets postponed a couple of days? How is that better than putting up a fight?

C: 我知道大家是热心的好人。在矿区里，你们帮助了很多伤员，还冒着风险去镇上找物资……
E: I know that you're good people. You helped a lot of the injured in the mine, and you risked going into the town for supplies.

C: 那是重点吗？重点是我们是从别的星球来的！
E: That's your big reveal? The important part is: We're from a different planet!

C: 果然，他知道「星核」…但这个话题有风险……
E: As expected... He knows of the Stellaron, but it's a restricted topic...

C: 等等，我们和那些人不一样！
E: Wait, we're not like those others!

C: 嘁…最后还是得动手啊。
E: Tsk... looks like we have to take action after all.

C: 真相，大人——真相不会随大多数人的想法改变。你面前的研究报告，是贝洛伯格最优秀的学者们的汗水结晶，你必须相信它的权威性……
E: It's the truth, madam... The truth won't change with the opinions of the people. The reports before you are the precious result of painstaking effort on the part of Belobog's greatest scholars. You must trust the weight of its conclusion...

C: 我明白了。以「存护」的名义…我一定不辱使命。
E: I understand. In the name of Preservation... I will fulfill this mission.

C: 母亲大人，为什么…也许她不知情，也许她……
E: Why...? Why, mother...? M—Maybe she wasn't aware, maybe she...

C: 「论迹不论心」，是有这么句话来着？如果下层区能重获自由，人们自然会把你们视作英雄。
E: A person is defined by their actions alone... I think that's how the saying goes? If the Underworld recovers its freedom, the people will see you as heroes.

C: 然后就是正常的拍卖流程。拍卖师展示拍品，买家现场竞价…怎么样，简单吧？
E: Then there's the standard auction procedure. The auctioneer presents the items, and the bidders place their bids on the spot... Pretty straightforward, don't you think?

C: 你先说吧，漆黑的虎克大人？
E: What's up, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great?

C: 没错，虎克想拍卖大熊玩偶！
E: Yep! Hook wants to auction this teddy bear!

C: 虎克来签！
E: Let me do it!

C: 别在这里吹牛了！
E: Stop bluffing!

C: 「真诚的爱」原来是这么好用的东西吗？好耶！
E: Is "true love" really that useful? Hee-hee!

C: 太好了，奶奶最棒了！
E: Grandma's the best!

C: 这拍卖会上的东西我都有了，真没意思。
E: I already have all of the stuff up for auction. How lame.

C: 虎克，你不是担心没有东西可以送给老爹吗？你看看这样礼物如何？
E: Hook, you're upset that you don't have a gift for your daddy, right? Well, what about this?

C: 娜塔莎姐姐——
E: Natasha!

C: 也别忘了洞洞机！每年这个时候，老爹还会准备一年份的机油，让洞洞机喝到饱。
E: And don't forget about Diggertron! Daddy brings a year's worth of machine oil and Diggertron drinks it all up!

C: 虎克还邀请了老巫婆，斯薇塔姐姐…当然还有你啦，荣誉队员{NICKNAME}！
E: I also invited the old witch, Swetta, aaaand... you, of course! The honorary member {NICKNAME}!

C: 没关系，老爹别哭！虎克会跟着娜塔莎姐姐学着再做一个玩偶！
E: It's okay daddy, don't cry! Natasha will teach me how to make another doll!

C: 只是…其实克拉拉掌握的信息也不多。小偷很狡猾，几乎没在营地里留下痕迹……
E: It's just... I haven't found enough clues yet. The thief is really tricky. They haven't left any traces in the dwelling...

C: 呃，姑且也算是条信息…？
E: Uh, I guess that could be a clue...

C: 听你的。
E: Okay.

C: 咻…是玩笑就好。
E: Phew... As long as you're not really annoyed with me.

C: …谢谢你，史瓦罗先生。
E: Thank you, Mr. Svarog.

C: 我们，还有帕斯卡…到底该怎么办才好？
E: What should we do with Pascal?

C: 谢啦，弗朗兹。找机会我跟老弟美言几句，让他提拔提拔你！
E: Thanks, Franz. I'll put in a good word for you with my brother and get him to promote you!

C: 总感觉有什么大事要发生了，神神秘秘的。
E: Mysterious. It feels like something big's about to go down.

C: 哟，邓恩！好久不见了——你都当上警卫队长了啊？
E: Hey, Dunn! It's been a while. I didn't know you made security captain.

C: 但如果你们是在用一层又一层的谎言粉饰真实目的，利用布洛妮娅和姐姐…我对克里珀发誓，一定会毫不留情地制裁你们。
E: But if you are using lies to mask your true intentions, using my sister and Bronya for your own ends... I swear by Qlipoth that I will carry out your punishment without an ounce of mercy.

C: 这么危险，你不会替他担心嘛？
E: It's so dangerous, don't you worry about him?

C: ——我就在这里等你，哪儿也不去。
E: I'll wait for you here. I'm not going anywhere.

C: 我辜负了斯捷潘先生的信任。他那么相信我，但我却…连这么简单的事都没做好。
E: I betrayed Mr. Stefan's trust. He put so much trust into me, but I... I couldn't even do this one simple thing.

C: 嗯…给我讲讲你的发现吧。如果有必要，我会即刻派铁卫开展调查。
E: Mmm... Tell me what you found. If necessary, I'll immediately send some Silvermane Guards over to investigate.

C: 没有开关，想办法绕路过去吧。
E: There's no switch. We need to find a way around.

C: …好…好冷！光凭一点点开拓的力量，已经没法抵御低温了……
E: It's f—freezing here — the blizzard's so fierce! The power from the Trailblaze Path isn't enough to stop the cold...

C: …为什么，可可利亚…你为什么会变得这么冷漠……
E: ...Why Cocolia... Why have you grown so cold...

C: 你、我，我们还需要履行更重要的使命…早晚有一天，你也要做出抉择
E: You, me, and every Silvermane Guard in the city, all of us must carry out a higher mission. There will come a day when you must make your own choice. Do you understand?

C: 那就是盘踞在人性深处的，难以磨灭的愚妄和怯懦。抛弃它们，解开束缚你的枷锁！星核将带人类走向进化，祂将……
E: It is the conceit and cowardice entrenched in the depths of human nature — so difficult to efface. Cast them aside, break free of the chains that bind you! The Stellaron will lead humanity to evolve, and THEY will...

C: 抱歉…我一定会想办法补偿你们。
E: Sorry... I'll be sure to make it up to you.

C: 呃…谢谢？但是这所答非所问呀……
E: Um... thank you? That's not answering my question though...

C: 这样啊…没关系。我也感受到了…你身上的确没有他的气息。
E: Oh... that's okay. I can feel it too... You really don't have his scent on you at all.

C: 你…陌生人，我不明白…你怎么会知道我的名字？
E: You... stranger, I don't understand... How do you know my name?

C: 唔…算了。虽然都是「琥珀王」的追随者，但应该暂时和我们贝洛伯格没关系。先不想了。
E: Oh... never mind. They're all followers of the Amber Lord, but they probably have nothing to do with Belobog. So I need not worry about them for now.

C: 你手上怎么会有这东西呀？发生什么事了？
E: How did you come by something like this? What happened?

C: 规则是什么来着？
E: What are the rules again?

C: 您还是应该辞退她。
E: I think you should fire her.

C: 没事没事，我已经这么麻烦你了，这件事让我自己再纠结纠结吧。
E: No worries, I've already troubled you so much. I should sort this out on my own.

C: 星槎的牌照看到了吗？
E: Did you see the starskiff registration plate?

C: …是真的吗？俺不信。
E: ...Is that true? I don't believe you.

C: 这简直是大师杰作！
E: This is truly a masterpiece!

C: 选择符合情景的路况照片。
E: Select the right photo evidence of the accident.

C: 天舶司就只有你们两个人是吧，那你们也别想抓住我了！
E: The Sky-Faring Commission only sent you to catch me, right? I don't think you will succeed in your mission!

C: 呃，你好，你有什么事吗？
E: Um, hello? How can I help you?

C: 《要药分剂》？博识学会的申请？
E: Compendium of Remedies? The Intelligentsia Guild's application?

C: 难道这就是玉络口中的医典？你决定——
E: Could this be the textbook that Yuluo mentioned? You decide to...

C: 有意思，这玩意儿确实形如某种植物枝条，但上面的脉络散发金光…其中的秘密一定和仙舟人过去的神话有关。
E: Fascinating. This thing does look similar to twigs, but its veins shine with a golden light... Its mysteries must be related to the Xianzhou natives' legends.

C: 所以我要怎么做？
E: So what should I do?

C: 今天还要来教希拉吗？
E: Do you still need me to teach Sheila today?

C: 家里长出了蘑菇，可真是件让人忧伤的事啊。
E: It's truly a doom-and-gloom thing to have mushrooms growing in a house.

C: 嗯？我好像并没有那么悲伤。
E: Mmm? I don't seem to be that sad at all.

C: 那我们就来打一场吧！
E: Then let's fight!

C: 在这里干等着也无济于事，你们帮我找找吧，这附近一定存在着<color=#dbc291ff>「感人的离别情景」</color>。
E: It's hopeless just waiting here. Please help me find what I'm looking for. There has to be an <color=#dbc291ff>emotional parting scene</color> nearby.

C: 你别以为我没有注意到，你拍到我了，现在就拿来给我看。
E: Don't think I didn't see you. I knew you took a picture with me in it. Show it to me now.

C: 没错，就是这样的。
E: Yes. That's it.

C: 你交出玉兆，各走各的道？
E: How about you hand over your Inspo Jade Abacus, and we go our separate ways?

C: 你猜到什么了？
E: Have you thought of something?

C: 我相信你的判断！出发！
E: I believe in your taste! Let's go!

C: 想必是我这代理站长身份让他有一些戒心。<color=#dbc291ff>据说这「聊天服务」是会员邀请制的，你去找他聊聊，要是也能得到邀请那就更好了。</color>
E: I think it must be because of my position as the acting lead researcher that he felt reticent to talk about his love life. <color=#dbc291ff>I heard that these chat services operate on an invite-only membership basis. Maybe you can have a chat with him, and even better if you could get an invite.</color>

C: 同一句话我不会讲第二遍。
E: I will not repeat myself.

C: 你好，我是仙舟反诈司的。
E: Hi, I'm from the Xianzhou's Anti-Fraud Commission.

C: 真不愧是聪明人。
E: Smart move.

C: 空间站是弹性工作制，现在就是我的私人时间，请你不要来说三道四。
E: The space station observes a flexible working-hour scheme. It is now my private time, so please don't accuse me of anything.

C: 这才给了多少钱，难道说对一个诈骗犯来说，这很多吗？
E: How much did I transfer... Is that a lot for a scammer?

C: 那玉兆在你手上，黛青又在哪里呢？
E: But the jade abacus is in your hand, so where is Daiqing?

C: {NICKNAME}手机上的照片不就是一般的狐人姑娘吗，估计是随便找了个路人吧。
E: Isn't the photo on {NICKNAME}'s phone just a regular foxian lady? Maybe the scammer chose a passing foxian girl at random.

C: 不过说到底，这些神话或历史故事也谈不上什么禁忌知识。贝尼尼老师为什么要将这些图样留在丹鼎司和鳞渊境里呢？
E: Still, these myths and historical stories aren't exactly taboos. Why did Bernini leave these drawings in the Alchemy Commission and Scalegorge Waterscape?

C: 年轻时可以不远千万光年地跨越一颗又一颗星星，但眼前这几步路却像要穿过一座疼痛的地狱，向宇宙尽头跋涉。
E: When I was young, I could hop from star to star no matter the millions of light-years apart. Now, I feel like I'm going through the pain of hell and going on a journey to the end of the universe when taking just a few steps.

C: 你不明白，你根本不了解这个秘密的价值。你和年轻时的我一样轻狂自大，以为自己会有数不尽的可能，以为青春永不消逝。
E: You don't get it. You don't understand the true value of this secret at all. I was just a know-it-all just like you at your age, thinking I'd have countless possibilities before me and that youth would never fade.

C: 既然你已作出了选择，我想为了安全起见，我该离开了。
E: You've made your choice, I guess for the sake of my own safety, it's time for me to go.

C: 我实现了愿望，只是它不是以我所想的形式。人类最古老的故事都是这么个调调。现在看来，这些陈腔滥调也不无道理。
E: My wish came true — just not in the form I thought it would take. The oldest stories in human civilization are fables that take this line. Seems like they aren't just a cliche, after all.

C: 有一位身着丹鼎司衣装的女性，跟你差不多高，好像是朝着渡口的那个方向过去了。你有没有瞧见呢？
E: Have you seen a woman wearing an Alchemy Commission uniform? She's about the same height as you — I think she was heading towards the jetty.

C: 奇奇怪怪的药方，好像没有提到任何有关半夏的信息。
E: A strange prescription, doesn't seem to be anything to do with Banxia

C: 一个孩子孤零零地站在陶德时常等待的地方，不知为何，他稚嫩的面庞有些眼熟。
E: A child stands alone in the place where Todd was always waiting. For some reason, his young face looks rather familiar.

C: 最终我也许会像持明一样变成一枚卵，也许会重新成为人类的胚胎——毕竟我并不是持明族。
E: In the end, I might even become an egg again, just like the Vidyadhara. Perhaps I could become a human embryo once again — I mean, I'm not Vidyadhara, am I?

C: 唔，给他们做些紧急治疗，换他们一身盔甲，应该很公平吧？
E: Hmm, a spot of emergency treatment in exchange for some armor. Sounds fair to me!

C: 妾身十二年前被选为侍女，日日陪伴主人学医受训，见证她无数次出逃，又无数次不甘心地被抓回来。
E: I've been a maid here for twelve years now, and was with my mistress every day as she studied medicine and received tutelage. I've witnessed her countless escapes, and the inevitable unwilling returns.

C: 你也是来关心龙尊传承的？
E: Are you here about the high elder succession, too?

C: 违背医嘱，擅动筋骨，真是浑身不自在。我也是时候该躺下歇息了。
E: I think I should refrain from violating the healers' orders any further — the weariness is creeping up on me once again. Time to lie down.

C: 你恐怕认错人了。
E: I'm afraid you have the wrong person.

C: 持明的天之骄子，「云上五骁」的大英雄，嘿嘿…你同咱们相斗一辈子，最终却沦落到了何等可怜的地步？
E: The proud son of the Vidyadhara, hero of the High-Cloud Quintet, hehe... You fought with us your whole life — how far you have fallen...

C: 化龙妙法？
E: The Transmutation Arcanum?

C: 龙师们目光浅薄，看不见您的天纵英才，还想另设龙尊，真是愚蠢至极。
E: The Preceptors are too narrow-minded to see your talent. They want to install another High Elder. Foolish!

C: 根据地衡司目前的调查工作来看，少数居民在丹鼎司、鳞渊境区域内发现近似「云吟术」的异象，并且在异象中遭遇了隐身怪物。
E: Based on the investigation of the Realm-Keeping Commission, a few citizens have found a strange phenomenon similar to cloudhymn magic in the Alchemy Commission and Scalegorge Waterscape, and even encountered invisible monsters inside these mirages.

C: 出现「云吟术」异象的地方总有怪物，具体原因我们也不清楚。
E: There are always monsters around where cloudhymn magic appears. We have no clue about the reason.

C: 这次我们得到了丹鼎司的协助，备好了能够吸引扑满的「特制饵食」。接下来，我们将以行医市集为中心布置陷阱，吸引扑满上钩。
E: This time, with the help of the Alchemy Commission, we've prepared a special bait for the Trotter. We'll lay traps with the Healer's Market as the center to attract the Trotter.

C: 没错，罗刹。他这次来背着个大箱子，说是殡葬用具，叫什么…「观火」。因为这个「观火」很显眼，我还忍不住多问了他几句。
E: That's right, Luocha. He came to the Xianzhou with a huge box this time — some sort of funerary contraption. It had a funny name... something to do with coughing? It was pretty conspicuous — I had to ask him about it.

C: 那倒不是…只是出于个人理由，我觉得有必要查一查这个人。请问他在建木生发那几日都做了什么事呢？
E: Not necessarily... but I have my reasons for wanting to investigate. What was he doing in the days leading up to the Ambrosial Arbor's resurrection?
