C: 算了，不跟你们一般见识。隐书说，长乐天那边有家小吃摊的优惠券要到期了，赶着去用掉…她走了没多久，现在可能刚吃完吧。
E: *sigh* Forget it, I'm not stooping to your level. Yinshu said she had a voucher for a food stall over in Exalting Sanctum — she wanted to use it before it expired... You know, she's not been gone long — probably finishing up her food right now.

C: 我们店里…在三余书肆？他来过吗…哦，对了！我想起来了，他来过，我见过他的，怎么给忘了呢？
E: My store... Spare Time Book Shop? You're sure he came to... Oh, that's right! I remember now, he did pay a visit — how could I forget?

C: 什么意思？顺还不好吗？
E: And? What's wrong with a quick route, hmm?

C: 求求你了，求求你了，就让我见见你的老板吧！
E: Please let me see your boss? Pleaaaase?

C: 喂！这里很危险！你们快走，快去天舶司叫人来救我，就说晴霓遇到危险了！
E: Hey! Get out of here — it's too dangerous! Go get someone from the Sky-Faring Commission — tell them Qingni is in trouble!

C: 那好，一会儿见。
E: Okay, see you later then.

C: 所以，晴霓小姐与其像今天这样爆发，不如耐心用行动来证明，自己可以照顾好自己？
E: What I mean to say is, instead of trying to prove yourself suddenly, perhaps you could demonstrate your ability to look after yourself methodically, over time. Don't you think, Miss Qingni?

C: 抓住玉兆，多半意味着孩子将来会成为卜者；抓住刀剑，那么成为战士建功立业指日可待；抓住星槎玩具……
E: If the child reaches for a jade abacus, then they'll grow up to be a diviner. If they reach for a sword, then they'll grow up to be a famous warrior. And if they reach for a toy starskiff...

C: 晴霓小姐还记得这份日记被存放在哪里吗？
E: Do you still remember where it was filed, Miss Qingni?

C: 应该就是这里了。我看看…找到了！这就是妈妈的日记。
E: It should be here. Let's see... yes! This is Mom's diary.

C: 什么话。作为仙舟人，我唯一的长处就是活得够久，能见证的东西要比那些朝生暮死的狐人飞行士更多。
E: Nonsense. As a Xianzhou native, I've lived long enough to remember more than the foxian pilots could ever hope to.

C: 左边。
E: Left side.

C: 这本册子倒是和妈妈那本日记形制很像。不过看起来，应该是采翼小姐的日记……
E: This looks similar to Mom's diary... but it looks like it belonged to Miss Caiyi...

C: 妈妈心情不好时，就会去一个能看到玉界门的地方散心。她现在应该还在那里，我们过去找她吧。
E: When Mom feels down, she usually goes to take in a view of the Jade Gate. She should still be there, let's go find her.

C: 我担心你走向我的道路，更担心你走向采翼的道路。但既然这是你的选择…我便愿意全力支持你，直到你后悔为止。
E: I was afraid of you following in my footsteps, and more afraid of you taking after Caiyi. But if this is your choice... then I'm willing to support you, even if you live to regret it.

C: 驭空静静地凝望着那个曾让她满怀热情，又让她失去了一切的地方。
E: Yukong gazes quietly at the place that once filled her with so much passion and cost her everything.

C: 无论你作出什么选择，我都接受。
E: Whatever your choice is, I will accept it.

C: （我不想再见到卡芙卡）
E: (I don't want to see Kafka again)
One plus one equals two, right?

C: 星核猎手的每个人都和艾利欧做了「交易」。我不知道别人的交易内容。但，既然卡芙卡和我一样同意被艾利欧驱使，她想要得到的东西一定非比寻常，她所做的每一件事都付出了巨大的代价。
E: Every Stellaron Hunter has a deal with Elio. I do not know the nature of those deals, but I do know that Kafka and I agreed to take orders from Elio. She must have sought something extraordinary. Everything she does comes at a great cost.

C: 说这种傻话我也不怪你，你现在还不了解杨叔的本事……
E: Are you forgetting we've got Mr. Yang with us? Oh, right, you haven't seen what he can do yet...

C: 仙舟应该及时对港口进行了疏散，只留下士兵对抗危机。但这些受到「侵蚀」的怪物究竟是……
E: I'm guessing the Xianzhou must have evacuated the port immediately, leaving the soldiers to deal with the crisis. But as for these corroded monsters...

C: 知道知道，急什么。这几位恩公还没谢过，一走了之也太失礼了吧。
E: Calm down, I heard you. It'd be rude of me to depart without thanking our benefactors.

C: 这是…一封信？
E: Is this... a letter?

C: 也许我该走一趟<color=#dbc291ff>神策府</color>，向景元打听下星核猎手的动向……
E: Maybe I should make a trip to <color=#dbc291ff>the Seat of Divine Foresight</color>. I need to ask Jing Yuan about the Stellaron Hunters.

C: 经她之手的星槎没几艘能原样回港，天舶司的人背地里都称她是「星槎杀手」。
E: Very few starskiffs she piloted were able to return to port in one piece. The folks at the Sky-Faring Commission secretly referred to her as the "Starskiff Killer."

C: 持明轮回重生，前尘旧事本该一忘成空。可你却留有龙尊的力量，和零星的记忆。
E: The Vidyadhara rebirth normally erases all memory of the previous life. However, you have retained fragments of your past, as well as the powers of the high elder.

C: 正如我的力量来自「丰饶」，立场却与联盟一致——宇宙间要置药师于死地的，并非只有「巡猎」一方势力。
E: Take me, for example. My powers originate from the Abundance, yet my goals are aligned with the Alliance. The Hunt is not the only faction in the universe that wants Yaoshi dead.

C: 将军，方才你也说过，此事由不得你我。联盟法度如此，不容更改。
E: General, you said it yourself — this is beyond your control. It is the law of the Alliance, we cannot deviate from it.

C: 镜流，我来奉还你的一剑之教。
E: Jingliu, allow me to repay you for your teachings.

C: 呜汪，汪汪汪呜汪汪嗷！
E: Woof woof, howoof woof ruff woof!

C: （找一个能听懂的人吧）
E: (Find someone who can understand)

C: 翻阅行动记录
E: Check operations log

C: 不过，我对他有信心。
E: I do have confidence in him, though.

C: 出剑吧，让前辈久等，可是很失礼的。
E: Draw your sword. Don't you know it's rude to keep an elder waiting?

C: 不过如此。
E: Underwhelming.

C: 你好慢啊，小弟弟。
E: Too slow, young man.

C: 再等等
E: Hold on a moment

C: 你的手臂越来越疼，但终究还是抄完了第二遍。
E: Your hand and shoulder are experiencing more pain, but you've only produced two copies.

C: （要截获信件的话，应该去长乐天的物流鸟架上找找看吧。）
E: (If they're looking to intercept a letter, then I should probably search around the Exalting Sanctum's Cycrane Stand.)

C: 在漫长的云骑生涯中，我领悟到一件事——人的力量是有极限的。
E: During my many years as a Cloud Knight, I realized something... An individual's strength is limited.

C: 这里面有些药材可以在医馆买到，有些药材则需要你自己想办法…但凭你的能力，这应该是小事一桩。
E: Some of the ingredients can be purchased at an apothecary, but others will require you to come up with your own solution... Given your strength, that shouldn't pose a problem.

C: 你们派了很多卧底吗？
E: Did you send a lot of people undercover?

C: 不过？
E: However?

C: 终于都清除干净了…继续回溯记忆，去和符玄小姐汇合吧。
E: *sigh* Finally, all done... I better meet up with Fu Xuan if I wanna keep going through my memories.

C: 不要回头，继续向前走。
E: Don't look back. Keep going forward.

C: 真是一杯好茶啊…可惜不是每个人都能体会到它的美好。
E: What an excellent cup of tea! It's a pity not everyone can appreciate its beauty...

C: 三月小姐，「遗忘」这种恩赐恰如这杯苦茶一样，入口苦涩，却有轻松的余味，可惜品尝它的人总是无法体会它的美好。
E: ...much like the gift of forgetting, Miss March. It's bitter at first, but with a gentle aftertaste.

C: 在被姬子拣到后，自封印其身体的六相冰中得到解放。她丧失了自己对过去的回忆。
E: After being picked up by Himeko, she was freed from the Six-Phased Ice in which she was encased. She lost all memory of the past...

C: 那么咱们就先走一步了。{NICKNAME}，赶快闪人吧，我怕太卜大人查出什么损坏，要向列车寄天价维修账单哩。
E: We'll leave you to it then! {NICKNAME}, run — if we broke something there'll be a huge bill to pay!

C: 话说，你不觉得这光锥里面的我特别可爱吗？
E: Hey, the "me" in the Light Cone looks kinda cute, don't you think?

C: 将军的家务事，让我去不好吧？
E: General, is it really my place to get involved in your family matters?

C: 那么，在哪能买到这种东西呢？
E: So, where can I buy one?

C: 再说我们俩今天都吵成那样了，要我现在回去找他聊聊？不行，至少今天不行。明天的话，我考虑考虑……
E: Besides, after our argument today, you want me to go back and talk to him now? No way, at least not today. Maybe tomorrow...

C: 忙完了这一切，你回到了列车，见到了逃课被抓包的三月七。
E: After finishing it all, you returned to the Express and came face-to-face with March 7th, caught skipping class.

C: 正是如此，嫌疑人目的性很强，唯独偷走了孤云。
E: Exactly. The suspect had a clear motive and took only Guyun.

C: 怎么，你是没见过飞剑吗？
E: You've never seen a Flying Sword before?

C: 我的…情绪是什么味道呢，老友……？
E: How do my emotions taste... my old friend...?

C: 身为被锻造之物，我的功能从一开始就已被注定，我必须成为一把武器，不断砍杀。
E: As a weapon, my purpose was predetermined from the start: I had to become a deadly sword that would relentlessly hack and kill.

C: 好家伙，这么小的云璃身上居然长了这么大个良心。呵呵，不容易啊不容易啊。
E: Oh, am I hearing right? This little girl is worried about her grandpa! Hehe, didn't see that coming.

C: 这不是我的挚友吗？又见面了！
E: Well, if it isn't my dear friend! Glad to meet you again!

C: 锵锵——是我赢咯。
E: Ding-a-ling — I won~

C: 对不起哦，亲爱的。心仪的舞伴…我已经有人选了。
E: I'm sorry, my dear. My dream dance partner... I've already got sights on someone else.

C: 看来花火小姐是想为调查再多添几分乐趣，我们就收下她的好意吧。请来这边，「侦探助手」先生。
E: Looks like Miss Sparkle is adding a little spice to the investigation. Let's take her up on her offer then — Mr. Assistant Detective, this way.

C: 想再听听嫌疑人信息。
E: I'd like to hear about the suspects one more time.

C: 真是一场惨剧啊，若不是有您这样明察秋毫的神探，三位嫌疑人一定会蒙受不白之冤！
E: What a tragedy. If it weren't for your incisive detective work, the three suspects would all be facing grave injustice!

C: 佐罗是花火大人部下悍将，在对抗山贼时，奋勇抗敌，<color=#dbc291ff>右手不幸被斩断了</color>。现在正在练习用左手写字和拿筷子，真是可怜啊。
E: Lefton is one of Miss Sparkle's chief lieutenants, whose <color=#dbc291ff>right hand was unfortunately severed</color> while he was valiantly fighting off the Annihilation Gang. He's now learning how to write and hold a fork with his left hand — how tough that must be!

C: 以上就是三位嫌疑人全部的信息了。
E: That's all the intel we have on the three suspects.

C: 它的工作已经完成，现在在休长假。有什么事就和我说吧！
E: Its work is done and it's taking a long vacation now. Come talk to me if you need anything!

C: 我猜猜，是不是门突然坏了？
E: Let me guess, the gate isn't working?

C: 这么简单，你家太卜怎么不亲自前来？
E: If it's so simple, why didn't your master diviner come and do it herself?

C: 如何？是不是很意外呢？恶名昭著的星核猎手做了这么多，只是为了让你成为仙舟的英雄——谁也想不到这样的剧本吧？
E: What do you think? Surprised? The notorious Stellaron Hunters did all that just to make you a hero of the Xianzhou... Quite the plot twist, don't you think?

C: 它蹲在那里，就像把「生人勿近」四个字贴在了脸上。你说…咱们就这么当着它的面走过去，它会不会突然暴起伤人？
E: I feel like it needs a sign saying "mortals forbidden" or something... Are you sure it won't fly into a rage if we walk past it?

C: 杀死星神？人类的力量办不到。
E: Killing an Aeon? Humans don't have that power.

C: 如果她没有骗我，我们应该不用交代什么了…
E: If what she said is true, we won't have to explain anything...

C: …你这个坏蛋。
E: ...You're a scoundrel.

C: 是，也不是。说是，因为九艘巨舰饱经苦旅，最终见证了神明显化，自药师的示现中寻得了种种不可思议的仙道神通；说不是，因为舰队自此迷航，再也没能成功返回故土。
E: Yes, and no. He succeeded because, after an arduous journey, the nine ships eventually witnessed the manifestation of a god — Yaoshi's appearance provided for all manner of unfathomable celestial blessings... However, he failed because the fleet has been lost ever since, and has never been able to return to its home planet.

C: 追她不过是徒费力气，「穷观阵」向我揭示了卡芙卡的清白。此际最紧要的事情是处理建木。
E: Pursuing Kafka is a waste of time and effort — The Matrix of Prescience informed me of her innocence. Our priority is the Ambrosial Arbor.

C: 对，有什么困难就跟咱说～嘻嘻，你们的景元将军可是三请四邀，才说动我们来帮忙的哦，你就放一百个心吧。
E: Yeah, you just need to tell us what the trouble is, hehe~ General Jing Yuan pulled out all the stops to get us here — you can trust us.

C: 这玩意不像草木之属，倒有股子金铁的坚韧感……
E: It's no ordinary tree — the branches felt tough as metal...

C: 您别说，我还真存着这心思。那就是棵盆栽嘛。
E: I was thinking about it, yeah. Isn't it just an ornamental tree?

C: 木精入侵的时候，老夫第一时间就想到了这东西。
E: This is the first thing that came to mind when the tree demon attacked.

C: 妈呀，怪不得仙舟这么恐惧「丰饶孽物」，这恢复能力根本不讲道理！
E: Ugh, no wonder the Xianzhou is so scared of the Abominations of Abundance — they're unstoppable!

C: {NICKNAME}，杨叔说的不是这个意思啦！
E: {NICKNAME}, are you listening to Mr. Yang!?

C: 成语用的不错，下次别用啦。
E: Please never do that again...

C: 成语用的不错，下次别用啦。
E: I feel like I'm gonna be sick...

C: 老大…我看这家伙的表情不像是在开玩笑……
E: Uh, boss... I don't think they're kidding...

C: 你的脚步声逗留不去，是因为心里还有很多疑惑吗？
E: Your footsteps still linger. Could it be that you still have unanswered questions?

C: 孽物们拥抱自己的本性，他们能毫无顾忌地改变自己的血肉，只为追求更强的躯壳。但这些手段，在仙舟之上，已是彻头彻尾的禁忌。
E: Abominations embrace their nature — they change and modify their flesh without care, for the sake of attaining power and strength. However, to the Xianzhou people, these methods are completely taboo.

C: （不…不能让他们…靠过来……）
E: (No... I can't let them... get near me...)

C: 魁首大人，您不能有任何闪失。这种杂事就交给我们来处理吧。
E: Master, you must stay out of harm's way. Let us handle this.

C: 我们「至味盛苑」这样菜肴品质的店，才不可能去抓什么来路不明的野羊来做菜。
E: For the Garden of Gourmet's prestige, we'll never use stray sheep from unknown sources as ingredient for our food.

C: 请注意安全，小心行事。有什么事我们随时联系。
E: Please stay safe and be careful. Just drop me a line if there is a problem.

C: 冬妮娅，原来是你干的好事啊！我以为鳞渊境没什么猛兽，才会把法乌努斯红毛羊放生到那里的，你干嘛把那些狼也放生到那儿？
E: So, Tonya, you are the culprit! I only released the Faunus Red Sheep in the Scalegorge Waterscape because I thought that area was free of beasts. Why did you release the wolves there too?

C: 不放生，就没有这烦恼喽？
E: You won't have this problem if you all stop the act of releasing wildlife.

C: 接入机兵。
E: Connect to the automatons.

C: 你那边都搞定了？我这里也差不多了。
E: How's the work on your side? My job here is almost done.

C: …这样的机器宝宝了！
E: ...mechanical babies like these!

C: 我明白，我明白。这足以显现出您良好的道德水准。
E: I get it. You feel that way because you're a virtuous character.

C: 无论如何，那「三大善人」一时半刻是不会回来了…那么往后我就是唯一的「大善人」了…嗯，我得考虑一下「放生帮」的未来。
E: Anyway, it might be some time before the Three Benevolent Ones come back... From now on, I'll be the only Benevolent One... Hmm... maybe it's time to think about the future of the Unshackled.

C: 你刚才的胆气到哪儿去了！
E: What happened to talking tough!?

C: 你疯了吗？为什么要帮助人类？！
E: Are you insane? Why are you helping humans!?

C: 换句话说，绥园里一定发生了什么「轰动仙舟的大事件」，咱们才能见到他们出马。
E: In other words, something BIG must have happened in Fyxestroll Garden for them to show up.

C: …啧，不对劲，我闻到了同类的味道。
E: ...Wait. Hold on. I smell something familiar...

C: 我、我认为我们还是可以听听浮烟的计划，毕竟现在也没有什么别的办法，哎……
E: I—I guess we can go with Cirrus's plan. It's not like we have any of our own...

C: 十王司的判官绝不空许承诺。若能化解眼前危机，吾可以上禀十王，还汝自由。但结果，吾不保证。
E: Judges of the Ten-Lords Commission always keep our promises. If you can truly deal with the problem at hand, I will ask for your freedom from the Ten Lords. However, I cannot guarantee the outcome of the appeal.

C: *远处传来若有若无的回应*
E: *There is a vague sound from far away. A response, possibly.*

C: 你尽可以差遣手中的冥差来找我，若能击败我所占据的这位无名客，我就心甘情愿被你吞下，为你大战将军贡献一臂之力。你意下如何？
E: Then send the spiritfarers under your control to find me. If you can defeat this Nameless I'm possessing, then you can swallow me up and let my strength aid you in your fight against the general. What do you say?

C: 我会保护好藿藿的。
E: I'll look after Huohuo.

C: 吼吼，终于露出狐狸尾巴了…嗯？
E: Aha! Not even trying to hide your true colors!

C: 真怀念现实里的微风和草地啊…真想找到一片宁静、柔软的田野，躺在里面，睡上一觉……
E: I really miss the gentle breeze and grass in real life... I really want to find a quiet, soft meadow, lie in it, and doze off...

C: 她那么看重那张唱片，应该可以用它打开她的心锁吧？快去试试！
E: That record she values so much could be used to break the locks over her heart. Go try it now!

C: 这次，我同意你妈妈的看法。你可要好好选，千万别让我们失望。
E: For once, I agree with your mother. You should choose carefully. Do not disappoint us.

C: 对——我知道该怎么给这首歌结尾了。
E: Yes... I know how to end this song.

C: 我猜您的身边大概围绕着不少可以带来欢笑的人吧？所以您才能如此积极、阳光。
E: I'm guessing you've got plenty of people around you who can put a smile on your face? That's why you're so enthusiastic and sunny about everything.

C: 柯柯娜转过头，向你投来最后一瞥。她的眸中饱含悲伤，孤寂，还有…感激。
E: Cocona turns her head, giving you one last glance. Her eyes are brimming with sorrow, loneliness, and... gratitude.

C: ——然后半途而弃，把烂摊子留给我…任由它们在我身上寄生、腐烂、毒发……
E: ...And then abandoning me halfway, leaving me to pick up the pieces... Leaving them to grow on me like parasites, decaying, spreading...
Ah...

C: 也许是…可我不知道该向谁求助。
E: It may well be... But I don't know who I can ask for help.

C: 我在这里能够拥有一切。所有我在现实当中失去的，梦境又再次馈赠予我。
E: I have everything that I could need here. Everything that I lost in the real world has been given to me once more in this dream.

C: 我理解了…为什么那些本应属于我的记忆，看上去却那么遥远、陌生，我现在终于明白了。
E: I understand now... why those memories that were supposed to belong to me felt so distant and strange. I finally understand.

C: 置身此处，我的感觉就像是在照镜子。只是这镜子能照出我的五脏六腑，还准许我近距离观测自己的灵魂。
E: Being in this place, I feel like I am looking into a mirror. However, what this mirror reflects is my internal organs. It allows me to see my own soul up-close.

C: 失去挚友的罗伯特濒临崩溃，他对自己生命中的一切都感到愤怒、不公、绝望。他开始寻找方式逃避…他找到了「我」。
E: Having lost his best friend, Robert was on the verge of collapse. He felt anger and rage towards everything around him. Just injustice and despair. So, he began to search for a way to escape, in doing so... He found "me."

C: 狂热的追随者，蹲伏在让人意想不到的街边角落，观察、偷拍，发送令人毛骨悚然的私信……
E: I remember crazed fans hiding on unexpected street corners, spying, taking secret pictures, and sending messages that would chill you to the bone...

C: 啊，你之前是不是说起过一家你喜欢的蛋糕店？要不下午我们一起去看看吧……
E: Ah, didn't you mention a cake store that you like before? How about we go and check it out this afternoon?

C: 他们为我创造了一个机会，准许我为莱斯利•迪恩的故事续上一个更好的结尾。
E: They created an opportunity for me and allowed me to give Lesley Dean's story a greater ending.

C: 请您放心，我将全程协助您，招聘事项由我来帮忙筹备，您来决策即可。
E: Please do not worry, I will be assisting you the entire way. I'll help organize the recruitment, and you just have to make the final call.

C: 放心，我不是那种人。
E: Don't worry. I'm not that kind of person.

C: 无论看过多少次，当再次看到的时候还是觉得很震撼，雕像的清新感，是业内所有船长都无法媲美的……
E: No matter how many times I've seen it, I'm still taken aback. The statue looks refreshing, unrivaled by any captain in the industry...

C: 好吧，那就花点时间，再调整一下心态…毕竟接下来你还有十个系统时的工作要做呢。
E: Alright. Take a little moment to adjust your mindset... After all, you still have ten system hours of work on the clock.

C: 悄悄告诉你，我这回来匹诺康尼还有别的任务在身——人命关天，相当重要！
E: Just between you and me — I've come to Penacony on a critical mission this time — a matter of life and death. Something extremely important!

C: 那、那么，我就先上去了……
E: S—So I'll go up, then...

C: 跟着我干，直接P<unbreak>35</unbreak>起步——我手上掌握的资源全都随你调用。如何？
E: Come work for me, and you'll start at P<unbreak>35</unbreak> — with all my resources at your disposal. What do you say?

C: …等会儿，我跟你争这个干嘛？{NICKNAME}，你说你找到那个「组织」了？在哪？
E: ...Hold on. Why am I even competing with you over this? {NICKNAME}, you said you found that "organization." Where is it?

C: 哈…这趟匹诺康尼之旅可太刺激了。早知道会遭这罪，我还不如留在司里摸摸鱼、打打牌呢……
E: Ha, this trip to Penacony has been quite a ride. If I'd known I would have gone through this ordeal, I would have just stayed back home and slacked off...

C: 世界聚焦于我们！
E: The world's watchful gaze fixes upon us!

C: 你可算来了，等你好久了！差点以为你赶不上了……
E: You're finally here. I've been waiting for ages! I started to think you might not make it...

C: 我猜你肯定会后悔的！
E: I knew you'd regret it!

C: 有道理，剑术锻炼是不可以怠慢的！
E: Quite right! Swordsmanship practice cannot be neglected!

C: 要不是我在玉阙仙舟应对各种质询，景元他…算了，这件事不提也罢。
E: If I didn't have so many inquiries to deal with on the Xianzhou Yuque, then Jing Yuan would... Forget it, it's not important.

C: …多谢将军点评。
E: ...Thank you, general.

C: 你这么一说，我更加内疚了！
E: I feel even worse now!

C: 你多学着点儿吧。
E: Come on, you gotta learn to work smarter.

C: 哪里都可以，你们说了算。
E: We can go anywhere you want.

C: 不过「建木」被帝弓斫断之后，大部分技术都失传了。 但星槎种植技术依然延续了下来。
E: But after Reignbow severed the Ambrosial Arbor, most of the tech was lost. However, this starskiff growing technology was retained.

C: 师傅为了教导我、为了点燃我的梦想，付出了心血和时间…他把「时间」这个对短生种最苛刻的东西全部倾注在了我身上，我必须回报他。
E: My master spent so much time and effort on teaching me, on igniting my passions... He gave me all his time, the most precious thing for a short-lived being. So I have to repay him in kind.

C: …你怎么比我还消极。
E: ...You're even more of a pessimist than I am.

C: 你赶紧对星槎做出「停航」操作，不料「停航」反倒是为玦轮提供了动力，星槎全力冲向出港口，很快就消失在你的视野之中，它自由了！
E: You quickly pressed "Stop," but it unexpectedly provided power to the jade wheel. The starskiff charged at its full speed out of the port and vanished out of your sight. It's been set free!

C: 工造司里的老师傅们说，只要让金人一直抖动，看上去就会栩栩如生。
E: The veteran craftsmen of the Artisanship Commission always say that as long as you make the aurumaton shake constantly, it will look more lifelike.

C: 很简单，我们做个测试。小娃儿，你先把武器准备好。
E: I can show you by performing a test. Please get the weapon ready first.

C: 若将「持续存在的我」视为统一之物，那么因果殿里存放的便是「灵魂」了。
E: If you perceive your continued existence as the same one, then what is inside the Hall of Karma is the souls.

C: …自从没有了「师傅的梦想」之后，我好像也没有失去什么。
E: ...I don't think I've lost anything after dropping my master's dream.

C: 我记得自己在迴星港的时候说过——
E: I remember saying this when I was in Stargazer Navalia...

C: 时候不早了，{NICKNAME}，去陪陪那位学徒吧。
E: It's getting late, {NICKNAME}. Why don't you spend some time with the apprentice?

C: 这确实是自我感动。
E: Yes.

C: 就是你不会拒绝的意思，对吧？我果然没看错！
E: So that's a yes, right? I knew it!

C: 这个故事想表达的是？
E: And the moral of the story is...?

C: 居然还真有追踪功能…看看它到底灵不灵光吧。
E: It really does have a tracking function... Let's see how useful it is.

C: <size=36>「——让世界上的邪恶无处遁形！」</size>
E: <size=36>"Defeater of evil throughout the world!"</size>

C: 这场修炼的最后一步——就是挑战史瓦罗大佬！
E: The final step in this training — is to challenge boss Svarog!

C: 加油，我支持你！
E: Noice! Count me in!

C: …够了，卢卡！就到此为止吧！
E: ...Enough, Luka! Let's end it here!

C: 那分组就这么定了！
E: Sounds great. Let's split into groups!

C: 灵异？我不太喜欢恐怖题材…不过，我们的客户一定会喜欢。
E: Supernatural? I don't really like scary things... but our clients will love it.

C: 确实。
E: I agree.

C: 饮月君的后世重回罗浮观礼演武仪典，若有机会，老朽想同你喝上一杯。
E: So, the Imbibitor Lunae's reincarnation has returned to the Luofu and will attend the Wardance. I'd love to have a drink with you should the chance presents itself.

C: 况且，若不是我伸手接过这剑，助它命中目标，那步离人早已逃之夭夭了。
E: By the way, if I hadn't caught it and helped it hit its mark, that borisin prisoner would have gotten away.

C: 尝试按照仙舟的法条解决问题
E: Try to resolve this according to Xianzhou regulations.

C: 是时候把问题扩大化了！
E: It's time to escalate the issue!

C: {NICKNAME}…咱们不必把姿态放这么低吧。
E: {NICKNAME}... do we really have to stoop this low?

C: 自我介绍一下，妾身是罗浮丹鼎司司鼎——灵砂。
E: Allow me to introduce myself. I'm Lingsha, Cauldron Master and Head of the Alchemy Commission on the Luofu.

C: 异议？妾身能有什么异议？不仅是这个样品，运输船上那些货物，你们也都可以留着，我们不会检查的。
E: Yeah, sure. Why should I object? Not only this sample, but all the goods on the transport ship are yours to keep. Like I said, we won't inspect them.

C: 与此同时，彦卿与{NICKNAME}回到了长乐天。
E: Meanwhile, Yanqing and {NICKNAME} return to the Exalting Sanctum.

C: 咳咳…当然了！作为云璃的对手，那位舞剑的少侠也是英气逼人，身法灵动！看得我都想拜他为师，学习仙舟剑术了！
E: Ahem, yeah... But to go up against Yunli is quite impressive, you know? That aura of heroism and grace. It almost makes me want to learn Xianzhou swordplay!

C: 有些人就算得到宝剑，难免要落入旁人之手。
E: Yeah, and even if someone gets their hands on such a precious sword, it'll probably end up in someone else's.

C: 那到时候就看我拿下一胜！
E: Just watch, I'll win a fight when the time comes!

C: 你们是谁？
E: Who are you guys?

C: 别疑神疑鬼。
E: Don't be so paranoid.

C: 那家伙发现我们了吗？快躲起来。
E: Did he spot us? Quickly, hide!

C: 可丹枢不过一介丹士长，竟如此手眼通天。她勾结外敌，召来星核也就罢了，古海建木可是持明一族的领地，她是如何绕过守卫的？
E: But here's the thing: Dan Shu was just a chief alchemist. Even if she colluded with our enemies and summoned the Stellaron, how did she manage to bypass the Vidyadhara guards around the Ambrosial Arbor?

C: 罗浮龙师颇为可疑
E: The Preceptors of the Luofu seem suspicious.

C: 奉景元将军呼召，我等开启入口，备妥文书，在此接引。问字部判官也已知晓两位来意。
E: As General Jing Yuan requested, everything is prepared for your arrival, and I am here to receive you. The judges at the Interrogation Division also know your purpose in coming.

C: {NICKNAME}说笑了，幽囚狱各处山重水复，层层相叠。还请来了持明的龙脉巧匠，用尽了洞天之术的奇巧。两位肉眼所见的只是幽囚狱的一部分。
E: You're funny, {NICKNAME}. This prison does contain many layers. We even brought in Vidyadhara Ichor Line craftsmen to introduce the ingenuity of delve enchantment. What you're seeing now is just one part of The Shackling Prison.

C: 咱们不上电梯吗？
E: Aren't we going to take the elevator?

C: 哀悼？我没那个意思。
E: Condolences? Well, that's unnecessary.

C: 如此一来，时间久了，外界察觉便会有援兵赶到。至于那时候我们是不是还活着，这也不是我们该考虑的选项。
E: Hopefully, someone will eventually notice that something is off and come to help. As for whether we'll still be alive by then, it's not something we should think about.

C: 貊泽先生真是知道如何安慰人心。
E: You sure have a way of comforting people, Mr. Moze.

C: 演武仪典还要照常举办吗？
E: Should the Wardance really be held as scheduled?

C: 其一是为演武仪典而来的众多商旅游客。宣布戒严，就等于公开声明罗浮并不安全，试问外人会作何反应？当然是人心惶惶，混乱不堪。
E: The first are the many travelers who have come all the way here for the Wardance. If we declare martial law now, it's like declaring that the Luofu isn't safe. How do you think the outsiders would react? They'd be terrified, and chaos might ensue.

C: 从一些线索来看，他们进入迴星港是为呼雷的逃亡做准备的，却阴差阳错被我们撞破了。
E: It seems they infiltrated Stargazer Navalia in order to prepare for Hoolay's escape, and we foiled their plans by pure chance.

C: 到底是「天击将军」，大难临头还有这么好的胃口…还请飞霄将军速战速决。
E: You still have a good appetite even in the face of disaster — you truly are the Merlin's Claw... Please, finish the food quickly so we can get to work, General Feixiao.

C: 我和步离孽物对抗多年，深知他们的凶残，也知晓那凶残背后的狡诈。这次劫狱事件，步离人显然是有备而来。敌在暗处，没理由贸然走上台前。
E: I've fought against borisin abominations for years, and I know their ferocity and cunning well. The borisin were clearly well-prepared for this prison break, and now they are staying in the shadows. They have no reason to rush out into the open.

C: 这最佳时机什么时候才会出现？
E: But when will that time come?

C: 长久以来，这只幕后黑手罔顾罗浮安危，一意孤行。退让只会助长对方的气焰，进一步危及罗浮的太平。
E: For a long time, this hidden force has been pursuing their own goals and undermining the security of the Luofu. Backing down now will only encourage them to further endanger the peace here.

C: 能将万般药物烹做菜式，令患者吃下，这就是{RUBY_B#火锅}鼎镬{RUBY_E#}的妙用。无论什么药材食材，稀里糊涂浸入汤中炖煮，顷刻间都成了珍馐美味了。
E: The magic of my {RUBY_B#hot pot}cauldron{RUBY_E#} is its ability to make all kinds of medicines into dishes that patients can eat. When simmered and cooked together, any kind of medicinal herb or ingredient becomes a delightful delicacy.

C: 心中的希望越大，死亡降临时的痛苦就越发强烈。等我撕开你喉咙的那一刻，我想看看你的表情是否还能像刚才那样镇定。
E: The more hope you hold in your heart, the greater your pain will be when death comes. I wonder if you can maintain your composure when I tear your throat open.

C: 应该是可疑的云骑士兵。
E: The Cloud Knight soldier.

C: 我还有些问题没有得到回答。
E: Because I need answers.

C: 我太了解这些孽物的手段了。他们总会留下逃生的道路，任由猎物仓惶离开。随后便是近乎戏耍般的逐杀追猎，在牺牲者们的惨状中，步离人总会获得莫大的满足……
E: I know the methods of these abominations all too well. They always leave an escape route for their prey, allowing them to flee in fear. Then they chase them like it's a game. Borisin get great satisfaction from the last struggles of their victims...

C: 在三十年前方壶仙舟的那场大战中，她拯救了你们所有人，但却在濒死的时刻意外察觉到了体内流淌着步离血脉。
E: So, she saved you all in that great battle on the Xianzhou Fanghu three decades ago, but to your surprise, you discovered her borisin bloodline while she was at death's door.

C: 你早就知道？
E: Did you already know this?

C: 末度…这是什么声音？
E: Mok Tok... What's that noise?

C: 我的回归将带回「狼之古训」，我将以我自己的方式挽救堕落的族群，让它重焕荣光！
E: My return will bring back the Wolf's Creed. In my own way, I shall save our weakened pack and restore it to its former glory!

C: 「演武仪典」即将召开\n\n竞锋舰
E: The Wardance is about to commence\n\nSkysplitter

C: 我？我还好。一看到这么多人聚在一块，不知怎么突然安心了起来。
E: Me? I'm fine. As soon as I saw all these people gathered here, I suddenly felt weirdly relaxed.

C: …也行，你去问吧。
E: ...Very well, go and get your intel.

C: 虽然椒丘总是希望我适可而止、别动真格，但现在…该是真正「速战速决」的时候了。
E: I know Jiaoqiu always wants me to know my limits and not get carried away, but... now is the time to bring this to a swift end.

C: 无论牺牲得有多壮烈…步离人，你们的战斗和死亡都没有一丝荣誉可言。
E: No matter how heroic your sacrifice... there is no honor in your battles or deaths, borisin.

C: 很遗憾，我们目前没有能区分步离人与狐人的手段。
E: Unfortunately, we don't have any means to distinguish between borisin and foxians.

C: 九、八、七、六、五、四…时间要到了哦！
E: Nine, eight, seven, six, five, four... Time is running out!

C: 擂赛开始前，要不抽空跟三月见个面？
E: Maybe I should take a moment to meet with March before the tournament starts?

C: 接纳这一切，步离人将会臣服于你。毁灭他们，让他们尸骨无存，或是教化他们成为仙舟的附庸…一切凭你喜欢。
E: Accept these truths and the borisin will bow to you. Destroy them, reduce them to dust, or teach them to become servants of the Xianzhou... You are free to do as you please.

C: 我曾统御群强，猎尽孱弱。
E: I once commanded the strong and hunted the weak.

C: 有太多话还没来得及讲…
E: There's so much we didn't have the chance to say...

C: 下次别再和{NICKNAME}玩这种超真实过家家了好不好？
E: Next time, let's not play overly realistic make-believe with {NICKNAME}, okay?

C: 太卜符玄在前往玉阙仙舟述职前，我曾向她问卜仪典之事。她留下字条说「卦象涨落于震乾之间，是大壮之相」，纵有波折也能安然度过。
E: Before Master Diviner Fu Xuan's departure for the Yuque, I consulted with her about the Wardance. She left a note stating, "The hexagram oscillates between thunder and heaven, a sign of great power," assuring us that we would successfully navigate any challenges.

C: 爻光从玉阙仙舟发来了她的通讯印信，她要将近些时日在阵法中参详计算的结果与我们分享。
E: Yao Guang has sent a message from the Xianzhou Yuque, informing us that she wishes to share the results of recent calculations she made within the matrix.

C: 你是这里的皇帝？
E: You're the Emperor of this place?

C: 不知道啊。要不您问问酒吧附近的人，他们也许还记得…埃夫姆当时那副志得意满的样子，轻易可忘不掉啊，哈哈哈。
E: I don't know. Why not ask the others near the bar? They might remember... Ephraim was a drunkenly flamboyant character — he's not easily forgettable, hahaha.

C: 行行行，你忙你的。
E: Sure, sure. You do you.

C: 当然不是…也不对，可能以前是吧？匹诺康尼的逐梦客里确实有不少是亡国的贵族。嗐，谁知道呢。
E: Of course not... Wait, maybe she was in the past? Many Dreamchasers from Penacony were aristocrats from the fallen empire. Ha, who knows?

C: 没错。朕也不能保证。
E: That's right. Even I cannot promise that.

C: 你们走吧。
E: You should leave.

C: 开始「钟表把戏」
E: Start the Clockwork

C: 你这儿挺热闹啊…
E: You've got a lot going on here...

C: 我与查德威克博士有过两面之缘。第一次是在他年轻气盛时，第二次则是在数十年后——两次见面，他所处的境遇大不相同。
E: I met Dr. Chadwick twice. Our first encounter happened when he was still young and ambitious, and the second was decades later. His situations in both meetings were starkly different.

C: 我没有回答您这个问题的权限，先生。我也没有权限允许任何人私自探访查德威克博士…请回吧，这里没有让步的余地。
E: I don't have the authority to answer your questions or allow unauthorized visits to Dr. Chadwick, sir... Please leave. There is no room for negotiation here.

C: 欣赏？可以这么说吧。不过老实说…我是有些羡慕，还有点…妒忌。
E: Admire? I suppose you could say that. But to be honest... I'm somewhat envious, and a bit... jealous.

C: 「木已成舟，自『虚数脉冲』问世的一刻起，宇宙的任何一隅都注定要警惕来自它的威胁。我无力令时光倒流，但我至少还能做到一件事——」
E: "The die was cast at the moment the Imaginary Pulse was created. Every corner of the universe is destined to be on guard against its threats. I can't turn back time, but there's still one thing I can do..."

C: 那就想办法绕过公司的眼线吧。赌上「天才」之名，我一定会为卡尔德隆•查德威克博士办到这件事。
E: Find a way to circumvent the IPC's surveillance then. With my reputation as a Genius on the line, I will surely get this done for Dr. Calderon Chadwick.

C: 好了，这下「钟表匠」的心愿圆满达成，那只贪杯的猎犬估计也光荣退休了——
E: All right, now the Watchmaker's wishes have been fulfilled. That drunken hound can also probably retire with honor...

C: 问得差不多了。
E: I'm about done with my questions.

C: …我会帮你传达。
E: ...I will deliver the message.

C: ——啾，啾啾！找到啦！
E: — Tweet, tweet tweet! Found it!

C: 竟然能在梦境之底造出如此庞大的城寨……
E: To be able to erect such a massive stronghold at the bottom of the Dreamscape...

C: …这就不必了吧。我只是想要钱而已，教训外邦人这活还轮不到我亲自做。
E: ...That won't be necessary. I am only interested in money. It's not up to me to personally mete out punishment on outlanders.

C: 拉莱德大人，这位{F#姑娘}{M#青年}的言外之意是，你的咄咄逼人已经把局面带到了冲突的边缘。
E: Lord Liluder, what this {F#lass}{M#lad} means is that, your overbearing antics have escalated this conflict to the brink of physical violence.

C: 某些激进者确实这么想，说奥赫玛不应接纳任何外邦人。但那样的话，我们在黑潮面前就会孤立无援了——万敌和白厄两位勇士也来自外邦。
E: Some radicals do think this way, saying that Okhema should not accept any outlanders at all. But if that were the case we would be solitary in our stand against the black tide — Mydei and Phainon are foreign as well.

C: 因为真正的资源，是人。没有人的城邦就像没有秘酿的容器，难以在狂风中保持挺立。
E: Because the true resource is people. A city without her people is like a vessel without fine brew — unable to stand steadfast in violent gales.

C: 在发表评价之前，务必记得，不是所有人拥有选择。
E: Before you pass judgment, please remember that not everyone has a choice.

C: 圣城的避难所距离城墙只有半天脚程，那里有卫兵守护，相对安全。只是凭这些人现在的状态很难抵达。
E: The holy city's shelter is only a half-day trek away from the city walls. There are guards there, so it'll be safer. It's just that the way these refugees are now... getting there would be difficult.

C: 怎么样，小家伙，做好决定了吗？
E: Little one, have you decided yet?

C: 这不是那位灰发英雄嘛？难道……
E: Isn't that the gray-haired hero? Could you have...

C: 苏克提瑞斯的眼神有些躲闪，似乎并不愿被你看到这副模样。
E: Soctires' eyes are somewhat avoidant, as if he is reluctant to have you see him in this state.

C: 按律法所言，偷窃应处以禁闭之刑。但考虑到作案动机，本案又不能简单依照先例判罚。
E: According to law, theft is a crime punishable by imprisonment. But in light of the motive of this case, it cannot be so easily judged based on precedent.

C: 站在我右手边的是控方代表，仓库的主人，富人拉莱德。他认为应当重判，以免再有物资流出城外。
E: To my right is the prosecution's representative and owner of the warehouse, the wealthy Liluder. He believes that the punishment should be harsh, to prevent future supplies from leaving the city.

C: 你怎么定义奥赫玛人？
E: How do you define an Okheman?

C: 人是会反抗的。即使人们眼中的弱者，被逼到份上时也会引发冲突。从功利角度看，帮助并安抚他们才是最划算的选择。
E: People will revolt. Even the meek will bare their fangs when forced into a corner. From a pragmatic perspective, assisting and placating them is the most economical choice.

C: 善恶与对错应该分开看待。
E: Good and evil should be viewed separately from right and wrong.

C: …怎么可能到那种地步呢？你这是滑坡谬误！
E: ...How could it possibly come to that? This is a slippery slope argument!

C: 不等帕拉滕发话，在场的公民们就已经笑作了一团。看架势，他不会有机会开口了。
E: Without waiting for Palaten's reply, the citizens are already bursting into laughter. By the looks of it, he probably isn't going to get a chance to speak.

C: 在结束之前，介意我补充几句吗？
E: Before we conclude, may I add a few words?

C: 这个帕里斯也太不讲义气了！我们还没问关于阿卡迪亚的事情呢！
E: This Paris guy knows nothing about loyalty! We still didn't get to ask him anything about Arcadia!

C: 唉！若是如此，我又有何脸面于云崖之上安然度日？如果他战死沙场，我便辞去元老职务，久居于城墙之前为他悼念。
E: Agh! If that is so, how can I bring myself to return to Dawncloud and live my days in peace? If he fell on the sands of the battlefield, I shall resign my post as the elder and spend the rest of my days before the city walls in remembrance of him.

C: 这人物关系有点复杂。
E: This guy really gets around...

C: 喂喂，不会是还放不下以前的心里的坎，不想给奥赫玛面子吧？
E: Hey now! You're not still so attached to your past that you cannot do Okhema the honor of a dance, are you?

C: 喂，你们说什么呢——
E: Hey, what are you saying...

C: 这、这是因为我们的错吗？是因为我们将纷争的眷属放了进来，所以才会变成这样！
E: Was... Was this our fault? Is this only happening because we allowed the Titankin of strife to enter the city!?

C: 这个故事…好像和一开始想象的不一样呢……
E: This story... It ended differently to how I imagined...

C: ——黄金茧中的浪漫丝，便是如此缥缈物。
E: ...The threads of romance in the golden cocoon, a mystery known to only those attuned.

C: 第三场的记忆
E: The Third Memory

C: 就靠你了，好用…不，万能的大恩人！
E: I'm counting on you, my handy... I mean, my all-powerful savior!

C: 它们手中的剑应该就是传递神性的媒介，试着让这几个大家伙把剑插下去吧！
E: The swords they're holding should be the medium for transmitting divinity. Let's see what happens when these big guys stick their swords in!

C: 你好，帕西提亚。
E: Hello, Pasithea.

C: 啧，难怪蠢到会相信所谓的传谕梦母，看来你的眼睛也和她一样不好使。
E: Tsk, no wonder you're foolish enough to believe this supposed Oracle Dreammother — your eyes are just as useless as hers.

C: 糟了！出大事了！
E: Oh shoot! Something huge is happening!

C: 我们只是不愿承认而已。那么多城邦覆灭在了「岁月」里，现在轮到我们了。
E: We simply do not wish to admit it ourselves. So many cities have been decimated by "time." Now it is our turn.

C: 放弃挣扎吧，帕西提亚。
E: Give up on struggling, Pasithea.

C: 这是不可更改的命运。
E: This destiny cannot be altered.

C: 我会陪你到最后的。
E: I'll be with you till the end.

C: （信徒们在蠢动中呼喊，期盼虚假的希望）
E: (The believers clamor and shout, clinging to false hope)

C: 就是这样。星际和平娱乐会操办《如我所书》的出版事宜，相关费用也由公司一并承担。
E: That's right. The Interastral Peace Entertainment will handle the publication of As I've Written, and the IPC will cover all related expenses.

C: 不过…贝洛伯格，会不会有一天也会像翁法罗斯那样，从宇宙里消失，只留下一本书呢？
E: But... will Belobog one day vanish from the universe like the Amphoreans did, leaving behind nothing except a book?

C: 铁墓陨落后不久，联盟便召集诸位将军，共同商讨下一步行动。此书中的记述，应当能为他们再添几分助力。
E: Shortly after the fall of Irontomb, the Alliance gathered all the generals to discuss their next course of action. The records in this book should provide them with additional support.

C: 好消息。
E: Good news.

C: 许多世界都会在本土英雄传说中添加夸张成分，声称祖先的血脉继承自某位星神…到后来，离奇的身世都变成一种潮流了。
E: Many worlds add exaggerated elements to their local hero legends, claiming their ancestors' bloodlines are inherited from some Aeon... Eventually, having an extraordinary origin story became quite the trend.

C: 叽里咕噜说什么呢？
E: What's all that gibberish?

C: 你也来买《如我所书》呢？
E: Oh, you're here to buy As I've Written too?

C: 嗨，想我了吗？
E: Hi, miss me yet?

C: 一个始终如一的世界。
E: A world that never changed.

C: 晕晕，呜——迷失，呜呜……
E: Dizzy... Lost... Wooo...

C: 你就没有点个人生活吗？
E: Did anyone teach you about work-life balance?

C: 啦啦啦～「流星怪盗卢布朗」的周边看起来好像也不贵，但是我没有钱，是不是该问古恩先生要一点呢……
E: Wow! "Meteor Thief Leblanc" merch doesn't seem to be that expensive, but I don't have any money. Should I ask Mr. Gunn for some?

C: 古恩先生之前好像交代了什么报告…研究？但研究不属于当前星系内通用学科考试重点内容，还是推掉为好。
E: Mr. Gunn seems to have given me some sort of report to handle... or is it some research to be done? But research is not a recommended field of study within the current Galactic General Examination's criteria. I better tell him I don't have time.

C: 古恩先生…好的，老师好，请多指教。
E: Mr. Gunn... Okay, {M#mister}{F#miss}, please teach me.

C: 我想学…想学那些能让我变得更像人的知识。
E: I want to learn... knowledge that will make me more human.

C: …我知道，所以在物理意义上我始终无法成为真正的人类。
E: ...I know, in the physical sense, I can never become a real human.

C: 错误编号<unbreak>26</unbreak>，是哪里报错来着？
E: Error code <unbreak>26</unbreak>... What's the problem again?

C: 别管想法了，机器人还没修好？
E: Enough ideas. Did you fix the robots?

C: 我刚收到消息说机器人已经恢复正常了，没想到背后竟然这么曲折。
E: I just got a message saying the robots are back to normal. I didn't know there's such a convoluted tale behind it.

C: 琥珀不知道具体哪一纪，那时候空间站还管理很混乱，奇物研究规范没有制定。
E: Some time during the Amber Era, when the space station was not very organized and there were no set rules regarding Curio research...

C: 我就知道你能搞定！快告诉我，你都查到了什么？
E: I knew you could figure this out! Quick! Tell me what you've found!

C: 说好的跨学科研究呢？
E: Weren't you doing this as cross-disciplinary research?

C: 我相信，只要继续把持莱姆士汀家真诚的待人之道，本人有朝一日必定能友遍天下。
E: I believe that I will one day make friends all over the world as long as I continue to treat people with sincerity like all the Limesteins.

C: 什么？莱姆士汀家的那个华劳斯？我没听错吧？
E: What? Wallace Limestein? Did I hear you right?

C: 所以呢？这和我有什么关系？
E: So? What's that got to do with me?

C: 原来如此…那位叫拉雯妮的房地产中介，她是看中了我的家庭背景才打算和我交朋友的。
E: I see... Lavonne wants to be friends with me because of my family background.

C: 我欣赏你的自信。
E: I admire your confidence.

C: 我从线人那里得到消息，「地火」今天又接到了一大批派送订单，他们的那点人手早就忙不过来啦。
E: I got news from my informant that Wildfire received a large number of delivery orders today, and has been overwhelmed by the workload.

C: 听说她得了一种「凡是说话就必须押韵」的怪病…正好！趁着这次机会，我也要去见识一下！
E: I heard that she developed a strange condition where she constantly speaks in rhyme. I'd say this is a perfect chance for us to check it out.

C: 与神情焦虑的老铁卫搭话…
E: Start a conversation with the anxious old guard...

C: 都准备好了。请拿好您的「七彩虹」——欢迎下次再光临「长夏」花店。
E: Here are your Rainbows. Thanks for the purchase, and have a lovely day!

C: 就来一束「初雪八落」吧。
E: Then I'll take a bouquet of First Snows.

C: 哎，这篇论文如果能发表，「大宇宙时间隧道」能为人所知，明明是整个贝洛伯格的福气…可除了你我，却没有半个人认真对待这件事。
E: If I can just get this paper out, then my big universe time tunnel theory will become common knowledge for the glorious prestige of all Belobog... But unfortunately, you and I are the only ones taking this seriously.

C: 嗐，我跟你说这个干嘛…总之，既然你证明了自己，那么我也愿赌服输——把你的论文交给我看看吧！
E: Ha! But why am I telling you all this... In any case, since you've proven yourself, I'm willing to take a gamble. Let me take a look at that paper of yours!

C: 呃…不是我说你，都知道这是真实事件改编了…那你自己觉得这答案能对吗？
E: Uh... wait, you knew it was based on real events... and you still think that's the right answer?

C: 好好好，就你聪明。
E: Haha, that's clever.

C: …求你了，再帮我一回。
E: ...Please, help me out one last time.

C: 嗯…放心好了，不会是什么很困难的工作哦~
E: Well... don't worry. It's not a difficult job~

C: 也许这本爱情小说里，还藏着塔米拉小姐本人对爱情的看法呢……
E: Maybe hidden within this novel are Tamila's secret thoughts about love...

C: 喔，贵客啊。塔米拉小姐，今天有什么事吗？
E: Oh, a customer. Tamila! What's up today?

C: 对，就只是看看。你只要告诉他「我是会社派来的」，他就明白你的来意了。
E: Yes, just there to see. Tell him that you're "from the Society" and he'll understand.

C: 哎哎哎？！等下，你别走！我看你从宾馆前台那边来…难不成你和老歌德聊过了？
E: Hey! Wait! Don't go! I saw you came from the hotel's reception desk... Did you talk to Old Goethe?

C: 原来你还有这种隐藏身份。
E: So, this is your hidden identity.

C: 哇，没想到这么快就有人来啦！那我就和你说说我的需求吧。
E: Woah, I didn't expect someone to arrive so quickly! Let me tell you what I need.

C: 哈哈哈，其实都是小事！我们一家子关系其实还不错。
E: Hahaha, it's nothing! My family actually gets on very well.

C: 嗯…我的话要这个、这个、还有这个…就这些吧，我去和老歌德说一声。
E: Mmm... I want this, this, and this... Alright, I'll go let Old Goethe know.

C: 你望见这被困于裂界的小小回声遁入街巷深处，随后很快便化作微光、四散无踪了。
E: You watch as this tiny echo trapped in the Fragmentum dives between the alleyways, then fades into scattered particles of light.

C: 老朽手里也有个类似的小玩意，是战前留下的——它能使人隔空通讯，还能凭空留下周遭的画像。只可惜它已经坏了，如今也没人懂得修理的技术……
E: I have a similar gadget with me from before the war. It can help us talk to people across the skies and memorialize your surroundings in images. Pity it's broken now, and no one knows how to fix it anymore...

C: 你转身离开，又正欲回头再看一眼老人时，却发现那人早已杳无踪迹。
E: As you turn to leave, you try to get one last look at the old man, but he is already nowhere to be found.

C: 我就说你吃不了吧。
E: I told you that you can't eat.

C: 你已经变成了一只幽灵…
E: You've turned into a ghost...

C: 还是好好改造，重新做人吧。
E: Leave the past behind and start over.

C: 这东西…是叫「简易护具」吗？不错，不错……
E: Is this thing called... Simple Protective Gear? Hmm, not bad...

C: 没错。
E: That's right.

C: 你客观陈述了护珠人为了寻找失事者而付出的努力，并且强力建议落难者给出自己的具体位置，以提高获救概率。
E: You objectively stated the efforts that the Pearlkeepers have gone to in order to find the castaway and strongly suggested they provide their precise location to increase their chances of rescue.

C: 对了，我已经跟地衡司反映了漂流瓶的情况。
E: Ah yes, I have already reported the drift bottle situation to the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 什么破漂流瓶，直接扔回海里！
E: Who cares about these dastardly drift bottles!? Just chuck it right back!

C: （跃渊说护珠人已经认可了我的能力，我可以独立处理巡逻中产生的情况。）
E: (Yueyuan said that the Pearlkeepers have already recognized my talents and that I can deal with anything I encounter on patrol alone.)

C: 你被永远关在瓶子里。
E: I wish for you to be shut inside this bottle forever.

C: 放心好了，配方的原材料都经过地衡司质检的，安心放心。而且我先前也喝过几次，你看我现在活蹦乱跳的，能有什么问题。
E: Don't worry. All my ingredients have passed the Realm-Keeping Commission's quality inspection. Plus, I've downed it a few times myself, and I'm still alive and kicking. What could possibly go wrong?

C: 你看见杜老板正用极为期盼的目光盯着你，你一直未开口，他的耳后冒出涔涔汗珠，不知是紧张，是急，亦或者对你办事不靠谱的负面情绪……
E: Boss Du looks at you with expectant eyes, but you remain silent. At that moment, you notice beads of sweat emerging behind his ears, and you are unsure if he's nervous, anxious, or lacks confidence in your competency...

C: 千万不要试图偷偷溜进去，毕竟这家餐厅的老板扔你就像掷铁饼一样轻松。
E: Do not attempt to sneak in, considering that the boss of this diner is physically capable of hauling you off your feet and tossing you to the streets like they would a discus.

C: 不过你敏锐地注意到，雕塑在破碎的一瞬间，碎片四散而下，似乎朝着什么地方飞去，落地时发出了清脆的响声。
E: But you keenly notice that the instant the statue shatters, while its fragments are scattered all over, it's as if they are flying somewhere, before being strewn on the ground in a crisp cascade of sounds.

C: 识相点，赶紧赔给我，钱不够的话写欠条也可以——别想着赖账啊，{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}，你也不想被我扭送到卫兵那儿去对吧？
E: Better not make this any worse and cough up the dough. I take IOUs if you don't have enough cash... And don't even think about skipping out, {F#girl}{M#boy}. You don't want me to call the guards now, do you?

C: 据说，也有一位桀骜的黄金裔向来厌恶这里——他对水温的要求太别致了。
E: It is said that there is also a rebellious Chrysos Heir who disdains this place — he has very particular demands about the water temperature.

C: 公司代表从无名客口中获悉，这颗新生的星球名为「翁法罗斯」。
E: According to information provided by the Nameless, IPC representatives have learned that this newborn planet is called "Amphoreus."

C: 经公司网络安全部门调查取证，确认本次攻击系「星核猎手」成员银狼所为。
E: An investigation by the IPC's cybersecurity department has confirmed that Silver Wolf, a member of the Stellaron Hunters, was behind the recent cyberattack.

C: 欢迎各位寰宇公民积极举报，本台将为线索提供者发放额外奖励。
E: We encourage all citizens of the cosmos to come forward with any information. This station will issue additional rewards to those who provide useful leads.

C: 凡人也倾慕瑟希斯的美满，便立此树为幸福的见证——
E: The mortals adored Cerces' happiness, and planted a tree to witness the happiness.

C: 神殿入口
E: Temple Entrance

C: 看，百眼的巨鸟就要苏醒，
E: Behold, the hundred-eyed bird stirs to awaken.

C: 凡人辩诘的议会，诸神注目的剧场。
E: An assembly for mortal debates, a theater under the gods' watch.

C: 在一瞥的震悚里遗忘身后长路。
E: In a fleeting moment of terror, the long road behind fades from memory.

C: 那便太过贪心。白厄阁下……
E: Now, that would be too greedy, Lord Phainon...

C: 你记住了「曾在果蔬摊品尝过水果」
E: You remembered "Tasting Fruits at the Fruit Stall."

C: 破碎的茧壳中依然流淌着微弱的光芒，就像墨涅塔留下的叹息，夜晚的花园似乎还记得那个追逐理性之光的蝴蝶，甘愿放弃永恒，只为换取片刻的相拥。
E: From the broken cocoon, faint light still emanates, like a sigh left behind by Mnestia. The garden at night seems to remember the butterfly that once chased the light of reason, willingly forsaking eternity for a fleeting embrace.

C: 在某个广为流传的童话中，英勇的冒险者顺着豆茎偷走了天上巨人的种种宝贝，最后还杀死了它。面对着如今的树庭，你忽然意识到这个故事对于天上的巨人实在很不友好。
E: In a widely told fairy tale, a brave adventurer climbed a beanstalk to steal treasures from the giant in the sky, ultimately killing it. Standing now in the Grove, you suddenly realize how unkind this story is to the giants above.

C: 你不甘心地翻了翻旁边的几卷，分别是《命运织者历年重大预言集》、《圣女不会告诉你的预言秘诀》和《危机破解术：重塑你的占卜价值》，你险些被信徒们积年的焦虑所压垮。
E: Unwilling to give up, you sift through a few others nearby. Their titles read: Major Prophecies of the Weavers of Destiny, Secrets the Holy Maiden Won't Share About Prophecy, and Crisis Decoding: Reshaping Your Divination Value. You nearly buckle under the anxiety accumulated over generations by the devout.

C: 传说智者们总能在此间辩得想要的答案，灯台燃起的暖焰，见证过无数个灵光乍现的瞬间。
E: It is said that sages could always argue their way to the answers they sought here. The warm flames atop the lamps bear witness to countless moments of sudden inspiration.

C: 对外人而言，这一切都有些难以置信。谁能想到传说中的圣女，终究只是爱涂画的孩子。
E: To an outsider, it all seems unbelievable. Who would have thought that the legendary Holy Maiden was, in the end, just a child who loved to draw?

C: 卡林尼库斯大人，我们已经按您要求，在树庭的部分干道装好了青铜雷管。
E: Master Callinicus, we have installed bronze detonators along a number of the Grove main roads as you instructed.

C: 没错，这里有一根柱子好像不太对劲！
E: That's right, this pillar seems a bit off!

C: 你凝视着圣烛中升降的金色流体，壁画上的图案在光影交错中若隐若现，却再也没有出现过你的名字。
E: You gaze at the golden liquid rising and falling within the holy candle. The images on the mural flicker in the shifting light, but your name does not appear again.

C: 承让，承让。
E: Likewise, likewise.

C: 推卸责任的新颖角度。
E: New ways to avoid responsibility.

C: 绿色塑料袋…算是活着吗？
E: Does a green plastic bag count as living?

C: 拿冥河水洗脚。
E: To wash your feet in the River of Souls.

C: 记忆的残像沉默不语，因为这是不曾发生过的对话。
E: The shadow of the memory remains silent, for this conversation never truly occurred.

C: 你已经做得够多了。
E: You've already done enough.

C: 总之先把球棒扎进去试试？
E: Might as well poke it with the bat and see what happens?

C: 看那遥远的废墟，曾是海洋女王的宫殿，它与她的孩子们曾在那里经历了一段短暂的美好时光…以及一段漫长的痛苦岁月。
E: Look there, that distant ruin, once the palace of the Ocean Queen, where she and her children knew a fleeting moment of joy... and a long, bitter eternity of sorrow.

C: 买一本「雪国冒险奇谭」。
E: ... and buy a copy of Tale of the Winterlands.

C: …能把敬拜学派那群呆子的古董学论讲出生气来，不错。此次模拟辩论，你过关了。我很期待你在第七百四十二届大辩论会上的表现。
E: ...You managed to breathe life into the ancient theories from the tedious Venerationism. Very impressive. You pass this mock debate. I look forward to your performance at the <unbreak>742</unbreak>nd Great Debate.

C: 再会，可爱的孩子，谢谢你陪了我这么久。
E: Farewell, Trianne. Thank you for keeping me company for so long.

C: 那面镜子是怎么回事？
E: What's the deal with that mirror?

C: 别动手呀！我不是坏人——
E: Wait a minute! I'm not one of the bad guys!

C: 呃，对了——我停留在星穹列车上的事情，最好只有你和我知道。我不会在你的伙伴们面前现身，所以你也不要说，好吗？
E: Erm, about me being on the Astral Express... It'd be best if you kept it between the two of us. I won't reveal myself to your companions, so make sure you don't tell them about me, okay?

C: 「有形之物的消逝，必然带来无形之物的湮灭。」
E: "The disappearance of those with form will inevitably bring about the obliteration of those without."

C: 每个人对自我、对外物的记忆都是独一无二的，为了保持它的独立性和纯粹，就让咱们的交易成为仅限于你我之间的小秘密吧？
E: Everyone has a unique memory of themselves and everything around them. In order to keep that uniqueness and pureness unspoiled, let's keep our dealings a secret.

C: 睡前故事，喜欢！念给人家听！
E: I love bedtime stories! Please, read one to me!

C: 偷看？怎么会呢，人家是在注视着你！睁大眼睛，注视！
E: Peeking? Not at all, I was just watching you! Eyes wide open, watching!

C: 真好奇不死的诅咒。
E: I'm really curious about the curse of immortality.

C: 是因为喜欢这里。
E: It's because I like this place.

C: 哎呀，人家懂了，这是{NICKNAME}的「关系认证」。好，那就都听你的！
E: Ah, I get it now! That's {NICKNAME}'s way of "certifying our relationship." Okay then, I'll go along with whatever you say!

C: 其实我的通缉令更好看。
E: My wanted poster looks even better.

C: 对吧对吧！仔细想想，根本没有非得成为神才能做的事，多奇怪呀……
E: Right, right! When you really think about it, there's nothing that can only be done as a god. How strange...

C: （算是公道的小费。）
E: (It's a fair tip.)

C: 少了三个碎片…难受…
E: Three pieces short... I feel sick...

C: 要是我那些蠢货徒弟能有你这样的干劲儿就好了。
E: If only my blockheaded apprentices have your drive.

C: 那就来吧！
E: Let's do it!

C: 哈哈哈，真是不错。老夫看到你麻溜地就解决了，真是越来越喜欢你了。
E: Hahaha, great. The problem is solved once I saw you. Now I just like you more.

C: 废话少说，上手见真章。
E: Silence. Spare me your words and show me your skill.

C: 把奖励拿了吧，反正我也用不上。
E: Take the reward. I can't use it anyway.

C: 我再准备下。
E: I need a moment to get ready.

C: 什么是「四大天王」？
E: The Formidable Four?

C: 还能选难度？
E: You can choose difficulties?

C: 滴答，游客，周围如此嘈杂，表针的声音却无比清晰…不可思议。
E: Tick-tock, hello guest. It's so noisy around us, but the sound of the clock hand is crystal clear... Incredible.

C: 在捕捉它们的过程中，你可能会看到一些难以理解的现象。不用担心，那只是它们留下的残影而已。
E: During the process of capturing them, you may witness some phenomena that are hard to comprehend. Don't worry. Those are merely the remnants they leave behind.

C: 嗯…有位织者向往高处、希望像纷争世的帝王那样手握权力。金丝带来消息，它正站在<color=#dbc291ff>俯瞰浴场的高处</color>，发表豪言壮语呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who aspires to great heights, longing to wield power like an emperor of Era Bellica. The golden thread brings tidings: They now stand <color=#dbc291ff>at the peak overlooking the baths</color>, making a bold and watchful statement.

C: 嗯…有位织者喜好乐理。金丝带来消息，它正和伙伴们于<color=#dbc291ff>云石天宫的水漫琴旁</color>倾听演奏，或许你也可以去听上一曲。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who has a deep love for music theory. The golden thread brings tidings: They now listen intently to a performance <color=#dbc291ff>beside the water harp of Marmoreal Palace</color>. Perhaps you might join them as well.

C: 嗯…有位织者思绪严密，渴求完美，看不惯任何苟全之事。金丝带来消息，它和<color=#dbc291ff>壁画里的方块</color>较上了劲，去那里找找看吧。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is meticulous and thirsty for perfection, unwilling to accept anything less. The golden thread brings tidings: They are now caught in a standoff with <color=#dbc291ff>the square in the mural painting</color>. Go there and seek them.

C: 嗯…有位织者执意要把铁球推上高坡。金丝带来消息，它在<color=#dbc291ff>长长的楼梯边缘</color>，重复着徒劳的工作。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who insists on pushing the iron balls up the steep hill. The golden thread brings tidings: They now toil <color=#dbc291ff>on the edge of a long staircase</color>, endlessly repeating the fruitless task.

C: 不要灰心，年轻人，仔细观察——答案就藏在阳光照耀不到的地方。
E: Fret not, youngling, and watch carefully — the answer is hidden where no sun may shine.

C: …没错，愿荣耀与你同在喀。
E: ...Correct. May glory be with you, crrk.

C: 好像欧洛尼斯一时兴起，用帷幕遮蔽了我天赋的灵光。昨天我出门时，竟然破天荒地暴露了行踪。现在又遇上你…看来今天也没指望了。
E: It feels as if Oronyx themself has cast a curtain to eclipse the bright light of my talents. Yesterday, when I left the house, I accidentally exposed my location for the first time ever. Meeting you now... It looks like any hope for today being any better is gone, too...

C: 您看我这玲珑剔透的肤质，有必要用那不便之物吗？
E: Look at my flawless, delicate skin. You think I have use for something so crude?

C: 悬锋城人把城市建立在这儿，又出于什么考量？就算他们真的这么爱脚底板发烫的感觉，至少也给悬桥加个扶手吧？
E: What were the people of Castrum Kremnos thinking when they built their city here? Even if they really enjoyed having their feet scorched, you'd think they would at least add railings to their bridges.

C: 我来自过去。
E: I came from the past.

C: 最有惊无险的吧。
E: The most harrowing heist.

C: 好吧，好吧…没想到聪明反被聪明误，到头来全是自取其辱！
E: Well, well... Oh my... Outsmarted at my own game... how humiliating!

C: 你猜。
E: Take a guess.

C: 那是，那是…你早就是这个游戏的大师级玩家了。
E: That's right... You've already become a master of this game.

C: 真巴特鲁斯在哪？
E: Where's the real Bartholos?

C: 桀桀桀桀，老巴特鲁斯每次被您逮住，原来就是这个感受啊！
E: Hehehehe, now I know exactly how old Bartholos feels when you catch it!

C: 漏？桀桀桀桀，您在说什么呐，咱可没有趁机把这位奇美拉的私房钱……
E: Missing? Hehehehe, what are you suggesting? I definitely didn't steal this chimera's secret stash...

C: 一定是扎格列斯干的！
E: It must be Zagreus's doing!

C: 咳咳…故事有点长，不过呢——巴特鲁斯为什么也有和朋友分享战利品的时候？其实就是类似的原因啦。
E: Ahem... That story ran a bit long. So why did Bartholos share their treasures with friends? Well, it's for pretty much the same reason.

C: 桀桀，桀桀。你的记忆当中还真是能偷出些相当有趣的东西。
E: Hehe. Your memories hold some absolutely fascinating things worth stealing.

C: 不告诉你。
E: Not telling you.

C: …诶，对了对了——咱们朋友一场，你就行行好，帮我把剩余的「培训课程」做完如何？
E: Oh, I know! Since we're pals and all, how about you do me a solid and finish up the rest of this "training course"?

C: 嘿嘿，你果然也是懂的——这种有点禁忌氛围的研究才最带感嘛！
E: Yes, you get it! It's more exciting if the research feels a little forbidden, right?

C: 嗐，你听我解释嘛。
E: Let me explain.

C: 好抽象的问题。
E: That's quite abstract.

C: 对报酬还满意吗？我们继续吧。
E: Are you satisfied with the reward? Let's continue.

C: 迷津隆隆作响……
E: The Maze groans deeply...

C: 秘锁消融、褪去，贮藏其中的物事缓缓显现……
E: The seals unravel, fading away as what lies within slowly comes into view...

C: 别一惊一乍啊。
E: Don't scare me like that.

C: 你真没事？感觉不大对劲…
E: You sure you're okay? You don't seem like yourself...

C: 你三下五除二揍趴了黑潮造物。
E: You knock out the Black Tide Creature in no time.

C: 你们还好吗？
E: Are you guys alright?

C: 之前「位面」功能做的不错，我们几个就各用这个功能擅自做了点实验…结果每个都给系统代码捅了点篓子。
E: The "Plane" function worked pretty well last time, so each of us used this function to experiment a little... and we all made some mistakes in the system's code.

C: 「不过…你记得『不免费』，对吧？」
E: "However, you remember my help 'doesn't come for free', right?"

C: 来吧……
E: Bring it on...

C: 可恶……
E: Darn it...

C: 继续…
E: Continue...

C: 关于「模拟宇宙」奖励…
E: About Simulated Universe rewards...

C: 祂的头发如同鹊翎，在千星寰宇中盛开。你想起书中记载人们对星神的遐想——<color=#dbc291ff>「丰饶」星神药师。</color>
E: THEIR hair is like a magpie's feathers, blooming in a universe of thousands of stars, which reminds you of people's reverie about the Aeons recorded in the book. It's <color=#dbc291ff>Yaoshi, the Aeon of Abundance</color>.

C: 没事，我也不感兴趣。
E: It's okay. I'm not interested either.

C: 这是沉浸装置，它会生成「位面饰品」数据。退出后，我会把「位面饰品」给你。
E: This is an immersion device that can generate Planar Ornament data. I'll give you the Planar Ornaments once you exit the simulation.

C: 「反正，你假装不知道就行，别拆穿他，不然他可能会不高兴。」黑塔继续百无聊赖，「至于『丰饶』…别等了，祂大概不会出现。」
E: "Anyway, just pretend you don't know anything. He might be upset if you expose him." Still looking bored, Herta continues, "As for the Aeon of Abundance, I suggest you stop waiting, as THEY are unlikely to show up."

C: 你的周身被死亡填满，不论是人还是虫——当猎人总比成为猎物好！但此刻，一种前所未有的诡谲场面出现：虫群突然于战火中放弃逃亡，开始繁衍，霎时间无数新的个体诞生——这一瞬间或将掀开宇宙生物谱系全新的一页！你从未想过如此惊人的异象会在眼前发生。
E: Death surrounds you, with corpses of both humans and insects littering the landscape. It's better to be the hunter than the prey! But to your amazement, in the midst of the battle, the Swarm abruptly ceases its flight and begins to reproduce. This moment may herald the advent of a new age of cosmic organisms! You never imagined that such a wondrous sight could occur right before your eyes.

C: 在这场浩劫平息后，一些以罪恶感为食的「血罪灵」从虚空中出现，短暂停留。崭新出生的*血罪灵*只顾手舞足蹈，它成为退场者意志的集结：死而又生、生而又死的虫群；摧毁又建立、建立又摧毁的文明……
E: After the destruction subsides, a group of "Sin Thirsters" emerge from the void, feeding on the sense of guilt. They appear fleetingly, and dance around in jubilation, having gained a new lease on life. They represent the souls of the deceased: The Swarm that has died and been reborn, and the civilizations that have been destroyed and reconstructed...

C: 但你仍听见言语…它称图谱编纂游戏进行到后来已人虫不分。在夜晚，一些幻觉悄然降临，令猎人与虫群难以分清彼此——党同伐异无可止息，直至他的爱人最终承认自己运用了虫粉巫术，并劝他开枪。
E: Still, its words persist... It claims that the chart compilation game has reached a point where the line between humans and insects has become blurred. Visions haunt the hunters and the Swarm alike at night, making it difficult to distinguish friend from foe. Inevitably, hunters started killing each other until the hunter's beloved confessed to using insect-dust witchcraft, urging him to end her life.

C: 「生命拥有概念上的美，如其基因数字的对称性、螺旋花纹的结构美…但生命短暂如尘埃。」阮•梅的眼中出现一丝悲哀，「类似的命运。」
E: "Life possesses a conceptual beauty, such as the symmetry of its genetic numbers and the structural beauty of its spiral patterns... But life is as fragile as dust," a hint of sadness appears in Ruan Mei's eyes. "And his life is no exception."

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了骰蛊里封存的无数记忆重合。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face and THEIR voice turns into the overlap of countless memories sealed within the dice holder.

C: 「设问：若『寰宇蝗灾』此时尚在起点，是否可证『繁育』星神的诞育时分为第一位面？」一个机械的声音突然出现，那声音里带有君主般的高贵风范，「你好，很高兴见到你，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。」
E: "If the Swarm Disaster is currently in its initial stage, can we infer that the birth of the Aeon of Propagation is the first plane?" A mechanical voice with elegance worthy of a king suddenly chimes in. "Greetings. It's a pleasure to see you here, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}."

C: 我们的相处就要结束了吗？
E: So our time has come to an end?

C: 行了，交代给你我就不管了。知道了一些对我而言更有趣的事情，我就要去做点更好玩的事情了，我准备开个星系招聘，诚纳第五位天才加入「模拟宇宙」。期待吧！拜拜啦。
E: All right, I'm leaving it to you. Now that I've learned of some interesting tidbits, I'm going to do more fun stuff. I'm off to open a cosmic recruitment drive, where I'm sincerely going to hire a fifth genius to join the Simulated Universe. Look forward to it! Bye for now.

C: 你看见一个鬼鬼祟祟的身影出现了……
E: You see a suspicious shadow appearing...

C: （夸他的形象可爱。）
E: (Compliment his cute avatar.)

C: 一瞬间，你仿佛看到祂揉合的身形恰似某个「方程」…但很快祂又汇聚成水母。接着祂又散了。
E: In a flash, it is as if you see THEIR kneaded figure form some kind of equation... But very quickly THEY congeal into a jellyfish. And then THEY scatter again.

C: 战争…战争持续了好久，久到你已能一眼识别出那些经历过*惨剧*的人，他们的眼中映出一种气质相似的、血红的事物，每次看见它，都会令你痛苦。
E: The war... It has been going on for so long that you can recognize those who have been through *tragedy* at one glance. There is a reflection of a similar, blood-red thing in their eyes. Every time you come across it, it will leave you in agony.

C: 你拉紧身上的背带，压缩到极致的行李包里只塞得下七管生命维持液，以及一台反干扰通讯装置。
E: Tightening your suspenders, only seven tubes of life-support tincture and an anti-jamming device can be squashed into the extremely crammed suitcase.

C: 那是之后的事。
E: That's for later.

C: 好痛。
E: That hurts.

C: 能做出反击的钢铁造物都已经瘫痪，虫子们扑进海里，贪婪地吃掉藏匿在水中的生灵。
E: All the steel creations capable of counter-attacking have now been paralyzed, and the bugs now plunge into the sea, greedily guzzling down on the creatures that hide in the water.

C: 无垠时空的谜底？
E: The mysteries of infinite space-time?

C: 倒一杯白水晶咖啡。
E: Pour a cup of quartz coffee.

C: 静待权杖的迁移结束。
E: Silently wait for the Scepters' migration to end.

C: 侧耳倾听。
E: Listen closely.

C: 在基地沦陷的前一秒，你按下了「权杖」的指令输入按钮，作为无声的呐喊。
E: One second before the base is conquered, you press the Scepter control button as your silent battle cry.

C: 这趟危险的旅途仅有一名旅客，名为帕提维娅的学士。只有学会的疯子，才敢于孤身飞往铸铁王座的方向。
E: There is only one passenger aboard for this perilous journey, a scholar by the name of Patavia. Only lunatics from the Guild dare to venture towards the Iron Throne alone.

C: 简而言之——<color=#dbc291ff>帕提维娅无法理解眼前的知识</color>。她无法理解想要解答的问题！她看不懂！
E: Put simply —<color=#dbc291ff>Patavia cannot comprehend the knowledge before her</color>. She cannot understand the question she wants to answer! She cannot understand!

C: 「欢迎来到『全知域』，我精心打造的实验场。」
E: "Welcome to the Knowable Domain, the experimental environment that I meticulously created."

C: 在狂乱的宇宙风中，两位天才的对垒一瞬间就落下了帷幕。
E: In the tempestuous cosmic winds, the battle between the two geniuses comes to an immediate end.

C: 你想为孩子缔造一个居所，让种族的血脉不断延续。「共生，共存」，你常常能听到他们呼喊类似的词句。
E: You wish to create a home for your children, to allow the blood of your species to continue on. You often hear them calling out slogans like: "Coexistence and co-survival."

C: 第一步是将「计算」、「逻辑」等概念系统性地提取出来，加以整理，筛选出和无机生命有关的内容。
E: The first step is to extract concepts such as calculation and logic systematically. Then, we need to organize them and filter out content related to inorganic lives.

C: 不然呢？
E: Of course.

C: 关于「寰宇蝗灾」…
E: About the Swarm Disaster...

C: 你手腕戴着一块像素手表。你用变成一个像素点的大拇指摁了摁它——「砰」地一声，你为自己切换了一套背带裤。
E: You are wearing a pixel watch on your wrist. With your pixelated thumb, you press down on the watch. With a bang, your clothes change into overalls.

C: 「黑塔，她喜欢做一些新奇的系统和小玩意。」她说。「我培育宇宙和星神原体。」
E: "Herta has a thing for inventing quirky systems and gadgets, while I nurture the prototypes of the universe and the Aeons." She answers.

C: 你又一次看到「奥斯瓦尔多•施耐德」的徒弟。他看上去苍老了许多，瓦鲁尼习星球的经济遭遇寒潮，夜市贸易已变得冷清，顾客门可罗雀。
E: Once again, you bump into Oswaldo Schneider's disciple at the bazaar. He looks like he has aged a lot. The economy on Varunix is in recession, and the bazaar is quiet and deserted.

C: 你不慎一脚踏入高科技流线的悬空矩阵中——你相信这是斯诺星最*新式作风*的猎人才会使用的陷阱。
E: You accidentally step into a high-tech, streamlined suspended matrix — a trap you believe to be used only by the most cutting-edge hunter on the Planet Snowland.

C: 你定睛一看——面前已有一群漫天虫潮作战部队。
E: You look closer and notice there is an army of insects in front of you.

C: No.5博士正被咔戎剪着头发，他沉浸其中，完全没注意到咔戎在剪的是他的胡须。他开始侃侃而谈，「你知道如何提升自己的『知识』吗？」
E: Dr. No.5 is enjoying Charon's hair-cutting service so much that he does not even realize Charon is cutting his beard. He speaks confidently, "Do you know how to improve the extent of your knowledge?"

C: 你漫步在圣多明戈城…这里的灯光璀璨夺目。正当你沉浸其中时，你的右肩被拍了一下——你诧异地回头，接着左臂就立刻被擒住。
E: You are taking a stroll in the city of St. Domingo... Dazzling lights are everywhere. As you are mesmerized by the brilliance, someone taps on your right shoulder. You turn around in surprise, and your left arm is clasped the next second.

C: 幼虫在奇物的影响下骤然变异，巨大的怪物发出威吓，张牙舞爪地扑向你。
E: The larva suddenly mutates under the influence of the Curio, and a huge monster lets out a threatening roar before baring tooth and claw to pounce on you.

C: 你曾经历过一些难以忘怀的事情，它们深刻地改变了你的生命轨迹，当你正视它们，未来也会随着改变。
E: You have some unforgettable experiences that have drastically altered the trajectory of your life. When you face them directly, your future will change accordingly.

C: 你听到一阵咕噜噜的闷响，有什么在水里游弋。你缓缓转身，熟悉的面孔正伏在实验台前，她往培养仓中注入些许养料，诡丽的生灵在营养液里打了个转，似是在表达喜悦。
E: You hear a muffled gurgling sound which seems to come from something swimming in the water. Slowly, you turn around and see a familiar face leaning over an experiment bench, adding some nutrients into an incubator. The bizarre but beautiful creature inside makes a spin in the nutrient solution, as if expressing delight.

C: 「哔嘟，检定已开始，请勿离开检测范围。」
E: "Beep. Beep. Test has begun. Please leave the scanning area."

C: 冗长的泊停登记磨灭了你的耐心，外星细菌消杀更是令你陷入了长达二十个标准时的空腹时间。
E: The long and drawn-out docking registration process has destroyed your patience and the alien bacteria extermination process has sent you into a long, <unbreak>20</unbreak>-hour period of fasting.

C: 你发现赛场的盒饭居然是免费的，于是决定把本钱吃回来。
E: You discover the meal box at the competition is empty, so you decide to get your money's worth by feasting.

C: 大门上残留着武装考古学派的爆破痕迹，可即便王已风化，缄默之殿的熵增限制装置仍恒久运行。
E: The door has been blasted open by the Armed Archaeologists' explosives, but even in the wake of the King's demise, the entropy-limiting device within the Temple of Reticence persists in perpetual operation.

C: 你掂量了下自己的劳动成果，两串代码如同宝石般在袋里熠熠生辉。
E: You feel the weight of your own work in your hand, the two strings of code gleaming like gems within the bag.

C: 「烹饪美食，品味人生。一场仙舟风味的宴席，就比那幻戏更值得在舌尖斟酌。」金鱼的喉咙里发出咕噜噜的异响。
E: "Gourmet cooking grants a sampling of life. A banquet of Xianzhou flavors is more worthy of your tongue's consideration than a showing of immersia." The goldfish makes a strange gurgling sound in its throat.

C: 你从恍惚中回过神，握紧手中的武器。接下来的任务十分凶险，身为云骑的小队队长，你和队员们纷纷严阵以待。
E: You snap out of your daze and tightly grip the weapon in your hands. The next mission is very dangerous. As the squad leader of the Cloud Knights, you and your team lie in wait.

C: 「然后，我就能证明，整个翁法罗斯都是以艾格勒为中心，进行周期性的旋转运动！」在雷鸣般的锻造声里，学者自言自语。
E: "And then, I can prove that the entirety of Amphoreus is centered around Aquila, revolving in periodic motion!" The scholar mutters to himself over the thunderous clamor of the forge.

C: 「谢谢你，小友。」他接下硬币，恋恋不舍地看向尚未被冥河淹没的尘世，消失在湍流深处。
E: "Thank you, young friend." He takes the coin, looks forlornly at the world still untouched by the River of Souls, and disappears into the torrential depths.

C: 眼泪在地面溅起，化作一大一小的水滴，诡计的扎格列斯。正如身子与影子，笑容与哭泣，一体双面的翻飞之币。
E: Tears hit the ground, turning into droplets. Zagreus, the master of deception, the Coin of Whimsy, embodies duality — just like the body and its shadow, a smile with tears.

C: 无名的英雄被构陷后身死，他的宝剑也坠入冥河。当河水退去，剑却仍未腐蚀。塞纳托斯在梦中呼唤英雄的子嗣，他依着梦里的指引，来到宝剑面前。
E: The nameless hero was framed and killed, his sword falling into the River of Souls. When the river receded, the sword remained uncorroded. Thanatos called the hero's offspring in a dream, who, guided by the vision, arrived at the sword.

C: 宴会已然开始，奏响那曲天与地狂欢之歌，颂唱满溢之杯的诞生。
E: The banquet has already begun, playing the song of Carnival of Heaven and Earth, celebrating the birth of the Chalice of Plenty.

C: 法吉娜没那么记仇。
E: Phagousa isn't one to hold grudges for long.

C: 这些原初的道路成为翁法罗斯的边界，时至今日，仍有无数人试图触及。
E: These primordial paths define the boundaries of Amphoreus, still sought by countless souls today.

C: 道路与方向被创造。
E: Roads and directions are forged.

C: 「你就拿这个考验树庭的面试官？哪个面试官经不起这样的考验？」面试官把你人赶了出去，礼物留了下来。
E: "This is what you call a challenge for the Grove's reviewers? Ha! Any half-decent reviewer could handle this!" With a dismissive scoff, the reviewer throws you out the door, but keeps the gift you brought.

C: 可惜预言的具体内容被祭祀们死死封锁，关于这条预言诞生了很多阴谋论。有人说黄金裔会带来永远的安宁，也有人说黑潮最终会吞没一切。
E: Yet the prophecy's exact contents remain fiercely guarded by the priests, spawning countless conspiracy theories. Some claim the Chrysos Heir will bring eternal peace, while others insist the black tide will ultimately devour all.

C: 但是吉奥里亚并不喜欢它的血亲，它总抱怨海浪侵蚀土地，飓风摧毁森林。但宽厚的吉奥里亚并不会诉诸武力，而是默默生长出新的土地和森林。
E: But Georios did not like their blood relatives. They constantly complained about the waves eroding the land and the hurricanes destroying the forests. However, the kind-hearted Georios did not resort to violence, but instead quietly grew new lands and forests.

C: 吉奥里亚真能忍。
E: Wow, Georios has some patience.

C: 生机勃勃的色彩和灵动遍布于天地之间，受它眷顾的人子们也繁衍生息，追本溯源地采集那些金色的硕果，奉于他们中最秀逸的智士。
E: Vibrant colors and vivid movements fill the space between heaven and earth. Those blessed by them prosper and multiply, gathering those golden fruits at their source and presenting them to the wisest scholars in their midst.

C: 云朵是艾格勒最初的眷属。艾格勒从自己的眸子里取下白色的部分，制作出云彩。这些眷属永远飘浮在主人的身边，但它们崇尚自由而生性散漫，因而很容易沉湎于享乐。
E: Clouds were Aquila's first Titankins. They took the white from their own eyes to create clouds. These kins forever float around their master, but they cherish freedom and are naturally carefree, thus easily indulging in pleasure.

C: 泥浆化成的生命，或拍打水花，或发出鸣叫，呼唤着自己的造物主。但巨人走得太快，没听到它们的响动，便将这些生命远远抛在身后。
E: The creatures born of the mud splashed in the waves, cried out from the earth, and called to their creator. But the giant walked too fast to hear them, leaving them far behind.

C: 于是欧洛尼斯回转心意，也应允赐福。
E: Hearing this, Oronyx reconsidered — and, at last, granted their blessing as well.

C: 可喜可贺。
E: Congratulations.

C: 这种轻状的确不易察觉。
E: Light symptoms such as these can easily go undetected.

C: 显然这不是终端机的密码。
E: This is evidently not the terminal's password.

C: 警告！检测到该设备未绑定空间站终端设备，自动返回上一级，上一级。
E: Warning! This device was detected to not be linked to a space station terminal device. Automatically returning to previous stage, previous stage.

C: 你输入后，设备上只跳出一行冰冷的红字：<color=#eb4d3dff>「密码错误，请重新输入正确密码。」</color>
E: You enter it, but all that pops up on the device is a line of cold red text: <color=#eb4d3dff>"Password error. Please enter the correct password."</color>

C: 恭喜你进入了没有任何文件的虚拟荒原！
E: Congratulations! You have now entered a virtual wasteland devoid of any documents!

C: 屏幕显示：「预约会议」。字符下方有详细的表格，对应着不同的时间段。
E: The screen display reads "Schedule a Meeting." There are detailed tables below with corresponding times.

C: 纸条上写满了看起来潦草的字，你努力辨认，发现页面印着「密卷科」字样，右下角还贴上了猫咪图案的贴纸。
E: The paper is filled with scribbled words. Squinting to make things out, you discover the words "Department of Insight" printed on the page. There's also a cat-shaped sticker at the bottom-right corner.

C: 「回应」？什么回应？
E: A "response"? What response?

C: 「灰——咪——」你听，发音是不是很像「毁灭」？这就是「毁灭」星神在背后干扰「公司」运转的证据！
E: "D... E... S... T..." see? Doesn't it spell out the start of "Destruction"? This is proof that the Aeon of Destruction is secretly pulling all the strings in the IPC!

C: 面对二人忧心忡忡的神情，你欲言又止。这一定是因为那杯「咖啡」——回忆起它，你不禁忆起舌尖的苦涩和甜美。当初的浅尝辄止是正确的，但，如果再给你一次机会……
E: You hold your tongue, seeing the worried look on both of their faces. This must be because of that cup of "coffee." You reminisce on the bitterness and sweetness that was on your tongue. It was the right thing to do to stop after a few sips. However, if you had another chance...

C: 「嘿，卡罗，」你身旁的男性望着舷窗外，那颗悬于无垠深空中的碧玉珠翠，「这是第几次星出了？」
E: "Hey, Caro." The man next to you stares out the porthole at a sparkling jade-like object hovering in the boundless space. "How many times has the star rise happened?"

C: 什么？！你在俱乐部混了这么久了，居然没听说过那位？
E: What!? You've been in the club for so long, but you still haven't heard of him?

C: （还是等人群散了再回来吧。）
E: (I'll come back after the crowd has died down.)

C: 走开。
E: Leave.

C: ( Φ ω Φ )
E: ( Φ ω Φ )

C: 我上我也行。
E: At this rate, I can go play it too.

C: 膜拜我吧~
E: Worship me~

C: （给丹恒发个消息吧。）
E: (Let's send a message to Dan Heng.)

C: 很好。选得很好。
E: Good. You chose well.

C: …不要随便摆弄自己的命运。
E: ...Do not trifle with your own fate.

C: 「不要轻视自己的选择。任何选择。」
E: "Never forget the importance of your decisions. Any decision."

C: <unbreak>180</unbreak>、<unbreak>179</unbreak>、<unbreak>178</unbreak>……
E: One hundred and eighty, one hundred and seventy-nine, one hundred and seventy-eight...

C: 你迅速作出决定。想必这偌大一磐岩镇，绝对再找不出比这小巷更隐蔽的藏身处了。
E: You make the decision quickly. The way you see it, there's absolutely no way you would find a more secluded hiding spot in all of Boulder Town.

C: 看来小朋友们已经准备回家了——尽管他们还没发现你。
E: Looks like the children are already set to go home, even though they haven't found you yet.

C: 嗐…我把您当成银鬃铁卫了——误会，都是误会哈！不过您也是，没事在别人车跟前瞎转悠……
E: Ah... I mistook you for a Silvermane Guard. My mistake. Just a misunderstanding! But it's your fault, too, wandering in front of other people's cars like that without a reason...

C: 你就这么跟铁卫说话的？
E: Is that how you talk to a guard?

C: …求求您，千万别贴我罚单！我这就把车开走……
E: ...I'm begging you. Please don't give me a ticket! I'll move my car...

C: 哦，哦哦！我懂，我懂！
E: Oh! Oh! I see. I see!

C: 房间里充斥着女性的啜泣声。她似乎正向某人恳求着什么。那声音实在是过于破碎，以至于根本无法分辨个中内容，但你确切地感受到了她的局促与惊恐。
E: The room is full of a woman's sobs. She seems to be pleading with someone else in the room. Her voice is far too strained, making it impossible to figure out what she is saying, but you can feel her unease and terror.

C: 早就听说持矛君王是个坏家伙，今天我倒要跟它斗上一斗，看看谁才是最猛的喀。
E: I heard the Spearlord is one bad egg. I want to fight against them — today — to see who's the baddest of the bad.

C: …喀？原来是人啊喀。我在这里藏了半天，那些怪物居然都没注意到我，难道是我太矮了？
E: ...Crrk? Ah, a human. Been hiding here forever, yet those monsters never spotted me. Perhaps I'm just too tiny?

C: 原来你能看见我？
E: So you can see me?

C: 这下是我赢了！
E: I won!

C: 我说怎么怪舒服的…
E: I was wondering why it's comfortable...

C: <size=36>喂！那不是拯救了下层区的大英雄吗！</size>
E: <size=36>Hey! You're that hero who saved the Underworld!</size>

C: 要我说，{NICKNAME}，你找到的这块东西，只要稍稍加工一下就能直接安到上层区的永冬铭碑上——一般人保准看不出区别！
E: If you ask me, {NICKNAME}, this thing you found just needs a little refinement before being put directly onto the Everwinter Monument up in the Overworld — Nobody would be able to tell the difference!

C: 对了，你手上不是正缺钱吗？把这块结晶卖给我，怎么样？价格绝对公道。你去打听打听，磐岩镇还有比安东尼娜出手更大方的矿监吗？
E: By the way, aren't you low on funds at the moment? How about you sell me this crystal, huh? I'll give you a fair price. Go ask around, and you won't find a more generous supervisor around here than me!

C: 真不错呀，真不错…拿着，{NICKNAME}——很高兴跟你做生意。
E: That's nice, real nice... Take this, {NICKNAME}. It's been a pleasure doing business with you.

C: 继续听听。
E: Do tell.

C: 是的、是的…现在我们终于又要启航了。水手，你准备好了吗？
E: Yes, yes... and now we are finally setting sail again. Are you ready, sailors?

C: 我听不——见！
E: I can't hear you!

C: 这里可不是只要带着架梯子就能随意出入的地方嘤！只有被女王认可的勇士才能继续前进。
E: This isn't a place you can just waltz into with a ladder, eep! Only warriors approved by the queen may proceed.

C: 听说那样的勇士能用投石击中巨人的独眼，你行吗嘤？
E: It's said that such warriors can strike a giant's single eye with a sling. Can you do that, eep?

C: 哟哟，你要离开「聪明绝顶的巴特鲁斯发现的隐藏房间」吗？
E: Yo yo, are you leaving "The Hidden Room Discovered by the Brilliant Bartholos"?

C: 该走的路我已走过…
E: The path I was meant to take has already been walked...

C: 希望那些黑潮怪物，不要弄脏他原本就很土气的衣裳啊。
E: Hope those black tide monsters don't mess up his already-scruffy clothes.

C: 嗡~浴场突然空荡下来，静悄悄的，难道今天浴池被本蝶包场了吗？
E: Hmm~? The baths are suddenly empty and silent... Did I just get a private spa day?

C: …我可没少对机巧鸟说话呀，要是能聊天，它们早就跟我聊起来了。
E: ...I talk with cycranes frequently. If they could talk, they would have talked to me by now.

C: 是你一直不怀好意地盯着我。
E: You were the one who kept giving me that nasty look.

C: 是会说话的机巧鸟！
E: A talking cycrane!

C: 就是这里，就是这里。我帮你放风，你来把这集装箱撬开。
E: This is the place. Here. I'll be on the look out. You'll go and pry open the container.

C: …这样吧，我给你出一道题，你要是答对了，我就算是你赢了；相反，你要是答错了，我就算是你赌输了，简单吧？
E: ...Alright then, how about a quiz? There's just one question, and if you guess it right, then you win! But if you guess incorrectly, you lose. Simple, right?

C: 说到底，不就是出题吗？
E: Isn't it just a question at the end of the day?

C: 就在你下定决心之后，那只恶龙缓缓地扇动了一下翅膀，狂风让你向后撤退了两步，似乎这是它最后的警告。
E: Just after you make your decision, the dragon slowly flaps open its wings. The ensuing gust of wind knocks you back two paces, as though it was issuing a final warning.

C: 现在怎么说？
E: Now what?

C: 梓桥让我叫你回去。
E: Ziqiao sent me to get you back.

C: 我吃，我吃！
E: Let's eat. Let's eat!

C: 我吃不下了…
E: I can't eat anymore...

C: 仙舟有句老话说得好：「胜不骄，败不馁」！今年输了没事，明年记得也要来小店看看啊！
E: There's an old Xianzhou saying: "No arrogance in victory, no despair in defeat!" It doesn't matter that you lost this year's contest. Just remember to come back and check out next year's contest!

C: 后来，我们通过比对它们失联之前的工作轨迹，找到了几个重合的对象…再用上一些排除法之后，其实就只剩下一名可疑的对象了。
E: We analyzed the missing cycranes' flight trajectories prior to losing contact. Once all the other flight paths were accounted for, there was only one suspicious trajectory left.

C: 作为一个温泉爱好者，绝对不能错过每一处温泉~
E: As a devoted hot spring enthusiast, I absolutely cannot miss a single one~

C: 千万要擦亮眼睛，别像多目的盲者一样挑到不靠谱的地产商——这简直是豆腐渣工程喀！
E: Keep your eyes open! Don't be like the many-eyed blind and fall for a shady real estate scheme — this whole place is a disaster, crrk!

C: 我们戮力同心！
E: Together, we fight as one!

C: 命运不公…
E: Fate is cruel...

C: 你阳雷呢？
E: What happened to your Daythunder?

C: 可这么做在理论上是安全的。
E: In theory, it should be safe.

C: 我不知道。包裹不是你亲自销毁的吗？
E: I don't know. Didn't you destroy the bomb yourself?

C: 嘿，就是你，哈努兄弟在看着你！
E: Oh hey, it's you. Brother Hanu has been watching you!

C: 《仓鼠球骑士冒险谭》，匹诺康尼最经典的系列IP之一，已经推出了百余部续作。
E: The Adventures of Hamster Ball Knight is one of Penacony's most classic IP series, launching over a hundred spin-offs.

C: 水，是生命的源泉，文明的摇篮…就在你的眼前，一颗颗水珠正缓慢地滋润着地面。
E: Water is the source of all life and the cradle of civilization... It is soaking the dry ground below, drip-by-drip, right before your eyes.

C: 到那时，这根水管里的水必然被尊为圣物，千金难求。
E: When that time comes, the water in this pipe is sure to be heralded as a divine object and become almost impossible to obtain.

C: 井盖下的热气以高效且均匀分布的状态散去，如同早已写好的程序。
E: The hot steam under the manhole cover dissipates evenly and effectively, like a program that was written long ago.

C: 真好，它便是神奇的七井盖之一，存护之井盖！
E: Wonderful, this must be one of the mystical Seven Manhole Covers, the Manhole Cover of Preservation!

C: 放任他们侵蚀这里，总有一天，这座城市连一个梦泡也不会剩下。
E: If we let them keep corrupting this place, one day there won't be a single dream bubble left in this city!

C: 看着不像善茬啊…
E: They look tough...

C: 好歌不嫌晚。
E: It's never too late for a good song.

C: 我就要永远离开梦境了。
E: I am about to leave the Dreamscape forever.

C: 祝您旅途愉快！
E: We wish you a pleasant journey!

C: 浴场今天好像有新的表演。
E: There seems to be a new show at the baths today.

C: 这么多水，又这么热…
E: So much water, and it's so hot...

C: 我千里迢迢到这。
E: I've come all this way.

C: 刻法勒背负的…
E: Kephale is carrying...

C: 这真的是能喝的东西吗？噗噗噗！不行不行我要去漱口！
E: Is this really something they drink? Ptooey! No no no, I have to gargle now!

C: （解释神探三月七的推理过程）
E: (You explain "genius detective" March 7th's process of deduction)

C: （介绍你遇到的奇人趣事）
E: (Tell Pom-Pom about some riveting encounters you experienced)

C: 帕姆笑眯眯地看着你，眼神里似乎有某种欣慰。
E: Pom-Pom looks at you with a smile, their eyes seeming to betray some form of gladness.

C: 好了好了，帕姆问完啦，谢谢{NICKNAME}乘客帕！
E: Alright, that's all from me. Thanks, {NICKNAME}!

C: 三月七乘客最开始在外冒险的时候，也发生了这样的转变。帕姆不知道怎么说比较好…感觉，更加成熟？更加稳重？
E: The same thing happened to March 7th when she first went out trailblazing. How can Pom-Pom put this... It feels like you're more mature? More stable?

C: 已经看到了。
E: Too late. I already saw you.

C: 你发现了一枚方正的小东西，凑近一看…是贴纸，不是纽扣！
E: You discover a square thing and draw closer to inspect... It's a note, not a button!

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，你会有这样的感觉吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, do you ever feel like this?

C: 总之，拜托{NICKNAME}乘客想想办法吧！帕姆目前能够拜托的也只有你了…
E: In any case, please help Pom-Pom think up a fix for this, {NICKNAME}! You're my only salvation...

C: （躺上去）
E: (Lie down)

C: 但是！下次不可以这样做了哦！呜呜…这可是很用心在保养的坐垫。
E: But! Next time, please don't do this! Boohoo... This is Pom-Pom's most cherished cushion.

C: 三月七乘客之前也是这么说的。
E: March 7th also said the same thing.

C: 配方表放到哪里了？怎么帕姆连这个也忘记了！
E: Where did I put it? How can I even forget something as basic as this!

C: 等一下！站住，先别动！
E: Hang on — stop there! Don't move!

C: 叫它「姆帕植株」！
E: Call it "The Mop-Mop Plant"!

C: 听起来好像蛮严重的，我应该…没有帕？
E: That sounds pretty serious to me. I guess... I'm alright?

C: 怎么样，跟空间站里的人相处得还好吧？
E: Did you get along well with the people at the space station?

C: 总是沉默寡言，成天提着一把很重的剑的那个！帕姆听说他是听话又本分的乖孩子，帕姆很欢迎他来做客！
E: That quiet guy who's always carrying a bulky sword! I heard he's a nice and responsible kid. I'd love to have him as my guest!

C: 之后我会安排科员把东西送过去的，就不劳烦小友亲自搬运了！
E: I will arrange for staff to deliver the things, so you don't need to carry them yourself!

C: 和之前一样，常用零件都给你们准备好了，一会儿就安排小机器人给你们配送过去。
E: As before, the common parts are ready, and a little robot will be arranged to deliver them to you in a while.

C: 帕姆最佩服丹恒乘客的一点是，他居然喝得下姬子的咖啡，甚至还称赞过几次。
E: One of the things Pom-Pom admires about Dan Heng is that he can actually drink Himeko's coffee. He even complimented her on it a few times.

C: 来吧，{NICKNAME}！全盛状态的银鬃铁卫指挥官该有的战力，今天就让你见识见识！
E: Bring it, {NICKNAME}! I'll show you the strength of a Silvermane Guard commander in their prime!

C: …不愧是你，有胆魄！
E: ...I expected no less from you. What bravery!

C: 回去向奥列格汇报
E: Go back and report to Oleg.

C: 接下来我会调查另一个方向，就麻烦{NICKNAME}你调查海滩了。
E: I'll be investigating the other direction next. Please help me check out the beach, {NICKNAME}.

C: 如果你真的放过了这只扑满，这任务就会完成不了，你就得假装自己好像没有参与过「牧场行动」一样，再挑战一次。
