E: If you let this Trotter go, you'll fail this task. Then, you'll have to pretend you didn't even participate in the "Herding Operation" before starting everything all over again.

C: 不过，虽然我们现在还没搞清楚这些怪物连接在一起的原理，但还是能探测它的位置。
E: While we currently can't determine the underlying principle of how the monsters are connected together, we can detect their locations.

C: 如果你没拿到俱乐部里的邀请函，我可不能多说……
E: I can't disclose much if you don't have the club invitation...

C: 是啊，何必和小孩子置气？这可不是你的作风。于是，你决定遵守游戏规则，同这位自大的小朋友公平对决——
E: Picking on kids is not your style at all. Therefore, you decide to follow the rules and play fair...

C: …但是，但是！你得给我时刻记住——破坏公物者，虽远必诛！
E: ...But know this — no vandals will be tolerated!

C: 可…可恶…这家伙，有点本事！不是一般的破坏狂。
E: You... You're pretty tough for a vandal!

C: 我今天就赖在这儿不走了。
E: What if I just stay put? What can you do about it?

C: 不过，老实说…你的心情还远未达到「激动」的境界。或许你还需要点时间才能参会这其中的美妙。
E: But honestly, your mood is far from reaching the state of "excitement." Perhaps you need more time to comprehend the subtle wonder in all this.

C: 客房服务…请问有人吗？
E: Room service... Is anyone in there?

C: 你眼睛一眨，已经将整个喷泉的模样化作高分辨率的图片保存在脑中；接着，你将这副图片在脑中二值化，利用形态学技术开始了疯狂运算……
E: In a flash, you transform the entire fountain into a hi-res image and save it in your memory. Next, you binarize these images in your mind, and use morphology tech to begin your crazy calculation...

C: 罢了罢了，看在这个想法十分具有创意的份上——尽管放手去做吧！只是…后果自负。
E: Forget it, seeing as this is such a creative idea — just go ahead and do it! But do so... at your own risk.

C: 直觉告诉你，许愿池似乎已经无法为你提供更多东西了。
E: Intuition tells you that the fountain cannot provide you with anything else.

C: 您输入的对话将被记录，并被逐字解析。
E: Your conversation will be recorded and parsed word-by-word.

C: 总之，它的训练结果十分完美——谢谢你，{NICKNAME}！
E: All in all, its training went perfectly — thank you so much, {NICKNAME}!

C: 我只是在怀疑，他是不是什么都没学到？难道是零件出故障了？又也许是学习的样本数不够……
E: I was just wondering, did it not learn anything? Was that a mechanical failure? Or maybe it didn't study enough samples...

C: …人类反而做不到这样。
E: ...Humans can't do that.

C: 等等，那是什么声音？一阵诡异的电话铃声撕破了凝滞的空气。你脑海里的抽象棉花糖被一口吞掉，甚至没给你留下一丝回甘。
E: Wait, what's that sound? The phone rings, shattering the silence and ripping the cotton candy from your mind, not even leaving an aftertaste.
Three.

C: 随后他便扯些什么「动力武器」、「单分子刀刃」之类的专业词汇。街角上下顿时充满了学术的空气。
E: Then he spouted industrial jargon such as "propulsion weapon" and "monomolecular blade," filling the surrounding street with a hint of academia.

C: 别磨磨唧唧的，赶时间！
E: Quit dawdling! I'm in a hurry.

C: 这是…人间烟火气…没想到你还真给我带来了。
E: This is... The hustle and bustle of the mortal realm... I didn't expect you to actually bring it.

C: 别过来，我不给。
E: Don't come over here. You can't have it.

C: 罐中仙陷入了沉默。
E: The Immortal falls silent.

C: 「尊敬的陌生人：」
E: "Dear stranger,"

C: 钱到位就行。
E: Just remember to pay me.

C: 栖木边上怎么没有孽物？
E: How come there are no abominations near the roost?

C: 看起来是这样的…但这丹鼎司地形复杂，用大部队寻找可能会惊动他们。所以……
E: That seems to be the case... However, the Alchemy Commission has a complex terrain, and we might alert them if we send everyone out to look for them. So...

C: 出发吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 我的前世爱上了一名短生种，却担心他们相爱的经历无人记得，于是编了一个「忆泡」故事，希望我能找到她留下的铁盒，她真是太自私了。
E: My past self had fallen in love with this short-life species person, but was afraid nobody would remember their love story. So she made up this caper about a Memory Bubble, hoping I could find the box she left behind. How selfish she was!

C: 别！我不是什么坏人，我这是有苦衷的！
E: No! I'm not a bad guy. I've got a lot going on!

C: 出什么事了？
E: What's happened?

C: 难度太低？要是在方块上增加「花纹对应」的要求，也许还能更难。
E: It's too easy!? If we added a pattern-matching element to the game, it should be even more difficult.

C: 在这种地方待久了，你会不自觉地堕落下去——你懂吗？你的思维、情感，都会在纵欲中被磨钝，到最后整个人就废了！
E: Spend too long in a place like this, and you'll start to degenerate without realizing... Do you understand? Your thoughts, your emotions — everything is blunted by over-indulgence and in the end you'll become useless!

C: 哟，是你，我的朋友！瞅瞅，我这新形象如何？
E: Oh, it's you. My friend! Check it out. What do you think about my new look?

C: 你知道吗，别看那家伙平时装得一本正经、人畜无害，实际上可比我糟糕多了，他只是喜欢扮演受害者罢了——
E: You know what? Even though that guy pretends to be all serious like he wouldn't harm a fly, in actuality he's far worse than me. He just likes to play the victim...

C: 这种感受，像您这样的人…一定可以明白的，对吧？
E: People like you can definitely understand this kind of feeling, right?

C: 还什么「梦境匹诺康尼，真正的繁星所在」…呸！要我看啊，这个希米亚影业，根本就是个财大气粗却毫无内涵的罐头工厂。
E: And what about "The Penacony Dreamscape, where the real stars orbit"... Ptooey! This Himemia Films is nothing more than a packing house for big budget blockbusters devoid of any real meaning.

C: 还有家族的同事，上班正事不干，下班喝酒团建；不参与等于不合群，他们所谓的「同谐」也就这点水平了。
E: Plus some staff members are from The Family and do zero work, then drink all night after work. If you don't go, they boot you out of their group, which doesn't seem to uphold "Harmony," if you ask me.

C: 梦境嘛，本质上是人们现实经历的糅合重组。一辈子不出门的家伙，能梦见的也无非自己那一亩三分地上发生的无聊事。
E: The Dreamscape: Basically a remix and reshuffle of people's real life experiences. Someone who never goes outside to touch grass can only dream of whatever boredom that happens around their own little patch of turf.

C: 算了，这个故事确实烂到蹩脚…忘了它吧。
E: Whatever, this story is terrible and hacky... just forget it.

C: 不，那样就没有教育意义了。
E: No, that isn't really very educational.

C: 不过，我确实有个符合你要求的故事。
E: However, I do have a story that fits the bill.

C: 韦兰趴在地上，像条脱水的鱼一样，死了。
E: Wyland lay on the ground, like a fish out of water — dead.

C: 「新伦蒂尼恩的居民们，过去一年来大家都做得不错，公司效益取得了显著提高，环保工作也向前迈了一大步。」
E: "Citizens of New Londinium, all of you have been performing well for the past year. IPC's efficiency has also improved tremendously, a big step forward for environmental protection."

C: 后来我离开新伦蒂尼恩，才发现那种鸟嘴呼吸器居然是限定款，其他星球都买不到！我花了好大力气也只能找到这种廉价替代品。
E: Later, when I left New Londinium, I realized the beak-looking air purifying mask was a limited edition and wasn't sold on other planets! No matter how hard I tried, I could only get cheap alternatives like these.

C: 我没法否认这个指控，所以…能请你不要把它放在心上吗？
E: I can't deny that, but... I hope you aren't bothered by it.

C: 你还没说对这项工程的看法。
E: You haven't shared your views about the project.

C: 何况宣发费用都是人家掏的腰包，他们也确实给我们争取到了延期建设的时间……
E: Moreover, they did spring for the promotional expenses and gave us more time to complete the project...

C: 往好处想，伙计，这个项目能帮我们累积足够的开发资金，让我们去做真正的大事。
E: Look on the bright side, buddy. We'll be able to earn enough capital through this project to fund what we really want to do.

C: 您瞧，您不是公司的人，他也必定*不知道我们俩的关系*。您就帮忙收集些证据，好让我能够揭露他的险恶阴谋、狡诈嘴脸！
E: Look, since you don't work at IPC, I'm certain Feinman isn't aware of our relationship. I need your help to gather evidence so that I can expose his true colors!

C: 但平心而论，他那企划…不能说是有理有据，只能说是狗屁不通。
E: Honestly, that proposal of his... It's just outright nonsense.

C: 出示
E: (Present evidence)

C: 我这人最讨厌无效加班……
E: Well, I hate pointless overtime...

C: 立马下单，还有机会赢取酥麻推拿套餐大礼包！
E: Order now and you might win the Zappy Zap-Up Bundle!

C: 把你到处张贴「长效专利捍卫一纸通」的事迹如实汇报给了艾默里奇……
E: You report to Emmrich how you put up those Indefinite Patent Operative Omnifier...

C: 你是个很有天赋的发明家。
E: You're an incredibly talented inventor.

C: …照片？
E: ...A photo?

C: 男人狂热地谈论起他第十一次一见钟情的对象——复制品科蒂在他身旁不为所动。
E: The man enthusiastically recounts the experience about his eleventh love at first sight, while the replica Coty remains unfazed.

C: 等等，你谁啊？
E: Wait a minute. Who are you?

C: 你这家伙，听不懂部长的话吗！
E: What's wrong with you? Can't you understand the leader?

C: 虽说我要让这些年轻人实现梦想，但不知道他们能否背负起梦想的重量。
E: As much as I want to help these youngsters achieve their dreams, I'm not sure whether they're ready to pay the price.

C: 芙尔拉女士，我也有话要对您说……
E: Madam Forla, I have something to tell you too...

C: 但「纯美之歌」真的一无是处吗…不，我觉得风格、受众、人气，都是掩盖成见的托词！我要向经纪人证明，门达希亚的音乐一定能大受欢迎！
E: However, is the Song of Beauty truly insignificant?... No, style, audience, and popularity are merely pretexts to conceal prejudices! I am determined to prove to my manager that Mendasian music will become a hit!

C: 跟踪偷拍、调查隐私…
E: Stalking, secret filming, nonstop surveillance...

C: 你就没有什么留恋的吗？
E: Don't you have anything you'll miss?

C: 好了，让我稍微歇歇吧…这些，你拿去！就当是为了感谢你这根救命稻草的谢礼！
E: Now, I need to rest... Here, take this! Consider it a token of appreciation for being my lifesaver!

C: 对哦，我是智械…我现在已经是智械了。
E: Right, I'm an Intellitron... I'm already an Intellitron now.

C: 「你那么激动干什么？」
E: "Why are you so excited?"

C: …我的朋友，也是最可靠的工作伙伴。
E: ...A friend of mine, and the most trusty work partner I can have.

C: （麦考先生说过，要我<color=#dbc291ff>把他的兄弟姐妹们给带回去</color>…可是到底该怎么做？）
E: (Mr. McCoy said he wants me to <color=#dbc291ff>bring back his brother and sister</color>... but how?)

C: 想回去…想回去……
E: Wanna go back... wanna go back...

E: Meteor.

C: 就这、就这？
E: What? This is it?

C: 我的答案是——动摇的信念。身为战士，倘若在刀尖向前的时刻产生动摇，就只剩下必死一条路了。
E: My answer is... a wavering will. If a warrior's heart wavers even slightly when charging at their enemy, then death would be their only outcome.

C: 好痛！痛到你想掏出你的球棒，但在此之前，还是听听这狮子会怎么解释吧。
E: Owwwww! It's so painful that you want to whip out your bat. But right now, let's hear what the lion has to say.

C: 整个事件是一系列巧合的重叠，而唯一的罪人…是那位荒诞无节制的城主。他极尽铺张，造桥时，强行要求匠人打造他本人的雕像，按固定间隔放置在护栏上。
E: The entire matter is an overlap of a string of coincidences, and the sole culprit... was that overly indulgent lord. An ostentatious man, he insisted that the bridge builder sculpt statues in his image, to be affixed at intervals along the railings.

C: 旁白：一想到能和全银河最危险的游戏外挂对决，你不禁心潮澎湃。
E: Narration: The thought of facing off against the most dangerous game plugin across the Cosmos gets your blood pumping.

C: 完成了。人们都说为敌人落泪是高尚之举，但你并没有落泪。可能因为你还没那么高尚，也可能因为你们已经化敌为友。
E: It's done. Everyone says that it's noble to shed tears for your enemy, but you don't cry. Maybe it's because you're not that noble yet, or maybe your enemies have been turned into friends.

C: 够了，不要再假装旁白了！
E: Enough with pretending to be the narrator!

C: 还是让大家继续随便用吧。都是家人，没必要多计较什么。
E: Why not let them keep using it as they want. We're all family here, and there's no need for petty squabbles.

C: 我能有什么好处吗？
E: What do I get from this?

C: 等于<unbreak>77</unbreak>。
E: It equals <unbreak>77</unbreak>.

C: 直接拉着他去。
E: Bring the guest to the destination.

C: 多亏你一直遵照我的指示，没有违反禁地的规则，才能活着走到现在。
E: Thankfully, you followed my instructions and didn't violate any of the forbidden ground's rules — the only reason you're alive and here.

C: ——你在路上走着，一个强壮的垃圾桶堵住了你的路，你会怎么做？
E: ...As you are walking along a road, a brawny trashcan blocks your way. What will you do?

C: 很遗憾，多数不公都是因此而不断扩大。
E: Alas, most injustices grow bigger because of this.

C: 这只名叫咪发迷的小妖精一直等待着白厄回信，该怎么办呢？
E: This tiny fairy Mifamem has been waiting all this time for Phainon's reply. What should you do now?

C: 不如断舍离，丢掉算了！
E: Just let it go. Toss it and move on!

C: 传授它「榫卯结构」。
E: Teach them about "mortise-and-tenon joints."

C: 没词还是不要硬写了。
E: No words left? Then best not to force it.

C: 打开看看。
E: Open it.

C: 不过它孤零零地呆在这儿，会感到寂寞吧？要是能有个伴就好了。
E: Still, it must get kinda lonely all by itself here. Wouldn't it be nice if it had a companion?

C: 倘若有诗人愿意为此写一首赞歌的话，肯定会颇受孩子们喜欢吧——就叫《两只海豹》好了。
E: If a bard were to write a song about them, I bet it'd be a hit with the kids. Let's just call it "Two Seals."

C: o((╬◣'ω´◢ )o「一池不容二豹，哥必须证明自己。快去给哥找个对手来！」)∋
E: o((╬◣'ω´◢ )o "No room for two seals in one pond! I gotta show 'em who's boss! Now find me a worthy opponent!" )∋

C: 是因为它嗷呜嗷呜地叫，所以叫呜呜伯吗？
E: They call it Wubbaboo because its cries go awoo-awoo, huh?

C: 往好处想，这至少说明他们二人确实安全降落，并且展开了较为成功的开拓。
E: On the bright side, this at least confirms they landed safely and made some successful progress in their Trailblaze.

C: 再等一阵风经过，麦穗被吹拂的时候，还要更好看呢。要是有办法记录下来就好啦。
E: Once the wind blows through again and the wheat starts swaying, it'll be even more beautiful. If only we could capture it somehow.

C: 就是现在的样子。
E: Just like you are now.

C: {NICKNAME}惊讶的样子，也和记忆里如出一辙呢。
E: {NICKNAME}'s surprised expression is just like what the memories recorded.

C: 是我呀，{NICKNAME}。是人家变化太大，你认不出来了？
E: It's me, {NICKNAME}. Don't you recognize me? Or did I really change that much?

C: <size=28>喂——等等，我在里面，你们要带我去哪？</size>
E: <size=28>Hey! Wait! I'm inside here. Where are you taking me?</size>

C: 我会考虑你的提议。战争本就毫无荣誉可言，但我有必须做的事…无论如何，愿塔兰顿庇佑你平安返回。
E: I will consider your suggestion. Though there is no honor in war, there is something I must do... Whatever happens, may Talanton protect you and ensure your safe return.

C: 神意既显，我也向您坦白我的困惑——我即将因公务前往神悟树庭，在离开奥赫玛前，我想知道…走出城门时，我该先迈左脚还是右脚？
E: Now that your godly will is revealed, I too shall confess my concern. Soon, I am to go to Grove of Epiphany on official business. Before I leave Okhema, I need to know... Should I step out of the city with my left or right foot?

C: 我是雅努斯的信徒。
E: I am a disciple of Janus.

C: 装轮子更重要一些吧？
E: But aren't wheels more essential?

C: 你意识到，方才与你对话的存在已经远去。但过段时间回来看看，或许…会有新的发现？
E: You realize the being that just spoke to you has disappeared. But maybe when you return after some time, there might be... new discoveries?

C: 「存在皆有原因」
E: All that exists has its cause

C: 继续赶路吧，好心的过路人。最后的时间，没必要花在一个陌路人身上。
E: Go ahead, kind traveler. In these final moments, there's no need to waste time on a stranger.

C: …抱歉了，阁下。下一世的事，就留到下一世再说吧。
E: ...Apologies, Your Excellency. The matters of the next life should be left for the next life.

C: （去看看水盆的情况吧。）
E: (Better go check the basin.)

C: （摸摸它的爪子）
E: (Touch its paws)

C: 不过如果有年轻人想要与我交流一二，我还是很乐意聊聊的。
E: But if any young people fancy a discussion with me, I am more than happy to do that.

C: 这正是对应了星神密卷里的痴缠与灾影啊！因此，我得出结论……
E: It echos the infatuation and disaster in the Mystic Scroll of Aeons! As a result, I've come to this conclusion...

C: 安全区？
E: Safe zone?

C: 我在这里，就是想要为这座空间站，也是为了黑塔大人，做出一点微薄的努力。
E: I'm here to make my humble contributions to this space station, as well as to Madam Herta.

C: 在这场风暴结束之前，我绝不会，没错，卡波特绝不会前往避难！
E: Before this storm is over, I will never, ever, take refuge!

C: 新时代的弄潮儿伊丽莎白•沃森，正是在下。
E: I am Elizabeth Watson, the trendsetter of the new era.

C: 你别吓我啊？！这要是记错了，我的工作就会全面搁浅。
E: Don't scare me like that! If I get it wrong, I will lose my job.

C: 情感，不只是人类才有的专有名词。正视身边非人生物的惨状，才是真正理解爱的第一步！
E: Emotion is not exclusive to humans. Facing the tragedy of non-human creatures around you is the first step to truly understand love!

C: 莱斯莉多久会回来呢？
E: When will Lesley come back?

C: 所以我经常会教训教训那帮臭小子！看他们还敢不敢再来找地概科室的麻烦！
E: That's why I often teach them a good lesson! I'll see if they still dare to look for troubles at the Department of Cosmic Geography!

C: 对于波少的爱好，我可是了如指掌。就连他喝咖啡只加三块半的糖，我都铭记于心底。
E: I know Master Capote's hobbies like the back of my hand. I even remember he adds three and a half cubes of sugar to his coffee.

C: 哦，好像确实有个科室反应，说是科员精神状况突发问题，让我过去看看来着。
E: Oh, a department informed me that one of their researchers had an urgent psychological issue. They sent me to have a look.

C: 因为我知道，更为严重的症结，并不在于外部的纷扰，而是内部的扭曲。
E: Because I know the worse issue lies in internal distortion instead of external disturbance.

C: 没事别乱捡地上的东西。
E: Guess the moral is "don't pick up just anything you find on the floor."

C: 对了，怎么突然聊起这个，你是有什么事想问我吗？
E: Oh, by the way, why did you want to talk about that all of a sudden? Is there something you want to ask me about?

C: 你长得和我们都不一样…你该不会是空间站的科员吧？你能给我讲讲你们科室的故事吗？
E: You look different from us... Are you a space station researcher? Can you share some stories about your department with me?

C: 你要是能感受到就好了，她给我们的爱，有这么这么这么这么这么多！
E: If only you could feel her love for us. It's sooooo much!

C: 现在大家都指望我和那些小铁皮罐子沟通协商，我总得照顾下大家情绪，等我私底下得空了咱们再慢慢聊哈。
E: Now, everyone's counting on me to negotiate with those little tin cans. I can't let them down. Let's talk in private when I'm free.

C: 你每天都在忙些什么？
E: What do you usually busy yourself with?

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have no more questions.

C: 不行，这是我们的家，这是我们诞生的地方，自己的家自己修。
E: No way. This is our home and birthplace. It's our responsibility to maintain it.

C: 我很烦，也很忙，你快些走，别再烦我了。
E: I'm annoyed and busy. Please go away and leave me alone.

C: 不，这是写实。盖因我弹跳力强，看得远，我有义务也有这个实力去眺望远方，守护这里的一片宁静。
E: No, it's a reflection of the truth. With my strong jumping ability and far-reaching vision, I have the obligation and the capability to look out into the distance and maintain peace in this place.

C: 你的名字怎么这么奇怪？
E: How come you have such an unusual name?

C: 我看到了通往空间站其他舱段的路，不过，这里是要怎么上去呢？
E: I see the way to the space station, but how do I get there?

C: 呜呜在这，很熟呜！
E: I'm here! Very familiar, woo!

C: 我想问…
E: I want to ask you something...

C: 我似乎忘记了我们之间的一些事。
E: I seem to have forgotten something about us.

C: 刻法勒的脚下，就算那位诡计之神在暗中怂恿，我也不敢弄虚作假啊。
E: Beneath Kephale's feet, even if the God of Trickery instigates from the shadows, I wouldn't dare defraud anyone.

C: 这盾牌到底保护了什么，敌人的手腕吗？
E: What exactly can this shield protect? The enemy's wrists?

C: 我与你恰好相反。「阿卡索斯」不会因为覆灭而消失，我们依旧可以谈论它、怀念它，就好像它仍是个真实存在的城邦似的。
E: I believe precisely the opposite. Icatus does not simply stop existing because it was destroyed. We can still discuss it and reminisce on it as if it were a city that still truly exists.

C: （质疑：论点有误。）
E: (Question: Your theory is flawed.)

C: 缺乏证据，只能推导出命题不能被证实，却无法证伪该命题。你该回去再跟着老师学学逻辑课了。
E: If there is a lack of evidence, the only possible deduction is that the proposition cannot be verified, but it also cannot be falsified. You should head back for more logic classes with your teacher.

C: 这些认识经过讲述与传承，便成为了关于「阿卡索斯」的知识。
E: This cognition is described to and inherited by others to become knowledge of "Icatus."

C: 根据探险队其他成员的描述，在他们即将返程时，夫妻俩说要去采集一些样本，就临时脱离了队伍，却并未在约好的时间返回。
E: Based on reports from other members of the team, just as they were all about to head back, she and Hadez said they wanted to go back for more samples. They split off from the team for just a moment, but didn't make it back to the meeting spot at the agreed time.

C: 宝贝，咱们这样是不是太大胆了？你父母就在下面的市场，只要一点动静，他们就会抬头，然后顺势发现我们……
E: My dear, isn't this too bold of us? Your parents are right down in the market — just a bit of noise, and they'll look up and spot us...

C: 哼，他俩都没上过战场，满脑子却只有战争留下的仇恨，对你们悬锋族人的恨。
E: Hmph, neither of them has ever fought in battle, but their minds both bear the scars of war — and hatred towards you and your Kremnoan brethren.

C: …这？！这条是我送给宁芙的，我母亲的鹰血红项链。我害怕暴露，从不让宁芙戴在身上，她肯定好好藏在家里了。
E: ...This!? That's my mother's eagleblood pendant that I gave to Nympha. I was worried about us getting busted, so I never let Nympha wear it. She must have hidden it very well somewhere at home.

C: 我必须…必须为此做些什么。
E: I have to... I've gotta do something about this.

C: 哼，让你偷我项链。
E: Hmph, steal MY necklace again, why don't you?

C: 利波都跟我说了…阿卡索斯早就不存在了！我的爸爸妈妈也……
E: Lipos told me... Icatus has all gone! And my mom and dad...

C: 您…我认得您。您是那个最近总是和黄金裔一起行动的异邦贵客！
E: You... I recognize you. You're that outlander who's always seen with the Chrysos Heir!

C: 只是，没想到黑潮造物仍在附近徘徊…我只是一个业余冒险家，没有您和黄金裔那样的力量，凭我自己根本没办法深入调查任何事情。
E: However, I didn't expect the black tide's remnants to still be lingering nearby... I'm just an amateur adventurer and lack the kind of power you and the Chrysos Heir have to thoroughly investigate this.

C: 所以……
E: So...

C: …唉。在最后的时刻，尼科马库斯绝望地和怪物搏斗、安德烈亚斯祈求泰坦的神迹——而被他们尽全力保护的科洛埃小姐，也终究……
E: ...Alas. In their final stand, Nicomachus desperately clashed with the creature, Andreas called out for a Titan's miracle, and Miss Clio, despite their valiant efforts to shield her...

C: 然后…就是「终点」了吧。
E: So... this must be the "end."

C: 据说小提图斯打听到了他家老头子的消息，前两天已经跟着探险队出发了。
E: I heard young Titus got word about his old man and left with the expedition team a few days ago.

C: 男人怒气冲冲的抱怨渐渐化作隐约的哽咽，那声音继而又变为难以遏制的啜泣。
E: The anger in his voice shatters like glass, grief pouring through as his shoulders shake with silent sobs.

C: …老东西…知道我给你准备的房子，花了多少钱吗？你倒是…先住住看啊……
E: You stubborn old man... Do you even know how much that house cost? Why didn't you... *sniff* try staying in there for once...

C: 不行，绝对不行，你要借就老老实实排队。
E: No way. Absolutely not. If you want to borrow something, wait in line like everyone else.

C: 别急，我看看啊。
E: Don't worry. I'll take a look.

C: 让他学奇美拉叫。
E: Make them mimic a chimera's call.

C: 其实，那个小女孩可不是平民……
E: Actually, that small girl isn't just some ordinary civilian...

C: 小女娃，我问你，你知道什么是刻法勒祭仪吗？
E: Young girl, let me ask: Do you know what the Kephale ritual is?

C: 可惜我没法去见您…
E: Too bad that I can't meet you in person...

C: 今天我的确没有签名的兴致。
E: I'm really not in the mood to sign autographs today.

C: 希瑞雅，你说你在黎明云崖听到了天父的回应，你能再说一遍回应的内容吗？
E: Serena, you said you heard the sky father's response at Dawncloud. Can you tell us what they said again?

C: 呸呸呸！你不准说了。你们两个…是不是非要亲耳听到才肯相信？
E: Hey! Stop talking! You two... Do you need to hear it yourselves to believe it?

C: 阁下眼熟的或许是我的同僚吧？十多年来我们一直轮换值守同一班岗位。
E: The one you're familiar with might be my colleague, maybe? We've been on the cycling in and out on the same post for more than a decade.

C: 谢谢叔叔！好壮观啊，希瑞雅，原来你真来过黎明云崖？
E: Thanks, mister! It's an amazing sight! Serena, you really came here before?

C: 离开这里，你会死的！
E: You'll die if you leave this place!

C: 「鸟儿的歌是穿林的风声，却绕不过他嶙峋的裂痕。」
E: "The bird's song is a whisper of wind through the forest, but it cannot pass the fractures in his form."

C: 我们会第一次，也会无数次并肩而眠…并再也不用从这场梦中醒来。
E: We'll sleep side by side for the first time, and countless times after... and never have to wake up from this dream again.

C: 能够指引命运的雅努斯迷津，就在这池水之下……
E: The destiny-guiding Janus' Maze lies beneath these waters...

C: 看看「日常委托」那页。
E: Check out the "Daily Requests" page.

C: 看看别的。
E: Look at another one.

C: 居然有这么古老的玩意儿…没想到你们还在用它听歌。
E: That thing is ancient... It's amazing you guys are still using it.

C: 广袤的宇宙，雅利洛-Ⅵ…这样壮丽的景色，无论看多少次都不会感到厌烦。
E: The vast universe and Jarilo-VI... How could you ever get tired of such an incredible view.

C: 而他却不知道，也正是我们这种连低温都无法应对的脆弱生物，才有办法挣脱重力的束缚，在宇宙中穿梭自如……
E: He never realized that human fragility is also the greatest driver of our accomplishments. Our bodies never conquered the cold, but our minds ensured that we never had to. Now we travel the stars...

C: 谢谢虎克大人！
E: Long live Boss Hook!

C: 哈哈，我开玩笑的。
E: Haha, I'm only kidding.

C: 刚才我和瓦尔特先生聊天，聊到我是个机械师，以前还给银鬃铁卫供过职；后来不知怎地，我们就聊到那个「造物引擎」……
E: I was talking to Mr. Yang about my career as a mechanic and my time in the Silvermane Guards. Somehow, we got onto that so-called Engine of Creation...

C: 离开朋克洛德前，我也曾梦想过当个无名客——乘着列车离开星球，等待着我的将是新手村外广阔无垠的冒险。
E: Before I left Punklorde, I also dreamed of joining the Nameless and hopping on the Express to travel between worlds — beyond the village of newbies back home, a vast and endless adventure awaited me.

C: 不得不说，来到列车上后，我确实有点羡慕你的生活。你能享受宇宙的浩瀚无垠，又有那么多可靠的伙伴。
E: I can't help but say that after arriving on the Express, I'm a little envious of your way of life. You are able to enjoy the vastness of the universe, and with reliable companions by your side.

C: 你好，丹鼎司来抓你了。
E: Alchemy Commission! Open Up!

C: 谢谢你的邀请，我很喜欢这里～
E: Anyway, thanks for the invitation, I really like it here~

C: 下次我再准备一些仙舟美食吧。
E: Next time I'll stock up on Xianzhou delicacies.

C: 嗯，都是些纸面功夫…文献研究什么的。
E: Mmm, but it's all a bit superficial, like reading and writing research papers.

C: 信件可以交给拉明娜，她会处理好的。期待下次与你的相见——或者与你的文字相见。
E: You can give your letter to Lamina and she will look after it. I look forward to seeing you again — or seeing your letters.

C: 我有些事情想问你…
E: I have a few questions for you...

C: 你现在的说话方式…
E: The way you talk now...

C: 你不是波少头号粉丝吗？
E: Aren't you Master Capote's biggest fan?

C: 波少粉丝后援会解散了吗？
E: Did the Master Capote Fan Club disband?

C: 有没有什么陈年旧梦的八卦？
E: Are there any gossips from the old days?

C: 你别看他现在这么阻挠他徒弟的爱情，当年的他，好家伙，那叫一个多情郎啊。
E: Don't be fooled by his seeming determination to prevent his apprentice from dating. You never could've guessed that he used to be quite the womanizer back in his younger days.

C: 你是说…姬子的咖啡？
E: Do you mean... Himeko's coffee?

C: 姬子小姐分了一大把咖啡豆给我——甚至还有一台咖啡机！真是弄得我怪不好意思的……
E: Himeko gave me a big handful of coffee beans when she saw how much I liked it — and then she gave me a coffee machine! It's a bit embarrassing, hehe.

C: 下次再来列车做客的话，一定要给她带些贝洛伯格特产作回礼才行。
E: Next time I visit the Express, I'll definitely bring her some Belobog specialties in return.

C: 自从上次露营之后，我就在想：要是能去比雪原更远的地方看看就好了。
E: I've been thinking since the last camping trip that it would be great if I can go somewhere even further than the Snow Plains.

C: 可惜罗浮一天也离不开我…就算想去哪里看看，他们也不愿放行吧。
E: It's a pity that the Luofu cannot part from me for even a day... Even if I wished to visit other lands, they probably wouldn't allow it.

C: 我其实也不太了解列车…
E: I actually don't know much about the Express either...

C: 好喝吗？
E: Does it taste good?

C: 呃…那倒不必，毕竟我和三月的风格也不一样……
E: Uh-uh, I think you mean "less." There's no way my room's ever gonna be that color...

C: 不如神策府气派。
E: It's not as grand as the Seat of Divine Foresight.

C: 身为无名客，却与列车无缘……
E: It is a shame that, as a Nameless, her path never crossed with the Astral Express.

C: …什么稀客，这小姑娘溜上列车的时候，老子哪次没有在？真是的。
E: ...Infrequent visitor? I'm here every time this little whippersnapper is! Honestly...

C: 不找人说话就不舒服
E: I feel uncomfortable if I keep things bottled up.

C: 不用着急，慢慢看。
E: Just take your time. There's no rush.

C: 当然，也谢谢{NICKNAME}的喜欢。
E: Of course, I'm also very grateful for {NICKNAME}'s support.

C: 我看看…
E: Let me see...

C: 哦？又收到了一个「大乐子」消息，我研究研究！
E: Oh? I just received another message — lemme see what kind of fun is inside this time!

C: 那么，请从金色、蓝色、七彩色这三组颜色的牌中抽取与你意念最为符合的一组吧。
E: Now, from the gold, blue, and rainbow decks of cards, please pick the deck that fits you best.

C: 看来我们颇为默契。
E: Looks like we understand each other.

C: 恐怕…不行…吧。
E: I'm afraid... not... I think.

C: 别自责，这样的礼物多多益善！
E: Don't beat yourself up. With gifts like these, the more the better!

C: 我只是想看看那些兵器，和它们交流一下，绝对没有别的想法！
E: I just want to take a look at the weapons and talk to them. I don't have any other intentions!

C: 若是有机会，恩公也可收购些。待之后去到新世界，遇见能鉴赏这种特殊电气晶石的收藏家再将其出售，或许能小赚一笔呢！
E: You might wish to purchase some, benefactor. If you happen to encounter connoisseurs of these unique electric crystals on new worlds, and then sell the spheres to them, you might find yourself with quite the windfall!

C: 你们有见到一个高高的机器人吗？
E: Have you guys seen a tall robot around here?

C: ——原来是你，你想起和洞悉者在此发生的一段小插曲，心神不自主地放松了下来。
E: So, it was you after all. You recall an episode featuring the Insighter here and your mind automatically relaxes.

C: 华劳斯？华劳斯是谁？
E: Wallace? Who's Wallace?

C: 这么说你同意了？
E: I'll take that as a yes?

C: 他是餐厅老板吗？
E: Is he a restaurant owner?

C: 你搭讪让帮忙写信的那个。
E: The one you approached to help with your letter.

C: 还是你有什么关于动物方面的问题，想来找我聊聊？
E: Or do you have any zoological questions you'd like to ask me about?

C: 那当然，我们政务官员永远都在忙，总有那么多事情要思考…市民杂务就像千条线，能穿上线的就只有我们几根针，你说能不忙吗？
E: Of course, administrative staff are always busy. There are always so many things to think about... Admin works are like messy yarns, and there are only a few administrators to gather the threads into skeins. How could I not be busy?

C: 最近过得怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: 这上面写的什么？「帮我买张邮票贴上，再帮我寄出去」……
E: What does it say? "Please buy me a stamp and post this for me..."

C: 以后可能会有不少人在那边定居，到时候房源可就供不应求了…这可是克里珀堡的大人物跟我透露的内幕消息，绝对靠谱！
E: In the future, there might be a lot of people looking to live out that way. Demand for housing will outpace supply... I'm revealing insider information I got from some important people in Qlipoth Fort. It is totally reliable!

C: 自我介绍一下，我是《水晶日报》出版部的尼古莱。这样唐突打扰您，是因为我们正在收集读者的请愿，申请解禁《雪国冒险奇谭》。
E: Let me introduce myself. I am Nika with the Crystal Daily. Sorry to bother you but we are collecting petitions from readers to lift the ban on the Tale of the Winterlands.

C: 市政厅担忧人们会受这本书影响，未经许可私自出城。唉…道理我都懂，但怎么能把罪过都推给一本小说呢？
E: The Town Hall worries that people might venture out of the city without permission after reading the book. They have their concerns and I understand that. But you can't blame a novel for that.

C: 当然，如果您觉得它被查禁确实不公，那就更应该仗义执言了！
E: But of course, if you think it doesn't deserve the ban, that's even more of a reason to speak out!

C: 灵感…这次一定能捕捉到灵感……
E: I'm onto something... I know it...

C: 你代笔了什么作品？
E: Tell me about your ghostwriting.

C: 「我一直在等着你，只要你屈下左膝…我们的爱情已经注定，现在我就要告诉我愿意……」
E: "I've been waiting for you to show me the ring... Love is our destiny, say the word baby..."

C: 唔，看你随身没带着笔记本的样子，也许吧。
E: Hmm... You don't have a notepad with you. I'll give you the benefit of the doubt.

C: 这些花虽然颜色各异、价格不同，但是它们都有着其他花无法替代的价值。
E: These flowers come in a variety of colors and prices, but really, they are all priceless.

C: 「侯爵夫人」？
E: The Marquise?

C: 一种非常娇贵的花朵，每年只开一次，一次一月——不骗您，就算为了那一个月的艳丽，也值得它的价钱！
E: It is a very expensive flower. It blooms only once a year for one month. But honestly, the price is completely worth that one month of bloom!

C: 或许她是嫉妒你有副好嗓子。
E: Maybe she is jealous of your voice.

C: 哼，你肯定不怎么关注时事。真正的有志青年应该像我一样多听、多看、多思考，针砭时弊，为推动贝洛伯格发展贡献自己的力量！
E: I bet you're not someone who follows the news. Anyone who is ambitious should pay attention to the world and think more, like I do. That way they can contribute to the development of Belobog!

C: 怎么你也叫好啊？唉，现在的同龄人，包括那位新任大守护者布洛妮娅，真是没有半点共情能力！贝洛伯格真是要完啊……
E: How could you call this good? People your age don't get it, including that new Supreme Guardian Bronya. You have no semblance of empathy! Belobog is finished...

C: 他斥责我根本没看说明书，还说我不识货，暴殄天物。他甚至还提出要全款回收「平行世界打印机」，找别的买家……
E: He accused me of not reading the manual and wasting such a genius invention. He even offered to refund the full payment so that he could find another buyer for the parallel universe printer.

C: 谁叫法律就是公正无私，不偏袒任何人呢？
E: But who's to blame? After all, the law is always fair and impartial, showing favor to no one?

C: 哇，真的假的？
E: Wow, are you serious?

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 你在卖什么？
E: What are you selling?

C: 别狡辩了，你和娜塔莎说去吧。
E: Save it for Natasha.

C: 好吧好吧，我放弃啦。
E: All right, I give up.

C: 得，又绕回来了。
E: Hmm, we are back to square one.

C: 为啥？当然是…因为梦想呀！
E: Why? Because it's my dream, of course!

C: 要是还有什么其他需要，尽管和我说啊！
E: If you need anything, please let me know!

C: 当时我不是没拍下那只大熊玩偶嘛，后来我又想到个法子——娜塔莎大夫心灵手巧，又喜欢照顾小孩，搞不好能让她帮忙出出主意哩。
E: I didn't bid on the big old bear at the time, but thought of something later — Natasha is ingenious, and loves taking care of kids. She'd have a back-up plan for me, I was sure.

C: 所以，顾名思义，「古代遗物」自然是大寒潮来临之前的遗留物了。
E: As the name suggests, relics are antiques from before the Eternal Freeze.

C: 要是磐岩镇的人都像你一样讲道理，我哪儿还犯得着暂停鉴定业务啊。还好马上就能去上层区了……
E: If the people of Boulder Town were more like you, I'd never have stopped my appraisal business. Fortunately, we'll be allowed up in the Overworld soon...

C: 既然没有生命危险了，那我为什么不重新开始鉴定古代遗物呢？回头我要是开张了，你也记得来捧个场啊，哈哈哈。
E: Now that my life's not in danger, why don't I start over with my relic appraisal business? Remember to stop by next time and give me some business, haha!

C: 居然提前放工了…得去找点事情做。
E: Can't believe I finish work early today... I gotta find something to do.

C: 成天待在那座冰冰凉的大城堡里？放过我吧，我可习惯不了那种生活。
E: Staying all day cooped up in that ice castle? Spare me — I could never get used to that lifestyle.

C: 你看上去还没释怀。
E: You look like it's still weighing on your mind.

C: 公司的处理你还满意吗？
E: Are you happy with how the IPC are handling things?

C: 我跟你说，我就知道自己的眼光准出不了问题——不是我夸张啊，茉莉她真是难得一遇的机械天才！
E: Let me tell you, I knew there was nothing wrong with my eye — I'm not exaggerating here when I say, Molly is a rare mechanical genius!

C: 希露瓦，她是我们的吉他手兼主唱。她真的很有魅力，既潇洒又有才华，当之无愧。
E: Serval, she's our guitarist and lead singer. She was absolutely charming and talented. She totally deserved her position.

C: 说吧，找我有什么事吗？
E: So, what brings you here?

C: 这都多亏了你的帮助，{NICKNAME}。我在这里代姐姐向你表示感谢。
E: And this was all thanks to your help, {NICKNAME}. I thank you on my big sister's behalf.

C: 让她做出改变的是你的陪伴。
E: It was your companionship that changed her.

C: 不管遇到什么事，史瓦罗先生都会优先考虑克拉拉…史瓦罗先生还教会了我各种知识，也教会了我如何与人相处……
E: No matter what we faced, Mr. Svarog would always put my well-being first... He also taught me all sorts of things, and how to live with others...

C: 答案为肯定。接入基地网络的个体将不再具备高级情感智能——
E: Affirmative. The machines integrated into the base network will no longer possess advanced emotional intelligence.

C: 原来如此。
E: I see.

C: 之前在大矿区的冲突...
E: About the clash in the Great Mine...

C: 脆弱，纯真，年幼的眼望着窗外见闻
E: Fragile, innocent, young eyes peeking out the windows
...Yeah~

C: 哼哼...哼，哼哼！
E: Oink oink... oink, oink oink!

C: 咳…嗯！
E: Ah... Ahem!

C: 榛子球在空中划出一道美丽的弧线。
E: The hazelnut soars through the air in a graceful arc.
Wow...

C: 我家的球牡丹开花了……
E: The Ball Peonies in my garden are blooming...

C: 岳父大人！就请您放心地把女儿交给我吧！
E: Sir! Please trust me with your daughter!

C: 我吃剩的鼠肉冻呢……
E: Where is my leftover rat jelly...

C: 听说了吗？歌蒂从巴列维那儿搞到块积木，来头似乎不小哩。
E: Have you heard? Gertie got a building block from Balaway. Seems like she's well-connected.

C: 再讲一个，再讲一个！
E: Another, another!

C: 咳咳，我来播报今天的新闻……
E: Ahem, I'm here with the latest in today's news...

C: 就这？我上我也行啊！
E: That's it? Even I can do that!

C: 哼，别逼我用自爆！
E: Hmph, don't make me do a mutual destruction!

C: 接下来该出哪一招呢……
E: What move should I make next...

C: 你们听说了吗？
E: Have you heard?

C: 总有一天，我也要开大机器人。
E: One day, I'll pilot a giant robot.

C: 你说要是我们买了票，还至于在这儿杵着吗？
E: If we'd bought tickets, do you think we'd still be stuck here?

C: 请问，您现在要进入博物馆吗？
E: Would you like to enter the museum?

C: 收下吧，{NICKNAME}，这是你应得的。
E: Take this, {NICKNAME}, it's what you deserve.

C: 我想了解幽囚狱的历史。
E: I want to learn about the Shackling Prison's history.

C: 我知道静斋的心意，我不会再去叨扰她。
E: I know what she thinks, and I will leave her alone.

C: 你是不是也觉得蘑菇不该说话？
E: Do you also think mushrooms shouldn't talk?

C: 听起来很先进…
E: Sounds really advanced...

C: 按她的说法：「让你们这些无所事事的囚犯们有点事做，也省得你们惹是生非、打架斗殴。」不过我本来也不喜欢打架啦～
E: As she puts it: "Giving bored prisoners something to do will keep your noses clean and prevent you from starting fights." Of course, I didn't enjoy fighting to begin with.

C: 这小小地衡司公廨里，我总觉得还是少了些什么，但又想不起是什么了。你来得正好，帮我来做下排除法，说说看，你觉得这里到底少了些什么？
E: I always feel like we're missing something here at the Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery, but I can never remember what. You've come at just the right time — help me rule out some possibilities. Say, tell me, what do you think our office is missing?

C: 仙舟人怎样才能取得「成年资格」？
E: How do the Xianzhou people usually qualify for their rite of passage?

C: 没别的事了？行，再见。
E: Nothing else? Fine, see ya.

C: 你注意到建木又长起来了吗？
E: Did you notice the Ambrosial Arbor was growing once again?

C: 明面上，我们这地衡司算是仙舟的庶务管理机构。人口统计、资源配置、生态治理、历法计时…等等之类，都是要经我们手的。
E: On the surface, we're the department that handles general affairs aboard the Xianzhou. The census, resource allocation, environmental protections, time calibration... We get up to all of these kinds of things.

C: 长乐天的小贩。
E: He's a merchant in the Exalting Sanctum.

C: 哎…既然您问了，那就和您坦白吧。
E: Ah... Since you asked, I'll level with you.

C: 我看神策府的工作就挺适合我。
E: I think working at the Seat of Divine Foresight would really suit me.

C: 不过嘛，景元本人心思细密，洞察幽微。所以大多数时候，我觉得自己更像是一个整理情报的杂工。
E: But Jing Yuan is a meticulous and insightful general, so most of the time I'm left feeling like a handyman who just passes on intelligence.

C: 是不是有点太看轻自己了？
E: Are you playing down your role a little bit here?

C: 景元为罗浮受了那么重的伤，我光是看着就觉得心如刀绞。所以，我也希望尽自己的努力，还给他一个干干净净的仙舟罗浮。
E: It breaks my heart to see Jing Yuan suffering such a serious injury for the Luofu. So, I hope to do my best to present him with a clean Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 冷静点，我不是犯人。
E: Calm down, I am not a prisoner.

C: 哈哈，毕竟就是「不该知道的事」才最吸引人呢！
E: Hahah, don't you know? "Forbidden knowledge" is always most alluring!

C: 仙舟本地人的户籍管理、登记以及维护；案件办理，打架斗殴、持械伤人、偷窃抢劫等等；基础信息采集、人口统计、资源配置……
E: Household registrations, applications, and maintenance for local Xianzhou citizens. Handling of cases such as fighting, wounding with a weapon, theft, robbery. Processing census data, demographic statistics, resource allocation...

C: 是的，你的观察没有错。如果你与两个甩手掌柜一起共事，很快你也能成为「最靠谱的人」。
E: Yeah, your observation is not wrong. If you get lumped in with two other lazybones at work, you'll soon become the "most reliable" around the workplace, too.

C: 所以你告诉她这些事情，只是在平添她的烦恼。我劝你还是不要这样做。
E: So telling her anything would just be adding to her troubles. I urge you not to do this.

C: 我还有事，先走了。
E: I'm busy, so I'll be heading off.

C: 我还有事，先走了。
E: I'm busy, so I'll be heading off.

C: 我没什么要问的了。
E: I've got no questions to ask.

C: 口说无凭，得让那人立下字据。
E: Verbal confirmations mean nothing. They should be made to put their promises in writing.

C: 你要真是这样，我很羡慕你。
E: If you really are that kind of person, then I have to say I envy you very much.

C: 确实如此，鳞渊境临近持明族的波月古海，那是他们浴月蜕生的地方，相当神圣…他们不希望有这么多持械士兵靠近，我也能理解。
E: There sure are. The Vidyadhara's Lunarescent Depths are near Scalegorge Waterscape. That's where they undergo their hatching rebirth, and it's a sacred place... They don't like having so many armed troops around, so I can see where they're coming from.

C: 想和你聊聊天。
E: I'd like to have a chat with you.

C: 唉…如果那天她在鳞渊境，也许持明能少受不少损失吧…只可惜，很多事情都容不得「如果」……
E: Alas... If she'd been at Scalegorge Waterscape on that day, perhaps the Vidyadhara wouldn't have suffered such terrible losses... It's a real shame how many "what ifs" there are out there...

C: 没错，据我观察，刚蜕生不久的持明族大多缺乏感情，也理解不了前世的做法。能从这些旧物中辨识出自己寄存之物的，一个也没有。
E: Exactly. From what I've seen, most Vidyadhara lack emotions fresh after their rebirth, and are unable to understand the sentiments of their previous selves. Not a single one has ever been able to identify which one of these items used to belong to them.

C: 有事您尽管问。虽然我也刚回本部没多久，未必能答上来就是了。
E: Ask away, though I've just returned to the headquarters and might not have all the answers.

C: 再后来就是听说她持械袭击云骑，让人家给当场击毙了。直到那时候，我才知道她走了邪路。
E: Later, I learned that she was killed during an armed attack against the Cloud Knights. Only then did I know that she had gone astray.

C: 我基本上算是在这丹鼎司长起来的。我小时候，周围的大人们就说，这丹鼎司是要衰败了。
E: I kind of grew up in the Alchemy Commission. When I was little, the adults around me kept saying that the commission was going to decline.

C: 就比如说我那个徒弟…司里给她外派到法特森星际医院的时候，她才四十多岁。我带了她五十多年，后来她先回了罗浮，还一直和我有书信往来。
E: Take my apprentice as an example. She was only in her forties when she was sent to the Fedson Interstellar Hospital where I trained her for about fifty years. She returned to the Luofu before me and kept in touch with me through letters.

C: 哎，我是丹士长又如何，连任命通知都是回来的路上突然收到的，至今都没搞清楚这儿发生什么事了，哎……
E: So what? I only received my appointment notice suddenly on my way back. I still can't make heads or tails of the situation here. *Sigh*...

C: 我听说药王秘传残党在闹事？
E: I heard that the remnants of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus are causing trouble here.

C: 呜呜呜…明明应该没问题了啊，到底是哪一步做错了？
E: Waaaa... I thought I had taken care of every problem! Where could I have gone wrong?

C: 你这个问题问的，我要知道的话不早跑出去了么。
E: Well, if I knew that, then I'd have escaped a long time ago, wouldn't I?

C: 公司怎么还不离开金人巷？
E: Why is the IPC still staying in Aurum Alley?

C: 他当然知道，他可是我最好的朋友兼对手呀。
E: Of course he does! He wouldn't be my best friend and worst enemy otherwise!

C: 上面还有些什么安排呢？
E: What else did the high-ups tell you to do?

C: 我想，在茶庄里重要的不是聊了什么，而是聊天本身。
E: I think what really matters in a tea house is not the content of the conversation, but the act of holding a conversation itself.

C: 最近生意好得不得了啊！以前金人巷没什么游客，我做的也都是仙舟人的生意…但仙舟人嘛，你也懂，不太需要我的业务。
E: It's been amazing! Aurum Alley never used to have any travelers, and I only ever did business with Xianzhou locals... But, well, you know how the Xianzhou folks are like... They don't really need my services.

C: 再说，蜕生这种事又不是我们能自主控制的，万一遇到点突发情况，蜕生完就丢失了全部记忆，谁还能记得每年要去体检的事啊？我看他们就是欺负老实人！
E: Besides, it's not like we can just control our own hatching rebirths. If we get into an accident, we don't get to keep any of our memories after the rebirth. How are we supposed to remember to do annual health checks? They're clearly just trying to get one over on us honest folk!

C: 我听说过天才俱乐部的「机械贵族」螺丝咕姆。
E: Well, I've heard of Screwllum, the "mechanical aristocrat," of the Genius Society.

C: 想来想去，我认为「奸诈」、「勇敢」这些评价人的词语，放在公司上都不对。
E: I don't think words that are used to describe people, such as "treacherous" or "courageous," can be used to describe a corporation.

C: 可以再和您随便聊聊吗？
E: Can we have another casual chat?

C: 你看这封信——老师当时还一直催我过来呢，没想到我前脚刚下星槎，老师他就……
E: I still remember how he urged me to come here in his last letter. Who would have thought that by the time I arrived, he...

C: 此象得主生有宿慧，伶俐聪明。对于你所问之事——世事纷杂不堪，你需保持内心的宁静，遵从内心所想前行便可得。你一路走来所见的幽谷深涧为常人难寻之景，切勿随波逐流乱了内心方向，切记孤独是开拓者的必经之道。
E: The bearer of this sign is gifted with wisdom. As for the question in your mind — keep your inner peace and follow your heart. You have experienced darkness that ordinary people do not see. Do not let that turmoil cloud your sight, for solitude is a quintessential part of those who trailblaze.

C: 青镞跟我提过，神策府里没有神策将军，这也算是罗浮八大怪谈之一了。我是为了帮助各位破除思维定势。
E: Qingzu once told me that the absence of the Divine Foresight at the Seat of Divine Foresight is supposed to be one of the eight mysteries on the Luofu. So I'm just trying to help everyone think outside of the box.

C: 那么，你来这儿，原本是想问本座什么问题呢？
E: So, what was it you wanted to ask originally?

C: 今日运势无咎，放心去做想做的事吧。
E: You have nothing to watch out for today. Be free to do whatever you desire.

C: 可她们却总有自己的打算。因为她们不是我的孩子，而是帝弓司命的孩子。
E: However, they always have their own plans. Because they are not my children, but the children of the Reignbow Arbiter.

C: 向你致以真诚的问候，可憎的有机体。愿你那速朽的肉身可以尽可能长存，得以见证「我们」如何摧毁你们。
E: Well met, loathsome organic lifeform. May your fast-crumbling body endure and bear testament to our destruction of your kind.

C: 我看你目光明亮、反应灵敏、面色光泽、形体康健，不像来看病的，找我有什么事吗？
E: Your eyes are clear, your reaction is quick, your complexion is great, and your body looks good. I guess you aren't here to see a healer. How can I help you?

C: 很恐怖！不、不过并不是人类以为的那种恐怖……
E: It's terrifying! B—But not the kind of terrifying that humans would fear...

C: 我们姐妹都是没有未来的人，谢谢你们愿意做她的朋友。
E: We sisters are people whose lives have come to an eternal standstill, yet all of you are still willing to be her friends despite that. For that, I thank you all.

C: …{NICKNAME}还是不要知道的为好。
E: ...It's best that you do not know, {NICKNAME}.

C: 你的问候，我会帮你转达的。
E: I'll pass on your regards.

C: 嗯。如果有时间，可以随时来陪吾聊聊天。
E: Okay. Feel free to come and chat with me anytime.

C: 仙舟总是把各种科技藏在古朴的造型下面嘛。
E: Xianzhou people love to conceal all kinds of technology inside simple shapes.

C: 反正基于这个理由，十王司的成员也都是些和社会完全脱钩的家伙。孤儿、怪人、贼配军——基本上都是这种人。
E: Anyway, because of this, the members of the Ten-Lords Commission are made up of people who live in seclusion — orphans, weirdos, prisoners, just to name a few.

C: 请多保重。金人勾魂使四卅七号为你祈福。
E: Take care. Aurumaton Spectral Envoy No. <unbreak>437</unbreak> prays for you.

C: 是{NICKNAME}啊，有什么事吗？如果不是紧要的问题，请恕小女子不能分神太久。
E: It's you, {NICKNAME}. Do you need something? If it isn't urgent, please forgive me as I cannot be distracted for too long.

C: 没事了。
E: That's all.

C: 我看亲亲听得云里雾里的。如果是第一次买玉兆，或者说只是想换新，体验最前端的玉兆科技，那么买「瑞兆<unbreak>15</unbreak>」准没有问题。
E: I can see you're starting to get a bit confused here, babe. If you're buying your first jade abacus or upgrading to a new one to experience the latest in cutting-edge tech, then the Auspicious XV is a great choice.

C: 不过小老板娘天资聪颖，想必很快就能独当一面了。
E: But she is incredibly talented and intelligent. Soon enough, she'll be able to take charge of everything by herself.

C: 好家伙，这疤面大汉拿起云骑军的钝剑，瞬时间一道寒光闪过，这陨铁靶人被他生生地一分为二了。校兵场上欢呼声雷动，很多新兵第一次见到这样的场面。
E: 'twas a sight to behold. This scarred man took up a Cloud Knight's blunt sword, and with a silvery flash, this meteoric alloy dummy was instantly cleaved in two. The parade square roared with cheers, for it was the first time many recruits had seen such a feat.

C: 别这么说嘛。站在你面前的可是特级星槎驾驶员、保险定损甲级专家、乙级护卫舰维修师、特级厨师、星际和平公司C级销售员、甲级玉兆修理工——旭霞！
E: Don't be so hasty. Standing before you is an S-ranked starskiff pilot, A-ranked damage assessment expert, B-ranked ship mechanic, S-Ranked chef, C-ranked IPC sales associate, and A-ranked jade abacus fixer: Xuxia!

C: 列车欢迎不同世界的乘客。
E: The Express welcomes passengers from any world.

C: 我叫作高唐，在仙舟开有一家小小的私房菜馆，名曰「至味盛苑」。虽然一座难求，但是比起星槎海，小店依然保有对顾客的基本尊重。
E: I am Gao Tang, and I own a private kitchen in Xianzhou called the Garden of Gourmet. It may be a hole-in-the-wall restaurant, but compared to the rest of the Starskiff Haven, my humble restaurant respects all its customers.

C: 你已经不记得我了吗？
E: Have you already forgotten who I am?

C: 你竟然是囚犯？！
E: You're a convict!?

C: 哎！那边那个！聊两句差不多得了。
E: Hey! Over there! That's enough talk.

C: 你看出来我不就露馅儿了嘛。
E: If you could tell, that would give away the game.

C: 我也是神仙！
E: I'm a celestial too!

C: 是啊。这蛋裂开，里面就跳出了个可漂亮的姐姐哩。
E: Yes. This egg cracked open and out popped a beautiful lady.

C: 简直受不了。
E: Can't stand it.

C: 这件事让我一直有些头疼，有一些是因为机巧鸟故障中途暂时搁置，有些则是因为用户填写了错误的寄件信息，再也联系不上寄件人，暂时搁置的。
E: This always gives me a headache. Some were put on hold due to cycrane failure; some were because the customer filled out their contact details incorrectly, so we couldn't get in touch with them.

C: 你在唱什么呀？
E: What are you singing?

C: 姐姐骂我。
E: Step on me, please.

C: 过去我随着商团在天外出使了约有一百五十年，你如果有任何不懂的，可以直接问我，而不是自己到处乱碰。
E: Previously, I followed the merchant guild and was dispatched to other star systems for about <unbreak>150</unbreak> years. If there's something you want to know, feel free to ask me, and don't touch stuff without permission.

C: 驭空那个老狐狸，当着我的面，她竟然笑出声了！我反问她这有什么好笑的，她却只说「想到了高兴的事情」。
E: That old fox Yukong actually laughed in my face! When I inquired as to what it was she found so humorous, she replied, "I just thought of something funny."

C: 看来我们的相遇是注定的，感谢琥珀王吧。
E: I guess we're destined to meet. Praise the Amber Lord.

C: 至少要假装感兴趣嘛……
E: At least pretend like you're interested...

C: 最后三天！最后三天！全场优惠大甩卖，赶快来抢购吧！
E: Last three days! Everything's got to go! Grab them while they last!

C: 如果你体力又弱演技又差，那我也知道几处通风管道，你懂的……
E: However, if you're physically weak and also a bad performer, then I do know of a couple of ventilation ducts...

C: 后来符玄大人忌惮它取代自己，便将其赶出太卜司，几经周转来到我手里。
E: Afraid that she would be replaced by it, Lady Fu Xuan chased it out of the Divination Commission. I then eventually got my hands on it.

C: 我想问的就这些。
E: That's all that I wanted to ask.

C: 今天暂时没有想聊的了。
E: I don't have anything to talk about today.

C: 爱你，亲爱的…
E: I love you, dear...

C: 鹤运速递，啥都能寄。
E: Heron Express — We Mail Anything.

C: 那又怎么样？
E: So what?

C: 那你尾巴呢？
E: What about your tail then?

C: 就是标题。取什么样的标题，会决定用户先点进哪条新闻里。
E: The article's headline, right? See, the headline decides which article a user opens and reads first.

C: 说说你能给我什么好处来着？
E: What benefits can you offer?

C: 凭什么呀……
E: Based on what...?

C: 似乎不符合法律…
E: It seems a little illegal...

C: 我窥察到这个小孩无非是想引起父母的注意，但孩子父亲却只是将他看作是负担。小孩不再闹腾了之后，他便满足了「欲望」。
E: What I observed was just a child wanting attention from his parents, but the father just saw him as a burden. After the kid stopped making noise, his "desire" had been satisfied.

C: 虽然那位小判官最后还是把我扔进了这里，但谢天谢地好过被困在一个疯狂的身体里。
E: Even though that little judge tossed me in here at the end, it's still thankfully better than being inside that crazy body.

C: 你这岁阳怎么张口就是钱？
E: You're a heliobus. Why are you always on about money?

C: 宝贝儿，我就喜欢跟这种紧贴着的感觉～毕竟我走不了的，只有等你贴近了。
E: My dear, I love nothing more than the feeling of such intimate quarters... Considering I can't move, so all I can do is wait for you to come closer.

C: 菜就多练，输不起就别来。这就是演武仪典的残酷！
E: Train harder if you're crap, and get lost if you can't handle loss. Such is the cold, brutal truth of the Wardance!

C: 没关系，想要击败新人的话，请随时来问我心得。
E: It's fine. You want to lay the hurt on any newbies, come to me for advice anytime.

C: 我不会打，各位高抬贵手。
E: I can't play. Please everybody, hands up.

C: 希望之后也别出乱子…
E: I hope there's no trouble in the future...

C: 「摘星社」带你游金人巷啦！
E: Star-Picking Tours will take you around the Aurum Alley!

C: 金人巷真的有金人啊！
E: There are really aurumatons in the Aurum Alley!

C: 你说自己是地衡司执事？
E: You say you're a Realm-Keeping Commission officer?

C: 是个小偷，我抓捕归案的。
E: You were a thief, and you were arrested by me.

C: 所以到底是出什么事了呢？怎么大家都在传……
E: So, what exactly is going on? Why is everyone talking about it...

C: 赛法利娅，看着我的眼睛。
E: Cifera, look into my eyes.

C: 好好，不和你们抢。
E: Fine, fine, I won't fight you for it.

C: *我们*之间，没有秘密！
E: Between us, there are no secrets!

C: 今日，{RUBY_B#十二宝瓶之一}冰泉原浆{RUBY_E#}不限量畅饮，共同喝个尽兴吧。
E: Today, have as much {RUBY_B#one of the twelve bottles}Essence of Icy Spring{RUBY_E#} as you wish! Let's drink to our heart's content!

C: 啊，阿蒙内特大人？！
E: Ah, Lady Amunet!?

C: 忽然置身手足亲情的环抱，一时不知如何应对。
E: I don't know how to react to such a sudden affectionate embrace.

C: 在我们这只有丹炉没有暖炉。我们有中央控温系统调节温度。
E: We don't have heaters here, only elixir crucibles... We have a centralized temperature control system that adjusts the outdoor temperature.

C: 这也能理解，观摩动物得出的武术比较着眼于动物的捕猎天性，发力也在有机生物的关节活动范畴内。
E: However, that is understandable. Martial arts that derive from the activity of animals focus on the animalistic hunting instinct, and their movements are limited to the physical exertion that the joints of organic beings are capable of.

C: 那能让我飞檐走壁么？
E: Can I walk on walls with it?

C: 材质：香炉，香灰
E: Materials: Incense burner, incense ash

C: 当人们都已淡忘妖魔的传说
E: For when humanity forgets about stories of ghosts and demons.

C: 无论它是何种科技，在幻戏作品中，引擎总是舰船最薄弱的环节。就像是神话中无敌的英雄都有一处致命弱点，无敌的舰船也无法例外。
E: No matter what kind of technology it runs on, in immersias, the engine is always the weakest part of the ship. Just like how invincible heroes in mythology always have a fatal weakness — invincible ships are no exception.

C: 定时炸弹的声音越来越急促，不知是时间快到了，还是临近了最低速度——
E: The ticking from the time bomb becomes more pressing. Not sure if it's almost out of time or nearing the lowest possible speed...

C: 意外发生了，在混乱之中，突如其来的杂物击中了你的后脑勺，你失去了意识……
E: The accident happens, and amongst the chaos, a sudden piece of debris strikes the back of your head. You lose consciousness...

C: 呼——你长舒一口气，终于看清楚了枘凿六合新广告的全貌。那是个*一丝不挂的三阶魔方*，魔方秘社竟然做出这种广告，真是太狂了！
E: *pheeew* You exhale a drawn-out breath, finally clearly seeing the Hexanexus ad in all its brand-new glory. It is a stark naked three-phase cube. To think the Hex Club even came up with such an ad, outrageous!

C: 这次旅行给我触动很大。
E: This trip gave me a lot of feels.

C: 据称，篆刻于玉石晶格中的符篆和原理全都来自司「智识」命途的博识尊——那么，是否可以将这枚玉兆晶石视作星神的一部分呢？
E: The symbols and knowledge engraved on the jade abacus crystal are said to originate from the Nous, which is in charge of the Path of Erudition. So, is it safe to regard the jade abacus crystal as part of the Aeon?

C: 此阵名为「业成」，是大衍穷观阵的阵基之一，与其他阵基一同演绎着大衍万化之道。
E: This matrix is called the "Karma Terminal," and it is one of the base terminals of the Matrix of Prescience Ultima. Along with other base terminals, it carries out the way of all change.

C: 您就通融通融吧…
E: Could you please make an exception...

C: 这行冰冷的仙舟文字会令任何拥有同理心的生命感到不安。说真的，你最好把它打开来确认一下状况。
E: This line of callous Xianzhou letters would disturb any being capable of empathy. Seriously, you'd better rip it open to check up on things.

C: 你担心有人顺手牵羊从这堆无人看守的货品里捞走些什么，不远处一只瞪着你的物流鸟也是这么想的。
E: You're concerned that someone could easily walk past and steal something from this unguarded pile of goods. The cycrane posted nearby that has been staring at you this whole time is thinking the same.

C: 唉，你至少完成了作业，这已经很了不起了，不是吗？
E: Ahh. Well, at least you finished the homework. That's already very impressive, no?

C: 他们肯定把违禁品藏花里了。
E: They must have hidden contraband in the flowers.

C: 演出似乎出了点问题…
E: The show appears to have run into problems...

C: 大量本该寄出的货物堆积于此，往来行人却仿佛理所当然似的熟视无睹。你检查了一番，才在旁边的货箱上看到一段铭文——
E: A huge pile of parcels that should have already been delivered are stacked up and passers-by ignore them as if they are nothing unusual. You inspect closely and realize there is an inscription on the cargo box to the side...

C: 你又看了看箱内，发现里面已经积累了不少贵重物品。
E: You look inside the boxes again and realize that there are a number of precious items already piled inside.

C: 看来十王司的「无纸化办公」不行。
E: It seems like the Ten-Lords Commission's "paperless work policy" isn't working.

C: 人生的不幸，在碑文中短促的生卒年月里展现得淋漓尽致。
E: The short period between birth and death in the inscription vividly shows the misfortunes of one's life.

C: 谢谢你，停泊侠。
E: Thank you, Dock Hero.
...Who's there?

C: 本店不提供任何酒精饮料。
E: This hotel does not provide any alcoholic beverages.

C: 直行：奥帝购物中心；后退：格拉克斯大道。
E: Go straight: Oti Mall; Go back: Glaux Avenue.

C: 消防栓，内无垃圾。
E: Fire hydrant. No trash inside.

C: 钟表小子专属周边贩售店，据说某些纪念品的材料直接取自钟表小子雕像。
E: Exclusive Clockie merchandise shop. Rumor has it that certain merch are made from materials directly harvested from the Clockie Statue.

C: 筑梦师们的脾气往往和名气成正比，所以当他们试图在某个问题上达成一致时，不论动口还是动手都不稀奇。
E: The tempers and renown of Dreamweavers are typically proportionate, which is why, when they try to come to consensus on a certain problem, it's not uncommon to see verbal debates turn to blows.

C: 「逐梦客，把我喝掉！」 它指向自己饱满的身躯，热情地发出邀请……
E: "Dreamchaser, drink me!" It points to its own bubbling body, warmly extending an invitation...

C: 人们说书是记忆的有形载体。但在充斥着梦泡的酒店中，这一墙书本就显得相形见绌了。
E: People say books are the physical medium of memories, but in the hotel filled with dream bubbles, this wall of books looks puny in comparison.

C: 一位谦恭的家族成员，匹诺康尼所有宾客的朋友。仅此而已。
E: A humble Family member and a friend to all Penacony's guests — that's it.

C: 我想和你了解一些事。
E: There are some things I want to find out more about.

C: 我说的可都是实话！年利率高达百分之二十三点六，绝对平稳无风险，数位金融专家轮班观测研究，只为守护您的资金安全。您真的不考虑吗？
E: Everything I say is true! With absolutely stable and risk-free annual returns as high as <unbreak>23.6%</unbreak>, analyzed and approved by countless financial experts all for your financial security. Are you really not going to consider it?

C: 关于保险套餐…
E: About the insurance package...

C: 去你的苜蓿草银行！整天业绩业绩，都是放屁！信不信我把你们一个个都崩了！
E: Curse you and your Alfalfa Bank! Work work work all day, it's all rubbish! You think I won't end all of you!

C: 去你的苜蓿草银行！整天业绩业绩，都是放屁！信不信我把你们一个个都崩了！
E: Curse you and your Alfalfa Bank! Work work work all day, it's all rubbish! You think I won't end all of you!

C: 我是你真正的朋友。
E: I am your true friend.

C: 还能和您交流，帮您做事，解决各种各样的事件，陪您一同冒险？
E: I can still talk to you, help you do stuff, solve all sorts of problems, and adventure with you?

C: …果然，您比我预想得还要有趣。
E: ...You are as interesting as I expected.

C: 想邀请你出去玩。
E: I'd like to ask you out to have some fun.

C: 除目测外，我们还会检查访客的梦境护照，核对种族信息和出身地，确保不会有假扮成皮皮西人混进来的情况出现。劝你少打些歪主意。
E: Besides visual observations, we also check the visitor's Dreamscape Pass to verify their ethnic data and place of origin, so that nobody can enter while impersonating a Pepeshi. I advise you to stop coming up with crooked schemes.

C: 我的梦想是当一名调查记者，寻找宇宙间被掩盖的真相。让大家不再因信息差而受到误导。
E: My dream was always to be an investigative reporter, chasing down hidden truths throughout the cosmos so that people would no longer be misled by low-quality information.

C: …啊，谢谢，我还好，就是腰有点疼。
E: ...Ah, thank you. I'm fine. Only my back hurts a little.

C: …咳，不是，我就随便编了个词，你别当真啊。
E: ...Ahem, no. I just came up with that term myself. Ignore me.

C: 目前能出场的三位台柱分别是路灯小姐、玻璃瓶先生和垃圾桶怪客。客人，您想看哪一个？
E: For now, we have only three stalwarts — Miss Street Lamp, Mr. Glass Bottle, and the Trashcan Monster. Which one would you like to watch, customer?

C: 难不成捡来的？
E: You were claimed from somewhere?

C: 我早就知道原地等待没有结果，其实我就是个胆小鬼…呜呜…宁愿闷头扎在车站门口，等一个虚无缥缈的好结局……
E: I always knew that just standing here waiting in one place would never work. I'm honestly just a coward... *wails*... I'd rather stand here in front of the station entrance and wait for an extremely unlikely happy ending...

C: …杠杆原理？
E: ...The principle of leverage?

C: 您很关注麦克斯先生…是因为感到好奇吗？
E: Are you concerned about Maestro Max... out of curiosity?

C: 除了我们猎犬家系外，还有橡木、苜蓿草、隐夜鸫和鸢尾花四大家系。各个家系分别负责不同的工作，彼此亲密无间。
E: Apart from us Bloodhound Family, there are also four other major lineages of Oak, Alfalfa, Nightingale, and Iris. Each family is charged with different jobs and is very tight-knit.

C: 哈哈，看来你是真的一点儿都没听说过我啊……
E: Haha, looks like you've really never heard of me...

C: 你是什么人？
E: Who are you?

C: 我是星穹列车的无名客。
E: I'm one of the Nameless on the Astral Express.

C: 不再多逛逛嘛，我觉着呀，您和这些豪车就是绝配！都散发着苜蓿币的香味！
E: Don't you want to take a closer look? Personally, I feel our luxury cars and you are a match made in heaven! It radiates with the fragrance of Alfalfa credits!

C: 朋友，人不疯玩枉少年！
E: My friend! No Party, No Life!

C: 可惜一到学校，我的电压就开始升高，估计是很难有这种机会了，哈哈。
E: It is just a shame that the moment I arrive at the school, my voltage starts to rise and I imagine it will not be easy to find such an opportunity, haha.

C: 想再了解下我的客房信息。
E: I'd like to learn about my room.

C: 您好啊，{F#美丽的女士}{M#英俊的先生}，今天想要喝点什么呢？
E: Greetings, {F#beautiful lady}{M#handsome sir}. What would you like today?

C: …呃，好吧，我得承认…这其实是个小小的玩笑，对！就是那种初见时用来活跃气氛的玩笑。
E: ...Well, you know... this is just a little joke! You know? The kind of joke to break the ice when meeting a stranger.

C: 我是{NICKNAME}。
E: I'm {NICKNAME}.

C: 嗯、嗯，再见，期待我们的下一次谈话~
E: Yeah, yeah... I look forward to our next conversation.

C: 「入梦」是什么？
E: What does a "dream nurse" do?

C: 近日有位蓝发「商人」四处兜售「价格低廉，功能可靠」的新式入梦工具。
E: Well, recently, a blue-haired "merchant" has been selling a new type of "affordable and reliable" dreaming device.

C: 若与其他宾客或酒店服务人员发生纠纷，您可向安保负责人科蒂寻求帮助。
E: In case of disputes with other guests or hotel staff, please seek assistance from Coty, the Head of Security.

C: 能跟你聊会儿天吗？
E: Can we talk for a while?

C: 听着不太…道德？
E: It doesn't sound very... ethical, right?

C: 这下听懂了。
E: Now you understand.

C: 咩咩？咩！咩咩咩…咩咩、咩咩、咩！
E: Baaaa? Baa! Baaaaaa...Baaaa, baaaa, baa!

C: 「窥梦电话」是什么？
E: What is a "Dreampeek Call"?

C: 这么看来，你一定会需要一支酷炫的帕特鲁鲁鲁电电枪了！快去指定门店咨询详情吧！
E: It looks like you're going to need a cool Patrululu's Zappy Gun! Head to our selected stores for more information now!

C: 如果您想亲自体验一番的话，随时可以到附近的食杂店购买我家产品哦！
E: If you're interested in trying our products, you can visit the grocery store in your neighborhood!

C: 「『鲱鱼先生』，与你的味蕾乘风破浪！」
E: "Mr. Herring's rides the waves with your taste buds!"

C: 我问你，你就是我的主人吗？
E: Are you my owner?

C: 您的设备电源余量过低，无法正常行驶。请您在完成充电后再尝试启动。
E: Your device is running low on power. Please charge your device and try starting the engine again.

C: 疾风——力量！目标——「黄金的时刻」！
E: Speed is power! Next stop: Golden Hour!

C: 说说看，你去那里打算做什么？
E: Tell me, what do you plan to do there?

C: 一声脆响过后，钞票如雪般飞落。
E: After a crisp sound, banknotes fall like a flurry of snow.

C: 我完成小鸟们的委托了！
E: I've completed the commission for the birdies!

C: （继续保持沉默！）
E: (Continue to remain silent!)

C: 看到你面前这尊雕像了吗？不瞒你说，它就是根据我——钟表小子——的形象被打造出来的哦！
E: See that statue in front of you? Tell you what, it is made based on me, Clockie!

C: 哇哦！灰色的朋友，没想到你已经为我带来这么多「金表钞」了，真是厉害！
E: Wow! I'm surprised you have gathered so many Clock Credits for me, my gray friend! That's terrific!

C: 这片美梦之所以能够成形，兴许就是因为它能隔绝与它不相干的一切痛苦烦忧——可谁能想到呢？它们并不会凭空消失……
E: Perhaps this dream was able to take shape because it can sever all pains and worries irrelevant to the dream. But who would have guessed that such anguish would not just disappear into thin air...

C: 你是指扮演动漫形象的同事？我敬重他们，就像我敬重每一个创作者那样。
E: You mean my coworkers playing the cartoon characters? I really respect them, just like I admire every creator.

C: 再见，希望你在这里玩得开心。
E: Goodbye, and I hope you have fun here.

C: 唉，难道属于动画片的年代真的已经过去了吗？
E: *sigh* Is the age of cartoons truly over?

C: 就不能当条咸鱼吗？
E: Can't I just be an average lazy bum?

C: 他有什么资格说我背叛了他！哈哈，他自己又做了些什么？
E: How dare he accuse me of betraying him!? Haha, what about his own doings?

C: 你怎么看待美梦剧团？
E: What's your take on the Sweet Dreams Troupe?

C: 看这右肩上的漆黑炮口，左臂上的伸缩能量刀，还有背后的双缸推进器…就知道这身战甲是极品啦！
E: Look at the black cannon on its right shoulder, the retractable energy blade on its left arm, and the dual thrusters on its back... I bet you can tell it is an elite armor!

C: 出于「神主」的仁慈，家族只会对这样的行为作出制止和口头教育，不会实行过分的惩罚。
E: Out of the benevolence of the Great One, The Family only addresses such behavior through intervention and verbal warnings without giving out severe sanctions.

C: 你还好吗？
E: Are you okay?

C: 亲爱的朋友，钟表小子为你服务，滴……
E: My dear friend, Clockie is here to serve you, tick...

C: 我还有很多其他好朋友，他们都是很好的人…有机会我再向你好好介绍他们吧？
E: I have lots of other good friends, too! They are all wonderful people... I'll introduce you to them all when I get an opportunity, okay?

C: 嗨，您早说嘛，我也省得耽误您时间…哎呦！
E: Hey, then why didn't you say! I wouldn't have wasted your time like this otherwise!

C: 什么运动健将，金牌选手…现在还不是混得比我还惨，任我差遣？哈哈哈！
E: He was an athlete? A gold-medalist...? Now he's in even more dire straits than I am and taking orders from me? Hahaha!

C: 这尊雕像象征着凯尔康尼，隐夜鸫家系的第一位家主。他主持了对边陲监狱的生活化改造，也是梦境拓荒运动的主负责人。他缔造了现今意义上的「梦想之地」匹诺康尼。
E: This statue symbolizes Celcony, first Family Head of the Nightingale Family. He took charge of the enlivening transformation of the frontier prisons and was the main person in charge of the Dreamscape pioneering movement. He created the "land of the dreams," Penacony, as it exists today.

C: 「不在这里、也不在那里！你为何不在我所及之处！」
E: "You're not here, you're not there! Why can you not be by my side!"

C: 对家族成员来说，书本和知识都是可以共享的。
E: As far as members of The Family are concerned, books and knowledge are things that can be shared.

C: 你也是门卫？啧，那么高的个子，看起来威风，说不定脑子里早就全生锈了。
E: You're a door attendant, too? Tsk, look at how tall you are, standing all high and mighty. Has your brain gone rusty from being so high in the sky?

C: 究竟是这嬉闹的光景，让他回想起了过往和朋友度过的欢乐时光，还是单纯喜爱这些有趣的怪物，任由自己沉醉在酒吧惬意的氛围中？
E: Perhaps the whimsical scene evokes his memories of joyous moments shared with friends? Or perhaps he simply harbors a deep fondness for these amusing monsters, immersing himself in the cozy ambiance of the lounge?

C: 至于酒吧里的怪物，嗯…我承认，它们让我看到了自动道具的另一面。从某种角度来说，它们确实是「生命」，对世界有着和我们类似的体验。
E: As for the monsters in the lounge, well... I admit they've presented me with a new perspective on the automated machines. In a way, they can be considered "beings" with a similar perception of the world as we do.

C: 不准围观。这不是动物表演！
E: No spectators. This is not an animal show!

C: 哼。计算，瞄准，出杆，简单的几何学。
E: Hmm, calculations, aiming, shots... simple geometry.

C: 没什么想聊的了。
E: That's all for now.

C: 来！这笔钱就当是姐姐给你的朋友费，在匹诺康尼狠狠地消费吧！
E: Here! Take this money. Think of it as some cash from a friend. Go out and spend big while you are here in Penacony!

C: 因为脑子里有许许多多的梦想都没法实现，所以只能自己做几个梦泡出来，满足一下那些异想天开的愿望。
E: I had all these dreams floating around in my head that I was never going to fulfill, so all I could do was make some dream bubbles to satisfy my unrealistic visions.

C: 哎，这么多钱，要怎么花才好呢。
E: Ah, this is a lot of money. How should I spend it?

C: 设备损坏要自己花钱修，员工宿舍要租金，就连入梦池污染都要我们赔钱，你干脆让我把公司买下来得了。
E: If we break any equipment, we've got to pay for it ourselves. We've got to pay rent to live in the employee dorms. We've even got to pay compensation for pollution when entering the Dreampool. With all of that, you might as well let me buy the company.

C: 我开始怀念昨日品尝到的佳酿了——冽如清溪、甘如花蜜，就好似流动的黄金、凝固的日色……
E: I'm starting to miss the fragrant brew I tasted yesterday — cool as a fresh stream, and that honeyed liquid was akin to molten gold or the color of the sun itself...

C: 这么消极怠工没问题吗？
E: You sure it's all right to be so indolent with your work?

C: 知更鸟小姐，那位银河巨星，你认识吧？听说她是第Ⅴ音级的家族成员…不过只比我们高一级，但她和我们已经完全是两个世界的人了。
E: Miss Robin, do you know that cosmic superstar over there? I heard she's a scale degree V Family member... that may only be one step above us, but she may as well have come from a completely different world.

C: 没听过银河球棒侠的威名吗？
E: Have you not heard of the great Galactic Baseballer?

C: 我是不是在哪见过你？
E: Have we met somewhere?

C: 我以前是个牛仔，过着全宇宙到处乱跑的生活。现在，困在梦里的时间长了，反而变得有点向往安定了。
E: I used to be a cowgirl, spending my life running all over the universe as I pleased. Now, having been stuck in this dream for so long, I've started to long to settle down.

C: 告诉你，你可别被它们无害的外表给骗了！它们都是吃噩梦长大的怪胎，家族邪恶计划的一部分！
E: Let me tell you, don't let their harmless appearance fool you! They are freaks that feed on nightmares to grow! They're part of The Family's wicked scheme!

C: 哼，这地方比十二时刻清净多了。
E: Hmph, this place is much more peaceful than the Twelve Hours.

C: 所谓「不可能之事」，就是鼓励我们做出选择，找到真正属于自己的美梦——哪怕它并不华丽。
E: That which we call "impossible" is what encourages us to make a choice and find the dream that truly belongs to us... Even if it is not glamorous.

C: 据说，许多人都会像我这样，向夜色寻求慰藉。至于原因，用文艺一点的说法…大概就是「人总会向往星空」吧。
E: I hear many people seek solace in the night like I do. As for the reason, I guess a more literary explanation would be... "Humanity will always yearn for the stars."

C: 是有什么谜题没解开吗？还是说米凯有事瞒着我……
E: Is there some kind of puzzle we haven't yet solved? Or is Micah hiding something from me...

C: 唉，就连这样微小的愿望，也有人无情地践踏！
E: Ah... There are people out there that would heartlessly trample even a tiny little hope like this!

C: 你在说什么？
E: What are you talking about?

C: 长期观察结合精密的测量，我得出的结果应该不会有多大误差。
E: Based on my long-term observation and precise measurements, I'm sure my result shouldn't have many errors.

C: 不过是谁做了这一切呢？
E: But who is the one behind it?

C: 就叫我开拓者吧。
E: Just call me Trailblazer.

C: 钟表小子动画延续至今，已经不仅仅是一部影视作品这么简单了。它承载了时代的变迁、历史的更迭，梦境的精神。
E: Clockie's cartoon has lasted to this day, and it is no longer just a movie and television series. It carries the change of times, the shifts of history, as well as the spirit of Dreamscapes.

C: 说起来也有点不好意思，小时候父母常常把我一个人留在家里，那阴冷的房间，吓人的雕像，瘆人的鸟叫…是钟表小子的声音赶走我的恐惧，陪着我一起长大。
E: Well, that's embarrassing. When I was a child, my parents used to leave me alone at home. There were terrifying statues displayed in that cold room with creepy birds chirping... But Clockie's voice chased away my fears and kept me company as I grew up.

C: 谢谢你，年轻的无名客，如果「钟表匠」他们知道了，一定会很高兴的。
E: Thank you, young Nameless. If the Watchmaker and the others knew about it, they would surely rejoice.

C: 再精确的历史，经历了时间和立场的磨砺，都会变得模糊。采撷其中的真实，也是我们的工作之一。
E: However meticulously documented, history will inevitably succumb to the erosion of time and variances of perspective. Thus, sifting through its layers to uncover the truth is an essential aspect of our job.

C: 希望那孩子能快些好起来……
E: I hope that kid gets better soon...

C: 那是种真实无比、纯粹无比的欢乐…我曾在囚犯们的眼睛里见过它，我曾在阿斯娜的指尖感受到它，而如今它又出现在我的面前——
E: That's a kind of pure, true joy... I'd seen it in those prisoners' eyes. I'd felt it at Asna's fingertips, and now it had arrived once more before me...

C: 你…难不成是智械？
E: So you... are you an Intellitron?

C: 让我想想…对了，有个三分钟热度的孩子，看见剧场乱哄哄的，就吵着要去帮忙，你应该能在<color=#dbc291ff>观众席的入场区</color>找到它啾～
E: Let me think... Oh, that's right, there's a child that gets distracted easily. It was clamoring to help out when it saw that the theater was in a mess. You should be able to find it at the <color=#dbc291ff>auditorium's entrance</color>, tweet!

C: 呃…抱歉，我只是一时有感而发……
E: Err... Apologies, I was just waxing poetic from the heart...

C: 我从旧日的理想中惊醒，怅然若失，不知何去何从……
E: I was shocked awake from my old ideals, at a loss, aimless...

C: 我将这番愿景讲述给了苜蓿草家系，那位德高望重的「老奥帝」出资赞助我开创了苏乐达工厂。经过千百次口味的调试，无数次的市场考验，才有了今天的苏乐达。
E: I told this dream to the Alfalfa Family, and the virtuous Old Oti sponsored the establishment of my SoulGlad factory. It took umpteen taste tests and countless market trials to create the SoulGlad of today.

C: 所以说啊，年轻人不能只想着挣快钱，要沉下心来，努力思考你的信念。重要的不是你赚了多少钱，而是你为什么而工作。
E: Which is why, young people shouldn't just think about making a quick buck. They have to find their composure and contemplate on their beliefs. How much you earn isn't important. It is the reason you work.

C: 建议你不要建议了。
E: I advise you not to offer any more advice.

C: 还说什么苏乐达其实是抄袭苏萨水，他们才是苏萨先生作品的正统继承者，完全是无稽之谈！
E: They still have the audacity to claim SoulGlad as copied Sousa Juice, and that they're the true successor of Mr. Sousa's work. Absolute and total hogwash!

C: 对你来说，可以把我当作是一个「玩具商人」，喜欢用些小玩意儿唤醒无机生命的快感回路，刺激有机生命的伏隔核~
E: As for you, you can see me as a toy merchant who has a penchant for using knick-knacks to jolt the dopamine circuits of inorganic creatures, and to tickle the thrills of the nucleus accumbens of organic life!

C: 我一直在这片漫无尽头的梦境中守候着，等着有人能够响应「钟表匠」的号召，继承他的理想。
E: I've been standing guard in this endless Dreamscape, waiting for someone to return the Watchmaker's echo, to inherit his wish.

C: 能说说你的父亲吗？
E: Can you talk about your father?

C: …嗯，我记得那场拍卖有克劳迪娅想要的手稿…咦，这个雕塑…路易斯是不是最近才给它的创作者写过评论……
E: Mmm, I remember that the manuscript which Claudia wants is at that auction... Huh? This statue... Didn't Louis just recently critique its sculptor?

C: 又或者一位不得志的冒险家，她一生都没能获得过什么成就，但她曾经作为第一人踏足了某个重归蛮荒的星球——
E: Or maybe you've heard of an unsuccessful adventurer. While she never accomplished much in her lifetime, she still became the first person to step foot on a planet that had been reclaimed by nature—

C: 苏乐达
E: SoulGlad

C: 啊…对了，正好给你看一些新发现，说不定能让你对忆域深潜更感兴趣呢。
E: Oh, I have a new discovery for you. Maybe it'll get you more interested in Memory Zone diving.

C: 如果不是样本太少，这还真是相当惊人啊……
E: Too bad we don't have more samples. This is truly astonishing...

C: 你受够这牢房每日供应的泔水了！临刑前的最后一夜，你塞给一位贪财的狱警你半辈子的积蓄，以换最后一次享用佳肴的机会。
E: Disgusted by the terrible prison food, you secretly hand over half of your life savings to a greedy warden, bargaining for one final good meal before your execution.

C: 我又何尝不是一种亡命狂徒！
E: Who knows? Maybe I'm a fugitive!

C: 如果这一切…最终都会幻灭……
E: If all of this... is meant to come to an end...

C: 我听他口气，连什么「托帕总监」他都认识，多少算是有点人脉吧～
E: It sounds like he even knows "Director Topaz" personally. I guess he's pretty well-connected.

C: 你好冷酷，你好无情…
E: Ouch, that's pretty harsh...

C: 投资是相当消耗脑力的事，社交也是…没什么事的话，请让我在这儿放空一会儿吧。
E: Investments and socializing both exhaust me... So, if there's nothing important, I'd appreciate some downtime.

C: 我想问…
E: I want to ask...

C: 市场就像大海，时有波动，总是充满不确定性…但这正是检验一个投资者洞察力的时刻。
E: The market's full of uncertainties, much like the unpredictable nature of the ocean's volatile waters... It's where an investor's keen observation is put to the test.

C: 能跟我介绍下你的业务吗？
E: Can you tell me a little about your work?

C: 关于叶子店长。
E: About Shopkeeper Leaf.

C: 冷静，什么大场面我都见过，不能因为见到船长本人就这么激动。
E: Calm down. What haven't I seen before? I can't be getting this flustered just because I get to see captain in the flesh.

C: …啊，船长是在看我吗？该不会以为我在摸鱼吧？
E: ...Eep, is captain looking at me? Does it look like I'm slacking off!?

C: 我是个靠手吃饭的手艺人——字面意义。
E: I make a living with my own hands — I mean that literally.

C: 我之所以注重这些细节，是因为…形象工作是基础中的基础。一个团队要想被尊重，首先就要从外在形象做起。
E: I'm particular about such details because maintaining one's image is one of the most basic things to always be mindful of. If a team wants to be respected, they must start by working on how they present themselves.

C: 从您的面部运动中，我看到了2％的困惑。提问：我能否为您解决麻烦？
E: From your facial expression, I can detect 2% confusion. Question: Am I able to solve your problem?

C: 也许你已经成功了，但亚梅塞菈的大脑装不下那么多东西，就连钟表把戏也被忘记了。
E: Perhaps you have already succeeded, but because Amsella's mind isn't able to store much information, she has even forgotten about the Clockwork.

C: 完全不知道。
E: Not at all.

C: 好的不学，净学坏的。不过你才这点年纪，就算留级也无法撼动我「第一荣誉留级生」的宝座…我就偷偷告诉你吧，耳朵凑过来——
E: Why would you want to follow my bad example? Well, you're still so young. Even if you repeat a year, my title of the "Number One Honorary Repeat Student" will remain unchanged... Alright, let me tell you the secret. Come closer...

C: 三块钱收十块钱，无限收。
E: Fiver for your tenner. This deal's always open.

C: 重要的是，这些作品会转换为价值，而这份价值…能够切实地帮上其他人。
E: What's important is that these pieces will be converted into value, and this value... will be able to really help others.

C: 简而言之，前些天我从学生那里听说，谐乐学院有位负责梦泡鉴赏课程的老教授，对众多星球的文化根本一无所知。
E: To put it simply, I recently heard from a student that there is a professor working in the Charmony Academy dream bubble connoisseurship course who knows absolutely nothing about interplanetary culture.

C: 怎么样，是不是特刺激，有没有很好奇？先别急，还有更劲爆的呢！
E: What do you think? Doesn't it get you fired up? Aren't you super curious? Don't go rushing off yet, I've got even more shocking stuff to come!

C: 有时候社里缺人手，我也会客串一些龙套角色，偶尔在梦泡里露个脸。运气好的话，你说不定能看到我的正脸特写镜头呢。
E: Sometimes we're short on people, so I'll do walk-on cameos or show my face in a dream bubble. If you're really lucky, you might get to see a close-up of me.

C: 你有事情要找我吗？
E: Do you need me for something?

C: 契波同学说是要在校园里留下「缭乱」的印记，就把键盘存放在这里了。
E: Czipo said he wanted to leave The Dazzling's mark at the school, so he left the keyboard here.

C: 那个DJ台…
E: That DJ turntable...

C: 您有兴趣的话，当然可以！有经理在，我们都不用为作曲的事发愁了。
E: If you're interested, absolutely! We won't have to fret over composing tracks with a manager around.

C: 你尝试用钟表把戏碰触艾尔菲的内心，但无论表盘如何转动，听到的都是相同的话语……
E: You try using clockwork to get in touch with Arfey's heart, but no matter how much the clock turns, you hear the same old words...

C: 那是什么？
E: What's that?

C: 太好了，谢谢{NICKNAME}同学。你可是盛会巨星，这下肯定有很多同学会羡慕我啦，嘻嘻。
E: Awesome, thank you {NICKNAME}. You're the Festive Superstar. I'll be the envy of the school with your message, tee-hee.

C: 那个，记得给其他同学留点……
E: Err, please leave some for the others...

C: 这都有什么甜品？
E: What desserts have you got?

C: 可是…我很害怕大家会怎么看待我的选择。我的家人们都希望我能加入隐夜鸫家系，为伟大的同谐事业添砖加瓦，如果我变成一个默默无闻的甜品师，他们应该会失望的吧……
E: But... I'm afraid of what others will think about my choice. My family hopes that I'll join the Nightingale Family, to build the foundation for the great Harmony. If I become an obscure dessert chef, they would probably be disappointed in me...

C: 你对翁法罗斯了解多少？
E: How much do you know about Amphoreus?

C: 呵呵，未免有些迫不及待了呢。但正如领航员小姐所说，眼下还是多做点准备为好。
E: Hehe, looks like someone is a little impatient! But as the Navigator said, it's best for us to prepare as best as we can now.

C: 第三次谐乐大典期间的特装版苏乐达，发行量极少，每一瓶的现世，都会在匹诺康尼拍卖中掀起一场血雨腥风。
E: A special edition SoulGlad produced during the third Charmony Festival. Few in quantity, when each of these bottles is released, Penacony's auctions turn into slaughterhouses.

C: 一曲终了，而短暂的静默后旋律再次响起，就像那一串串相互属连的梦永远不会有尽头。
E: The song finishes. Then, the melody rings out again after a brief interlude — just like the neverending string of interconnected dreams.

C: 宁静的夜晚，真不错…
E: How nice, a serene evening...

C: 快给我，快给我钱…
E: Give me... give me some money now...

C: 都不卖你还开什么店！
E: If you don't sell anything, what's the point of opening a store!?

C: 好想一直呆在这里。
E: How I wish to stay here forever.

C: 别让她发现了！
E: Don't let her find us!

C: 房费可是很贵的！
E: The rooms are so darn expensive!

C: 天上哪会掉馅饼啊？
E: You can't expect to find gold at the end of every rainbow.

C: 十年之后又十年…
E: It's been ten years, and then another ten years...

C: 啊，好凉！
E: Ah, so cool!

C: 健康我就不吃了。
E: Heh, I'm after just the unhealthy ones.

C: 明明我费心准备了这么多礼物…明明我的心意是那么真！
E: I went through so much trouble to prepare all these gifts... My love is so genuine!

C: 我抢到知更鸟的票了，真是千钧一发！
E: I got the tickets for Robin's concert! That was a close call!

C: …做了大半个月，都快完工了，结果突然跟我说什么「不够惊险」，关键他之前也没提过这个需求啊……
E: ...I've been working on it for a month. Now it's almost done, and he suddenly told me it's not "thrilling" enough... but he never mentioned that requirement before...

C: 什么玩意？
E: What the hell!?

C: 明明上周才重新整理过，现在又想不起来了。
E: I just went through and organized this again last week and it's already slipped my mind.

C: 是钟表小子的雕像！
E: It's the Clockie Statue!

C: 拍完了我们来张合影。
E: Let's take a group photo together after this.

C: 友谊第一，比赛第二。
E: Friends first, competitors second.

C: 我在匹诺康尼也算是有点人脉，我最近听说…这晖长石号要改名了？
E: I've got some connections on Penacony, and I heard... the Radiant Feldspar is going to have its name changed?

C: 我这整套日程都被打乱了。
E: My entire itinerary has been ruined.

C: 很抱歉，您目前的工作排期很紧张，恐怕没有时间再安排一场晚宴了。
E: My sincerest apologies. Your current work schedule is packed to the brim. I'm afraid you won't have time to arrange another banquet.

C: 看啊，多美的景色…
E: Look, such a beautiful view...

C: 能有我背吗？
E: You think YOU'RE down on your luck?

C: 费用有点贵啊…
E: The fee's pretty steep...

C: 欠你的钱再缓几天…
E: Give me a few more days to return you the money...

C: 直到现在你依旧没弄清「白日梦」酒店大堂里那个漂浮的钟表究竟有什么用，总不能是单纯为了好看吧？
E: Even now, you still can't figure out what that floating clock is for in the Reverie's lobby. It can't just be for decor, can it?

C: 再后来，你们毕业了，乐队也就自然而然地解散了。你很清楚学历始终与演奏水平成反比，选择正常毕业，也就意味着放弃了乐队梦想。
E: Later on, you all graduate, and the band naturally disbands. You are aware that your grades and your music skills are the antithesis of each other. Choosing to graduate normally marks an end to your band dream.

C: ——可喜可贺，可喜可贺。
E: ...Sincere congratulations.

C: 不用紧张啦，就算从来没接触过乐器也没关系，我们会安排专门的教学课程。这里是轻松享受音乐的地方，不需要为任何多余的事烦恼。
E: Don't worry. It's okay even if you've never touched an instrument. We will arrange for professional lessons. This is a place where you can enjoy music without stress. You don't have to be concerned about anything else.

C: 尽管有些迟疑，这位认真的同学仍旧按你的要求，结束了这堂课的罚站。你很难不去想象后续究竟会发生什么样的故事，但现在最好还是——
E: Despite some hesitation, the conscientious student concludes the punishment according to your instructions. While you can't help but wonder what the consequences of such an action will be, for now, it's best that you...

C: 晚上好，尊贵的客人！您今天是否有兴趣打一通神奇的「窥梦电话」？
E: Good evening, esteemed guest! Would you be interested in making a Dreampeek Call today?

C: 哼~哼哼哼！
E: Oink~ Oink oink oink!

C: 四大箱的橡皮鸭子！
E: Four crates packed with rubber ducks!

C: 好嘞！不过你可别笑我，小店最近存货不多，仅剩的都是些大地兽纪念品了。
E: Feel free to pick out anything that catches your eye. Sadly, my stock's running low these days, and all I've got left are dromas souvenirs.

C: 供稿的作者越来越多，存书已经多到隔间快藏不下了，得想个法子……
E: With more authors joining in, I'm running out of space to store their books in my secret compartment. I need to find a solution...

C: 但我也喜欢他，这就够了。
E: But I'm in love with him. That's what matters.

C: 是啊，山之民怎么了！他只是平时看上去老实木讷，但如果认真交流的话，你就能发现他人其实非常好的！
E: Beats me! I mean, what's wrong with Mountain Dwellers!? Sure, he might seem a little dull, but once you get to know him, you'll see his heart of gold!

C: 嗷呜嗷呜？
E: Awoo? Awoo?

C: 哈哈，看来还算和你的口味。承蒙惠顾，<unbreak>20</unbreak>利衡币。
E: Aha, looks like you like it. That'll be <unbreak>20</unbreak> Balance Coins. Thank you for your patronage!

C: 异乡人，你好，吃了吗？
E: Hello, outlander. Have you eaten yet?

C: 假意改信，日后再悔过？
E: Pretend to convert, then repent later?

C: 其他泰坦的信徒可就没有这么宽容喽。人们都说，刻法勒厌恶黑暗——结果刻法勒的圣城就连个真正意义的{RUBY_B#夜幕}晚上{RUBY_E#}都没有！…理解了吗，迷信就是这么过分。
E: The disciples of other Titans aren't so easy-going. They all claim Kephale can't stand darkness. And now you see this holy city of Kephale doesn't even have a proper {RUBY_B#night}evening{RUBY_E#}! ...Do you get it now? That's how unreasonable superstitions get?

C: 怎么，看来你感兴趣？虽说最近活动经费有点紧张，没法直接邀请你参加…但和你描述一番圣城生活的另一面，我很有兴致！
E: Curious? Well, we've been tight on funds lately, so I can't really invite you... but if you want to learn more about the other side of life in this holy city, I'd love to spill the beans!

C: （我想问的差不多了。）
E: (That's pretty much all I wanted to ask.)

C: 再见，路过的{RUBY_B#一盏灯}有缘人{RUBY_E#}。
E: Farewell, {RUBY_B#bright lamp}destined one{RUBY_E#}.

C: …当然了，也可能是因为给我写推荐信的那位教授人缘不好。
E: ...Or maybe because the professor who wrote my letter of recommendation wasn't so popular.

C: 聊聊树庭。
E: Tell me more about the Grove.

C: 打听奥赫玛的事
E: Ask about Okhema.

C: 感谢命运指引我们在此相遇，有什么想听的诗歌吗？利波愿意为您献上全部的收藏~
E: Thank fate for this moment we share. Any poem striking your fancy today? Lipos got a trove waiting just for you!

C: 「信徒悲泣三日自刎而死，血液生出红玫瑰，明媚娇艳。」
E: "The disciple wept for three days and took his life. Red roses sprung from his blood, vivid and rife."

C: 「故事发生在黄金暗淡的世纪，神的纷争让人的世界分崩离析：」
E: "In a somber age when golden brilliance waned. When divine clashes shook the earthly plane."

C: 那些湮灭在历史洪流中的城邦啊…可真令人怀念向往。那么这首《黄金时代》献给您——
E: The cities lost in history's flow evoke such nostalgia... Please delight in this piece named The Golden Age...

C: 「耶利卡的港口船只往来不息；皮利亚的驼兽络绎无闲。」
E: "Jericha's ports, alive with ships in array. Pyria's domain, filled with camelbeasts at bay."

C: 因为瀑布。
E: Because of the waterfall.

C: 小灰，请你在心底呼唤「万径之门」，感受空间的摇曳，聆听遥远的彼方在你耳边的呢喃……
E: Gray Hair, please call out the "Gate of Infinity" from the bottom of your heart. Feel the wavering of space and listen to the distant murmurs in your ears...

C: 圣城…大家都很喜欢这里，远道而来的朋友，希望你也是。
E: The holy city... Everyone seems to like this place. I hope that you do too, friend from afar!

C: 手工则是因为我想多保留一些美丽的事物。蝴蝶、干花，我会把它们缝到特制的绸布上，让它们看上去好像从未失去生命。
E: Making ornaments is how I preserve things of beauty, such as butterflies and dried flowers... I sew them onto special silk fabric so they look like they never lost their lives.

C: 谢了。这地方冷冰冰的，有人问候一声，感觉好多了。
E: Thanks. This is a cold place. Having someone check in with me brings warmth to my heart.

C: 有时候，我会想象我的战友们现在在哪里。也许他们在欧洛尼斯的怀抱中沉眠？也许他们变成了星星，永远守护着翁法罗斯？
