E: Sometimes I imagine where my comrades are now. Perhaps they are sleeping under the protection of Oronyx? Perhaps they have become stars to watch over Amphoreus for the rest of time?

C: 能介绍下这里的风俗吗？
E: Can you tell me a little about the local customs?

C: 你觉得行就行呗，把东西给我吧。
E: If you think it will do, then it will. Give it to me.

C: …这话本身没错，但窗户只是用来看风景的。能从窗户翻出去的狠人，从来都是少数中的少数。
E: ...That's true in and of itself, but windows are only for appreciating the view. The ruthless few who can climb out that window are a minority indeed.

C: 不过我觉得最神奇的还是它们的胃，简直像是小型炼金工房，我都不知道它们是如何消化这么多奇形怪状的矿石的，光是咀嚼的声音我就听得牙疼。
E: But I think what's most amazing about them is their stomach, it's basically like a small alchemical workstation. I have no idea how they can digest so many weird shapes and minerals. Just the chewing sound makes my ears hurt.

C: 装洗澡水…听起来有点失礼。
E: Using bath water sounds... a little rude.

C: {RUBY_B#尼卡多利}庇佑我们的泰坦{RUBY_E#}不爱和平，唯有争斗才能赢得它的睥睨。而为争斗献出生命，是每名勇士必定的终点。
E: {RUBY_B#Nikador}The Titan that protects us{RUBY_E#} abhors peace. Only war will win their favor. And offering one's life in battle is the inevitable ending for every warrior.

C: 摒弃疑虑，才能更好地为尼卡多利献身。
E: Only by relinquishing all doubt can we best devote ourselves to Nikador.

C: 宝贝儿…带秘酿来…珍宝、圣物、美人儿…随你挑……
E: My dear... Bring ambrosia here... Treasures, relics, beauties... Take your pick...

C: 没意思的地方…没有宴会、没有音乐、没有秘酿…黑漆漆的………好小，好窄…让我真难受……
E: A pointless place... No banquets, no music, no ambrosia... Pitch black... So small, so narrow... So uncomfortable...

C: 铁胚，并无特别。锻造过程，有泰坦的赐福。
E: Billet, ordinary it was. The tempering process, blessed by Titans it was.

C: 当然，当然。操作本身不难，但是要精通也不容易，要是雇佣我们的团队，您可以省下许多练习的功夫，俗话说得好，功夫就是利衡币啊。
E: Of course, of course. Controlling it is quite easy, while mastery is a bit harder. If you hire my team, you can save the time of practicing. Like the saying goes, time is Balance Coins.

C: 感谢你贡献的迷醉逸闻！我感觉离法吉娜大人又近了一步。
E: Thank you for contributing your intoxicated anecdote! I feel one more step closer to Phagousa.

C: 先喝一口…
E: Try a sip...

C: 你捧起瓶身，一饮而尽……
E: You raise the bottle, and down it in one go...

C: 之前的事情…很感谢你。
E: Thank you... for what you did before.

C: 无妨，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}。白日漫漫、长夜无垠，我们还会再见的。
E: It's okay, {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}. The days are long, the nights are endless, and we'll see each other again.

C: 为什么只对我有反应？
E: Why do you only respond to me?

C: 让我来辩！
E: Let me join the debate!

C: 学生的成就超过老师，是什么稀奇事吗？按你的观点，世界岂不是始终在倒退？
E: Is it that rare for a student to surpass their teacher? If we follow your view, surely the world would only ever be regressing?

C: 哦，还有…你能告诉我，你眼中的世界是什么样的吗？
E: Oh, and... could you tell me, what does the world look like through your eyes?

C: 奥赫玛会饿死人？
E: Do people starve in Okhema?

C: 我不被主流审美绑架。
E: I don't let mainstream beauty standards define me.

C: 那时起我就开始研究各种小物件，给自己做，给邻人做，没多久就造了这手，也给他打了个新假腿，还有空就往天上瞧，等着什么时候问问艾格勒——
E: Since then, I began researching various little gadgets, making them for myself and for my neighbors. Before long, I created this hand and even crafted a new prosthetic leg for him. Whenever I had the chance, I'd gaze at the sky, waiting for the moment to ask Aquila —

C: 我会想你的，朋友！很想很想~所以你还会来找我的，对吗？
E: I'll miss you, friend — so, so much. You'll come back and see me, right?
Wah—!!!

C: 你到底在这做什么？
E: What exactly are you doing here?

C: 我是书库的负责人之一，名叫泽诺托斯。在这书库中遇到的问题，都可以来找我，只要在馆内别大声喧哗，吵到别人就好。
E: I am one of the managers of the repository, and my name is Zenotus. Any issues you encounter here, feel free to come to me. Just make sure not to raise your voice too loudly within the repository and disturb others.

C: 啧，我看你样貌不凡，没想到竟是和树庭那群老古板一样的庸人，真是可悲。
E: Tsk, you look like an extraordinary person, but you're just as intransigent as those old farts in the Grove. What a shame.

C: 比如说，我发现雅努斯的思维模式可能影响了整个世界的空间结构。你有没有注意到奥赫玛的建筑总是成对出现？这可能就是雅努斯双面性的体现！
E: For example, I noticed that Janus' mode of thought may have influenced the entire world's spatial structure. Have you noticed that Okhema's buildings always come in pairs? This could be an allusion to Janus' duality!

C: 首先，这里的水直接来自受法吉娜祝福的泉眼。你能想象吗？每天都能浸泡在纯粹的神性中！我在这里冥想，试图理解法吉娜的思维方式。
E: First, the water here originates directly from springwater blessed by Phagousa. Can you imagine that? To be soaked in pure divinity on the daily! I am meditating here to try to understand Phagousa's thought process.

C: 我没什么想聊的了。
E: That's all for now.

C: 当然！普通人或许做不到，但以泰坦的神力而言，这很难吗？我们也不过是沾了瑟希斯的光，得到了些余荫。
E: Of course! It may not be possible for ordinary people, but how hard can it be with the Titan's divinity? We've only been graced by Cerces' light, retaining slivers of their omniscience.

C: 你和你妹妹关系还好吗？
E: Are you on good terms with your younger sister?

C: 她觉得一切知识都要免费开放，这才符合瑟希斯的精神。但理想和生活总归是两件事，我们普通人呢，还是得考虑下生活与做学问的成本才行啊……
E: She thinks all knowledge should be openly shared for free, which is Cerces' philosophy. But ideals and real life are totally different concepts. Ordinary folk like us still have to consider the costs of living and pursuing knowledge...

C: 喝下这杯鲜血秘酿…嗝…拥抱荣耀与力量吧！
E: Drink this sanguine honey brew... *hic* ...and embrace glory and strength!

C: 就聊这些吧。
E: Let's leave it there for now.

C: 一块晶体静静地漂浮在空中，不知是什么时候冒出来的。
E: A crystal floats by silently in midair. Goodness knows when it first appeared.

C: 不错，需要的就是这个。神驹得到了满足，将为你打开雅努斯的大门。
E: Great, that's what I need. The divine foal has been satisfied, and will open up the gate of Janus for you.

C: 「唯一的问题是——每天都要跟大家社交，光是回消息就得花不少时间，我感觉都没有私人生活了…唔，这大概算是某种幸福的烦恼吧。哎，不说了，有人给我打视频电话，我先挂了。」
E: "The main issue is having to socialize every day. Just responding to messages takes up so much time, I feel like I've got no personal life left... well, I guess that's a good problem to have in a way. Oh, hold on, I've got a video call coming in, gotta go."

C: 跃渊暂时没有留言给你，不过我看着她的状态显示一直是「工作中」，打过去也是忙音，可能是去奋斗了。
E: Yueyuan hasn't left any messages recently. Her status is consistently "busy," and all calls just ring out. She must be swamped at work.

C: 我看中的是他身上的执着。雷金这么多年一直在坚持论证他的…「大宇宙时间隧道」理论，既然我有能力帮他，为什么不试试呢？
E: What I appreciate is his commitment. Regin has been diligently advocating his "big universe time tunnel" theory for years. If I can support him, why not?

C: 听说最近下层区的治安越来越好了，没准哪天我会去那边转转。不过下层区人好像很粗鲁，应该不适合做我的朋友。
E: I heard the Underworld area is getting safer by the day, maybe I'll visit someday. However, the locals seem pretty rough around the edges, probably not the ideal friend material for me.

C: 结果就在我即将放弃的时候，认识了雷金，也许这就是缘分吧。
E: Just when I was about to give up, I met Regin, maybe it was meant to be.

C: 好在小女子现在是塔米拉小姐的好朋友～她为我介绍了一位新锐导演，小女子运气真好～被他看中，留在他的新剧里担任女主角呢。
E: Thankfully, Miss Tamila and I are close friends now. She introduced me to an up-and-coming director, and, lucky me, he cast me as the lead in his next production.

C: …周游翁法罗斯之后终于抵达了它的中心，完成人生的最后一次朝圣，它的意义其实早就超过了圣城的风景究竟如何。
E: ...Now that I have traveled all of Amphoreus and arrived at its center, I have completed the final pilgrimage of my life. The meaning this place holds to me far exceeds the picturesque sights of the holy city.

C: 故而作为一名希求神明垂青的虔诚信徒，你需得在塔兰顿的天秤中放上足够的分量。
E: As a devout disciple that desires to be favored by the gods, you will need to place enough weight atop the scales of Talanton.

C: 所以他问了什么？
E: What did he ask?

C: 还请阁下接受我诚挚的歉意。命运三相殿地处神圣，圣女又手无缚鸡之力，我等祭司不得不严防死守。
E: Please accept my sincerest apologies, My Lord. The Temple of the Three Fates is a sacred location, and the Holy Maiden is powerless to protect it. We must keep it under tight guard.

C: 打扫神殿，然后准备点心。有时候年轻的祭司们会来找我们老家伙聊天，问问以前的事。闲下来就在这儿坐着，给路过的人倒杯茶。
E: Cleaning the temple, then prepare treats. Sometimes the young priests seek wisdom from us elders. When it's quiet, I just sit here, offering tea to those who pass by.

C: 「我，达格拉，塔兰顿的忠实信徒，向天秤起誓——我将遵从内心的律法，为物品的价值得到公正对待而永远抗争。此心可鉴，至死…方休！」
E: "I, Dagra, a devoted disciple of Talanton, swear upon the scales — I shall fight tirelessly for the fair valuation of all things, abiding by the law within my heart. Let this conviction stand, until death... and beyond!"

C: 当然可以！小灰想聊些什么呢？又想听*我们*给你唱预言的歌谣吗？
E: No problem! What would you like to discuss, Little Gray? Do you want to hear our song of prophecy again?

C: 呼——轰炸空间！
E: Ha! Space bomb!

C: 想和你说说话！
E: I just want to chat with you!

C: 而你与你的朋友们，就在这样一个童话般的场景里畅聊，聆听彼此的烦恼，纾解身心的疲敝……
E: And there you are, with your friends, in this fairytale scene, chatting freely, sharing your worries, and easing the fatigue plaguing each other's minds and souls...

C: 不不不，我可没有看错，毕竟我也在现场嘛。
E: Oh, no, I didn't mistake you. I was there. I saw it myself.

C: 我手上有份账单，上头全是向我借钱的蠢货——本事没有，架子倒是不小…瞧不起我，但还是要向我这种「暴发户」赔笑脸。
E: I've got a ledger full of these fools who borrowed money from me. They may look down on me, but they still come groveling to this "nouveau riche" when they need cash.

C: 我打算用「米里奥斯」来命名这个城市——纪念一下我那在黑潮中毁灭的故乡！
E: I've decided to name this city "Milios" — a tribute to my homeland, destroyed in the black tide.

C: 自己给自己的剧大量买票？
E: You buy out tickets to your own shows?

C: 哈哈哈哈，你不会觉得我是在自吹自擂吧？可惜这奥赫玛还没有举办过同等级的大型体育竞技赛事，你不认识我，我不怪你。
E: Hahaha, you don't think I'm tooting my own horn, do you? It's a shame that Okhema has yet to host any large-scale sports competition on the same level, so I don't blame you for not knowing me.

C: 死亡对所有人都是公平的。
E: Death is fair to all.

C: 如果之后遇到什么困难，随时都可以来找我，我们这里永远向迷途者敞开大门。
E: If you ever find yourself in need, don't hesitate to come find me. Our doors are always open to the lost.

C: 你在奥赫玛这里是做什么的？
E: What are you doing in Okhema?

C: 那你还给我钱？
E: And you still gave me money?

C: 她的研究存在许多纰漏之处，不过对我来说仍有价值。若能得到更多织者的赐福，我就能找到一个行之有效的改进方法。
E: Her research has many flaws, but it still holds value for me. With more blessings from the weavers, I can find an effective way to improve it.

C: 唉…下一世，我一定不会让她去参加什么探险队了……
E: Hmm... in the next life, I will never let her join any expedition again...

C: 对我来说，那一刻的告别就已经足够了。
E: For me, that farewell in that moment was already enough.

C: 啊！{F#女士}{M#先生}，我和阿芙罗姐姐学了很久的缝纫，但总觉得这项技能不太适合我。
E: Ah, {F#miss}{M#mister}! I've studied sewing with Aphrea for ages, but it never quite suited me.

C: 你还活着，我很欣慰。
E: It's good to see you survived.

C: 你现在有什么打算？
E: So what's your plan now?

C: 关于刚才的战斗…
E: About the battle we just had...

C: 正如我们初见时我所说，我无比期盼翁法罗斯的明天……
E: As I told you when we first met, I long for Amphoreus's tomorrow...

C: 我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
E: I've found all the nymphs here.

C: 没有记忆残晶，我们该如何追溯若虫的踪迹？等你得到之后再来找我吧。
E: Without Memory Crystal Shards, how can we trace the nymphs? Come back when you have some.

C: 我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
E: I've found all the nymphs here.

C: 所以你还有什么事吗？没看我现在忙着么……
E: So... did you need something? Can't you see I'm busy?

C: 好嘞，借你吉言！老爹这次绝对找不着我！
E: Thanks! I'll take all the luck I can get! No way dad's finding me this time!

C: 好嘞，我得先想办法把自己藏好…回见！
E: Got it. I need to find a better hiding spot anyway... Catch you later!

C: 呦，这不是和白厄一起的{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}吗，难得见你自个儿在外边晃悠。
E: Well, well, isn't this the {F#young lady}{M#young lad} who's always with Phainon? Rare to see you wandering around alone.

C: 不巧，现在正是农忙的时候，学校不开课，不然还想让你给孩子们讲讲外面的事呢。
E: Not the best timing, though. It's a busy season in the fields right now, and the school's on break. Otherwise, I'd have loved for you to tell the kids a bit about the outside world.

C: 我可以带你一起去看——只要你愿意和莉维娅成为好朋友的话！
E: I can take you to see them — if you promise to be my friend!

C: 嘘！别吵，我在和种子们聊天迷。
E: Shh! Not so loud. I'm talking to the seeds, memi.

C: 是你呀，贵客…我们又见面了。
E: Well hello, my esteemed guest... we meet again.

C: 不干杯，想聊天。
E: No cheers-ing, I just wanna talk.

C: 让我看看。
E: Lemme see.

C: 等以后再度启航时，我一定要努力收收心——但在那之前，在这美好的宴会之中……
E: When we sail again, I'll strive to focus. But until then, let us savor this splendid banquet...

C: 所以我…就醒了…然后又醉了…得陪她…所以我信仰…出神…我想听她诉说…希望她不再、不再那么孤独…那么绝望…一起等待……
E: So I... wake... then drink again... to keep her company... My faith is ecstasy... I yearn to hear her voice... to end her solitude... her despair... to wait together...

C: 第四个选项呢？
E: What's the fourth option?

C: 回答…正确！正，正是，第四个选项——葡萄口味的蜜酿！
E: C—Correct! It is the fourth option — grape-flavored honey brew!

C: 下次再说吧。
E: Maybe next time.

C: …你怎么把池子抽干了？就这么想见我吗嘤？
E: ...Why did you drain the pool? Wanted to see me that badly, eep?

C: 让尖酸果汁流过肉的表面只是徒劳，将它滴入肉的纹理之间，才是品尝美味的奥义。
E: Letting the tangy fruit juice run over the meat's surface does nothing. Only when it seeps into the fibers of the meat can the true flavor be unlocked.

C: 那您可要多享受享受呢！听我的师父说啊，这份手艺是从黄金世末期传下来的，有两千多年的历史呢。
E: Then you should enjoy it to your heart's desire! My master told me that these massage skills have been passed down from the end of the Era Chrysea. There's more than two thousand years of history to it.

C: 诶呦——我又赢啦！承让了啊兄弟！
E: Oh... I win again! You have to stop letting me win, brother!

C: 所以，我可以在那之前大量购入，然后涨价卖给冒险者们，这样就能大赚一笔，随后攒够利衡币搬去云崖住。
E: So, I can buy in a huge amount of rain gear beforehand and sell them to adventurers for an inflated price? Then I can make a fortune. I'll have enough Balance Coins to move to Dawncloud.

C: 我怎么没听见，你不会又想骗人吧？{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}对你说了什么？
E: Then why couldn't I hear anything. You're not lying again, are you? What did {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} say to you?

C: 嗯。
E: Yeah.

C: 嗷呜呜。
E: Awoowoo.

C: 不过，咕咕——新同学，我看你腿脚利索，人也很亲切——小鸟们一定会信任你的，不如来做我的帮手吧。
E: But, hoot hoot... New student, I see you're quick on your feet, and you're affable — the birds will surely trust you. How about helping me out?

C: 咕咕…噢！有个喜欢游泳的孩子，走到哪儿游到哪儿，在校园的<color=#dbc291ff>水池</color>中找找它的身影吧。
E: Hoot hoot... Oh! There's a child who loves to swim — it swims wherever it goes. Look for it at the campus <color=#dbc291ff>pool</color>.

C: 不过如果有年轻人想要与我交流一二，我还是很乐意聊聊的。
E: But if any young people fancy a discussion with me, I am more than happy to do that.

C: 我没有问题了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 如果你对愚人戏有兴趣的话，就最好不过——我可知道不少有趣的戏呢！
E: If you are interested in Fool's Play, then you've come to the right person. I know many interesting ones!

C: 奇物再收容小队嘛，是空间站依据灾后复兴需要，临时牵头成立的应急小组。
E: The Curio Collection Squad is a temporary emergency unit established by the space station to address the needs of the post-disaster revival.

C: 无妨，小友遇到任何困难，再来找明德便是。
E: Good. For any questions you may encounter in the future, my young friend, please do not hesitate to come to me.

C: 我有些事情想问你…
E: I have a few questions for you...

C: 因为，我的毕业论文就在这里。
E: Because my thesis is right here.

C: 按照通常社会人的观念来看，的确如此。
E: From a typical working adult's perspective, that's definitely true.

C: 当然，如果只要你不觉得枯燥就好～
E: Of course, as long as you don't find it boring~

C: 这个通道看上去就令虫晕眩…这个洞的设计者一定充满了恶意喀！
E: Just one look at this passage makes me dizzy... Whosoever designed this cave must've had serious ill intentions, crrk!

C: 好口渴，我究竟喝不喝呢…喝了对不起{RUBY_B#墨涅塔}太太{RUBY_E#}，不喝对不起我自己。
E: So thirsty... Should I drink it or not...? If I drink, I'll feel bad about the {RUBY_B#Mnestia}old lady{RUBY_E#}. If I don't, I'll feel bad for myself.

C: 能多给我点提示吗？
E: Can you give me more hints?

C: 嗯…有位织者发现了新的道路。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>屋顶的柱础上</color>观摩大地兽呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who has discovered a new path. The golden thread brings tidings: They are <color=#dbc291ff>on the roof's column base</color> watching the dromas.

C: 原来你早已从风中读出了预言的旨意啊，恭喜你，贵客。
E: So you've already read the prophecy's will from the wind. Congratulations, esteemed guest.

C: 你仍然记得，在大墓的最深处，你们将德谬歌的符号转变为无限的符号，为翁法罗斯许诺了它应得的未来。
E: You still remember, in the deepest part of the Great Tomb, how you converted the symbol of Demiurge into the symbol of infinity, promising Amphoreus the future it deserves.

C: 你仔细端详上面的纹路，它像等高线地形图，像一座俯瞰的迷宫，更像某个穿背带裤的手工大师喜欢的焊接道具…等等，这不是电路板吗？
E: You examine the patterns carefully. They look like topographic contours, like a maze looking from above, or maybe even some soldering tool that a certain suspender-wearing craftsman would love... Wait a minute, isn't this a circuit board?

C: 自从上次在黑潮中被两位搭救，我们兄弟俩时时刻刻不敢忘记这份大恩大德。
E: Ever since you two saved us from the black tide that time, my brother and I have never forgotten your immense kindness and grace.

C: 过几天我就去找忒斯庇斯写获奖宣言，放心，致谢词里提到的第一个名字肯定是你！
E: In a few days, I'll go find Thespis to write my award acceptance speech. Don't worry, your name will definitely be the first one mentioned in the acknowledgments!

C: 哎，你这人真有意思，这招呼还能打得有来有往的。
E: Well now, you really know how to keep up your end of a conversation.

C: 算了算了，孩子没事就好。
E: Forget it, I'm just glad you're alright.

C: 呵，赛法利娅，对你来说，哪天不是休息日？若非事态紧急，我不会把两位召集至此。
E: Heh. When is it not a rest day for you, Cifera? I wouldn't have called you both here if it weren't urgent.

C: 嗯，就是这样，你的气势比我们两个还要火热十足啊！
E: Hmm, that's right, your spirit is even more fiery and intense than two of us combined!

C: 瞧，我还带了老妈做的蜂蜜烙饼和葡萄馅饼，滋味不输给悬锋城的羊奶石榴汁。
E: Look, I even brought honey suncakes and grape pies made by my mom. They're just as tasty as the pomegranate goat milk from Castrum Kremnos.

C: 你的图书馆都有什么书？
E: What kind of books do you have in your library?

C: 这倒稀奇，「金织」女士什么时候这么在乎人们的看法了？
E: Well, that's rare. Since when did Lady Goldweaver start caring about what others think?

C: 安提灵是生长于冥界的花朵，它素净的花瓣能带给往生者最后的安宁，但种在这里就有些不合时宜了。
E: Antila is a flower that grows in the nether realm. Its pure petals bring final peace to the departed, but planting it here seems rather inappropriate.

C: 嗯…有位织者正进退维谷。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>隐蔽的道路旁</color>，期待能洗刷自己的冤屈呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who's in quite a pickle. The golden thread brings tidings: They're by the <color=#dbc291ff>hidden path</color>, hoping to do themself justice.

C: 嗯…有位织者沉浸在悲伤之中。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>世界的巨大创口前</color>，聆听记录亡者最后的声音呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is immersed in sorrow. The golden thread brings tidings: They're <color=#dbc291ff>in front of the vast wound of the world</color>, listening and recording the final cries of the dead.

C: 关于派系…
E: About the factions...

C: 如果时间允许，希望你能多多和我聊一聊你们在地表的冒险。
E: If time permits, I hope you can chat with me more about your adventures on that planet.

C: 《冒险鼹鼠队》讲的是什么呀？
E: What is The Adventurous Moles about?

C: 鼹鼠党的名称是这么来的吗？
E: Is that how you guys got the name "The Moles"?

C: …我知道你想说，这根本不算是什么好处。不过，大人也太急功近利了吧。
E: ...I know what you're going to say. There's nothing in it for you at all. Adults are so eager for instant gratifications.

C: （铁丝网上的矿灯好像空缺了一处……）
E: (There seems to be a miner's lamp missing on the barbed wire...)

C: 然后是这个「阻车器」。顾名思义，阻车器会堵住矿车前进的路线。要是矿车被阻车器拦住，咱就只能让它沿着轨道倒回起点了。
E: Then comes this blocker. As the name implies, the blocker will block the route of the mine cart. If the mine cart is stopped by one of these, then the only thing we can do is send it back to where it just came from.

C: …再说一次？
E: ...What did you say?

C: 行，等你闲下来了再说。
E: That's fine. Come see me when you're free.

C: 把满载矿车送到亮黄灯的地方……
E: Take the loaded mine cart to the place with the yellow lights...

C: 修复工作还是很顺利的，只是过程中，我发现了一些异常——访问记录显示，在主控系统瘫痪的那段时间，有「军团」以外的第三者入侵了这里。
E: The repair job began smoothly, but along the way I found some anomalies — some access logs showing that a third party other than the Legion was actually here, while the systems were all paralyzed.

C: 好。
E: Alright.

C: 不过，这小子脾气比较古怪。如果他坚持不要稿费，你也就别浪费时间了——就当是跑腿费，自己收下吧。
E: But this dude's got a quirky temper. If he insists on not taking the payment, don't waste your time. Just keep it as a delivery fee for yourself.

C: 从画面构成到色彩运用再到意向传达，你穷尽毕生所学，将自己的观点和盘托出。
E: From the composition to the color palette and the communication of motifs, you pull out all the stops to offer up all the insight you can give.

C: 雷比尼按照你的建议，对画作飞快地进行了修改。
E: Rebini hastily makes revisions to the painting based on your feedback.

C: 你的回答是不知道——你也不知道自己的此番回答会引起大师何种反应。但你坚信，真诚就是你最好的武器。
E: Your answer is that you don't know — and you don't know what reaction this answer will invoke within the master painter. But you firmly believe that sincerity is your best weapon.

C: 肚子好饿……
E: I'm sooo hungry...

C: 给你钱，你自己去买吧。
E: Here's some money. Get some for yourself.

C: 这也是她说过的——「如果世界由冷酷的白银铸就，就用歌声的黄金将之融化」……
E: She did say: "If the world was forged in cold silver, then it shall be challenged by the molten gold known as music"...

C: 原来这套机体数据就给你吧，反正我已经用不到了。
E: So here's the previous automaton data for you. I ain't got no use for it anymore.

C: 看起来这些宝物都在下层区…{NICKNAME}，可能要麻烦你去找找看了。
E: Looks like these treasures are all in the Underworld... {NICKNAME}, can I please task you with finding them?

C: 听说你有事找我。
E: Heard you were looking for me?

C: …对不起，我或许掺入了太多私人情感。
E: ...I'm sorry. I may have injected too many personal feelings.

C: 这都是你的功劳，我身为这座博物馆的馆长，必须要亲自感谢你才行。
E: This is the fruit of your effort. As the curator of the museum, I must express my gratitude to you personally.

C: 「直到大守护者踏上母亲走过的路，再度踏入裂界时，人们终于放下成见，一致高唱她那高贵的姓名为其送行——」
E: "It was only after the Supreme Guardian walked in her mother's footsteps and entered the Fragmentum once more that the people finally let go of their preconceived thinking and sang her noble name."

C: 藿藿，你、你别怕……
E: Huohuo, d—don't be afraid...

C: 我就在这里等着各位的消息。
E: Then I'll be waiting here for your good news.

C: 这事真真的！不过等我们走近瞧的时候，星槎消失了。
E: The skiff is r—r—real! But it disappeared the moment we got close to it.

C: 驭空大人？
E: Madam Yukong?

C: 不用谢，这是我们应该做的。
E: You're welcome. That's our job.

C: 要求真多，行吧，别浪费我太多时间。
E: That's a lot to ask. Fine, but don't waste too much of my time.

C: 呼——总算回来了，多亏了荣誉队员！
E: Whew — I'm back. Thanks a lot, honorary member!

C: （把电视关掉）
E: (Turn off the TV)

C: （等它们自行离开）

E: Rule Two: <color=#dbc291ff>Play your ace card at the right time</color>. These documents can only be truly effective when your opponent reveals a weak spot.

C: 对啊，对啊。

C: 正好有一件事要通知你——我们顺利地完成了这一阶段的营收目标！这都是多亏了你、素裳、还有金人巷各位商户们的帮助。
E: I have something to tell you — we achieved our revenue goal for this quarter! This is all thanks to you two, not to mention the merchants of Aurum Alley.

C: 当然，这么多订单也不是凭空变出来的，老爷您可以在我这里买一些「昂贵的配方」，我们有来有往，实现双赢，这样如何？
E: Of course, all these orders don't come out of nowhere. You can buy some "costly remedies" from me. A little business between us will be to our mutual profit. How about it?

C: 太好了，那我就能稍微缓缓了。
E: That's great. Then I can take it a little easy.

C: 再去找个更好的理由！
E: Come up with a better excuse!

C: 这难道不是大家所期望的、终极的「金人巷复兴」吗？
E: And that, honorable ladies and gentlemen, is the rejuvenation that everyone has been hoping for.

E: Ahh, stop it! Stop! Or I'll throw up!

E: Any contestant who beats all the Martial Exhibition matches not only wins the tournament prize, but there's also a special secret prize from the Scott Business Alliance!

C: （清扫雪堆）

C: 根…据我的…的「大小眼…大…宇宙时间隧道」理…论……

*Hmph*

C: 简单收拾过后，你和狱友踏上了寻找哈努兄弟的旅程。

C: 滴答！欢迎来到美梦小镇！

E: Mwahaha, don't worry. Look, my hands are puny and feeble. I won't wreck it.

E: I'm good at chatting with people I don't care about. But when it comes to someone I do... how can I say something so embarrassing?

E: Producing animations in Penacony is pretty simple. Apart from the common techniques like smart illustration, mental projection, and algorithmic generation, there's also the Sweet Dreams Troupe which is skilled in drawing and capable of recreating the vintage hand-drawn graphic style...

E: "That's why I'm afraid. I'm afraid the stories I wrote in my creations will tarnish this innocence. I hope that there's always a dream in your heart. I hope you'll never be skeptical of this world."

C: 末日一定会降临吗？
E: Is the apocalypse inevitable?

E: There are also plenty of painting frames by the art display.

C: …十个？

C: 他们会惊讶「啊——？！当初那个斯科特怎么又回来了？这次他又要做什么？」

E: Alright, enough talking! Let's go, boys! That delicious medicinal soup will give us the strength to win!

C: 一段小插曲结束了，而三月七的剑术学习还将继续。
E: This brief interlude has concluded, yet March 7th's pursuit of the art of swordplay shall continue.

C: 质疑斯科特的不可取代。

E: Picture Skott leaving the IPC.

C: 适当的沉默。
E: Remain silent.

C: 你沉默不语，流露出哀伤的眼神。如果说眼神有温度，那么你的爱怜可以孵化小鸡。
E: In your silence, your eyes betraying your sadness. The heat of the sympathy in your gaze could hatch a chick.

C: 而面对如此挑战，斯科特求之不得，决战一触即发——
E: Faced with this challenge, Skott greatly welcomed the opportunity. The decisive battle was about to begin...

C: 三月小姐的反应还挺可爱的，告诉你也无妨，椒丘先生所说的「赤龙」确实存在。
E: Miss March's reaction is quite adorable, so I'll be frank: The Crimson Dragon that Mr. Jiaoqiu mentioned does indeed exist.

C: 老夫有一个好消息和一个坏消息。
E: I have good and bad news.

C: 机械是不是有灵魂…你可以直接问问螺丝咕姆先生，他可能会有答案？
E: To find out whether a mech has a soul... You can ask Mr. Screwllum directly. Maybe he will know the answer?

C: 哦…啊？！为什么是我？
E: Oh... Huh!? Why me?

C: 「庄严…伟大的机械之魂，吾等呼唤你的存在。请指引吾等螺旋的结构，连接此处徘徊的精魂，于铆接处与元器件中回响……」
E: "O, solemn... and mighty Mechanical Soul, we call upon thy presence. May thou guide our spiral structures to the wandering soul at this place, echoing in the riveted joints and components..."

C: …老夫没想到会再次听到这个名字。

C: 我听说你喜欢玩各种游戏，不是吗？要不了多久，你就会因为懂得太多、玩得太多、以及想得太多，对游戏再也提不起兴趣。

C: 我怎么会让客人上班呢！你们俩当然是来微服私访，体验生活的嘛～
E: As if I could make a visitor work for me! You two would be here on an undercover visit to experience the daily life of the Divination Commission~

C: 好吧，如果还需要补拍，欢迎随时过来。
E: Alright. If you need to retake any pictures, you can come back anytime.

C: 魔阴身…听上去像是一种很难对付的疾病呢。幸好你现在还能完好地站在我的面前，这说明你们克服了那些困难，对吧？
E: Mara-struck... That sounds like a hard sickness to handle. Fortunately, you stand before me today in perfect health. That must mean that you overcame these struggles, correct?

C: 怎样可以阻止它们？
E: How can we stop them?

C: 卢卡，没想到会在这里遇到你。
E: Luka, didn't expect to see you here.

C: 我还有事。

C: {NICKNAME}！你来看我们的比赛啦？

C: 如果只靠着大人物发发善心让自己渡过难关，那人就永远都不会成为真正的自由人，而只会成为被赋予了自由权的奴隶。
E: If we rely too much on the charity of major influences to help us overcome hardships, they will never truly become free, but rather remain a servant under the illusion of freedom.

C: 嗯，是该休息一下了，我毕竟不是铁人。说到铁人…漆黑的虎克大人，你怎么一个人在这里？史瓦罗大佬去哪了？
E: Mm, I do need a break. I'm not actually an iron man or anything. Speaking of which... Pitch-Dark Hook the Great, what are you doing here on your own? Where'd Svarog go?

C: 别让玲可等太久，去太卜司吧。
E: We don't want to keep Lynx waiting too long. Let's go to the Divination Commission.

C: 感谢您，漆黑的虎克大人！那咱们现在就出发吧。
E: Thank you, Pitch-Dark Hook the Great! Let's set off right now!

C: 没关系，你心中的「寻圈」魂终究会破茧而出！
E: That's fine too. The Pathfinder soul within you will come round eventually!

C: 不多了，做好心理准备，卢卡。
E: Not long, Luka. Best brace yourself.

C: 真的吗？让您破费了！
E: Really? At your expense?

C: 为什么叹气呀？是出了什么问题吗……
E: Why the long sigh? Is there a problem...?

C: 我一定会顺利复活的。
E: I'm going to win this.

C: 是呀，青雀，别难过了。这只是历史。
E: You're right. Qingque, don't be sad. It's just history.

C: 我怎么没想到！
E: Why didn't I think of you?

C: 他们家的「茶」可有点烈。
E: But the tea has a real kick to it. It's pretty fiery stuff.

C: 好嘞。请您二位稍等片刻。
E: No problem. I'll be right back.

C: 我明白，但我仍然要登上那个擂台，挥出一拳。因为胜败不是战斗的全部。
E: I understand, but I'm still going to step into the ring and throw a punch. Win or lose, the outcome isn't the only thing that matters.

C: 自演武仪典开赛以来，「卢卡挑战彦卿」便稳居观众期待榜的榜首，如今这场大家期待已久的梦幻对决即将呈现在全银河的观众眼前！
E: Since the beginning of the Wardance, the match between Luka and Yanqing has been the most anticipated one among the audience. Now, this highly awaited showdown is about to unfold before viewers across the cosmos!

C: 人类像一株巨树般彼此紧密相联，不断滋长。人们塑造历史，历史造就英雄，英雄鼓舞着未来，而未来又诞生出全新的人们。
E: People are like a giant tree, closely intertwined and ever-growing. People shape history, history creates heroes, heroes inspire the future, and the future brings forth new people.

C: 你和卡美丽将卢卡搀回了休息室。他浑身颤抖，几乎不能站立。
E: You return to the lounge with Carmella and Luka. Luka is trembling, barely able to stand.

C: 这是……
E: Is this...

C: 警告：敌意单位靠近！方案：劫持敌方单位，保护奢摩。
E: Warning: Enemy units approaching! Plan: Hijack enemy units, and protect Samatha.

C: 安静点——他醒了。
E: Shh, he's waking up.

C: 逻辑：最高目标，完成请愿；次级目标，保护奢摩，二者高于其他一切进程。
E: Logic: The critical objective — complete the petition. Secondary objective — protect Samatha. These two objectives take priority over all the other directives.

C: ……永远都会有选择，而我将选择更好的。
E: ...There will always be a choice, and I will make that better choice.

C: 但有个问题…你现在一点都不困。况且就算再怎么困，也不太可能在朋友（卢卡）期待的注视中安然睡着吧？
E: A slight problem though... You aren't sleepy at all right now. And even if you are, you can't possibly go to sleep under the eager gaze of your friend Luka, can you?

C: 据我所知，卢卡没有幻觉…
E: From what I know, Luka does not hallucinate...

C: 请你立刻出去。
E: Please remove yourself from the premises.

C: 呼呼哈哈！正合我意！
E: Hoohoohaha! My thoughts exactly!

C: 我们根本不是什么星核猎手，承受不住您这铁拳啊哥！
E: We aren't the Stellaron Hunters. We can't withstand your punches!

C: 扑满训练师用非常自豪的语气说出了莫名其妙的话！
E: Such confidence for such a strange confession, Trotter trainer!

C: 「朱明三不」…仔细品了品，这名字还挺帅气的。该去擂台上会会他们了！
E: The Tri-Dis of Zhuming... After some appreciation, this name sounds quite impressive. It's time to go meet them in the arena!

C: 我们就是欣赏你这一点。上吧！
E: This is what we admire about you. Bring it!

C: 稍作准备。
E: Make some preparations.

C: 你为什么，执着于，和植物对话？
E: Why. Are you. So. Insistent. On talking. To the plants?

C: 回家的船票已经买好了…
E: The ticket home has already been bought...

C: 你看，网友都明白的道理，组委会那帮家伙怎么就不明白呢。
E: Look, the netizens understand what's going on. Why those committee folks don't understand is beyond me.

C: 等的就是你这样的专业记者。
E: I've been waiting for a professional individual such as yourself.

C: 前排左手边第一位。
E: Front row, first from the left.

C: 这可真是太有自信了！
E: What a super confident answer!

C: 反有机方程的残存么，还是第一次见…罢了，倒也并非不可度化。
E: Remnants of the anti-organic equation, huh? This is the first time I've seen one... Never mind, it's not that it cannot be delivered to salvation.

C: 卢卡选手，请做好准备吧。
E: Luka, prepare yourself.

C: 唉…抱歉，我是不是吓到你了？
E: Ah... Sorry, did I scare you?

C: 以前我就不爱玩。
E: I never enjoyed those before.

C: 还有别的事。
E: Nah, I've got better stuff to do.

C: 因为我将自己的形象授权给了「罗浮庙会筹备组」，所以他们可以让虚拟大毫担任庙会引导员。
E: I've transferred my image rights to the Luofu Temple Fair Preparatory Group, so they can use my virtual emulation as a temple fair guide.

C: 答案很简单。因为我们预算有限，虚拟陪玩服务器只用得起免费体验版。
E: The answer's simple. We've got a tight budget. We've only managed to use the free trial version for the virtual NPC servers.

C: 原来二位早就认识！我就知道，游戏领域大神之间是会互相吸引的。
E: So you know each other! I called it — GOATs of the game world clop together.

C: 将蕉授从梦境中驱逐出去后，折纸大学很快恢复了原本的秩序。你过来的路上应该看到了，学生们都在热火朝天地准备「彩梦校庆」的音乐派对呢。
E: After the Profnana was exiled from the dreamscape, Paperfold University has since quickly restored its former order. You should've seen it along the way — the students are in a frenzy prepping for the Dreamlight Anniversary's musical party.

C: 需要进行三场演出吗？
E: There must be three performances?

C: 什么东西…我没听说过这个奖项。
E: What the heck... I've never heard of such an award.

C: 刚才乱破大人的安排，我都听见啦。虽然我的资质不够，没法成为音忍，但这种通风报信…不对，是收集资讯的工作，我最擅长了！
E: I overheard everything about Lady Rappa's arrangements. I may not be adequately qualified to become a sound ninja, but if it's about gossip... I mean, I'm excellent at intel gathering work!

C: 在下果然没看错。主公的音忍•资质远在常人之上。
E: My judgment was sound about you. Your sound ninja aptitude is beyond average.

C: 音乐派对会持续多久？
E: How long will the music party last?

C: 看到头顶那只金光灿灿的大鸟了吗？是不是特别地潮？！
E: Can you see that huge glittering golden bird above us? Isn't it super stylish?

C: 关于中央舞台…
E: About the central stage...

C: 新品种的折纸小鸟？
E: A new kind of origami bird?

C: 铛…铛…铛…铛！哈哈！
E: Ding... Ding... Ding... Ding! Haha!

C: 呃…误闯此地，向各位致意，希望争端就此平息，好让我安心逃离。
E: Uh... stumbled in by mistake, I greet you all, hoping this beef can end, so I can make my call. Let me leave in peace, no more trouble at all.

C: 新游戏首次测试，只需体验三分钟，相信你就会像我一样，爱上这款游戏！
E: There's a new game doing their first playtest. Just three minutes and I'm sure you'll love this game just like I do!

C: 我来说明吧，我有一个理论——
E: Allow me to explain. I have a theory...

C: …挺羡慕她的，没有接受过任何乐理教育，活在属于自己的天马行空的世界里，也因此始终保留着创造力，也有热情关照乐队的其他人……
E: ...I am quite envious of her. She has never taken any education on musical theory and lives in her own delusional world, but this has allowed her to maintain her creativity and given her the passion to take care of her bandmates...

C: 你到底为什么会回来啊？
E: Why did you come back?

C: 演奏用的那把吉他在艾尔菲同学身边，就算临时顶替…也没有乐器了。
E: Arfey has the guitar! Even if you were to stand in... you have no instrument.

C: 哎呀，作为学院代表，亲临现场视察校园活动的进展有什么问题吗？
E: Oh my, as the academy's representative, there's nothing wrong with taking a vested interest in how the campus event prep is going, is there?

C: 喂，破铁罐子，你也说几句，现在你不是这里水平最差的人了。
E: Hey, you heap of scrap, you say something too. I mean, you're not the trashiest one among us, after all.

C: 其二：抵御心如邪祟的恶徒阻挠，为我等争取登台的时机。
E: Second: Resist the sinister machinations of those evildoers and secure a window of opportunity for us to take the stage.

C: 那我们也要去！
E: Even so, we have to go!

C: 其实，有件事情…你们听了不要生气啊，就是…前几天，财富学院的代表突然找到我，让我组织一只新的乐队，替代你们完成演出。
E: Actually, there's this thing... Please don't be angry after hearing this. Um... A couple of days ago, the Fortune Academy's rep suddenly hit us up to have me form a new band and replace you guys in the show.

C: 哇，是舒翁姐姐！好久没见了，你是来参加舞台表演的嘛？
E: Wow, it's Siobhan! Long time no see. Are you here to participate in the performance?

C: 就算校方允许演出，只靠台上的那两个学生也撑不了多久。
E: Even if the school allows the performance, it won't last long just with those two students on stage.

C: 这就是我们「缭乱乐团 / 缭乱众 / 缭乱号飞艇 / 缭乱忍徒旅店 / 缭乱流派对」的乐队精神啊，那些学院代表有没有这种精神啊？
E: This is the spirit of Dazzling Band / Dazzling Collective / Dazzling Airship / Dazzling Initiate Hotel / Dazzling School Party. Do those representatives of the academy have this spirit?

C: 我打听到新乐队的消息了，他们也是临时组织起来的，还在手忙脚乱地为演出做准备。
E: I've heard some news about the new band. They were also assembled on short notice and are still scrambling to prepare for their performance.

C: 但事实上，财富学院的那位代表处处刁难乐队，不过是因为「晖长石号」上的几处店面是奥帝先生答应给他的生日礼物，却随飞艇一同被转赠给了星穹列车。
E: But honestly, the reason the Fortune Academy's representative has been haranguing us non-stop is only because Mr. Alfalfa promised to give him ownership of some stores aboard the Radiant Feldspar, which was instead gifted to the Astral Express, airship and all.

C: 艾尔菲完全沉浸在和扑满嬉戏的氛围中了……
E: Arfey is totally immersed in the atmosphere of playing with the trotter...

C: （看我悄悄地溜走……）
E: (Watch me silently slink away...)

C: 嗯。观众们的呼声，永远是给演出者最好的回应。你们——非常受欢迎啊。
E: Good. The audience's cheers are always the best answer to a performance. You're all very popular.

C: 其实，有同题材的游戏…
E: Actually, there is a game with a similar theme...

C: 什么，材料不够？没事，等你准备好了，随时回来啊。
E: What, not enough materials? Don't worry. I'll wait for you to get some. Come back anytime.

C: 我的天，太可怕了，千万别变成这样的人啊。
E: Heavens, that's so scary. Please don't become someone like that.

C: 明明昨天打赌的时候，你还拍着胸脯保证，今早一定能起得来呢！
E: When we made a bet yesterday, you confidently proclaimed that you'd definitely be able to wake up on time!

C: 含泪支付「列车基金」。
E: Fight back your tears and fork out your Express fund.

C: （三月七做足了准备，这回恐怕得认真应对了……）
E: (Uh-oh, March 7th has fully prepared for this. I'll have to get serious this time...)

C: 洞天隐月，苍龙濯世！
E: Delve-hidden moon, world-cleansing dragon!

C: 唔哇哇哇！怎么回事！姬子姐，快按取消键！
E: Uwaahhh! What's going on! Himeko, hurry up and hit the cancel button!

C: 哇～还真是简单有效的措施！不愧是丹恒乘客。
E: Wowww, a simple, yet effective measure! That's Dan Heng for you.

C: 什么！竟然是钓鱼执法？？？太离谱了帕！
E: What! It was a trap??? This is outrageous!

C: 好难过，它陪了我这么久，最后竟然这样不告而别……
E: I'm so upset — I've used them for the longest time, and I didn't even get to say goodbye...

C: 唉…也对。
E: *sigh* ...You're right.

C: 我们都明白，真正宝贵的不是硬件设备，而是数十年如一日在工作中积累下的，肚子里的「油墨」，以及头脑中的「幽默」。
E: We all know that true value is not in hardware, but accumulated through decades of work, the juices in your stomachs, and the juices in your brains.

C: 呃…他是在夸我吧？
E: Err... Is he complimenting me?

C: 都住手，有游客在拍照呢！
E: Stop it. Tourists are taking photos!

C: 哼哼，明白就好。
E: Hmph, as long as you get it.

C: 第一天的课题竟然是「品牌聚焦」，要求与苏乐达有关…怎么看都是赞助商打广告吧？
E: The first day's task is actually "Brand Focus" and they want it to be about SoulGlad... It's all just sponsored commercials, isn't it?

C: 「美少女与金刚猴」。
E: "Beauty and the Golden Monkey."

C: 对于演员来说，还有比被观众忽视更让人恼火的吗？
E: Is there anything more irritating for an actor than being ignored by your audience?

C: 能看透本质…
E: It can see into the subject's essence...

C: 你开始相信他是出于个人趣味才来担任评委的。
E: You're starting to believe that he is only here as a judge purely out of personal interest.

C: 看到闪光灯居然都打哆嗦，真是要把本大爷笑得魂体破散了。
E: It's just the flash, stop quivering. I'm gonna laugh so hard that my spirit is gonna stop holding its shape.

C: 立即执行！
E: The sentencing commences now!

C: 「最速快门奖」的得主则是——无冕之王子！平均每张成片连拍近百张，不漏过任何决定性的瞬间。请代我向您的快门帘问好。
E: The winner of the "Fastest Shutter Award" goes to... Crownless Prince! With an average of nearly <unbreak>100</unbreak> consecutive shots for each finished picture, no decisive moment was overlooked. Please extend my regards to your camera shutter.

C: 嗯！{NICKNAME}，你说得没错！
E: Yeah! You're totally right, {NICKNAME}!

C: 你需要帮助吗？
E: Do you need help?

C: 啊，好心的{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，你终于来了！你能帮我找回乌拉尼娅的「眼睛」吗？
E: Ah, good-hearted {F#big sis}{M#big bro}, you're finally here! Can you help me find Urania's "eyes"?

C: 管它是谁的造物，敢扰乱我的军队，军规伺候，你将被我斩杀化作天谴之锋的战魂！
E: Who cares whose creation it is. Whoever dares disrupt my legion will be charged according to martial law. You will be executed by me and turned into a warring soul for my Blade of Fury!

C: （表示你的善意）
E: (Show your goodwill)

C: 别怕，我会拯救这一切。
E: Don't worry. I'll salvage everything.

C: ——「懒得取名字 / 开拓者说的都队 / 风堇亲卫队 / 奇美拉施工队 / 无名部队 / 自定义小队1」！这就是我们队伍的新名字嗷呜！
E: ...Can't Be Bothered To Make A Name / The Squad Mentioned by the Trailblazer / Hyacine's Royal Guard / Chimera Operation Team / Nameless Army / Custom Team 1! This is our squad's new name, awoo!

C: 别走，我给你涨工资。
E: Don't go. I'll raise your pay.

C: 我能不能也放个假？
E: Can I take some time off too?

C: 得定个目标，嗯…这次就把<color=#dbc291ff>第二名的队伍</color>作为我们的对手吧！
E: Got to set a target, hmm... Let's have the <color=#dbc291ff>second-ranked squad</color> be our opponents this time!

C: 你想办法占据排行榜的首位，坚持由奇美拉担任管理员，认为这样才能提高效率。可是，队伍名次是由小奇美拉的工作量决定的。
E: You keep trying to occupy the top spot on the leaderboard, insisting on a chimera being an administrator, and believing that this is the only way to improve efficiency. But, a squad's rank is determined by the chimeras' work output.

C: 升调表示这支队伍是接下来的对手，降调表示不值一提；发声急促表示赶紧动手，拖长尾音则是慢慢来。就这些。
E: A rising inflection indicates this squad is the next opponent, while a lower inflection means they're not worth mentioning. A hurried sound means to act quickly, while a drawn-out ending means to take it slow. That's all.

C: ——管理员，您辛苦了嗷呜！！！
E: ...Administrator, you've worked hard, awoo!!!

C: 老夫果然没看错人，不过是从记忆中采撷的一隅，竟有传说中那僭主的天舟一般的气派。
E: Indeed, I was not mistaken in my judgment. It is but a mere shard drawn from memory's depths, yet it bears the majesty of an astral vessel, akin to the tyrant's fabled skyship.

C: 瑟希斯的智慧，我亲爱的朋友。
E: It's Cerces's wisdom, my dear friend.

C: …说来话长。
E: It's... complicated.

C: 我会让你的胜利flag全部破灭。
E: Time to break your winning streak.

C: *耳边悄悄话*嘿呀，灰子，你还真够执着的。
E: *whisper* Hey, Gray Mystery, you really don't let up, do you?

C: 多谢，真是多谢大家的支持，我们兄弟…从没想过这次的庆典能举办得这么热闹。
E: Thank you. Thank you all for your incredible support. We... never thought this celebration would be this lively.

C: 一、二、三——
E: One, two, three—

C: 你这浓眉大眼的怎么也叛变了？
E: I can't believe someone like you would switch sides.

C: 白厄阁下，你就忽略掉这些怪话，就当{F#她}{M#他}同意了吧。
E: Lord Phainon, pay the ramblings no mind. Just pretend that {F#she}{M#he} said yes.

C: 一段时间后，密底斯泰歇三兄弟布置好了水上狂欢节的现场，「豹豹碰碰大作战」正式开始了。
E: After some time, the Mythemis Brothers finished setting up the venue for the festival, and the Seal Slammers officially began.

C: 预言…难道说，你是因为预言，才指名要和我组队吗……
E: A prophecy... Is that why you specifically wanted to team up with me?

C: 维护必要的仪式感——原本我打算带大伙享受些咖啡和茶点，但是被一致拒绝了。
E: Maintain a necessary sense of ceremony — I wanted to bring everyone to enjoy some coffee, tea, and pastry, but it was unanimously rejected.

C: 正式发行之后，请务必寄给我一份。
E: When it's officially published, please send a copy to me.

C: 你一如既往的幽默可真令我倍感亲切，我亲爱的朋友。
E: Your humor, as always, is truly comforting, my dear friend.

C: 介绍下游戏内容？
E: Could you tell me about the game?

C: 时间差不多咯…任务完成，打卡，下班！
E: Time's almost up... Job's done. Clocking out!

C: 您真爽快，请随我来！
E: You're quick to the point. Please, follow me!

C: （是吧，就跟她擅自骇入空间站一样，这不太好。）
E: (Exactly. Like when she hacked the space station on a whim. Not cool.)

C: 当然，除了公司那份，家族这边派我跟您打个招呼——我们这边特地为您准备了一些小礼物，像是信用点什么的，还有一些亮晶晶的宝石，希望您会喜欢。
E: Of course, aside from the IPC's share, The Family sent me to pass along a few gifts — credits and some shiny gems. Hope you like them.

C: 让她启动引擎，陪我跑一圈吧。
E: Let her start the engine and take a lap with me.

C: 放心啦，我玩够了就该下了。
E: Don't worry, once I've had my fun, I'll log off.

C: 您的比赛表现真的太精彩了，解说之前都快把嗓子喊哑了！大家都对您的驾驶技巧赞不绝口！
E: Your performance was simply marvelous. The commentator almost blew their voice out with how hard they were cheering! Everyone was praising your driving skills!

C: 来来来，我已经等不及了！
E: Let's go. I'm pumped!

C: 「倒反天罡」。

C: 口感会好一些吗？

C: 看来你更喜欢单打独斗。

C: 于是我上了点手段，虽然他们顶住了七次大规模倾销，但最后还是在公司舰队的火力瞄准下放弃了抵抗。
E: So I pulled some strings. Although they withstood seven massive dumping attempts, they finally gave up resisting when faced with the IPC fleet's aimed firepower.

C: 就知道您是仗义人！

C: 走吧，咱该去丹鼎司了～
E: Alright! Let's push on then to the Alchemy Commission~

E: Competition in entertainment circles is so fierce these days. How are we storytellers supposed to compete with all the razzle-dazzle and hype of something like immersia? There's only one answer: Manufactured outrage!

C: 是不是该写评书第二回了…

E: "With the dragon oil elixir flowing internally and the Vidyadhara high elder's power protecting externally, our hero gripped onto this world-destroying divine blade, Star-Shattering Blade of Truth / Big Sword / Reaper of Nexus Modder / Imaginary Intra-Kinetic Portable Tactical Laser Cannon!"

C: 万代太平！
E: Everlasting peace!

C: 您先等一下…
E: Hold on a second...

E: Just pop a <color=#dbc291ff>thermic core</color> into a lamp, and all the nearby lamps will light up simultaneously — cool, right?

C: 这就是格局。
E: It's about the bigger picture.

C: 哼哼！哼？！

C: 哼哼？哼！哼？

C: 哼哼！哼，哼哼！

C: …对吧？

E: (Try to ram the door open)

E: I would call it: Wasting my life away. Thank you, Master Diviner, for giving me the push I needed. Since you feel that my skills could be put to better use elsewhere, it's time for me to think about making some changes.

C: 世间万物都有结束的那一天。可能兆亿年后，也可能明天下午，可能是因为纳努克的卒子，也可能是虚无的一声哈欠，或者其他什么理由……

C: 这是怎么回事…
E: What's going on...

C: 那我陪你下一局吧。

C: 喂喂，你还好吧？别吓我啊！

C: 我是来踢馆的！
E: I'm here for a fight!

E: You know President Qing? Who on the Luofu doesn't? As for being her close friends... I am certain that a famous person like President Qing has many "close friends" that even she isn't aware of.

C: 像你们这样来闹事的家伙…大爷我可见多了！
E: Troublemakers like you... I've seen many!

C: 放心交给我们吧。
E: Don't worry. We're on it.

C: 是你赶走了凶宅真正的房主。
E: You were the one that chased out the real landlord of that haunted house.

C: 我们老家那边就经常会讲「有时人心比魔鬼更可怕」，你看那岁阳害怕的样子，我才明白这句话应该是真的吧。
E: We have a saying in my homeworld: "Sometimes men's hearts are even darker than demons'." Seeing how scared that heliobus was, I've finally truly understood this phrase.

C: （要不让素裳试试密码？）
E: (Why not get Sushang to give the password a try?)

C: 货架，不动如山，令人安心的沉稳感。

C: 她们两姐妹说话太难懂了，像云骑军里对暗号似的。

C: 你观察得好仔细啊，我压根都没注意到这些细节！

C: 真不愧是十王司判官。

C: 它就是那天逃走的碎片。

C: （该回绥园的镇妖塔了。）

E: Shangshang's right. There's only one of these and it can't be split up. And anyway, this achievement is also impossible without our fanbase supporting us...

C: 我想想，干脆就去星槎海录视频吧？
E: Let me think. Why don't we just shoot over at Starskiff Haven?

C: {NICKNAME}，你来给大家回应两句呗！

C: 嘘，憋住，不许说，剧透的都是小狗。

C: 金色传说，肯定珍贵。

C: 那就测一下吧。

C: 原来如此，我明白了，是我考虑不周——我没想到刚诞生的造物这么快就拥有自主意识。
E: Ah, I see. Insufficient consideration has been given — I didn't expect the new creation to develop sentience so soon.

C: 它竟然能迅速搞清楚自己的需求是什么，这哪怕在空间站里也不常见…呃，抱歉，我不是有意批评空间站的工作人员，他们都是很努力的人类。
E: It's actually capable of quickly figuring out its needs, which is rare even among the entire space station... Um, I'm sorry. I don't mean to criticize the hard-working humans aboard the space station.

C: 它将垃圾吞了下去，随即浑身颤抖了起来，身躯不断变幻……
E: It swallows the trash, then begins to tremble all over as its body starts changing uncontrollably...

C: 我认识你吗？星辰的孑遗、语言的残片、命运散乱的支线、诗篇中唯一的标点。是的，我认识你。

C: …嗯。嗯。多面骰的花色显示，今日最适宜的饮品，当由那边的调饮师亲手制作。
E: ...Hmm. Uh-huh. Yes, the hues of the dice indicate that the finest beverage shall be handcrafted by the drinksmith over there.

C: 表层是黑色？
E: Is the top layer black?

C: 你们…刚才都是装出来的？但…这不是我的梦吗？为什么……

C: 回去吧，你的职责还没有结束。
E: Now, go back. You haven't fulfilled your duty yet.

C: 汪！我也觉得哇！
E: Woof! I agree, too!

C: 「所谓*异常*，对我们而言才是自由。」
E: "To us, *abnormality* means freedom."

C: 放松，听我说…没事了，我们不会伤害你的，别紧张。
E: Relax and listen... It's okay now. We won't hurt you. Just take a breath.

C: 因为名字啊，是最初的牵绊。

C: 记录「忧郁派」的情况。
E: Record information about Melancholy.

C: 给我来个<color=#dbc291ff>超大杯、特别甜、味道特别刺激的饮料，还得有漂亮的分层！</color>要是哪点没达到要求，我都不会付钱！
E: Give me something in an <color=#dbc291ff>extra large glass, very sweet, and tastes super intense. And it's gotta have pretty layers!</color> I'm not paying if any of my criteria are not met!

C: 唉，你问得好，繁华皆是表象，其后的狼藉与痛楚从不为世人所知晓。

C: 过去不断追赶着我，可怖的梦魇始终萦绕着我，尽管找到了这处乐园，我心中的悲伤也从来没有减少分毫。那不是简单几杯饮料就能消除的痛楚，而是……
E: The past continues to haunt me. Even in this paradise, the dreadful nightmare persists, and the sadness within me never fades. It's not something a few drinks can wash away, but...

C: …跟您说这个，是因为人家也藏着不少秘密，犹豫要不要讲出来。
E: ...I'm sharing this with you because I'm also holding onto many secrets, and I'm hesitant to reveal them.

C: 你在酒吧里的地位很高啊？
E: You're a big shot at the lounge, I guess?

C: 确实是我要的味道。作为调饮师的能力，你比我预想得要厉害。

C: （忧郁派喜欢的是……）

C: …你也挺疯的。

C: …汪？你要陪我玩？等等我！
E: ...Woof? You want to play with me? Wait for me!

C: 先来复习一下节奏吧。
E: Let's rehearse the beat first.

E: After the golden trashcan completes its rap, <color=#f29e38ff>press space</color> to perform.

E: Follow the beat of SoulGlad Idol Group's sprays and <color=#f29e38ff>press the button</color> when it's your turn.

C: 你是不是还漏了一个？
E: Have you forgotten someone?

C: 还记得之前给你们打包的隐藏地图作弊代码吗？为了保证星穹列车的诸位不会卡关，我特意在里面加了个小彩蛋。
E: Remember the cheat code for the hidden map I gave you some time back? To ensure that everyone from the Astral Express can clear the stages, I've specially added a small Easter egg within.

C: 啾——被你发现啦，啾啾啾！
E: Tweet! You found me! Tweet tweet!

C: 人多热闹嘛，看着大家这样有活力，我感觉自己的情绪都稍微高涨起来了。
E: The more, the merrier, as they say. Besides, seeing everyone so chipper kind of lifts my spirits too.

C: 咦…原来还有其他人在，这位小姐是？
E: Huh... There are other people here as well. Who are you, miss?

C: 我不知道…我个人不想答应这件事，但我也不知道断然拒绝是不是一件好事……
E: I'm not sure... I personally don't want to agree to it, but I don't know if it's wise to refuse it outright.

C: 这文章也是一系统时内写好的？
E: This article was written within a system hour?

C: 那不是卢卡吗？
E: Isn't that Luka over there?

C: 就是就是！卢卡你怎么不讲武德！
E: Exactly! Luka, why aren't you playing fair!

C: 铄金，我不想和你多说一个字。就让我用拳头来向大家展示——我卢卡究竟是公司走狗，还是一名堂堂正正的格斗家吧！
E: Shuojin, I don't want to waste words with you. Let my fists show everyone — am I, Luka, just an IPC puppet, or am I a true fighter?

C: 快看，那不是卢卡吗？
E: Look, isn't that Luka?

C: 嘿，{NICKNAME}，你在黄金与机械的表现不错，应对鲁珀特的造物也有经验，而我现在又正好缺一个助手，你说这事儿巧不巧？
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}, your performance in Gold and Gears was decent. You are experienced in dealing with Rubert's creations too, and it looks like I'm lacking an assistant. Isn't this just the perfect coincidence?

C: 这房间怎么这么乱啊…
E: Why is it such a mess in here...?

C: 列车长囤积了很多「未来一定用得上」的东西，也是时候断舍离了。
E: The conductor has amassed a mountain of knickknacks over the years, thinking that they'll eventually be useful. We're overdue for some decluttering anyway.

C: 因为一些「生活必需品」，三月七乘客的「列车基金」严重超支了哦。
E: Ahem! May I remind you that your expenses on "lifestyle essentials" have grossly exceeded your Express Fund budget?

C: 我只想问一个问题——睡纸箱子不硌得慌吗？
E: All I want to know now is... Isn't it uncomfortable to sleep on a cardboard box?

C: 稍等，现在还有别的事。
E: Hold on. I've got something else I need to do.

C: 我不太懂这方面的技术，但也许可以给你推荐一些入门教材。期待你学成的那天。
E: I'm not very familiar with this kind of technology, but I can recommend some beginner's materials to you. Looking forward to the day you master it.

C: 依据首字母。
E: By alphabetical order.

C: 每一次冲泡咖啡都能带来全新的口感…很像我们的旅途，不是吗？
E: Each time you brew coffee, it brings a whole new flavor... It's very much like our journey, don't you think?

C: 「闭嘴」的半球形玻璃罩缓缓打开，机械臂将升降台上的「香皂」取出，郑重地放进你的手里。
E: The hemispherical glass dome of "Shush" slowly opens. A robotic arm carefully retrieves the "soap" from the platform and solemnly places it into your hands.

C: 哼哼，帕姆可是列车长～整个列车都是帕姆自己的房间！
E: Hmph, Pom-Pom is the conductor~ The entire train is Pom-Pom's room!

C: …后来，黑潮的威胁愈演愈烈，城墙以里成了唯一安全的地方，这些地方逐渐都被废弃了。
E: ...Then, the black tide raged stronger. The area within the city walls became the only safe place, while all other regions gradually grew deserted.

C: 我们要去倒斗？
E: Are we going to... go grave digging?

C: 埋在地下、规模巨大的建筑群，多半是用来存放贵重物品的地方…就是可能有些防御措施。
E: A massive underground building complex that was likely used as a vault to store valuable items... and safeguarded with defense mechanisms that may be still functioning.

C: 的确。这么说来，用蛮力砸开银行大门也算偷窃的一种…扎格列斯，实在可怕。
E: Indeed. If so, I guess breaking open the entrance to a bank by force could also be viewed as a form of theft... Zagreus is a terrifying Titan indeed.

C: 哦哦哦哦哦哦！
E: Wowwww!

C: 呜嗡…
E: Grumph...

C: {F#它用小巧的前爪搭在你的靴子上，不愿让你离开。}{M#它用小巧的前爪攥住了你的裤脚，不愿松开。}
E: {F#Those tiny front paws have a death grip on your boots, and they're not budging.}{M#Those tiny front paws have a death grip on your clothes, and they're not budging.}

C: 我再想想。
E: I'm having second thoughts.

C: 别这样嘛——不要心急，或许是它太早从蛋里孵出来的缘故吧。
E: Hey now — no need for that. It probably just hatched too early.

C: 其实，我和小伊卡初次相遇时也有些意外——那位贤人说要给我一个惊喜，没想到送来了一只活生生的小马。
E: Actually, when I first met Little Ica, I was completely unprepared. The Sage mentioned a "surprise," but I never expected an actual living, breathing pony!

C: 恩师曾与我聊起过一位天赋异禀的祭司，在他步入敬拜之道前也曾历经此疾，以致他年过半百时，外貌还如少年一般。
E: My teacher once told me about a gifted priest who had suffered from this condition before he embraced the path of Venerationism. Because of it, even in his fifties, he still had the appearance of a young man.

C: 等等，别再回溯啦——
E: Wait, stop rewinding —

C: 大地兽毕竟是吉奥里亚最为独特的造物，领受最多的宠爱也是理所当然的吧——听说「大地的半神」就是大地兽啊！
E: After all, dromases are Georios's most unique creation. So it's only natural these creatures receive the most love. I heard that the demigod of Earth is actually a dromas!

C: 结果到现在一分都没花掉，一定是我的教育方法出了问题。
E: But not a single coin has been used. Clearly, something's off with my parenting style.

C: 旅团实习当日，你对即将出门的小驮兽千叮咛万嘱咐，生怕它到了新的环境被人欺负。
E: On the day of the troupe internship, you gave your little pack beast endless reminders, worried it might get bullied in a new environment.

C: 试想一下，哪怕吉奥里亚打赢了复活赛，它能保证自己学得会欧洛尼斯祷言吗？我家孩子就做到了！
E: Think about it: Even if Georios came back to life, could they guarantee they'd master Oronyx's Prayer? Well, my kid did just that!

C: 对，对吗？
E: D-Does this make any sense?

C: 仿品？哼！你知道它能追到什么年代吗？至少是{RUBY_B#命运圣城}雅努萨波利斯{RUBY_E#}尚在的时候！
E: Replica? Do you know how far back it dates? It's from at least the time when the {RUBY_B#Holy City of Fate}Janusopolis{RUBY_E#} was still standing!

C: 今天没有适合你上手的宝物啦，请明天再来吧。
E: There are no suitable treasures for you to handle today. Please come back tomorrow.

E: What's the story of this treasure?

C: 嘶嘶。怎么还是你，我已经不知道该说什么好了。是直接请求还是走程序？嘶嘶。
E: Zztzzt. Why are you here again? I don't even know what to say anymore. Do you want to beg right away, or go through the standard procedure? Zztzzt.

C: 竟然是…七贤人那刻夏，还有昏光庭院的首席，风堇小姐！

C: 这样就都种上啦。等待一天时间，田地里的作物就会成熟，记得要按时来收获哦。

C: 单论增加客流量，便有低价促销与提升翻台率两种策略可选，对团队的要求也各不相同。顾客增加也会带来更高的管理成本，未必一定是好事。
E: If we're just talking traffic, we've got two approaches: run discounts, or boost table turnover. Each one puts different demands on the team. And more customers means more management pressure, which is not always a good thing.

C: 我亲自上也不是不行…
E: I could do it myself...

E: Aw~ Don't be so stingy, big sis Tribbie~

E: Trianne wants to know whose dish is sweeter!

C: 流言的真相，\n他从来只用背影讲述。
E: The truth of such rumors,\nhe speaks only through his distant silhouette.

C: 无人知晓，\n为何男人的命运，总是被某个数字笼罩。
E: None know why this man's fate,\nIs always overshadowed by a single number decreed.

C: 男人心中无谓对错，\n「狮子拥有自己的史官。」
E: There is no right or wrong in the man's heart.\n"The lion has its own historian."

C:
当然无妨，
男人本就以大敌自居。
肃清前路，是为让同伴有朝一日，
配得上自己的怒意。
E:
It matters little,
For the man always considered himself an enemy to the world.
He paves the road so that one day his peers,
Would match his anger within.

C:
暮色将至，
疲惫的少女们躺倒在麦堆上，
交换着憧憬与美梦：
文学，爱情，横渡大地的旅行。
E:
As dusk approaches,
The exhausted girls collapse over the wheat heaps,
Talking about their longings and dreams:
Of literature, love, and a journey through a world dear.

C: 片翼的蝴蝶凋落窗前，\n捎来忧悒的气息。
E: The broken-winged butterfly falls by the window,\nBringing with it a scent of melancholy.

C: 「玻吕茜亚，不要心急。」\n姐姐俯身在她耳畔轻语，\n她依偎在姐姐肩上啜泣。
E: "Don't worry, Polyxia."\nHer older sister whispers beside her ear,\nAnd on her sister's shoulder, the girl weeps mournfully.

C:
风和日暄时分，
姐姐会带着少女出门远行。
翻弄花田，远眺湖岸。
于花丛中午睡、谈心。
E:
When the days are warm,
The sister would take the girl on long journeys.
Through the flower fields, gazing upon rivers,
Napping amongst the grove, a discussion hearty.

C: 「第一则故事名为：」\n「金苹果？不必给最美之人。」
E: "The first story is titled:"\n"The Golden Apple? It doesn't have to go to the fairest."

C: 他嚎啕着求法吉娜收回祝福， 却迎面碰见一位兜帽少女。 少女忍俊不禁地握握他的手， 「回去看看你的金库， 兴许少了些金币。」 「但你的爱人就在那里。」
E: He howls at Phagousa to retract the blessing But sees a girl in a hood in passing. The girl laughs hilariously, holding his hand in hers. "Go back and check your vault. Some gold may be missing." "But your beloved is right there, waiting."

C: 老妇还不知她编织的白裙，\n早就沾上了狡诈的泥。
E: And the grandmother is unaware,\nThat her hand-made white dress has been stained by the mud of conceit.

C: 只是贼灵的「盗友」总吓唬它——\n「嘿，冥河的鱼正饿肚子哪！」\n
E: It's just that the Spirithief's "companion" was always scaring them—\n"Hey, the fish in the River of Souls are starving, y'know!"\n

C: 「天外之界并不存在，\n粉霞天女又怎会从天外而来？」
E: "There are no worlds beyond the sky,\nSo how can the Rosy Celestial Maiden come from there?"

C: 乐曲自刃间流淌，\n破阵如一尾旗鱼穿洋。
E: The song flowed from betwixt the blades,\nBreaking through formations as a dorsal fin cleaving the waves.

C: 身负满溢的海洋，\n旧日的欢宴，\n在杯底徒作酒花轻漾。
E: The bountiful ocean,\nWith the banquets of bygone days,\nStir as futile bubbles at the bottom of a glass.

C: 「天外的鱼儿们，\n我们将沉入过往。」
E: "To fish from beyond the sky,\nWe shall sink into the past."

C: 「一个花费智慧的学徒，」\n「比藏匿知识的贤者更可贵。」
E: "An apprentice who spends wisdom,"\n"Is more precious than scholars who hide knowledge away."

C: 「逐火是不断失却的旅途。」
E: "Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey."

C: 那双眼染上天空的湛蓝，\n目光凝视着<color=#9e5738>负世的泰坦</color>。
E: His eyes were painted with the azure of the sky,\nGaze fixed on <color=#9e5738>the Titan bearing the world</color>.

C:
对于身后事，
他言之不尽，
直至无话可说，

E: The <color=#f29e38ff>Signal Jammer</color> can be dragged on a Bumper or Push Plate to temporarily stop them from operating. Stopping a Bumper prevents the creations on it from being bounced out, and stopping a Push Plate prevents it from pushing creations off the track.

E: When an ally character triggers a <color=#f29e38ff>Counter</color>, consume <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> "Kinetic Point(s)" to launch a Follow-Up ATK. When the minican is in <color=#f29e38ff>"Ultra Gold"</color> form, the "Kinetic Points" limit increases to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>. The minican's evolution stages are Bronze / Silver / Gold / Ultra Gold. Upon evolving, all allies receive a DMG Boost. When the minican evolves to "Ultra Gold," an "Exit Ultra Gold" countdown appears in the Action Order. At the start of the countdown turn, the minican regresses to its "Gold" form.

C: 还不过瘾，就和他过两招吧！
E: Let's try sparring with this guy!

C: 本姑娘要展现真正的技术了…呃，丹恒你总该相信我了吧！
E: I'm gonna show them what I can really do... Huh? Dan Heng, you better believe in me!

C: 彦卿师父放心，咱不会给你丢人的！
E: Don't worry, Master Yanqing. I won't let you down!

C: 放心，无名客会永远与翁法罗斯站在一起！
E: Don't worry. The Nameless will forever stand with Amphoreus!

C: 做得好，夸夸自己吧~
E: I deserve a nice pat on the back for that one!

C: 看看看看，有没有亮晶晶的？
E: Shiny! Ooh, Sparkly!

C: 丹恒，列车永远是你的后盾。
E: The Express will always have your back, Dan Heng.

C: 保持冷静。
E: Stay calm.

C: 等级拉满了？未来一片光明呀。
E: Maxed out? Time for the endgame.

C: 就是游戏账号名，{NICKNAME}你不也是？
E: It's the same as my screen name. Isn't yours, {NICKNAME}?

C: 什么时候有新玩法？
E: Is it always the same mechanics?

C: 战斗才能取胜。
E: Fight to win.

C: 真碍事。
E: You're in the way.

C: 是啊，如果我不努力工作，就要回去继承家业了……
E: You heard right! If I don't work hard, I'll have to go back and inherit the family fortune... *sigh*

C: 闭着眼睛都能搞定。
E: I can do this in my sleep.

C: 我还挺喜欢做饭的。但在匹诺康尼，烹饪的方式似乎与其他地方不同…呵，看来我没机会展示完整的手艺咯。
E: I actually enjoy cooking. But here in Penacony, the way things are done seems... different. Heh, guess I won't get the chance to show off my all my skills. Pity.

C: 有备无患。
E: This will keep us well-stocked.

C: 他嘛，我就等着老弟什么时候能逮着他。
E: Hah, that guy. One of these days he's gonna get busted by my brother.

C: 奉陪到底。
E: I'm here to the end.

C: 克拉拉的机器伙伴们，虽然有时说话有些粗鲁，但都是不会说谎的乖孩子哦。
E: My robot friends can be rude sometimes, but deep down, they're kind and honest.

C: 目标标本出现，准备采集。
E: Target specimen sighted, preparing for collection.

C: 劳驾，让一让。
E: Excuse me, coming through.

C: 这就是我的极限？哈，怎么可能！
E: That's my limit? Ha, no way!

C: 有次见停云小姐在牌馆前驻足打量，便留她打了一盘。停云小姐人好看，打牌也好看，那天牌桌前人满为患，热情高涨，店主输得落花流水，表演效果拉满。
E: I saw Tingyun stopping in front of the games parlor once, so I invited her to play a round. Tingyun is pretty and her play is entertaining. People crowded around the game table that day and the mood was on fire. The owner lost all his money — it was great to watch.

C: 驭空大人，交涉周旋就交由小女子吧，总能争取些时间。
E: Madam Yukong, allow me to handle the negotiations — I can buy us some time.

C: 再不让开，就要挨揍啦。
E: Let me through, or I'll go through you.

C: 这下…玩脱了……
E: A little... too much fun...

C: 能在「罗浮」听上一段评书，我可算是如了愿了，毕竟「云上五骁」是从这儿出名的。「不夜侯」说书人西衍先生的看家本领，全在这儿啦。
E: To hear a story on the Luofu is like a wish come true! After all, this is where High-Cloud Quintet became famous. All the expertise of Mr. Xiyan, the storyteller at the Sleepless Earl, is in this place.

C: 卜者们凭此阵法鉴往知来。罗浮漂航星海，一日也不可缺了它。只是…我有时候在想，它是否也锁住了我们的前路与众多可能？
E: It is through this Matrix that the diviners view the past and know the future. The Luofu, drifting on the sea of stars, could not be without it for even a day. But... sometimes I wonder if it limits our future possibilities and seals our path ahead?

C: 在宵旰操劳之余，饮一杯龙女特调的药茶——加糖、加糖、再加糖，一饮而尽，精神焕发！刚好弥补了计算所消耗的能量。
E: After a long night's work, I like to drink a cup of the Dragon Lady's specially blended herbal tea. I add sugar, more sugar, and extra sugar! Just one cup and I feel like a new person! It helps recharge all the energy I spend through my calculations.

C: 你去过幽囚狱吗？到处都是漆黑一团，只有冥差身边会悬一盏灯，带来难得的光亮。于我而言，这尘世是幽囚狱，而姐姐是那盏灯。
E: Have you ever been to The Shackling Prison? The whole place is pitch black, except for the light cast by the occasional spiritfarer's lamp. To me, this mortal world is the prison, and my sister is the lamp.

C: 藿藿：看不见我看不见我…\n尾巴：那边的傻瓜，看这看这！
E: Huohuo: They can't see me, they can't see me...\nTail: Hey, knucklehead, look over here!

C: 手痒，总想一刀劈了。
E: My hands are just itching to chop it up.

C: 剑术精进了，再多吃点好吃的！
E: My skills have improved. Time to treat myself to some yummy food!

C: 三月，凑近点，为师再教你几招实战应用。
E: March, stand closer — I'll teach you a few tricks for the battlefield.

C: 老铁，我们上！
E: Old Mettle, let's go!

C: 米沙是个懂事的孩子，我在他这个年纪，还只知道到处咬人呢。
E: Misha is a sensible kid. Me? At his age I was just a little terror, biting everyone in sight.

C: 如果能重来……
E: If I could do it all again...

C: 荣光在上。
E: Glory above all.

C: 生灵…真是奇妙。
E: Life... a true marvel.

C: 普遍的解法而已。
E: A simple solution — that's all it takes.

C: 全部买入！
E: All in!

C: 以益智玩具的标准，还不错。
E: An interesting test of intellect.

C: 唯有记忆永存。
E: Only memories remain eternal.

C: 人们常说食客的口味越刁钻，厨师的技艺才会越精湛。不管别人怎么说，我自己永远会做那个最刁钻的听众。
E: There's a saying — the more demanding the diner, the stronger the skills of the chef... but no matter what others say, I'll always be demanding more from myself.

C: 如果遇上什么问题，不妨与我说说，倾听一直是我的工作。
E: If you encounter any problems, feel free to talk to me. Listening has always been my job.

C: 群星与未来都会在前方闪耀。
E: The stars, and our futures, shine before us.

C: 不是每个人都能欣赏这样的原石——愈原始，愈疯狂，愈美丽…但现在就将其收获，似乎还为时过早。
E: Not everyone can appreciate this kind of gemstone — the more unrefined and unbridled it is, the more beautiful... But it's too early to unearth now.

C: 此时此刻，你那灵光的小脑袋又在想什么？没关系，不用告诉我。
E: What is that clever little head thinking about now? Don't worry, you don't have to tell me.

C: 「纯美骑士团」和「巡海游侠」，什么人才能让咱们联手？
E: "Knights of Beauty" and "Galaxy Rangers," who will let us join forces?

C: 银枪•修罗殿下，令邪祟尝尝我等眼花缭乱的忍•联手吧！
E: Lord Silvergun Shura, let the evil fiendlings taste the power of our Dazzling Ninja Alliance!

C: 每当我快要对你失去兴趣时，你总能整出点新活，不会是故意的吧？还挺懂的。
E: You always manage to pull out something new every time I'm on the verge of losing interest in you. Are you doing that on purpose? Maybe, just maybe, you know what makes me tick.

C: 谁啊？哦，那个喜欢恶作剧的小姑娘。什么时候她懂得大人的游戏了，我应该就能记住她的名字了。
E: Who? Oh, that young lady who loves to prank. I'll remember her name when she finally understands the game that adults play.

C: 洞见未知的瞬间，为它沉迷吧。
E: Glimpse the unknown for a moment, and let it captivate you.

C: 小敌，这回也要速战速决吗…呃，我支持，必须支持！
E: De, are you going for a quick victory this time too? I'll do my best to support!

C: 时间就是金钱，再等下去，余额就会-1-1-1…快欠费喽！
E: Time is money, you know? Wait any longer, and you'll owe me interest~!

C: 以万千金血，她为时代铭刻下属于英雄的印记。虽然我不曾与他们同行，但没有她的牺牲，逐火的伟业恐怕早已中道而亡。
E: With the golden blood of countless beings, she etched the mark of heroes upon the ages. Though I did not walk with them, the great cause of the Flame-Chase would have long died without her sacrifices.

C: 无名客每一次赴汤蹈火，我都将铭记在心。
E: I shall remember every risk that the Nameless took for us.

C: 足以媲美珍珠的光泽。
E: A luster worthy of rivaling any pearl.

C: 这并非终点，而是伟业的基石。
E: This is not the end, merely the cornerstone of a grand endeavor.

C: 救世主，准备好冲锋陷阵了么？
E: Are you ready to charge into battle, Deliverer?

C: 诸位，自行论功领赏吧。
E: Take stock of your deeds... and claim rewards as you see fit.

C: 同为与大海相亲的生灵，她歌唱时总能让我想起鳞渊境的浪涛，但愿翁法罗斯的人们，也能在未来拥有一片同样清澈的大海。
E: As a fellow kin of water, I am always reminded of Scalegorge Waterscape's tides when she sings... I hope the people of Amphoreus may one day find a sea just as clear and pure.

C: 我绝不后退。
E: I won't fall back.

E: Show DMG Statistics

E: Treasure Hunt

E: Name the Culprit

E: A flyer for Paperfold University's anthology series, documenting various scenes of life during the Swarm Disaster.

C: 我也不再害怕从梦中醒来。
E: I won't fear waking up from this dream.

C: 燕麦粥
E: Oatmeal

E: Dux Beast

C: 会有转正机会的吧？
E: There's a chance to be the main star, right?

C: 该回家吃饭了嗷！
E: Time to go home for dinner, awoo!

C: 守护至最后一刻！
E: Defend until the very last moment!

C: 听，有只小猫在哈气呢。
E: Listen... I think I hear a kitten hissing.

E: Current

E: Select Defense Lineup

E: Dangerous

C:
・真理医生将砂金带到戒备森严的朝露公馆，接受星期日的私人审讯。
・星期日拆穿了砂金隐藏基石的诡计，并将他判处死刑，只留下十七个系统时的自由。随后，星期日将礼金袋还给砂金，令他在生命的最后时限内带回真相。
・砂金独自在黄金的时刻进行调查，在此期间，往事不断在他的心间浮现。
・最终，砂金决意制造自己的「死亡」，以此作为公司介入匹诺康尼的机会。
・原来，砂金一开始就敲碎了自己的基石，并将其混入了礼金袋里。他将其重新拼合，解放全部力量，试图引动黄泉拔刀斩杀自己。
・在此期间，托帕也赶到了匹诺康尼。
E:
・ Dr. Ratio brought Aventurine to the heavily guarded Dewlight Pavilion for Sunday's interrogation.
・ Sunday exposed Aventurine's scheme of hiding the Cornerstone and sentenced him to death, leaving him with only seventeen system hours of freedom. Thereafter, Sunday returned the gift bag to Aventurine and ordered him to bring him the truth with what little remained of his life.
・ Aventurine conducted his investigation alone in Golden Hour, while memories of the past kept surfacing in his mind.
・ Finally, Aventurine resolved to stage his own "death" as a chance for the IPC to intervene in Penacony.
・ It turned out that Aventurine had shattered his Cornerstone from the beginning and mixed it into the gift bag. He reassembled it, unleashing all his strength in an attempt to provoke Acheron to strike him down.
・ During this time, Topaz also arrived at Penacony.

C: ・花火伪装成星期日，在筑梦边境杀死知更鸟，并以一副面具提示知更鸟真相。\n・杀死知更鸟后，发现了一位不怀好意的来客——花火试图与对方达成某种交易。\n・伪装成桑博，将开拓者和流萤送入了原始梦境。
E: ・ Disguised as Sunday, Sparkle killed Robin in Dream's Edge, and revealed the truth to Robin with a mask.\n・ After killing Robin, an ill-intentioned visitor was revealed. Sparkle attempted to strike a deal with them.\n・ Disguised as Sampo, she sent the Trailblazer and Firefly into the Primordial Dreamscape.

E: Trailblazer: Mikhail's Past

E: You and Firefly got separated because of "Death." Now, she encountered her other companion...

C: 我方目标每次消耗战技点后，使自身暴击伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>，最多叠加<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>层。

C: 蛀蚀盘根
E: Corroded Weaving Roots

C: 既是裁判，又是选手，这样的安排何来公正可言？
E: How is it fair for someone to simultaneously be the referee and a participant?

C: 使所有可以行动的「旧梦的回声」对指定我方单体造成虚数属性伤害。若没有可以行动的「旧梦的回声」则本技能施放失败。技能施放后，恢复「旧梦的回声」的韧性。
E: Makes all "Echoes of Faded Dreams" that can take action deal Imaginary DMG to a single target. If there are no "Echoes of Faded Dreams" that can take action, then this ability will fail to launch. After using this ability, restore Toughness for "Echoes of Faded Dreams".

C: 对指定我方单体造成少量物理属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Physical DMG to one designated target.

C: 「存护」的巨锤砸向「太一」，三重梦境逐次破碎。你在匹诺康尼大剧院的舞台上醒来，直面与神主日的决战。
E: As the great hammer of "Preservation" struck "Ena," the three layers of dreamscape shattered one by one. You awoke on the stage of the Penacony Grand Theater to face the final showdown with The Great Septimus.

C: 在「梦想之地」，盛会即将开幕。从一开始，你的记忆就出现了「缺失」。那自称艺者、被家族追捕的少女。而你眼中的「初遇」，却是她渴盼已久的「重逢」。
E: In the "Land of the Dreams," a grand event was about to unfold. From the beginning, your memories had been "missing." The girl who called herself an artist, pursued by The Family. What appeared to be a "first encounter" in your eyes was actually a long-awaited "reunion" in hers.

C: 时间会为它增添新叶。
E: Time clothes it in new leaves.

C:
诗人间流传着一则消息：
有学者从遗迹中挖出了一卷羊皮，
上面记录着一行古老咒语。
它可以杀死世间任何人，
只是要先把代价收取。
谋反的野心家念出了它，
希望能如愿咒杀皇帝，
隔日仆从打开房门，
却发现了念咒人的尸体。
街头的乞儿念出了它，
祈求惩罚奴隶主的罪行。
叮铃铃，叮铃铃，
那恶棍几乎转瞬暴毙，
而代价只是碗里的三枚铜币。
「难道这咒语还有分辨是非的魔力？」
听众们大声议论，又摇头叹息。
若是这咒语果真存在，
大地上哪还有这么多不义？
E:
A tale circulates among poets:
A scholar unearthed a scroll of parchment from ruins,
upon which an ancient curse was inscribed.
It could kill anyone in this world,
but first, it would collect its price.
An ambitious rebel recited it,
hoping to curse the emperor to death.
The next day, when servants opened his door,
they found the corpse of the one who spoke the curse.
A beggar on the street recited it,
praying to punish the slave master's crimes.
*tinkle* *tinkle*
That villain dropped dead in an instant,
while the price was just three bronze coins in the bowl.
"Could this curse possess the magical power to judge right from wrong?"
The audience debated loudly, then shook their heads and sighed.
If such a curse truly existed,
why would there still be so much injustice on earth?

C:
「教室不应为学者所独享！」
神悟树庭中，一伙学生突发奇想。
他们偷印讲义，将资料带出课堂。
印不了的，便徒手抄录，免费发放，
惠及贫民、流浪儿、乃至不识字的老妇。
每当幕匿降临，学生与受惠者们便会聚在一起，
探讨今日所学，让知识的枝条肆意生长。
更有胆大的学生，直接将外人带进课堂。
伪装成奇兽、盆栽，乃至窗边的雕像。
一位教授在教室里宣讲，一群人在教室外借光。
对于此等闹剧，教授们颇有默契：
「启蒙愚者，本就是贤人的天职。」
E:
"Classrooms shouldn't be the exclusive domain of scholars!"
In the Grove of Epiphany, a group of students had an ingenious idea.
They secretly printed lecture notes and brought materials outside the classroom.
What couldn't be printed, they copied by hand, distributing them for free,
benefiting the poor, orphans, and even illiterate elderly women.
When dusk fell, students and beneficiaries would gather together,
discussing what they'd learned that day, letting the branches of knowledge grow wild.
Bolder students even smuggled outsiders directly into classes,
disguising them as strange beasts, potted plants, or even statues by the window.
While professors lectured inside, crowds learned by proxy outside.
To such shenanigans, the professors had a tacit agreement:
"Enlightening the foolish is, after all, a Sage's sacred duty."

C:
有人守卫门，有人则要成为门扉本身。
当纷争的军队踏破雅努斯之门，用火焰将神殿烧尽时，
亚克托不在那里。
作为勇士，他没能保卫同僚；作为祭司，他没能制止亵渎。
但作为败者，他仍有机会复仇。
当圣城联军前去征讨纷争时，他主动加入。
借由雅努斯之斧，他以己身洞开百界门，供复仇的军队穿行。
千里路程转瞬跨越，将士们如神兵下凡、阵斩敌将。
而亚克托之门则始终挺立在原地，任人们踩过它的门槛。
直到又一场纷争将它毁灭。
E:
Some guard the gates, while others become the gates themselves.
When the armies of Strife trampled through the gates of Janus, burning the temple to ashes,
Yactor wasn't there.
As a warrior, he failed to protect his comrades. As a priest, he failed to stop the sacrilege.
Yet as the defeated, he still had a chance for revenge.
When the holy city's allied forces set out to quell the Strife, he volunteered to join.
With the Axe of Janus, he cleaved open the Century Gate using his own being as the keystone, forging a passage for the army of vengeance.
Covering a thousand miles in a flash, the warriors descended like a divine strike, cutting down the enemy host.
The Gate of Yactor stood fast, enduring the passage of all who crossed its threshold,
until another strife swept it into ruin.
